Numbers14:1 Na ũmbano w’onthe wookĩlya wasya woo
Numbers14:2 Na ana onthe ma Isilaeli mamanyungunyĩĩsya Mose na Aluni: na ũmbano w’onthe wamea
Numbers14:3 Na nũndũ wa kĩ Yeova watũetie nthĩ ĩno
Numbers14:4 Na maneenan’ya
Numbers14:5 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Mose na Aluni mavalũkile na mothyũ moo mbee wa ũmbano w’onthe ũla wũmbanĩte wa ana ma Isilaeli.
Numbers14:6 Na Yosua mwana wa Nuni na Kalevu mwana wa Yevune
Numbers14:7 na maneena na ũmbano w’onthe wa ana ma Isilaeli
Numbers14:8 Ethĩwa Yeova nĩwendeeaw’a nĩ ithyĩ
Numbers14:9 Ĩndĩ mũtikamũng’endee Yeova
Numbers14:10 Ĩndĩ ũmbano w’onthe wasya makimangwe na mavia. Na ũtheu mũtisu wa Yeova wamaumĩlĩla ana onthe ma Isilaeli ĩeemanĩ ya kũmbanĩa.
Numbers14:11 Na Yeova amwĩa Mose
Numbers14:12 Ngamakũna na mũimũ
Numbers14:13 Na Mose amwĩa Yeova
Numbers14:14 nao makatavya andũ ala matwĩe nthĩ ĩno. Nĩmwew’ĩte kana we Yeova wĩ katĩ wa andũ aa; nũndũ we Yeova nĩwonawa ũthyũ kwa ũthyũ
Numbers14:15 Na yu ethĩwa ũkooaa andũ aa o ta kũaa mũndũ ũmwe
Numbers14:16 Nĩkwĩthĩwa Yeova ndaatonya kũtwaa andũ aa nthĩ ĩla wameavĩe
Numbers14:17 Na yu
Numbers14:18 Yeova ndathataa na mĩtũkĩ
Numbers14:19 Ekea
Numbers14:20 Na Yeova amwĩa
Numbers14:21 ĩndĩ nĩ w’o
Numbers14:22 nĩkwĩthĩwa andũ asu onthe ala moonie ũnene wakwa
Numbers14:23 vate ndĩi matikona nthĩ ĩla nameavĩe aaĩthe moo
Numbers14:24 ĩndĩ mũthũkũmi wakwa Kalevu
Numbers14:25 Na ĩndĩ Mũamaleki na Mũkanaani matũaa mwandanĩ: ũnĩ ĩthyũũei na mũithi weũnĩ na nzĩa ĩelete Ũkanganĩ Mũtene.
Numbers14:26 Na Yeova aneena na Mose na Aluni
Numbers14:27 Ngoomĩĩsya ũmbano ũũ mũthũku ũla ũnyungunyĩĩasya ĩvinda yĩana ata? Nĩneewie monyungunyĩsyo ma ana ma Isilaeli ala manyungunyĩĩasya.
Numbers14:28 Matavyei
Numbers14:29 simba syenyu ikavalũka weũnĩ ũũ; na inyw’onthe ala mũtalilwe
Numbers14:30 nĩ w’o mũtikalika nthĩ ĩsu
Numbers14:31 Ĩndĩ syana syenyu nini
Numbers14:32 Ĩndĩ ũndũ wenyu
Numbers14:33 Na syana syenyu ikeethĩwa angangi weũnĩ myaka mĩongo ĩna
Numbers14:34 O ta ũtalo wa mĩthenya ĩla mũnathianie nthĩ
Numbers14:35 Nyie
Numbers14:36 Na andũ
Numbers14:37 o andũ asu ala maetie ũvoo mũthũku wa nthĩ
Numbers14:38 Ĩndĩ Yosua mwana wa Nuni
Numbers14:39 Na Mose atavya ana onthe ma Isilaeli ndeto isu: na andũ maĩa mũno.
Numbers14:40 Na mookĩla kĩoko tene
Numbers14:41 Na Mose amea
Numbers14:42 Mũtikambate
Numbers14:43 Nũndũ Mũamaleki na Mũkanaani me vo mbee wenyu
Numbers14:44 Ĩndĩ maema na mambata mũtumbĩnĩ wa kĩĩma: ĩndĩ ĩsandũkũ ya ũtianĩo ya Yeova yĩtyaauma mwakonĩ wa maeema
Numbers14:45 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Mũamaleki na Mũkanaani ala matwĩe kĩĩmanĩ kyu matheeie
Numbers15:1 Na Yeova aneena na Mose
Numbers15:2 Neena na ana ma Isilaeli
Numbers15:3 na mũkenda kũmũthembea Yeova nthembo ĩvĩvaw’a na mwaki
Numbers15:4 nĩvo ĩndĩ ũla ũetae nthembo yake ũkamũthembea Yeova nthembo ya mũtu ya kĩlungu kya ĩkũmi kya eva ya mũtu mũvinyu ũvulanĩtw’e na kĩlungu kya kana kya ini ya mauta:
Numbers15:5 na kwondũ wa kĩla katena ka ĩlondu ũkaseũvye mbinyu yĩthĩwe nthembo ya kũnyuwa
Numbers15:6 Kana kwondũ wa ndũũme
Numbers15:7 na ũndũ wa nthembo ya kũnyuwa ũkathembe kĩlungu kya katatũ kya ini ya mbinyu
Numbers15:8 Na yĩla wĩseũvya kasalũ ka mũew’a kethĩwe nthembo ya kũvĩvw’a
Numbers15:9 nĩvo ĩndĩ wĩthembanĩsya na kala kasalũ nthembo ya mũtu ya ilungu itatũ sya ĩkũmi sya eva ya mũtu mũvinyu ũvulanĩtw’e na nyunzu ya ini ya mauta:
Numbers15:10 na ũkathembe ũndũ wa nthembo ya kũnyuwa nyunzu ya ini ya mbinyu
Numbers15:11 Ũu nĩw’o wĩĩkwa kwondũ wa kĩla kasalũ ka mũew’a
Numbers15:12 Kwĩanana na ũndũ syĩana ila mũkaseũvya
Numbers15:13 Onthe ala masyaawa kwenyu makeke maũndũ asu kwĩanana na ũu
Numbers15:14 Na ethĩwa mũeni ekalaa ũeni kwenyu
Numbers15:15 Nthĩnĩ wa ũmbano kũkeethĩwa mwamũlo ũmwe kwondũ wenyu
Numbers15:16 Kũkeethĩwa mwĩao ũmwe na ũtw’ĩo umwe kwondũ wenyu na kwondũ wa mũeni ũla wĩkalaa ũeni kwenyu.
Numbers15:17 Na Yeova aneena na Mose
Numbers15:18 Neena na ana ma Isilaeli
Numbers15:19 nĩvo ĩndĩ kwĩĩthĩwa
Numbers15:20 Mũkathembe kamũtũ kamwe kethĩwe nthembo ya kũkĩlw’a kuma mũtunĩ wenyu wa mbee; o tondũ mwĩkaa na nthembo ya kũkĩlw’a ya kĩvũĩonĩ
Numbers15:21 Mũkanenge Yeova nthembo ya kukĩlw’a ya mũtu wenyu wa mbee mosyaanĩonĩ menyu onthe.
Numbers15:22 Na yĩla mũkavĩtya
Numbers15:23 o maũndũ onthe ala Yeova wamwĩaĩe na kanyw’a wa Mose
Numbers15:24 nĩvo ĩndĩ kũkethĩwa
Numbers15:25 Na mũthembi akathemba nthembo ya wĩw’anĩthyo kwondũ wa ũmbano w’onthe wa ana ma Isilaeli
Numbers15:26 na ũmbano w’onthe wa ana ma Isilaeli ũkaekewa
Numbers15:27 Na ethĩwa mũndũ ũmwe akavĩtya ateũmanya
Numbers15:28 Na mũthembi akathemba nthembo ya wĩw’anĩthyo kwondũ wa mũndũ ũla ũnũũvĩtya
Numbers15:29 Mũkeethĩwa na mwĩao ũmwe ũndũ wa ũla wĩkaa ũndũ o na wĩva ateũmanya
Numbers15:30 Ĩndĩ mũndũ ũla wĩkaa ũndũ na ngũlũ
Numbers15:31 Nĩkwĩthĩwa nũvũthĩtye ndeto ya Yeova
Numbers15:32 Na yĩla ana ma Isilaeli maĩ weũnĩ
Numbers15:33 Na ala mamwonie aikolan’ya ngũ mamũtwaa vala ve Mose na Aluni
Numbers15:34 Na mamwĩkĩa ũsũvĩonĩ
Numbers15:35 Na Yeova amwĩa Mose
Numbers15:36 Na ũmbano w’onthe wamũtwaa ũtee wa mwako wa maeema
Numbers15:37 Na Yeova aneena na Mose
Numbers15:38 Neena na ana ma Isilaeli
Numbers15:39 naw’o ũkeethĩwa kwenyu manyenze
Numbers15:40 nĩ kana mũlilikanae na kwĩkaa mĩao yakwa yonthe
Numbers15:41 Ninyie Yeova Ngai wenyu
Numbers16:1 Na ĩndĩ Kola
Numbers16:2 na mookĩla mathi vala ve Mose
Numbers16:3 na mamombanĩa Mose na Aluni
Numbers16:4 Na Mose eew’a ũu
Numbers16:5 na aneena na Kola na nguthu yake yonthe
Numbers16:6 Ĩkai ũũ: we Kola
Numbers16:7 nokĩkĩa mwaki nthĩnĩ wasyo
Numbers16:8 Na Mose amwĩa Kola
Numbers16:9 nĩmũkwona nĩ ũndũ ũnini kana Ngai wa Isilaeli nũmũvathĩte inyw’ĩ kũmumya ũmbanonĩ wa Isilaeli
Numbers16:10 na ĩngĩ kana akũete vakuvĩ
Numbers16:11 Kwondũ wa ũu we na nguthu yaku yonthe nĩmũmũmbanĩe Yeova: na Aluni
Numbers16:12 Na Mose atũmana Ndathani na Avilamu
Numbers16:13 nĩ ũndũ ũnini atĩ nĩwatumisye nthĩ yusũĩte ĩia na ũkĩ wa nzũkĩ
Numbers16:14 O na mbee wa ũu ndwaatũtwaa nthĩ yusũĩte ĩia na ũkĩ wa nzũkĩ
Numbers16:15 Na Mose athilĩka
Numbers16:16 Na Mose amwĩa Kola
Numbers16:17 na kĩla mũndũ wenyu natwae kĩtoeesya kyake
Numbers16:18 Na kĩla mũndũ oosa kĩtoeesya kyake
Numbers16:19 Na Kola oombanĩsya ũmbano w’onthe mũomonĩ wa ĩeema ya kũmbanĩa: na ũtheu mũtisu wa Yeova waumĩlĩla ũmbano w’onthe.
Numbers16:20 Na Yeova aneena na Mose na Aluni
Numbers16:21 Ĩvathei inyw’ĩ mume ũmbanonĩ ũũ
Numbers16:22 Na mavalũka na mothyũ moo
Numbers16:23 Na Yeova aneena na Mose
Numbers16:24 Neena na ũmbano
Numbers16:25 Na Mose ookĩla na amaendea Ndathani na Avilamu; na atumĩa ma Isilaeli maatĩanĩa nake.
Numbers16:26 Nake aneena na ũmbano
Numbers16:27 Kwondũ wa ũu mookĩla kuma vakuvĩ na wĩkalo wa Kola
Numbers16:28 Na Mose amea
Numbers16:29 Ethĩwa andũ aa nĩmeũkw’a kĩkw’ũ kĩla kĩkusawa nĩ andũ onthe
Numbers16:30 Ĩndĩ ethĩwa Yeova akeeka ũndũ weũ
Numbers16:31 Na kweethĩwa
Numbers16:32 na nthĩ yaathamya kanyw’a wayo
Numbers16:33 Kwondũ wa ũu mo
Numbers16:34 Na Isilaeli onthe ala mamathyũlũlũkĩte makĩa ũndũ wa kũkaya kwoo; nũndũ masya
Numbers16:35 Na mwaki wauma kwa Yeova
Numbers16:36 Na Yeova aneena na Mose
Numbers16:37 Neena na Eleasali mwana wa mũthembi
Numbers16:38 o itoeesya isu sya andũ asu athe ala mavĩtĩsye mathayũ moo ene
Numbers16:39 Na mũthembi Eleasali oosa itoeesya isu sya ũthuku
Numbers16:40 syĩthĩwe syĩ ũlilikan’yo kwa ana ma Isilaeli
Numbers16:41 Ĩndĩ ũnĩ ũsu ũmbano w’onthe wa ana ma Isilaeli mamanyungunyĩĩsya Mose na Aluni
Numbers16:42 Na kweethĩwa
Numbers16:43 Na Mose na Aluni maenda ngalĩ ya mbee ya ĩeema ya kũmbanĩa
Numbers16:44 Na Yeova aneena na Mose
Numbers16:45 Ũkĩlai mume ũmbanonĩ ũũ
Numbers16:46 Na Mose amwĩa Aluni
Numbers16:47 Na Aluni oosa o tondũ Mose waneenie
Numbers16:48 Na aũngama katĩ wa ala akw’ũ na ala maĩ thayũ; na mũimũ ũsu wasiĩĩwa.
Numbers16:49 Na ĩndĩ ala makwie nĩ ũ mũimũ maĩ ngili ĩkũmi na inya na maana mũonza
Numbers16:50 Na Aluni asyoka vala ve Mose mũomonĩ wa ĩeema ya kũmbanĩa: na mũimũ wasiĩĩwa.

Numbers17:2 Neena na ana ma Isilaeli

Numbers18:9 Syĩndũ ii nĩsyo ikeethĩwa syaku nthĩnĩ wa syĩndũ ntheu mũno mbee
Numbers18:10 Ũkaya syĩndũ ntheu mũno mbee; kĩla mũndũ mũũme akaiya: ikeethĩwa syĩ ntheu kwaku.

Numbers18:13 Mosyao ma mbee meũ ma kĩla kĩndũ kĩ nthĩ yoo
Numbers18:14 Kĩla kĩndũ kĩvathĩtwe kĩthĩwe kĩtheu nthĩnĩ wa Isilaeli kĩkeethĩwa kyaku.
Numbers18:15 Kyonthe kĩla kyambaa kuma ĩvunĩ ya nyinyia kya mĩĩ yonthe

Numbers19:1 Na Yeova aneena na Mose na Aluni
Numbers19:2 Ũũ nĩw’o mwamũlo wa mĩao ĩla Yeova weaie
Numbers19:3 Na mũkamĩnenge mũthembi Eleasali
Numbers19:4 na mũthembi Eleasali akose nthakame yayo na kyaa kyake
Numbers19:5 Na mũndũ ũmwe akavĩvye moi ĩsu Eleasali asyaĩtye; kĩthuma kyayo
Numbers19:6 na mũthembi akose mũtĩ wa mũkũũ
Numbers19:7 Nĩvo ĩndĩ mũthembi wĩthambya ngũa syake
Numbers19:8 Na ũla wĩmĩvĩvya akathambye ngũa syake manzĩnĩ
Numbers19:9 Na mũndũ ũla mũtheu akoke mũu wa ila moi
Numbers19:10 Na ũla wĩoka mũu wa moi ĩsu akathambye ngũa syake
Numbers19:11 Ũla ũkakiita kimba kya mũndũ o na wĩva akeethĩwa e mũvuku matukũ mũonza:
Numbers19:12 ũsu akethesya namo mũthenya wa katatũ
Numbers19:13 O ũla ũkakiita kimba
Numbers19:14 Ũũ nĩw’o mwĩao yĩla mũndũ ũkakw’ĩa ĩeemanĩ: kĩla mũndũ ũla wĩlika ĩeemanĩ
Numbers19:15 Na kĩla kĩndũ kĩkunũe
Numbers19:16 Na mũndũ o na wĩva ũla wĩ weũnĩ ũla ũkakiita ũla woaiwe na ũvyũ
Numbers19:17 Na kwondũ wa ũla wĩ mũvuku makose mũu ũsu wa kũvĩvw’a kwa ĩla nthembo kwondũ wa naĩ; na manzĩ ala mavĩtĩte makavulanw’a naw’o ĩsaaninĩ:
Numbers19:18 na mũndũ ũte mũvuku akose mũtĩ wa ĩsovo
Numbers19:19 na mũndũ mũtheu akamũminzangĩĩsye ũsu mũvuku mũthenya wa katatũ
Numbers19:20 Ĩndĩ mũndũ ũla ũkethĩwa e mũvuku na akalea kwĩthesya
Numbers19:21 Naw’o ũkeethĩwa mwamũlo wa tene na tene kwoo: na ũla ũkaminzanĩsya manzĩ ma kũthesya ũvuku akathambye ngũa syake; na ũla ũkakiita manzĩ ma kũthesya ũvuku akeethĩwa e mũvuku kũvika wĩoo.
Numbers19:22 Na kĩndũ o na kĩva kĩla mũndũ ũla wĩ mũvuku ũkakiita kĩkeethĩwa kĩvuku; na mũndũ ũla ũkakĩtiita akeethĩwa e mũvuku kũvika wĩoo.

Numbers25:13 na ũkeethĩwa kwake
Numbers25:14 Na ĩndĩ syĩtwa ya mũndũ wa Isilaeli ũla woaiwe
Numbers25:15 Na syĩtwa ya mũndũ mũka Mũmitiani ũla woaiwe eetawa Kosivi
Numbers25:16 Na Yeova aneena na Mose
Numbers25:17 Mathĩn’ye Amitiani
Numbers25:18 nũndũ nĩmeũmũthĩn’ya na moseleke moo
Numbers26:1 Na kweethĩwa ĩtina wa mũimũ ũsu
Numbers26:2 Talai ũmbano w’onthe wa ana ma Isilaeli
Numbers26:3 Na Mose na mũthembi Eleasali maneenea nao ndiĩnĩ sya Moavi vakuvĩ na Yolotani ku Yeliko
Numbers26:4 Talai andũ onthe ala mavikĩtye myaka mĩongo ĩlĩ na mbee; o tondũ Yeova wamwĩaĩe Mose na ana ma Isilaeli
Numbers26:5 Leuveni
Numbers26:6 ma Esiloni
Numbers26:7 Ĩsu nĩyo mĩvĩa ya Aleuveni; na ala matalilwe moo maĩ ngili mĩongo ĩna na itatũ na maana mũonza na mĩongo ĩtatũ.
Numbers26:8 Na ana ma Valu: o Eliavu.
Numbers26:9 Na ana ma Eliavu: Nemueli
Numbers26:10 na nthĩ yaathamya kanyw’a wayo
Numbers26:11 Ĩndĩ ana ma Kola matyaakw’a.
Numbers26:12 Ana ma Simeoni kũatĩĩa mĩvĩa yoo nĩ aa: ma Nemueli
Numbers26:13 ma Nzela
Numbers26:14 Ĩsu nĩyo mĩvĩa ya Asimeoni
Numbers26:15 Ana ma Ngati kũatĩĩa mĩvĩa yoo nĩ aa: ma Nzevoni
Numbers26:16 ma Osini
Numbers26:17 ma Aloti
Numbers26:18 Ĩsu nĩyo mĩvĩa ya ana ma Ngati kwĩanana na ala matalilwe moo
Numbers26:19 Ana ma Yuta nĩ aa: Eeli na Onani; na Eeli na Onani nĩmakw’ĩĩe nthĩ ya Kanaani.
Numbers26:20 Na ana ma Yuta kũatĩĩa mĩvĩa yoo nĩ aa: ma Siela
Numbers26:21 Na ana ma Velesi nĩ aa: ma Esiloni
Numbers26:22 Ĩsu nĩyo mĩvĩa ya Yuta kwĩanana na ala matalilwe moo
Numbers26:23 Ana ma Isakali kũatĩĩa mĩvĩa yoo nĩ aa: ma Tola
Numbers26:24 ma Yasuvu
Numbers26:25 Ĩsu nĩyo mĩvĩa ya Isakali kwĩanana na ala matalilwe moo
Numbers26:26 Ana ma Nzevuluni kũatĩĩa mĩvĩa yoo ni aa: ma Seletu
Numbers26:27 Ĩsu nĩyo mĩvĩa ya Anzevuluni kwĩanana na ala matalilwe moo
Numbers26:28 Ana ma Yosevu kũatĩĩa mĩvĩa yoo nĩ aa: Manase na Evalaimu.
Numbers26:29 Ana ma Manase nĩ aa: ma Makili
Numbers26:30 Aa nĩo ana ma Ngileati: ma Ieseli
Numbers26:31 na ma Asilieli
Numbers26:32 na ma Semita
Numbers26:33 Na Nzeloveati mwana wa Eevieli ndaĩ na ana aũme
Numbers26:34 Ĩsu nĩyo mĩvĩa ya Manase; na ala matalilwe moo maĩ ngili mĩongo ĩtano na ilĩ na maana mũonza.
Numbers26:35 Aa nĩo ana ma Evalaimu kũatĩĩa mĩvĩa yoo: ma Suthela
Numbers26:36 Na aa nĩo ana ma Suthela: ma Elani
Numbers26:37 Ĩsu nĩyo mĩvĩa ya ana ma Evalaimu kwĩanana na ala matalilwe moo
Numbers26:38 Ana ma Mbenyamini kũatĩĩa mĩvĩa yoo nĩ aa: ma Mbela
Numbers26:39 ma Suvamu
Numbers26:40 Na ana ma Mbela nĩ Aliti na Naamani: ma Aliti
Numbers26:41 Asu nĩ ana ma Mbenyamini kũatĩĩa mĩvĩa yoo; na ala matalilwe moo maĩ ngili mĩongo ĩna na itano na maana thanthatũ.
Numbers26:42 Aa nĩo ana ma Ndani kũatĩĩa mĩvĩa yoo: ma Suamu
Numbers26:43 Mĩvĩa yonthe ya Asuamu
Numbers26:44 Ana ma Aseli kũatĩĩa mĩvĩa yoo nĩ aa: ma Imina
Numbers26:45 Ma ana ma Mbelia nĩ aa: ma Eeveli
Numbers26:46 Na syĩtwa ya mwĩĩtu wa Aseli eetawa Selaa.
Numbers26:47 Ĩsu nĩyo mĩvĩa ya ana ma Aseli kwĩanana na ala matalilwe moo
Numbers26:48 Ana ma Navitali kũatĩĩa mĩvĩa yoo nĩ aa: ma Yaseeli
Numbers26:49 ma Yeseli
Numbers26:50 Ĩsu nĩyo mĩvĩa ya Navitali kwĩanana na mĩvĩa yoo; na ala matalilwe moo maĩ ngili mĩongo ĩna na itano na maana ana.
Numbers26:51 Asu nĩo ala matalilwe ma ana ma Isilaeli
Numbers26:52 Na Yeova aneena na Mose
Numbers26:53 Andũ asu makaaanw’a nthĩ ĩno yĩthĩwe ũtiĩwa woo kwĩanana na ũtalo wa masyĩtwa moo.
Numbers26:54 Ala aingĩ ũkamanenge ũtiĩwa mwingĩ
Numbers26:55 Ĩndĩ nthĩ ĩkaaanw’a kwa kũlimana: kwĩanana na masyĩtwa ma mbaĩ sya aaĩthe moo makoosa ũtiĩwa woo.
Numbers26:56 O ũndũ kũlimana kũilyĩ nĩw’o ũtiĩwa woo ũkaaanw’a katĩ wa ala aingĩ na ala anini.
Numbers26:57 Na aa nĩo ala matalilwe ma Alivai kũatĩĩa mĩvĩa yoo; ma Ngelisoni
Numbers26:58 Ĩno nĩyo mĩvĩa ya Livai: mũvĩa wa Alivini
Numbers26:59 Na syĩtwa ya mũka wa Amilamu eetawa Yokeveti
Numbers26:60 Na Aluni asyaa Natavu na Aviu na Eleasali na Ithamali.
Numbers26:61 Na Natavu na Aviu makw’a
Numbers26:62 Na ala matalilwe moo maĩ ngili mĩongo ĩlĩ na itatũ
Numbers26:63 Asu nĩo ala matalilwe nĩ Mose na mũthembi Eleasali
Numbers26:64 Ĩndĩ andũnĩ asu kũtyaĩ mũndũ ũmwe woo ũla watalilwe nĩ Mose na mũthembi Aluni
Numbers26:65 Nũndũ Yeova nĩwaĩtye ũndũ woo
Numbers27:1 Nĩvo ĩndĩ eĩtu mookie ma Nzeloveati
Numbers27:2 Na maũngama mbee wa Mose
Numbers27:3 Ĩthe waitũ nĩwakw’ĩĩe weũnĩ
Numbers27:4 Syĩtwa ya ĩthe waitũ yaĩlwe kũvetwa mũvĩanĩ wake nĩkĩ
Numbers27:5 Na Mose amũtwaĩa Yeova ũvoo woo.
Numbers27:6 Na Yeova aneena na Mose
Numbers27:7 Eĩtu ma Nzeloveati nĩmeũneena w’o: ndũtĩa ũmanenga kĩlungu kya ũtiĩwa katĩ wa ana‐a‐ĩthe ma ĩthe woo; na nue wĩtuma mosa ũtiĩwa wa ĩthe woo.
Numbers27:8 Na ũkaneene na ana ma Isilaeli
Numbers27:9 Na ethĩwa nde na mwĩĩtu
Numbers27:10 Na ethĩwa nde na ana‐a‐ĩthe
Numbers27:11 Na ethĩwa nde na endw’a‐ĩthe

Numbers27:13 Na wamyona
Numbers27:14 nũndũ nĩmwang’endeie ndeto yakwa weũnĩ wa Nzini

Numbers27:16 Yeova
Numbers27:17 ũla ũtonya kumaalaa mene
Numbers27:18 Na Yeova amwĩa Mose

Numbers27:20 Na ũkamũolela ndaĩa yaku
Numbers27:21 Nake akaũngama mbee wa mũthembi Eleasali
Numbers27:22 Na Mose eeka o tondũ Yeova wamwĩaĩe; na amwosa Yosua
Numbers27:23 na amwilĩĩla moko make
Numbers28:1 Na Yeova aneena na Mose
Numbers28:2 Ĩaĩe ana ma Isilaeli
Numbers28:3 Na ũkamea
Numbers28:4 Katũlũme kamwe ũkathembe kĩoko
Numbers28:5 vamwe na kĩlungu kya ĩkũmi kya eva ya mũtu mũvinyu wĩthĩwe nthembo ya mũtu
Numbers28:6 Nĩ nthembo ya kũvĩvw’a ĩtatw’ĩkanaa
Numbers28:7 Na nthembo ya kũnyuwa ya kũthembanĩsya nayo ĩkeethĩwa kĩlungu kya kana kya ini kwondũ wa katũlũme kamwe: nthĩnĩ wa vala vandũ vatheu ũkamwĩtĩe Yeova nthembo ya kũnyuwa ya mbinyu mbĩu.
Numbers28:8 Na katũlũme kala kangĩ ũkathembe wĩoo: o tondũ nthembo ya mũtu ya kĩoko
Numbers28:9 Na mũthenya wa savato ũkathembe tũtũlũme twĩlĩ twa mwaka ũmwe tũte kĩema
Numbers28:10 ĩsu nĩyo nthembo ya kũvĩvw’a ya kĩla savato
Numbers28:11 Na myambĩlĩlyo ya myei yenyu mũkathembee Yeova nthembo ya kũvĩvw’a: tũsalũ twĩlĩ
Numbers28:12 na ilungu itatũ sya ĩkũmi sya eva ya mũtu mũvinyu ũvulanĩtw’e na mauta
Numbers28:13 na kĩlungu kya ĩkũmi kya mũtu mũvinyu ũvulanĩtw’e na mauta
Numbers28:14 Na nthembo sya kũnyuwa sya kũthembanĩsya nasyo ikeethĩwa nyunzu ya ini ya mbinyu kwondũ wa kĩla kasalũ
Numbers28:15 Na nthenge ĩmwe ĩkathembewe. Yeova yĩthĩwe nthembo kwondũ wa naĩ; nayo ĩkathembwa vamwe na nthembo ya kũvĩvw’a ĩtatw’ĩkanaa
Numbers28:16 Na mwei wa mbee
Numbers28:17 Na mũthenya wa ĩkũmi na ĩtano wa mwei ũsu ũkeethĩwa wa mboka: kĩmũtũ kĩte ĩlawa kĩkaĩwe mĩthenya mũonza.
Numbers28:18 Mũthenya wa mbee kũkeethĩwa ũmbano mũtheu: mũikatethye wĩa o na wĩva w’onthe;
Numbers28:19 ĩndĩ mũkathembe nthembo ĩvĩvaw’a na mwaki
Numbers28:20 na nthembo ya mũtu ya kũthembanĩsya nasyo
Numbers28:21 kĩlungu kya ĩkũmi ũkathembe kwondũ wa kĩla katũlũme ka tũla tũtũlũme mũonza;
Numbers28:22 na nthenge ĩmwe yĩthĩwe nthembo kwondũ wa naĩ
Numbers28:23 Mũkathembe isu o vamwe na nthembo ya kũvĩvw’a ya kĩoko
Numbers28:24 Ũu nĩw’o mwĩthemba kĩla mũthenya
Numbers28:25 Na mũthenya wa mũonza mũkeethĩwa na ũmbano mũtheu; mũtikatethye wĩa o na wĩva w’onthe.
Numbers28:26 Na ĩngĩ mũthenya wa mosyao ma mbee
Numbers28:27 ĩndĩ mũkathembe nthembo ya kũvĩvw’a yĩthĩwe yĩ mũuke mũseo kwa Yeova: tũsalũ twĩlĩ
Numbers28:28 na nthembo ya mũtu ya kũthembanĩsya nasyo
Numbers28:29 na kĩlungu kya ĩkũmi kwondũ wa kĩla katũlũme ka tũla tũtũlũme mũonza;
Numbers28:30 na nthenge ĩmwe yĩthĩwe nthembo ya kwĩw’anĩthw’a kwenyu.
Numbers28:31 O vamwe na nthembo ya kũvĩvw’a ĩtatw’ĩkanaa
Numbers29:1 Na mwei wa mũonza
Numbers29:2 Na mũkathembe nthembo ya kũvĩvw’a yĩthĩwe yĩ mũuke mũseo kwa Yeova: kasalũ kamwe
Numbers29:3 na nthembo ya mũtu ya kũthembanĩsya nasyo
Numbers29:4 na kĩlungu kĩmwe kya ĩkũmi kwondũ wa kĩla katũlũme ka tũla tũtũlũme mũonza;
Numbers29:5 na nthenge ĩmwe yĩthĩwe nthembo kwondũ wa naĩ
Numbers29:6 o vamwe na nthembo ya kũvĩvw’a ya mũtiso wa mwei
Numbers29:7 Na mũthenya wa ĩkũmi wa mwei ũsu wa mũonza mũkeethĩwa na ũmbano mũtheu; na mwĩĩthĩn’ye ngoo syenyu: mũtikatethye wĩa o na wĩva;
Numbers29:8 ĩndĩ mũkamũthembee Yeova nthembo ya kũvĩvw’a yĩthĩwe yĩ mũuke mũseo: kasalũ kamwe
Numbers29:9 na nthembo ya mũtu ya kũthembanĩsya nasyo
Numbers29:10 na kĩlungu kya ĩkũmi kwondũ wa kĩla katũlũme ka tũla tũtũlũme mũonza:
Numbers29:11 na nthenge ĩmwe yĩthĩwe nthembo kwondũ wa naĩ; o vamwe na nthembo kwondũ wa naĩ ya kwĩw’anĩthya
Numbers29:12 Na mũthenya wa ĩkũmi na ĩtano wa mwei wa mũonza mũkeethĩwa na ũmbano mũtheu; mũtikatethye wĩa o na wĩva w’onthe
Numbers29:13 na mũkathembe nthembo ya kũvĩvw’a
Numbers29:14 na nthembo ya mũtu ya kũthembanĩsya nasyo
Numbers29:15 na kĩlungu kya ĩkũmi kwondũ wa kĩla katũlũme ka tũla tũtũlũme ĩkũmi na tũna;
Numbers29:16 na nthenge ĩmwe yĩthĩwe nthembo kwondũ wa naĩ; o vamwe na ĩla nthembo ya kũvivw’a ĩtatw’ĩkanaa
Numbers29:17 Na mũthenya wa kelĩ mũkathembe tũsalũ ĩkũmi na twĩlĩ
Numbers29:18 na nthembo ya mũtu ya kũthembanĩsya nasyo na nthembo sya kũnyuwa sya kũthembanĩsya nasyo kwondũ wa tũsalũ tũu
Numbers29:19 na nthenge ĩmwe yĩthĩwe nthembo kwondũ wa naĩ; o vamwe na nthembo ya kũvĩvw’a ĩtatw’ĩkanaa
Numbers29:20 Na mũthenya wa katatũ mũkathembe tũsalũ ĩkũmi na kamwe
Numbers29:21 na nthembo ya mũtu na nthembo sya kũnyuwa sya kũthembanĩsya nasyo kwondũ wa tũsalũ tũu
Numbers29:22 na nthenge ĩmwe yĩthĩwe nthembo kwondũ wa naĩ; o vamwe na nthembo ya kũvĩvw’a ĩtatw’ĩkanaa
Numbers29:23 Na mũthenya wa kana mũkathembe tũsalũ ĩkũmi
Numbers29:24 na nthembo ya mũtu na nthembo sya kũnyuwa sya kũthembanĩsya nasyo kwondũ wa tũsalũ tũu
Numbers29:25 na nthenge ĩmwe yĩthĩwe nthembo kwondũ wa naĩ; o vamwe na nthembo ya kũvĩvw’a ĩtatw’ĩkanaa
Numbers29:26 Na mũthenya wa katano mũkathembe tũsalũ kenda
Numbers29:27 na nthembo ya mũtu na nthembo sya kũnyuwa sya kũthembanĩsya nasyo kwondũ wa tũsalũ tũũ
Numbers29:28 na nthenge ĩmwe yĩthĩwe nthembo kwondũ wa naĩ; o vamwe na nthembo ya kũvĩvw’a ĩtatw’ĩkanaa
Numbers29:29 Na mũthenya wa thanthatũ mũkathembe tũsalũ nyanya
Numbers29:30 na nthembo ya mũtu na nthembo sya kũnyuwa sya kũthembanĩsya nasyo kwondũ wa tũsalũ tũu
Numbers29:31 na nthenge ĩmwe yĩthĩwe nthembo kwondũ wa naĩ; o vamwe na nthembo ya kũvĩvw’a ĩtatw’ĩkanaa
Numbers29:32 Na mũthenya wa mũonza mũkathembe tũsalũ mũonza
Numbers29:33 na nthembo ya mũtu na nthembo sya kũnyuwa kwondũ wa tũsalũ tũu
Numbers29:34 na nthenge ĩmwe yĩthĩwe nthembo kwondũ wa naĩ; o vamwe na nthembo ya kũvĩvw’a ĩtatw’ĩkanaa
Numbers29:35 Mũthenya wa nyanya mũkeethĩwa na ũmbano ũkilĩtye: mũtikatethye wĩa o na wĩva w’onthe;
Numbers29:36 ĩndĩ mũkathembe nthembo ya kũvĩvw’a
Numbers29:37 na nthembo ya mũtu ya kũthembanĩsya nasyo na nthembo sya kũnyuwa sya kũthembanĩsya nasyo kwondũ wa kasalũ kau
Numbers29:38 na nthenge ĩmwe yĩthĩwe nthembo kwondũ wa naĩ; o vamwe na nthembo ya kũvĩvw’a ĩtatw’ĩkanaa
Numbers29:39 Isu mũkathembee Yeova ĩvinda ya mboka syenyu ila itw’ĩtwe
Numbers29:40 Na Mose amatavya ana ma Isilaeli kwĩanana na w’onthe ũla Yeova wamwĩaĩe Mose.
Numbers30:1 Na Mose aneena na atongoi ma mbaĩ sya ana ma Isilaeli
Numbers30:2 Yĩla mũndũ mũũme ũkevĩtĩa Yeova wĩvĩto kana kwĩyĩava wĩavo wa kwova ngoo yake na wovo
Numbers30:3 Na ĩngĩ yĩla mũndũ mũka ũkevĩtĩa Yeova wĩvĩto
Numbers30:4 na ĩthe wake akĩw’a wĩvĩto wake
Numbers30:5 Ĩndĩ ethĩwa ĩthe wake akamũvata mũthenya o ũla wĩĩw’a
Numbers30:6 Na ethĩwa nake nĩ mũtwae
Numbers30:7 na mũũme akawĩw’a
Numbers30:8 Ĩndĩ ethĩwa mũũme akamũvata mũthenya o ũla wĩĩw’a
Numbers30:9 Ĩndĩ wĩvĩto wa mũndũ mũka ndiwa
Numbers30:10 Na ethĩwa nĩmevĩtĩie e kwa mũũme
Numbers30:11 na mũũme awĩw’a
Numbers30:12 Ĩndĩ ethĩwa mũũme wake nĩwamatw’ĩkĩthisye ma mana vyũ mũthenya o ũsu ũla wamewie
Numbers30:13 Kĩla wĩvĩto
Numbers30:14 Ĩndĩ ethĩwa mũũme wake akamũvindĩsya ki mĩthenya yonthe
Numbers30:15 Ĩndĩ ethĩwa akamatw’ĩkĩthya ma mana vyũ ĩtina wa kũmew’a
Numbers30:16 Asu nĩmo myamũlo
Numbers31:1 Na Yeova aneena na Mose
Numbers31:2 Ĩvanĩsya ana ma Isilaeli kwa Amitiani: ĩtina ũkoombanw’a vamwe na andũ maku.
Numbers31:3 Na Mose aneena na andũ
Numbers31:4 Mũkatwae kaũnĩ andũ ngili ya kĩla mbaĩ
Numbers31:5 Kwondũ wa ũu nĩkwaumw’a nthĩnĩ wa ngili sya Isilaeli
Numbers31:6 Na Mose amatũma
Numbers31:7 Na mokita na Mitiani
Numbers31:8 Na mooaa asumbi ma Mitiani vamwe na ala angĩ oae: nao nĩ Evi
Numbers31:9 Na ana ma Isilaeli matava aka ma Mitiani na syana syoo nini; na ng’ombe syoo syonthe
Numbers31:10 Na ndũa syoo syonthe kũndũ kũla matũaa
Numbers31:11 Nao mamakũũta syĩndũ syonthe
Numbers31:12 Na maete andũ ala atave
Numbers31:13 Na Mose
Numbers31:14 Na Mose amathilĩkĩa anene ma ĩla nguthu
Numbers31:15 Na Mose amakũlya
Numbers31:16 Sisyai
Numbers31:17 Yu ĩndĩno ũaai kĩla kana ka kavĩsĩ
Numbers31:18 Ĩndĩ twana tw’onthe twa twĩlĩtu
Numbers31:19 Na ĩkalai ũtee wa mwako wa maeema mĩthenya mũonza: o ũla ũaĩte mũndũ o na wĩva
Numbers31:20 Na ũndũ wa kĩla ngũa
Numbers31:21 Na mũthembi Eleasali amea andũ ma kaũ ala maendie kũkita
Numbers31:22 ĩndĩ thaavu
Numbers31:23 kĩla kĩndũ kĩtonya kũmĩĩsya mwaki
Numbers31:24 Na mũkathambye ngũa syenyu mũthenya wa mũonza
Numbers31:25 Na Yeova aneena na Mose
Numbers31:26 Tala ũtalo wa mũtavo ũla wataviwe
Numbers31:27 na aan’ya mũtavo ilungu ilĩ: katĩ wa andũ ala oĩ kaũnĩ ala maendie kũkita
Numbers31:28 Na mumĩsye Yeova mũvothi wa andũ ma kaũ ala maendie kũkita: thayũ ũmwe nthĩnĩ wa mathayũ maana atano
Numbers31:29 osa nthĩnĩ wa nyunzu yoo na mũnenge mũthembi Eleasali
Numbers31:30 Na nthĩnĩ wa nyunzu ya ana ma Isilaeli
Numbers31:31 Na Mose na mũthembi Eleasali meeka o tondũ Yeova wamwĩaĩe Mose.
Numbers31:32 Na ĩndĩ matialyo ala matialile
Numbers31:33 na ng’ombe ngili mĩongo mũonza na ilĩ
Numbers31:34 na mang’oi ngili mĩongo thanthatũ na ĩmwe
Numbers31:35 na aka ngili mĩongo ĩtatũ na ilĩ ala mataamanya mũndũ mũũme ũndũ wa ũkoma nake.
Numbers31:36 Na nyunzu
Numbers31:37 na mũvothi wa Yeova wa malondu waĩ maana thanthatũ na mĩongo mũonza na atano.
Numbers31:38 Na ng’ombe syaĩ ngili mĩongo ĩtatũ na thanthatũ; na mũvothi wa Yeova wa isu waĩ mĩongo mũonza na ilĩ.
Numbers31:39 Na mang’oi maĩ ngili mĩongo ĩtatũ na maana atano; na mũvothi wa Yeova wamo waĩ mĩongo thanthatũ na yĩmwe.
Numbers31:40 Na andũ maĩ ngili ĩkũmi na thanthatũ; na mũvothi wa Yeova wa asu waĩ andũ mĩongo ĩtatũ na elĩ.
Numbers31:41 Na Mose anenga mũthembi Eleasali ũla mũvothi
Numbers31:42 Na nthĩnĩ wa nyunzu ĩla yaĩ ya ana ma Isilaeli

Numbers34:1 Na Yeova aneena na Mose
Numbers34:2 Ĩaĩe ana ma Isilaeli
Numbers34:3 nĩvo ĩndĩ kĩlungu kyenyu kya ngalĩ ya ĩtheo kĩkethĩwa kuma weũ wa Nzini kũvĩtĩla ũtee wa Etomu
Numbers34:4 na mũvaka wenyu ũkasyoka kwelekela ngalĩ ya ĩtheo kyambatonĩ kya Akilavimu
Numbers34:5 na mũvaka ũkasyoka kuma Asimoni kũvika kalũsĩ ka Misili
Numbers34:6 Na mũvaka wenyu wa ngalĩ ya ũthũĩlonĩ wa syũa ũkeethĩwa nĩ ũkanga mũnene o ngũkanĩ yaw’o: ũsu ũkeethĩwa mũvaka wenyu wa ũthũĩlonĩ wa syũa.
Numbers34:7 Na mũvaka wenyu wa ngalĩ ya ĩũlũ nĩ ũũ: kuma ũkanga mũnene mũkeekĩa mũvaka kũvika kĩĩma kya Olu;
Numbers34:8 kuma kĩĩmanĩ kya Olu mũkeekĩa mũvaka kũvika ũlikĩlonĩ wa Amathi; na ũmĩlĩlo wa mũvaka ũkeethĩwa Nzetati;
Numbers34:9 na mũvaka ũkavĩta na kũthi Nzĩviloni
Numbers34:10 Na mũkeekĩa mũvaka wenyu wa ngalĩ ya wũmĩlonĩ wa syũa kuma Asali‐enani kũvika Seviamu;
Numbers34:11 na mũvaka ũkatheea kuma Seviamu kũvika Livila
Numbers34:12 na mũvaka ũkatheelela Yolotani
Numbers34:13 Na Mose ameaĩa ana ma Isilaeli

Numbers34:16 Na Yeova aneena na Mose

Numbers35:1 Na Yeova aneenea na Mose ndiĩnĩ sya Moavi vakuvĩ na Yolotani ku Yeliko
Numbers35:2 Meaĩe ana ma Isilaeli mamanenge Alivai ndũa sya kũtũa nthĩnĩ wa ũtiĩwa wa ng’ũndũ syoo; na mũkanenge Alivai syengo ila ithyũlũlũkĩtye ndũa ngalĩ syonthe.
Numbers35:3 Na ndũa isu ikeethĩwa syoo sya kũtũa; na syengo isu ikeethĩwa sya indo syoo
Numbers35:4 Na syengo sya ndũa isu
Numbers35:5 Na mũkathime ũtee wa ndũa mĩkono ngili ili ngalĩ ya wumĩlonĩ wa syũa
Numbers35:6 Na ndũa ila mũkanenga Alivai
Numbers35:7 Ndũa syonthe ila mũkanenga Alivai ikeethĩwa mĩongo ĩna na nyanya; nĩsyo mũkamanenga vamwe na syengo syasyo.
Numbers35:8 Na ũndũ wa ndũa ila mũkanengane kuma nthĩnĩ wa ng’ũndũ ya ana ma Isilaeli
Numbers35:9 Na Yeova aneena na Mose
Numbers35:10 Neena na ana ma Isilaeli
Numbers35:11 nĩvo ĩndĩ mwĩia ndũa syĩthĩwe ndũa sya kwĩvitha kwondũ wenyu
Numbers35:12 Na ndũa isu ikeethĩwa kwenyu kwondũ wa kũmwĩvitha mũĩvanĩsya
Numbers35:13 Na ndũa ila mũkanengane ikeethĩwa kwenyu ndũa thanthatũ sya kwĩvitha.
Numbers35:14 Mũkanengane ndũa itatũ mũingo wa Yolotani; na mũkanengane ndũa itatũ nthĩ ya Kanaani; isu ikeethĩwa ndũa sya kwĩvitha.
Numbers35:15 Ndũa isu thanthatũ ikeethĩwa sya kwĩvitha kwondũ wa ana ma Isilaeli
Numbers35:16 Ĩndĩ ethĩwa nĩwamũkũna na kĩndũ kya kĩaa
Numbers35:17 Na ethĩwa nĩwamũkima na ĩvia akwete na kw’oko kwake
Numbers35:18 Kana ethĩwa nĩwamũkũna na kĩndũ kya mũtĩ akwete kw’okonĩ
Numbers35:19 Mũĩvanĩsya wa nthakame we mwene akooaa mũaani ũsu: akomana nake akamũaa.
Numbers35:20 Na ethĩwa nĩwamũluuta nũndũ wa kũmũmena
Numbers35:21 kana ethĩwa nĩwamũkũna na kw’oko kwondũ wa ũthũ
Numbers35:22 Ĩndĩ ethĩwa nĩwamũluuta na kĩthũlũmũkĩlo vate ũthũ
Numbers35:23 kana ĩvia o na yĩva
Numbers35:24 nĩvo ĩndĩ ũmbano ũkamasilan’ya ũla mũkũnani na mũĩvanĩsya wa nthakame
Numbers35:25 na ũmbano ũkamũvonokya mũaani kũmumya kw’okonĩ kwa mũĩvanĩsya wa nthakame
Numbers35:26 Ĩndĩ ethĩwa mũaani o na ĩndĩĩ akakĩla mũvaka wa ndũa yake ya kwĩvitha
Numbers35:27 na mũĩvanĩsya wa nthakame akamwona akĩlĩte mũvaka wa ndũa yake ya kwĩvitha
Numbers35:28 nĩkwĩthĩwa ũsu nĩwaĩlwe nĩ kwĩkala ndũanĩ yake ya kwĩvitha kũvika yĩla mũthembi mũnene ũkakw’a: ĩndĩ mũthembi mũnene akw’a ũla mũaani akasyoka nthĩ ĩla ya ng’ũndũ yake.
Numbers35:29 Na maũndũ asu makeethĩwa kwenyu mwamũlo na ũtw’ĩo mosyaanĩonĩ menyu onthe motũonĩ menyu onthe.
Numbers35:30 O ũla ũkoaa mũndũ o na wĩva
Numbers35:31 Na ĩngĩ mũtikose mbovosya kwondũ wa thayũ wa mũaani
Numbers35:32 Na mũtikose mbovosya kwondũ wa ũla wakĩĩe ndũanĩ yake ya kwĩvitha
Numbers35:33 Na ĩndĩ mũtikavukye nthĩ ĩla mũtwĩe: nũndũ nthakame
Numbers35:34 Na mũtikavukye nthĩ ĩla mũtũĩte

Numbers36:7 Kwondũ wa ũu vai ũtiĩwa wa ana ma Isilaeli ũkaumw’a mbaĩnĩ ĩmwe kũthi mbaĩnĩ ĩngĩ; nũndũ ana ma Isilaeli makakwatana kĩla mũndũ na ũtiĩwa wa mbaĩ ya aaĩthe make.
Numbers36:8 Na kĩla mwĩĩtu ũla ũkethĩwa na ũtiĩwa mbaĩnĩ o na yĩva ya ana ma Isilaeli
Numbers36:9 Kwondũ wa ũu kũikethĩwa ũtiĩwa o na wĩva ũkyumw’a mbaĩnĩ ĩmwe kũtwawa mbaĩnĩ ĩngĩ; nũndũ mbaĩ sya ana ma Isilaeli ikalũman’ya kĩla ĩmwe na ũtiĩwa wayo.

Numbers36:13 Ĩsu nĩyo mĩao na motw’ĩo ala Yeova weaĩe ana ma Isilaeli na kanyw’a wa Mose ndiĩnĩ sya Moavi vakuvĩ na Yolotani ku Yeliko.

Deuteronomy2:5 mũikamathee; nũndũ ndikamũnenga kĩlungu kya nthĩ yoo

Deuteronomy2:7 Nũndũ Yeova Ngai waku nũkũathimĩte wĩanĩ w’onthe wa moko maku; nũmanyĩte kwanganga kwaku weũnĩ ũũ mũnene: myaka ĩno mĩongo ma Yeova Ngai waku nĩwĩkalĩte naku; ndwaanyivĩwa nĩ kĩndũ.

Deuteronomy16:4 Na kũikoneke kwaku ĩlawa nthĩnĩ wa mĩvaka yaku yonthe vandũ va mĩthenya mũonza; o na nyama o na yĩva ĩla ũthembaa mũthenya wa mbee wĩoo

Deuteronomy16:9 Ĩtalĩle syumwa mũonza: ambĩlĩlya kũtala syumwa mũonza kuma yĩla wĩambĩlĩlya kũketha lĩu ũtũĩtye na kavyũ ke ngoto.

Deuteronomy16:11 naku ũkatane mbee wa Yeova Ngai waku

Deuteronomy16:16 Mavinda atatũ kĩla mwaka aũme maku onthe makookaa mbee wa Yeova Ngai waku vala wĩnyuva: mbokanĩ ya kĩmũtũ kĩte ĩlawa

Deuteronomy19:3 Ĩseũvĩsye nzĩa

Deuteronomy19:5 ta yĩla mũndũ ũendaa mũtitũnĩ e na mũtũi wake kũtema mĩtĩ

Deuteronomy19:10 nĩ kana nthakame ĩte ĩvĩtyo ndĩketĩkw’e nthĩ yaku

Deuteronomy28:1 Na kũkeethĩwa
Deuteronomy28:2 na moathimo aa onthe makooka kwaku
Deuteronomy28:3 Ũkeethĩwa wĩ mũathime ndũanĩ
Deuteronomy28:4 Ũsyao wa mwĩĩ waku ũkeethĩwa mũathime
Deuteronomy28:5 Kĩkeethĩwa kĩ kĩathime kyondo kyaku na kĩndũ kyaku kĩla kĩluĩlawa mũtu.
Deuteronomy28:6 Ũkeethĩwa wĩ mũathime yĩla wĩlikaa na ũkeethĩwa wĩ mũathime yĩla wĩumaalaa.
Deuteronomy28:7 Yeova akamakũnĩthya mbee waku amaitha maku ala mekũkĩlĩla: makakumaalĩla na nzĩa ĩmwe
Deuteronomy28:8 Yeova akeaĩa ũathimo ĩũlũ waku makũmbĩnĩ maku
Deuteronomy28:9 Yeova akakũlũlũmĩlya withĩwe ũko mũtheu kwake
Deuteronomy28:10 Na ngo syonthe sya nthĩ ikoona atĩ nĩwĩtanĩaw’a na syĩtwa ya Yeova; na ikakũkĩa.
Deuteronomy28:11 Na Yeova akakwingĩvĩsya ũseo
Deuteronomy28:12 Yeova akakũvingũĩa kyũmbanĩsyo kyake kĩseo
Deuteronomy28:13 Na Yeova akakũtw’ĩkĩthya mũtwe
Deuteronomy28:14 na ethĩwa ndũkathũka kuma ndetonĩ syonthe ila ngũkwĩaĩa ũmũnthĩ
Deuteronomy28:15 Ĩndĩ kũkeethĩwa
Deuteronomy28:16 Ũkeethĩwa wĩ mũumanĩe ndũanĩ
Deuteronomy28:17 Kĩkeethĩwa kĩumanĩwe kĩkavũ kyaku
Deuteronomy28:18 Ũkeethĩwa ũumanĩwe ũsyao wa mwĩĩ waku
Deuteronomy28:19 Ũkeethĩwa wĩ mũumanĩe yĩla wĩlikaa
Deuteronomy28:20 Yeova akakũetee kĩumo
Deuteronomy28:21 Yeova akakũkwatĩthya mũimũ
Deuteronomy28:22 Yeova akakũkũna na ũwau wa ũkooa
Deuteronomy28:23 Na ĩtu yaku yĩla yĩ ĩũlũ wa mũtwe waku yĩkeethĩwa ta ũthuku
Deuteronomy28:24 Yeova akatw’ĩkĩthya mbua ya nthĩ yaku ta mũtu na kĩtoo: ĩkakũtheeea kuma ĩtunĩ
Deuteronomy28:25 Yeova akaũkũnĩthya mbee wa amaitha maku; ũkamaumaalĩla na nzĩa ĩmwe
Deuteronomy28:26 Na kimba kyaku kĩkeethĩwa lĩu wa nyũnyi syonthe sya yayaya
Deuteronomy28:27 Yeova akaũkũna na ũla mũimũ wa Misili
Deuteronomy28:28 Yeova akaũkũna na ndũũka

Deuteronomy28:30 Ũkeevasya mwĩĩtu
Deuteronomy28:31 Ng’ombe yaku ĩkooawa wene na metho maku
Deuteronomy28:32 Ana maku na eĩtu maku makanenganwe mbaĩnĩ ĩngĩ; na metho maku makasyaĩĩsya
Deuteronomy28:33 Ũsyao wa nthĩ yaku
Deuteronomy28:34 ũndũ ũkaũũka nũndũ wa maũndũ ala metho maku makona.

Deuteronomy28:39 Ũkavanda mĩũnda ya mĩsavivũ

Deuteronomy28:41 Ũkasyaa ana na eĩtu
Deuteronomy28:42 Mĩtĩ yaku yonthe na ũsyao wa nthĩ yaku ũkeethĩwa wa ngie.
Deuteronomy28:43 Mwĩkali wa ũeninĩ ũla wĩ kwaku akanenevw’a kwĩ we mbee na mbee; naku ũkatheea kũtheea.

Joshua1:6 Ĩthĩwa na vinya na ũkũmbaũ mũnene; nũndũ ũkatuma andũ aa mosa nthĩ ĩla neevĩtĩe aaĩthe moo nĩmanenga yithĩwe ũtiĩwa.
Joshua1:7 Ĩndĩ ĩthĩwa na vinya na ũkũmbaũ mũnene
Joshua1:8 Ĩvuku yĩĩ ya mĩao yĩtikaaume kanyw’anĩ waku

Joshua3:17 Na athembi ala makuaa ĩsandũkũ ya ũtianĩo ya Yeova maũngama ki nthĩ nyũmũ Yolotani katĩ; na Isilaeli onthe mainga makinyĩle nthĩ nyũmũ

Joshua4:6 nĩ kana ũu wĩthĩwe wonan’yo katĩ wenyu
Joshua4:7 Nĩvo mwĩsyĩa

Joshua4:11 Na kweethĩwa
Joshua4:12 Na ana ma Leuveni
Joshua4:13 mainga o ta ngili mĩongo ĩna Yeova asyaĩtye mekĩĩte mĩio ya kaũ

Joshua4:15 Na Yeova aneena na Yosua

Joshua4:18 Na kweethĩwa

Joshua4:20 Na mavia asu ĩkũmi na elĩ
Joshua4:21 Na aneena na ana ma Isilaeli

Joshua6:13 Na athembi mũonza ala makuĩte masoo mũonza ma mbya sya ndũũme me mbee wa ĩsandũkũ ya Yeova maendeeaa matekũũngama
Joshua6:14 Na mũthenya wa kelĩ mathyũlũlũka ndũa ĩmwe

Joshua13:12 ũsumbĩko w’onthe wa Oku ku Mbasani
Joshua13:13 Ĩndĩ ana ma Isilaeli matyaalũngya Angesuli
Joshua13:14 Ĩndĩ mbaĩ ya Livai ndaamĩnenga ũtiĩwa; nthembo sya Yeova
Joshua13:15 Na Mose anenga mbaĩ ya ana ma Leuveni nthĩ kwĩanana na mĩvĩa yoo.
Joshua13:16 Na mũvaka woo waĩ kuma Aloeli
Joshua13:17 na Esivoni
Joshua13:18 na Yaasa
Joshua13:19 na Kiliathaimu
Joshua13:20 na Mbethiveoli
Joshua13:21 na ndũa syonthe sya ũiĩ
Joshua13:22 Mbalaamu nake mwana wa Mbeoli
Joshua13:23 Na mũvaka wa ana ma Leuveni waĩ Yolotani
Joshua13:24 Na Mose anenga mbaĩ ya Ngati
Joshua13:25 Na mũvaka woo waĩ Yaseli
Joshua13:26 na kuma Esivoni kũvika Lamathi‐misive
Joshua13:27 na mwandanĩ
Joshua13:28 Ũsu nĩw’o ũtiĩwa wa ana ma Ngati
Joshua13:29 Na Mose anenga ĩla nyunzu ya mbaĩ ya Manase ũtiĩwa: na waĩ kwondũ wa ĩla nyunzu ya mbaĩ ya Manase kwĩanana na mĩvĩa yoo.
Joshua13:30 Na mũvaka woo waĩ kuma Maanaimu
Joshua13:31 na nyunzu ya Ngileati
Joshua13:32 Asu nĩmo motiĩwa ala Mose waaanisye ndiĩnĩ sya Moavi
Joshua13:33 Ĩndĩ mbaĩ ya Livai Mose ndaamanenga ũtiĩwa: Yeova
Joshua14:1 Na asu nĩmo motiĩwa ala ana ma Isilaeli moosie nthĩ ya Kanaani
Joshua14:2 kwondũ wa kũlimana kwa ũtiĩwa woo
Joshua14:3 Nũndũ Mose aĩ anainenga ũtiĩwa mbaĩ ilĩ na nyunzu ya mbaĩ mũingo wa Yolotani: ĩndĩ ndaanenga Alivai ũtiĩwa katĩ woo.
Joshua14:4 Nũndũ ana ma Yosevu maĩ mbaĩ ilĩ
Joshua14:5 O tondũ Yeova weaĩa Mose
Joshua14:6 Nivo ĩndĩ ana ma Yuta mathengeeie Yosua ku Ngilikali: na Kalevu mwana wa Yevune Mũkenisi amwĩa
Joshua14:7 Naĩ wa myaka mĩongo ĩna yĩla Mose mũthũkũmi wa Yeova wandũmie kuma Katesi‐mbalinea nĩthiane ĩ nthĩ; na namũtũngĩa ũvoo o tondũ wailyĩ ngoonĩ yakwa.
Joshua14:8 Ĩndĩ ana‐a‐asa makwa ala mambatie vamwe nakwa matuma ngoo sya andũ itweka: ĩndĩ nyie nĩnamũatĩĩe Yeova Ngai wakwa ki.
Joshua14:9 Na Mose eevĩta mũthenya ũsu
Joshua14:10 Na yu
Joshua14:11 O na yu nĩ na vinya ũmũnthĩ o tondũ naĩ naw’o mũthenya ũla Mose wandũmie: o tondũ vinya wakwa wailyĩ ĩvinda yĩu
Joshua14:12 Na ĩndĩ kwondũ wa ũu nenga nthĩ ĩno yĩ iĩma
Joshua14:13 Na Yosua amũathima
Joshua14:14 Kwondũ wa ũu Eviloni yatw’ĩka ũtiĩwa wa Kalevu mwana wa Yevune Mũkenisi kũvika ũmũnthĩ; nũndũ nĩwamũatĩĩe ki Yeova
Joshua14:15 Na ĩndĩ syĩtwa ya Eviloni tene yeetawa Kiliathi‐aliva; ũsu Aliva aĩ mũndũ mũnene kwĩ onthe katĩ wa Aanaki. Na ĩ nthĩ yathũmũĩa kaũ.
Joshua15:1 Na mũlimano kwondũ wa mbaĩ ya ana ma Yuta kũatĩĩa mĩvĩa yoo waĩ wa kũvika mũvaka wa Etomu
Joshua15:2 Na mũvaka woo wa ngalĩ ya ĩtheo waĩ kuma mũthelelo wa Ũkanga wa Mũnyũ
Joshua15:3 na waumĩla ngalĩ ya ĩtheo ya kyambato kya Akilavimu na
Joshua15:4 na waendeea kũvika Asimoni na waumĩlĩla kalũsĩnĩ ka Misili; na ũmalĩlo waw’o waĩ ũkanganĩ: ũsu nĩw’o ũkethĩwa mũvaka wenyu wa ngalĩ ya ĩtheo.
Joshua15:5 Na mũvaka wa ngalĩ ya wumĩlonĩ wa syũa waĩ Ũkanga wa Mũnyũ o kũvika mũthelelo wa Yolotani. Na mũvaka wa ngalĩ ya ĩũlũ waĩ kuma kyokonĩ kya ũkanga mũthelelonĩ wa Yolotani;
Joshua15:6 na mũvaka wambata kũvika Mbethi‐okila
Joshua15:7 na mũvaka wambata kũvika Ndevili kuma mwandanĩ wa Akoli
Joshua15:8 na mũvaka wambata waendeea kyandanĩ kya mwana wa Inomu kũvika ngalĩ ya Mũyevusi kwelekela ngalĩ ya ĩtheo (nayo nĩ Yelusaleme); na mũvaka wambata waendeea kũvika mũtumbĩnĩ wa kĩĩma kĩla kĩthengeee kyanda kya Inomu ngalĩ ya ũthũĩlonĩ wa syũa
Joshua15:9 na mũvaka waendeea kuma mũtumbĩnĩ wa kĩĩma kũvika nthongo ya manzĩ ma Nevitoa oa waendeea kũvika ndũa sya kĩĩma kya Eveloni; na mũvaka wavika ku Mbaala (nayo nĩ Kiliathi‐yealimu);
Joshua15:10 na mũvaka weelingĩla kuma Mbaala kwelekela ngalĩ ya ũthũĩlonĩ wa syũa kũvika kĩĩma kya Seili
Joshua15:11 na mũvaka waumĩla ũtee wa Ekiloni
Joshua15:12 Na mũvaka wa ngalĩ ya ũthũĩlonĩ wa syũa wavika ũkanga mũnene
Joshua15:13 Na anenga Kalevu mwana wa Yevune kĩanda katĩ wa ana ma Yuta
Joshua15:14 Na Kalevu alũngya vo ana atatũ ma Anaki: Sesai
Joshua15:15 Na ambata kw’o okite na andũ ala matwĩe Ndevili: na ĩndĩ syĩtwa ya Ndevili tene yeetawa Kiliathi‐seveli.
Joshua15:16 Na Kalevu asya
Joshua15:17 Na Othinieli mwana wa Kenasi
Joshua15:18 Na kweethĩwa
Joshua15:19 Nake amũsũngĩa
Joshua15:20 Ũsu nĩw’o ũtiĩwa wa mbaĩ ya ana ma Yuta kũatĩĩa mĩvĩa yoo.
Joshua15:21 Na ndũa syĩ ngalĩ ya mũminũkĩlyo sya mbaĩ ya ana ma Yuta kwelekela mũvaka wa Etomu ngalĩ ya Ĩtheo syaĩ Kaviseeli
Joshua15:22 na Kina
Joshua15:23 na Ketesi

Joshua15:29 na Mbaala

Joshua15:31 na Nzikilaki
Joshua15:32 na Levaothi

Joshua15:34 na Nzanoa
Joshua15:35 na Yalimuthi
Joshua15:36 na Saalaimu
Joshua15:37 Nzenani
Joshua15:38 na Ndileani
Joshua15:39 na Lakisi na Mbosikathi
Joshua15:40 na Kavoni
Joshua15:41 na Ngetelothi
Joshua15:42 Livina

Joshua15:44 na Keila
Joshua15:45 Ekiloni
Joshua15:46 kuma Ekiloni kũvika ũkanga

Joshua15:49 na Ndana
Joshua15:50 na Anavu
Joshua15:51 na Ngoseni

Joshua15:58 Aliuli
Joshua15:59 na Maalathi
Joshua15:60 Kiliathi‐mbaali (nayo nĩ Kiliathi‐yealimu)
Joshua15:61 Weũnĩ kwaĩ Mbethi‐alava
Joshua15:62 na Nivisani
Joshua15:63 Na ũvoo wa Ayevusi
Joshua16:1 Na mũlimano wambĩlĩla wa ana ma Yosevu kuma Yolotani ku Yeliko
Joshua16:2 na wauma Mbethi‐eli wavika Lusu
Joshua16:3 na watheea kwelekela ngalĩ ya ũthũĩlonĩ wa syũa kũvika mũvaka wa Ayavileti
Joshua16:4 Na ana ma Yosevu
Joshua16:5 Na mũvaka wa ana ma Evalaimu kwĩanana na mĩvĩa yoo wailyĩ ũũ: mũvaka wa ũtiĩwa woo kwelekela ngalĩ ya wumĩlonĩ wa syũa waĩ Atalothi‐atali kũvika Mbethi‐oloni ĩla yĩ ĩũlũ;
Joshua16:6 na mũvaka waumĩla kwelekela ngalĩ ya ũthũĩlonĩ wa syũa ku Mikimetha ngalĩ ya ĩũlũ; na mũvaka weelingĩla kwelekela ngalĩ ya wumĩlonĩ wa syũa kũvika Taanathi‐silo
Joshua16:7 na watheea kũma Yanoa kũvika Atalothi
Joshua16:8 Kuma Tavua mũvaka waendeea kwelekela ngalĩ ya ũthũĩlonĩ wa syũa kũvika kalũsĩ ka Kana; na umalĩlo waw’o waĩ ũkanganĩ. Ũsu nĩw’o ũtiĩwa wa mbaĩ ya ana ma Evalaimu kũatĩĩa mĩvĩa yoo;
Joshua16:9 vamwe na ndũa ila ivathĩtwe kwondũ wa ana ma Evalaimu katĩ wa ũtiĩwa wa ana ma Manase
Joshua16:10 Na matyaalũngya Akanaani ala matwĩe Ngelesi: ĩndĩ Akanaani matũaa katĩ wa Evalaimu kũvika ũmũnthĩ
Joshua17:1 Na ũu nĩw’o mũlimano kwondũ wa mbaĩ ya Manase; nũndũ aĩ ĩkithathi ya Yosevu. Na ũvoo wa Makili ĩkithathi ya Manase
Joshua17:2 Kwondũ wa ũu mũlimano waĩ kwondũ wa ana ala angĩ ma Manase kũatĩĩa mĩvĩa yoo: kwondũ wa ana ma Avieseli
Joshua17:3 Ĩndĩ Nzeloveati
Joshua17:4 Na mamũthengeea mũthembi Eleasali
Joshua17:5 Na ianda ĩkũmi syamũvalũkĩla Manase
Joshua17:6 nũndũ eĩtu ma Manase maĩ na ũtiĩwa katĩ wa ana aũme make. Na nthĩ ya Ngileati yaĩ ya ana ala angĩ ma Manase.
Joshua17:7 Na mũvaka wa Manase waĩ kuma Aseli kũvika Mikemetha
Joshua17:8 Nthĩ ya Tavua yaĩ ya Manase; ĩndĩ Tavua mũvakanĩ wa Manase yaĩ ya ana ma Evalaimu.
Joshua17:9 Na mũvaka watheea kũvika kalũsĩ ka Kana
Joshua17:10 kwelekela ngalĩ ya ĩtheo yaĩ ya Evalaimu
Joshua17:11 Na nthĩnĩ wa Isakali na Aseli
Joshua17:12 Ĩndĩ ana ma Manase matyaatonya kũlũngya ala matwĩe ndũanĩ isu; ĩndĩ Akanaani meevinyĩlĩlya nthĩ ĩsu.
Joshua17:13 Na kweethĩwa
Joshua17:14 Na ana ma Yosevu maneena na Yosua
Joshua17:15 Na Yosua amea
Joshua17:16 Na ana ma Yosevu masya
Joshua17:17 Na Yosua aneena na nyũmba ya Yosevu
Joshua17:18 ĩndĩ nthĩ yĩ iĩma ĩkeethĩwa yaku; nũndũ o na kau nĩ mũtitũ
Joshua18:1 Na ũmbano w’onthe wa Isilaeli woombana ku Silo
Joshua18:2 Na kwatiala katĩ wa ana ma Isilaeli mbaĩ mũonza
Joshua18:3 Na Yosua akũlya ana ma Isilaeli
Joshua18:4 Ĩyiĩei andũ atatũ ma kĩla mbaĩ: na ngamatũma
Joshua18:5 Na makamĩaan’ye ianda mũonza: Yuta ĩkekala mũvakanĩ wayo ngalĩ ya ĩtheo
Joshua18:6 Na mũkaandĩke nthĩ ĩaanĩtw’e ianda mũonza
Joshua18:7 Nũndũ Alivai mati na kĩanda katĩ wenyu; nũndũ ũthembi wa Yeova nĩw’o ũtiĩwa woo: na Ngati na Leuveni na nyunzu ya mbaĩ ya Manase nĩmosete ũtiĩwa woo mũingo wa Yolotani kweleleka ngalĩ ya wumĩlonĩ wa syũa
Joshua18:8 Na andũ asu mookĩla na mathi: na Yosua ameaĩa ala maendie kũandĩka nthĩ
Joshua18:9 Na andũ mathi na mavĩtĩla katĩ wa nthĩ
Joshua18:10 Na Yosua alimana kwondũ woo ku Silo kũla kwĩ Yeova; na kw’o Yosua amaaan’ya ana ma Isilaeli nthĩ kwĩanana na ũndũ maaanĩtye.
Joshua18:11 Na mũlimano wa mbaĩ ya ana ma Mbenyamini waumĩla kũatĩĩa mĩvĩa yoo: na mũvaka wa mũlimano woo waumĩla katĩ wa ana ma Yuta na ana ma Yosevu.
Joshua18:12 Na mũvaka woo wa ngalĩ ya ĩũlũ waĩ kuma Yolotani; na mũvaka wambata ũtee wa Yeliko ngalĩ ya ĩũlũ
Joshua18:13 Na mũvaka waendeea kuma vau kũvika Lusu
Joshua18:14 Na mũvaka waendeea kuma vau
Joshua18:15 Na kĩlungu kya ngalĩ ya ĩtheo kyaĩ kuma mũthelelo wa Kiliathi‐yealimu; na mũvaka waumĩla kwelekela ngalĩ ya ũthũĩlonĩ wa syũa
Joshua18:16 na mũvaka watheea kũvika mũthelelo wa kĩĩma kĩla kyelekele kyanda kya mwana wa Inomu
Joshua18:17 na waendeea kwelekela ngalĩ ya ĩũlũ
Joshua18:18 na wavĩtĩla ũtee kwelekela Alava kwelekela ngalĩ ya ĩũlũ
Joshua18:19 na mũvaka waendeea kũvika ũtee wa Mbethi‐okila kwelekela ngalĩ ya ĩũlũ; na umalĩlo wa mũvaka waĩ kyokonĩ kya ngalĩ ya ĩũlũ kya Ũkanga wa Mũnyũ
Joshua18:20 Na Yolotani waĩ mũvaka wayo kĩlungunĩ kya ngalĩ ya wumĩlonĩ wa syũa. Ũsu waĩ ũtiĩwa wa ana ma Mbenyamini
Joshua18:21 Na ĩndĩ ndũa sya mbaĩ ya ana ma Mbenyamini kũatĩĩa mĩvĩa yoo syaĩ Yeliko
Joshua18:22 na Mbethi‐alava
Joshua18:23 na Aavi
Joshua18:24 na Kevali‐amimoni
Joshua18:25 na Ngiveoni
Joshua18:26 na Misiva
Joshua18:27 na Lekemu
Joshua18:28 na Nzeela
Joshua19:1 Na mũlimano wa kelĩ waumĩla wa Simeoni
Joshua19:2 Na ũtiĩwa woo waĩ Mbeeli‐sieva
Joshua19:3 na Asali‐suali
Joshua19:4 na Elitolati
Joshua19:5 na Nzikilaki
Joshua19:6 na Mbethi‐levaothi
Joshua19:7 na Aini
Joshua19:8 na mĩsyĩ yonthe ĩla ĩthyũlũlũkĩte ndũa isu kũvika Mbaalathi‐mbeeli
Joshua19:9 Ũtiĩwa wa ana ma Simeoni waĩ kuma kĩlungunĩ kya ana ma Yuta; nũndũ kĩanda kya ana ma Yuta kyaĩ kĩnene kwoo: kwondũ wa ũu ana ma Simeoni maĩ na ũtiĩwa katĩ wa ũtiĩwa woo.
Joshua19:10 Na mũlimano wa katatũ waumila wa ana ma Nzevuluni kũatĩĩa mĩvĩa yoo. Na mũvaka wa ũtiĩwa woo wavika Saliti;
Joshua19:11 na mũvaka woo wambata kwelekela ngalĩ ya ũthũĩlonĩ wa syũa
Joshua19:12 na weelingĩla kuma Saliti kwelekela ngalĩ ya wumĩlonĩ wa syũa kwelekela vala syũa yumĩlaa kũvika mũvaka wa Kisilothi‐tavoli; na waumĩla wavika Ndavelathi
Joshua19:13 na kuma vau waendeea kwelekela wumĩlonĩ wa syũa kũvika Ngathi‐eevieli
Joshua19:14 na mũvaka wamĩthyũlũlũka ngalĩ ya ĩũlũ yayo kũvika Anathoni; na umalĩlo waw’o waĩ mwandanĩ wa Ivita‐eli;
Joshua19:15 na Katathi
Joshua19:16 Ũsu nĩw’o ũtiĩwa wa ana ma Nzevuluni kũatĩĩa mĩvĩa yoo
Joshua19:17 Mũlimano wa kana waumĩla wa Isakali
Joshua19:18 Na mũvaka woo wavika Yesileeli
Joshua19:19 na Avalaimu
Joshua19:20 na Lavithi
Joshua19:21 na Lemethi
Joshua19:22 na mũvaka wavika Tavoli
Joshua19:23 Ũsu nĩw’o ũtiĩwa wa mbaĩ ya ana ma Isakali kũatĩĩa mĩvĩa yoo
Joshua19:24 Na mũlimano wa katano waumĩla wa mbaĩ ya ana ma Aseli kũatĩĩa mĩvĩa yoo.
Joshua19:25 Na mũvaka woo waĩ Elikathi
Joshua19:26 na Alamelekĩ
Joshua19:27 na weelelũka welekela wumĩlonĩ wa syũa kũvika Mbethi‐ndakoni
Joshua19:28 na Eviloni
Joshua19:29 na mũvaka weelelũka kũvika Lama
Joshua19:30 o na Uma
Joshua19:31 Ũsu nĩw’o ũtiĩwa wa mbaĩ ya ana ma Aseli kũatĩĩa mĩvĩa yoo
Joshua19:32 Mũlimano wa thanthatũ waumĩla wa ana ma Navitali
Joshua19:33 Na mũvaka woo waĩ kuma Elevi
Joshua19:34 na mũvaka weelelũka kwelekela ngalĩ ya ũthũĩlonĩ wa syũa kũvika Asinothitavoli
Joshua19:35 Na ndũa mbiie sya Nzitimu
Joshua19:36 na Atama
Joshua19:37 na Ketesi
Joshua19:38 na Iloni
Joshua19:39 Ũsu nĩw’o ũtiĩwa wa mbaĩ ya ana ma Navitali kũatĩĩa mĩvĩa yoo
Joshua19:40 Mũlimano wa mũonza waumĩla wa mbaĩ ya ana ma Ndani kũatĩĩa mĩvĩa yoo.
Joshua19:41 Na mũvaka wa ũtiĩwa woo waĩ Nzola
Joshua19:42 na Saalavini
Joshua19:43 na Eloni
Joshua19:44 na Eliteke
Joshua19:45 na Yeuti
Joshua19:46 na Me‐yalikoni
Joshua19:47 Na mũvaka wa ana ma Ndani waumĩla mbee woo: nũndũ ana ma Ndani mambata na mokita na Lesemu
Joshua19:48 Ũsu nĩw’o ũtiĩwa wa mbaĩ ya ana ma Ndani kũatĩĩa mĩvĩa yoo
Joshua19:49 O ta ũu mamina kũaan’ya nthĩ kwondũ wa ũtiĩwa kũatĩĩa mĩvaka yayo; na ana ma Isilaeli manenga Yosua wa Nunĩ ũtiĩwa katĩ woo:
Joshua19:50 kwĩanana na mwĩao wa Yeova mamũnenga ndũa ĩla wetisye
Joshua19:51 Asu nĩmo motiĩwa ala mũthembi Eleasali na Yosua mwana wa Nuni
Joshua20:1 Na Yeova aneena na Yosua
Joshua20:2 Neena na ana ma Isilaeli
Joshua20:3 nĩ kana mũndũ ũla ũkoaa mũndũ o na wĩva na mbanga na atesĩ akĩĩe vo: na ikeethĩawa kwenyu kwondũ wa kũmwĩvitha mũĩvanĩsya wa nthakame.
Joshua20:4 Nake akakĩĩa ndũa ĩmwe ya isu
Joshua20:5 Na ethĩwa mũĩvanĩsya wa nthakame akamũatĩĩa
Joshua20:6 Nake akekalaa ndũanĩ ĩsu
Joshua20:7 Na mavatha Ketesi ĩla yĩ Ngalilii yĩ nthĩ yĩ iĩma ya Navitali
Joshua20:8 Na mũingo wa Yolotani ku Yeliko kwelekela ngalĩ ya wumĩlonĩ wa syũa
Joshua20:9 Isu syaĩ ndũa ivathĩtwe kwondũ wa ana onthe ma Isilaeli
Joshua21:1 Na ĩndĩ atongoi ma nyũmba sya aaĩthe ma Alivai mamũkĩa mũthembi Eleasali
Joshua21:2 na maneenea nao ku Silo nthĩ ya Kanaani
Joshua21:3 Na ana ma Isilaeli manenga Alivai kuma ũtiĩwanĩ woo ndũa ii vamwe na syengo syasyo
Joshua21:4 Na mũlimano waumĩla wa mĩvĩa ya Akoathi: na ana ma mũthembi Aluni
Joshua21:5 Na ana ala angĩ ma Koathi moosa kwa kũlimana kuma mĩvĩanĩ ya mbaĩ ya Evalaimu
Joshua21:6 Na ana ma Ngelisoni moosa kwa kũlimana kuma mĩvĩanĩ ya mbaĩ ya Isakali
Joshua21:7 Ana ma Melali kũatĩĩa mĩvĩa yoo moosa kuma mbaĩnĩ ya Leuveni
Joshua21:8 Na ana ma Isilaeli kwa kũlimana manenga Alivai ndũa isu vamwe na syengo syasyo
Joshua21:9 Na manengane kuma mbaĩnĩ ya ana ma Yuta
Joshua21:10 na syaĩ kwondũ wa ana ma Aluni
Joshua21:11 Na mamanenga Kiliathi‐aliva
Joshua21:12 Ĩndĩ isesi sya ndũa
Joshua21:13 Na manenga ana ma mũthembi Alinu Eviloni na syengo syayo
Joshua21:14 na Yatili na syengo syayo
Joshua21:15 na Oloni na syengo syayo
Joshua21:16 na Aini na syengo syayo
Joshua21:17 Na kuma mbaĩnĩ ya Mbenyamini
Joshua21:18 na Anathothi na syengo syayo
Joshua21:19 Ndũa syonthe sya ana ma Alini
Joshua21:20 Na mĩvĩa ya ana ma Koathi
Joshua21:21 Nao mamanenga Sekemu na syengo syayo yĩ nthĩ yĩ iĩma ya Evalaimu
Joshua21:22 na Kivisaimu na syengo syayo
Joshua21:23 Na kuma mbaĩnĩ ya Ndani
Joshua21:24 na Aĩyaloni na syengo syayo
Joshua21:25 Na kuma nyunzunĩ ya mbaĩ ya Manase
Joshua21:26 Ndũa syonthe sya mĩvĩa ya ana ala angĩ ma Koathi syaĩ ĩkũmi vamwe na syengo syasyo.
Joshua21:27 Na manenga ana ma Ngelisoni
Joshua21:28 Na kuma mbaĩnĩ ya Isakali
Joshua21:29 na Yalimuthi na syengo syayo
Joshua21:30 Na kuma mbaĩnĩ ya Aseli
Joshua21:31 na Elikathi na syengo syayo
Joshua21:32 Na kuma mbaĩnĩ ya Navitali
Joshua21:33 Ndũa syonthe sya Angelisoni kũatĩĩa mĩvĩa yoo syaĩ ndũa ĩkũmi na itatũ na syengo syasyo.
Joshua21:34 Na mĩvĩa ya ana ma Milali
Joshua21:35 na Ndimina na syengo syayo
Joshua21:36 Na kuma mbaĩnĩ ya Leuveni
Joshua21:37 na Ketemothi na syengo syayo
Joshua21:38 Na kuma mbaĩnĩ ya Ngati
Joshua21:39 na Esivoni na syengo syayo
Joshua21:40 Isu syonthe syaĩ ndũa sya ana ma Melali kũatĩĩa mĩvĩa yoo
Joshua21:41 Ndũa syonthe sya Alivai katĩ wa ng’ũndũ sya ana ma Isilaeli syaĩ mĩongo ĩna na nyanya na syengo syasyo.
Joshua21:42 Ndũa isu kĩla ĩmwe yaĩ na syengo syayo ithyũlũlũkĩte: ũu nĩw’o kwailyĩ ndũanĩ isu syonthe.
Joshua21:43 O ta ũu Yeova amanenga Isilaeli nthĩ yonthe ĩla wevĩtie kũnenga aaĩthe moo; na mamĩmesya
Joshua21:44 Na Yeova amanenga ũthũmũo ngalĩ syonthe
Joshua21:45 Kũtyaalea kwĩanĩw’a o na ũmwe wa moseo onthe ala Yeova wathie nyũmba ya Isilaeli; onthe nĩmeanĩw’e.
Joshua22:1 Na ĩndĩ Yosua ameta Aleuveni na Angati
Joshua22:2 na amea
Joshua22:3 mũtyaamatia ana‐a‐ĩthe menyu mĩthenya ĩsu mingĩ kũvika ũmũnthĩ
Joshua22:4 Na yu Yeova Ngai wenyu nũnengete ana‐a‐ĩthe menyu ũthũmũo
Joshua22:5 Ĩsũvĩei mũno mwĩkae ũtw’ĩo na mĩao ĩla Mose mũthũkũmi wa Yeova wamwĩaĩe
Joshua22:6 Na ĩndĩ Yosua amaathima
Joshua22:7 Na ĩndĩ Mose aĩ ananenga nyunzu ya mbaĩ ya Manase ũtiĩwa ku Mbasani; ĩndĩ nyunzu ĩla ĩngĩ Yosua amanenga katĩ wa ana‐a‐ĩthe moo mũingo wa Yolotani kwelekela ũthũĩlonĩ wa syũa. O na ĩngĩ yĩla Yosua wamaekie mathi maeemanĩ moo
Joshua22:8 na aneena nao
Joshua22:9 Na ana ma Leuveni na ana ma Ngati na nyunzu ya mbaĩ ya Manase masyoka
Joshua22:10 Na yĩla mavikie nthĩ ĩla yĩ ũtee wa Yolotani
Joshua22:11 Na ana ma Isilaeli meew’a kũkyaw’a
Joshua22:12 Na yĩla ana ma Isilaeli meewie ũu
Joshua22:13 Na ana ma Isilaeli matũma kwa ana ma Leuveni
Joshua22:14 na vamwe nake anene ĩkũmi
Joshua22:15 Na mamokĩa ana ma Leuveni
Joshua22:16 Ũũ nĩw’o ũmbano w’onthe wa Yeova ũkwasya
Joshua22:17 Naĩ ya Veoli no nini kwĩtũ
Joshua22:18 no mũvaka mwĩthyũũe ũmũnthĩ mũeke kũmũvikĩla Yeova? Na kũkeethĩwa atĩĩ
Joshua22:19 Ĩndĩ
Joshua22:20 Akani mwana wa Nzela ndaavĩtya kwondũ wa kwosa kĩndũ kĩla kĩvathĩtwe
Joshua22:21 Nĩvo ĩndĩ ana ma Leuveni na ana ma Ngati na nyunzu ya mbaĩ ya Manase masũngĩie
Joshua22:22 Ũla Mwene Vinya
Joshua22:23 atĩ nĩtwakĩte kĩthembeo twĩthyũũe tũeke kũmũvikĩla Yeova; kana ethĩwa nĩ kya kũthemba nthembo ya kũvĩvw’a kana nthembo ya mũtu ĩũlũ wakyo
Joshua22:24 na ethĩwa tũtyaaika ũndũ ũũ ũndũ wa kũsũvĩa
Joshua22:25 Nũndũ Yeova nũtw’ĩĩte Yolotani mũvaka katĩ waitũ nenyu
Joshua22:26 Kwondũ wa ũu twasya
Joshua22:27 ĩndĩ kĩkeethĩwa ũkũsĩ katĩ waitũ nenyu
Joshua22:28 Kwondũ wa ũu twasya
Joshua22:29 Nĩkwĩthĩwe kũasa naitũ kũmũng’endea Yeova
Joshua22:30 Na yĩla mũthembi Vineasi
Joshua22:31 Na Vineasi mwana wa mũthembi Eleasali amea ana ma Leuveni
Joshua22:32 Na Vineasi mwana wa mũthembi Eleasali
Joshua22:33 Na ũndũ ũsu wendeesya ana ma Isilaeli; na ana ma Isilaeli mamũtaĩa Ngai
Joshua22:34 Na ana ma Leuveni na ana ma Ngati makĩta kĩthembeo kyu Eti: masya
Joshua23:1 Na kweethĩwa ĩtina wa mĩthenya mingĩ
Joshua23:2 Yosua ameta Isilaeli onthe
Joshua23:3 na nĩmwonete ũndũ w’onthe ũla Yeova Ngai wenyu wĩkĩte mbaĩ ii syonthe nũndũ wenyu; nũndũ Yeova Ngai wenyu
Joshua23:4 Sisyai
Joshua23:5 Na Yeova Ngai wenyu
Joshua23:6 Kwondũ wa ũu ĩthĩwai na ũkũmbaũ mũnene mũsũvĩe na kwĩka w’onthe ũla ũandĩkĩtwe ĩvukunĩ ya mĩao ya Mose
Joshua23:7 nĩ kana mũtikalike katĩ wa mbaĩ ii
Joshua23:8 ĩndĩ lũman’yai na Yeova Ngai wenyu
Joshua23:9 Nũndũ Yeova nũlũngĩtye mbee wenyu mbaĩ nene syĩ vinya: ĩndĩ ũndũ wenyu
Joshua23:10 Mũndũ ũmwe wenyu akalũngya ngili; nũndũ Yeova Ngai nĩwe ũla ũmũkitĩaa
Joshua23:11 Ĩsũvĩei nesa ĩndĩ
Joshua23:12 Na ethĩwa nĩmũũsyoka o vanini
Joshua23:13 manyai ki Yeova Ngai wenyu ndakalũngya ĩngĩ mbaĩ ii iende vala mũtatonya kũsyona; ĩndĩ ikeethĩwa mũkwa na kĩtei kwenyu
Joshua23:14 Na
Joshua23:15 Na kũkeethĩwa
Joshua23:16 Yĩla mũkavĩtya ũtianĩo wa Yeova Ngai wenyu
Joshua24:1 Na Yosua oomban’ya mbaĩ syonthe sya Isilaeli ku Sekemu
Joshua24:2 Na Yosua amea andũ onthe
Joshua24:3 Na noosa ĩthe wenyu Avalaamu kũmumya mũingo wa ũla Ũsĩ
Joshua24:4 Na namũnenga Isaka
Joshua24:5 Na natũma Mose na Aluni
Joshua24:6 Na naumya aaĩthe menyu Misili: na mavika ũkanganĩ; na Amisili mamaatĩĩa aaĩthe menyu na makasya ma kaũ na andũ matũlĩte mbalasi kũvika Ũkanga Mũtune.
Joshua24:7 Na yĩla mamwĩkaĩlile Yeova
Joshua24:8 Na namũete nthĩ ya Aamoli
Joshua24:9 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Mbalaki mwana wa Nzivoli
Joshua24:10 ĩndĩ ndyaaĩtĩkĩla kũmwĩthukĩĩsya Mbalaamu; kwondũ wa ũu aendeea na ũmũathima: na ĩndĩ namũvonokya kuma kw’okonĩ kwake.
Joshua24:11 Na mwainga Yolotani
Joshua24:12 Na natũma yĩla ĩuĩ mbee wenyu
Joshua24:13 Na namũnenga nthĩ vala mũtaatethya wĩa
Joshua24:14 Kwondũ wa ũu ĩndĩ kĩai Yeova
Joshua24:15 Na ethĩwa nimũkwona nĩ ũthũku kũthũkũma Yeova
Joshua24:16 Na andũ masũngĩa na masya
Joshua24:17 nũndũ Yeova Ngai waitũ
Joshua24:18 na Yeova alũngya mbee waitũ ngo syonthe sya andũ
Joshua24:19 Na Yosua amea andũ
Joshua24:20 Ethĩwa mũkatia Yeova
Joshua24:21 Na andũ mamwĩa Yosua
Joshua24:22 Na Yosua amea andũ
Joshua24:23 Yũ ĩndĩ vetai ngai ngeni ila syĩ katĩ wenyu
Joshua24:24 Na andũ mamwĩa Yosua
Joshua24:25 Kwondũ wa ũu Yosua atianĩa ũtianĩo na andũ mũthenya ũsu
Joshua24:26 Na Yosua aandĩka ndeto isu ĩvukunĩ ya mĩao ya Ngai; na oosa ĩvia ĩnene
Joshua24:27 Na Yosua amea andũ onthe
Joshua24:28 Kwondũ wa ũu Yosua amombũũkya andũ mathi
Joshua24:29 Na kweethĩwa ĩtina wa maũndũ asu
Joshua24:30 Na mamũthika mũvakanĩ wa ũtiĩwa wake ku Timinathi‐selaa
Joshua24:31 Na Isilaeli mathũkũmaa Yeova mĩthenya yonthe ya Yosua
Joshua24:32 Na mavĩndĩ ma Yosevu
Joshua24:33 Na Eleasali
Judges1:1 Na kweethĩwa ĩtina wa kĩkw’ũ kya Yosua
Judges1:2 Na Yeova amea
Judges1:3 Na Yuta amwĩa Simeoni mwana‐a‐inyia
Judges1:4 Na Yuta ambata; na Yeova amanengane Akanaani na Avelisi mokonĩ moo: nao mamoaa ma asu andũ ngili ĩkũmi ku Mbeseki.
Judges1:5 Na mamwĩthĩa Atoni‐mbeseki ku Mbeseki; na mokita nake
Judges1:6 Ĩndĩ Atoni‐mbeseki akũka; na mamũatĩĩa
Judges1:7 Na Atoni‐mbeseki asya
Judges1:8 Na ana ma Yuta mokita na Yelusaleme
Judges1:9 Na ĩtina ana ma Yuta matheea kũkita na Akanaani ala matwĩe nthĩ yĩ iĩma
Judges1:10 Na Yuta mathi kũkita na Akanaani ala matwĩe Eviloni (na ĩndĩ syĩtwa ya Eviloni mbee yeetawa Kiliathi‐aliva); na makũna Sesai
Judges1:11 Na kuma vo aenda kũkita na ala matwĩe Ndevili. (Na syĩtwa ya Ndevili mbee yeetawa Kiliathi‐seveli.)
Judges1:12 Na Kalevu asya
Judges1:13 Na Othinieli mwana wa Kenasi
Judges1:14 Na kweethĩwa
Judges1:15 Nake amũsũngĩa
Judges1:16 Na ana ma Mũkeni
Judges1:17 Na Yuta athi na mwana‐a‐inyia Simeoni
Judges1:18 Vamwe na ũu Yuta akwata Ngasa vamwe na mĩvaka yayo
Judges1:19 Na Yeova aĩ vamwe na Yuta; nake amalũngya ala matwĩe nthĩ yĩ iĩma; nũndũ ndaatonya kũlũngya ala matwĩe mwandanĩ
Judges1:20 Na mamũnenga Kalevu Eviloni
Judges1:21 Na ana ma Mbenyamini matyaalũngya Ayevusi ala matwĩe Yelusaleme; ĩndĩ Ayevusi matũaa na ana ma Mbenyamini ku Yelusaleme kũvika ũmũnthĩ.
Judges1:22 Na nyũmba ya Yosevu
Judges1:23 Na nyũmba ya Yosevu matũmana makathiane Mbethi‐eli. (Na syĩtwa ya ndũa ĩsu mbee yeetawa Lusu.)
Judges1:24 Na athiani moona mũndũ okĩte kuma ĩ ndũanĩ
Judges1:25 Nake amon’ya ũlikĩlo wa ndũa ĩsu; namo makũna ĩ ndũa kwa kũtemanga na ũvyũ; ĩndĩ ũla mũndũ mamũeka vamwe na mũvĩa wake w’onthe.
Judges1:26 Na ũla mũndũ athi nthĩ ya Aititi
Judges1:27 Na Manase ndaalũngya ala matwĩe Mbethi‐seani na tũtũla twayo
Judges1:28 Na kweethĩwa
Judges1:29 Na Evalaimu ndaamalũngya Akanaani ala matwĩe Ngeseli; ĩndĩ Akanaani matũaa Ngeseli katĩ woo.
Judges1:30 Na Nzevuluni ndaamalũngya ala matwĩe Kiteloni
Judges1:31 Na Aseli ndaamalũngya ala matwie Ako
Judges1:32 ĩndĩ Aaseli matũaa vamwe na Akanaani
Judges1:33 Na Navitali ndaamalũngya ala matwĩe Mbethi‐semesi
Judges1:34 Na Aamol malũngĩlĩĩlya ana ma Ndani nthĩ yĩ iĩma; na matyaametĩkĩla matheee mwandanĩ;
Judges1:35 ĩndĩ Aamoli meevinyĩlĩlya kĩĩmanĩ kya Eelesi
Judges1:36 Na mũvaka wa Aamoli waumĩte kyambatonĩ kya Akilavimu
Judges2:1 Na mũlaĩka wa Yeova ambata kuma Ngilikali kũthi Mbokimu. Na asya
Judges2:2 nenyu mũtikaatianĩe ũtianĩo o na wĩva na ala matwĩe nthĩ ĩno; mwĩomboa ithembeo syoo. Ĩndĩ mũtyaaĩthukĩĩsya wasya wakwa: mwĩkaa ũu kĩ?
Judges2:3 Kwondũ wa ũu o nakwa nĩnaisye
Judges2:4 Na kweethĩwa
Judges2:5 Na meeta syĩtwa ya vandũ vau Mbokimu: na mamũthembea Yeova vo.
Judges2:6 Na ĩndĩ yĩla Yosua wamombũũkisye andũ
Judges2:7 Na andũ mamũthũkũmaa Yeova mĩthenya yonthe ya Yosua
Judges2:8 Na Yosua mwana wa Nuni
Judges2:9 Na mamũthika mũvakanĩ wa ũtiĩwa wake ku Timinathi‐eelesi
Judges2:10 O na andũ onthe ma nzyawa ĩsu yonthe moombanw’a vamwe na aaĩthe moo
Judges2:11 Na ana ma Isilaeli meekaa ũla Yeova wonaa wĩ ũthũku
Judges2:12 na mamũtia Yeova
Judges2:13 Na mamũtia Yeova
Judges2:14 Na ũthatu wa Yeova wakanĩa Isilaeli
Judges2:15 O kw’onthe kũla maendĩe kw’oko kwa Yeova kwaĩ ĩũlũ woo kwondũ wa ũthũku
Judges2:16 Na Yeova aũngamasya asili
Judges2:17 Na vamwe na ũu matyaamethukĩĩasya asili moo; nĩkwĩthĩwa nĩmeekaa ũmalwaya makĩatĩĩa ngai ingĩ
Judges2:18 Na yĩla Yeova wamaũngamĩsya asili
Judges2:19 Ĩndĩ kweethĩawa
Judges2:20 Na ũthatu wa Yeova wakanĩa Isilaeli; an asya
Judges2:21 nakwa nyie kuma yu ndikailũngya mbaĩ ila Yosua watialilye aikw’a syume vala maĩ;
Judges2:22 nĩ kana nĩmatatae Isilaeli nasyo ethĩwa makakwataa nzĩa ya Yeova mamĩendelae
Judges2:23 Kwondũ wa ũu Yeova aeka mbaĩ isũ
Judges3:1 Na ĩndĩ ii nĩsyo mbaĩ ila Yeova watialilye atatae Isilaeli nasyo
Judges3:2 no kana mosyaanĩo ma ana ma Isilaeli mamanyae
Judges3:3 na nĩsyo ii
Judges3:4 Nasyo saytiiwe sya kũtataa Isilaeli nasyo
Judges3:5 Na ana ma Isilaeli namo matũa katĩ wa Akanaani
Judges3:6 namo matwaa eĩtu ma asu methĩwe aka moo
Judges3:7 Na ana ma Isilaeli meekaa ũla Yeova wonaa wĩ ũthũku
Judges3:8 Kwondũ wa ũu ũthatu wa Yeova wakanĩa Isilaeli
Judges3:9 Na yĩla ana ma Isilaeli mamwĩkaĩlile Yeova
Judges3:10 Na veva wa Yeova ooka ĩũlũ wake
Judges3:11 Na ĩ nthĩ yathũmũa myaka mĩongo ĩna. Na Othinieli mwana wa Kenasi akw’a.
Judges3:12 Na ana ma Isilaeli meeka ĩngĩ ũla Yeova wonaa wĩ ũthũku: na Yeova amwĩkĩa Ekeloni mũsumbĩ wa Moavi vinya okite na Isilaeli
Judges3:13 Na Ekeloni amomban’ya kwake ana ma Amimoni na Amaleki; na athi na akũna Isilaeli
Judges3:14 Na ana ma Isilaeli mamũthũkũma Ekeloni mũsumbĩ wa Moavi myaka ĩkũmi na nyanya.
Judges3:15 Ĩndĩ yĩla ana ma Isilaeli mamwĩkaĩlile Yeova
Judges3:16 Na Euti eetuĩa ũvyũ waĩ mũĩ ngalĩ syelĩ
Judges3:17 Na amũnenga Ekeloni mũsumbĩ wa Moavi ũla mũvothi: na ĩndĩ Ekeloni aĩ mũndũ mũnou mũno.
Judges3:18 Na amina kũmũnenga mũvothi ũsu
Judges3:19 Ĩndĩ we mwene eetulũlĩle vala vasũvaw’a mĩvw’anano vakuvĩ na Ngilikali
Judges3:20 Na Euti ooka vala ũĩ; nake ekalĩte e weka nyũmbanĩ ya ĩũlũ ya mbevo. Na Euti asya
Judges3:21 Na Euti atambũũkya kw’oko kwake kwa aka
Judges3:22 na mbusya o nayo yalikanĩlya na ũvyũ; na mathunya malindĩla ũvyũ
Judges3:23 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Euti waumaalile valasyanĩ
Judges3:24 Na ĩndĩ yĩla waendie athũkũmi make mooka; namo moona
Judges3:25 Na meteelanga mũvaka meew’a nthoni; na
Judges3:26 Na Euti eevonokya yĩla meeteelete
Judges3:27 Na kweethĩwa
Judges3:28 Na amea
Judges3:29 Na ĩvinda yĩu makũna ma Moavi andũ ta ngili ĩkũmi
Judges3:30 Ũu nĩw’o Moavi wakĩlĩlw’e vinya mũthenya ũsu na kw’oko kwa Isilaeli. Na nthĩ yathũmũa myaka mĩongo nyanya.
Judges3:31 Na ĩtina wake kwaĩ Samukalĩ mwana wa Anathi
Judges4:1 Na ana ma Isilaeli meeka ĩngĩ ũla Yeova wonaa wĩ ũthũku
Judges4:2 Na Yeova amathoosya kw’okonĩ kwa Yavini mũsumbĩ wa Kanaani
Judges4:3 Na ana ma Isilaeli mamwĩkaĩla Yeova: nũndũ Sisela aĩ na makasya ma kaũ maana kenda ma iaa; na nĩwathĩnasya ana ma Isilaeli na vinya myaka mĩongo ĩlĩ.
Judges4:4 Na ĩvinda yĩu Ndevola
Judges4:5 Nake ekalaa ĩtina wa mũtende wa Ndevola
Judges4:6 Na atũmana Mbalaka aketwe
Judges4:7 Nakwa ngakũthengeesya Sisela ũsĩnĩ wa Kisoni
Judges4:8 Na Mbalaka amwĩa
Judges4:9 Nake amwĩa
Judges4:10 Na Mbalaka eeta a Nzevuluni na a Navitali mombane Ketesi; na mambata andũ ngili ĩkũmi mamũatĩĩe: na Ndevola ambata vamwe nake.
Judges4:11 Na ĩndĩ Eeveli Mũkeni nĩwevathanĩte na Akeni
Judges4:12 Na matavya Sisela kana Mbalaka mwana wa Avinoamu nĩwambatĩte kĩĩmanĩ kya Tavoli.
Judges4:13 Na Sisela oomban’ya kuma Alosethi ya Andũ‐ma‐mbaĩ‐ingĩ
Judges4:14 Na Ndevola amwĩa Mbalaka
Judges4:15 Na Yeova amũthokoan’ya Sisela
Judges4:16 Ĩndĩ Mbalaka aatĩĩa makasya ma kaũ na nguthu
Judges4:17 Ĩndĩ Sisela akũka na maũũ avika ĩeemanĩ ya Yaeli mũka wa Eeveli ũla Mũkeni; nũndũ kwaĩ mũuo katĩ wa Yavini mũsumbĩ wa Asoli na nyũmba ya Eeveli ũla Mũkeni.
Judges4:18 Na Yaeli athi amũthaũe Sisela
Judges4:19 Na amwĩa
Judges4:20 Na amwĩa
Judges4:21 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Yaeli mũka wa Eeveli wosie kyambo kya ĩeema
Judges4:22 Na
Judges4:23 Ũu nĩw’o Ngai wakĩlilye Yavini mũsumbĩ wa Kanaani vinya kwondũ wa ana ma Isilaeli mũthenya ũsu.
Judges4:24 Na kw’oko kwa ana ma Isilaeli kwakĩlya Yavini mũsumbĩ wa Kanaani vinya mbee na mbee
Judges5:1 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Ndevola na Mbalaka mwana wa Avinoamu mainie mũthenya ũsu
Judges5:2 Nũndũ atongoi nĩmatongoetye nthĩnĩ wa Isilaeli
Judges5:3 Ĩw’ai
Judges5:4 Yeova
Judges5:5 Iĩma syatetema Yeova e vo
Judges5:6 Mĩthenyanĩ ya Samukali mwana wa Anathi
Judges5:7 Asumbĩki mathela nthĩnĩ wa Isilaeli
Judges5:8 Nĩmanyuvie ngai ingĩ; Na ĩndĩ kwaĩ kaũ i mbingĩlonĩ: Nĩkwoonekie ngao kana ĩtumo Katĩ wa andũ ngili mĩongo ĩna ma Isilaeli?
Judges5:9 Ngoo yakwa nĩyelekele makavana ma Isilaeli
Judges5:10 Ũtavan’yei
Judges5:11 O kũasa na kĩlonzo kya ala ma mata
Judges5:12 Amũka
Judges5:13 Nĩvo ĩndĩ kwatheeie ũtialo wa anene me ndaĩa o na andũ; Yeova atheea kwondũ wakwa okite na ala me vinya mũnene.
Judges5:14 Kuma Evalaimu matheea ala kĩtina kyoo kĩ ku Amaleki; Ĩtina waku
Judges5:15 Na anene ma Isakali maĩ vamwe na Ndevola; O tondũ Isakali wailyĩ
Judges5:16 Wekalĩte syengonĩ sya malondu nĩkĩ
Judges5:17 Ngileati atwĩe mũingo wa Yolotani: Na Ndani
Judges5:18 Nzevuluni maĩ ũko wa andũ ũla walekilye mathayũ moo mũisyonĩ kũvika kĩkw’ũ
Judges5:19 Asumbĩ mooka na mokita; Nĩvo ĩndĩ asumbĩ ma Kanaani mokitĩe
Judges5:20 Ndata nĩsyokitie syĩ ĩtunĩ
Judges5:21 Ũsĩ wa Kisoni wamatwaa vyũ
Judges5:22 Nĩvo ĩndĩ mavũngũ ma mbalasi malumangya matuu Kwondũ wa kũtũlĩlanga
Judges5:23 Umanĩai Melosi

Judges6:1 Na ana ma Isilaeli meeka ũla Yeova wonaa wĩ ũthũku: na Yeova amanengane kw’okonĩ kwa Mitiani myaka mũonza.
Judges6:2 Na kw’oko kwa Mitiani kwakĩlya Isilaeli vinya; na nũndũ wa Mitiani ana ma Isilaeli nĩmeeseũvĩsye maima ala me iĩmanĩ
Judges6:3 Na kweethĩwa
Judges6:4 na mamba maeema mamataũĩĩe
Judges6:5 Nũndũ mo me na indo syoo na maeema moo nĩmambatie; malikile aingĩ ta ngie; mo na ngamĩle syoo ityaĩ italĩka: namo malika nthĩ ĩsu mamyanange.
Judges6:6 Na Isilaeli matheew’a mũno nũndũ wa Mitiani; na ana ma Isilaeli mamwĩkaĩla Yeova.
Judges6:7 Na kweethĩwa
Judges6:8 Yeova atũmĩa ana ma Isilaeli mwathanĩ: nake amea
Judges6:9 na nĩnamũvonokisye kuma mokonĩ ma Amisili
Judges6:10 na namwĩa
Judges6:11 Na mũlaĩka wa Yeova ooka na ekala ĩtina wa mũtĩ wa mwaloni ũla waĩ Ovala
Judges6:12 Na mũlaĩka wa Yeova amumĩlĩla
Judges6:13 Na Ngiteoni amwĩa
Judges6:14 Na Yeova amũsisya
Judges6:15 Nake amwĩa
Judges6:16 Na Yeova amwĩa
Judges6:17 Nake amwĩa
Judges6:18 Nĩngũkwĩsũva
Judges6:19 Na Ngiteoni alika nthĩnĩ
Judges6:20 Na ũla mũlaĩka wa Ngai amwĩa
Judges6:21 Na ĩndĩ mũlaĩka wa Yeova atwaa mũthya wa ndata ĩla yaĩ kw’okonĩ kwake
Judges6:22 Na Ngiteoni amanya atĩ ũsu eĩ mũlaĩka wa Yeova; na Ngiteoni asya
Judges6:23 Na Yeova amwĩa
Judges6:24 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Ngiteoni wamwakĩe Yeova kĩthembeo vu
Judges6:25 Na kweethĩwa ũtukũ o ũsu
Judges6:26 na mwakĩe Yeova Ngai waku kĩthembeo ĩũlũ wa ngome ĩno yĩ vinya
Judges6:27 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Ngiteoni wosie ĩkũmi ma athũkũmi make
Judges6:28 Na yĩla andũ ma ĩ ndũa mookĩlile kĩoko tene
Judges6:29 Na makũlan’ya ene kwa ene
Judges6:30 Nĩvo ĩndĩ andũ ma ndũa mamwĩie Yoasi
Judges6:31 Na Yoasi amakũlya onthe ala maũngamie matetan’ye nake
Judges6:32 Kwondũ wa ũu mũthenya ũsu amwĩta Ngiteoni Yelumbaali
Judges6:33 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Amitiani na Aamaleki onthe na ana ma ngalĩ ya wumĩlonĩ wa syũa moombanie vamwe; na mainga na mamba maeema mwandanĩ wa Yesileeli.
Judges6:34 Ĩndĩ Veva wa Yeova ooka ĩũlũ wa Ngiteoni; na avuva soo; na Avieseli moombana mamũatĩĩe.
Judges6:35 Nake atũma atũmwa kwa Manase kw’onthe; o namo moombana mamũatĩĩe: na atũma atũmwa kwa Aseli
Judges6:36 Na Ngiteoni amwĩa Ngai
Judges6:37 sisya

Judges6:39 Na Ngiteoni amwĩa Ngai
Judges6:40 Na Ngai eeka ũu ũtukũ ũsu: nũndũ ũ w’ĩa now’o waĩ mũmũ

Judges7:7 Na Yeova amwĩa Ngiteoni
Judges7:8 Na ĩndĩ andũ asu makua lĩu na masoo moo na moko moo; na amea andũ onthe ma Isilaeli kĩla mũndũ enũke ĩeemanĩ yake

Judges7:12 Na Amitiani na Aamaleki na ana ma ngalĩ ya wumĩlonĩ wa syũa menyaĩtye mwandanĩ me aingĩ ta ngie; na ngamĩle syoo ityaĩ italĩka
Judges7:13 Na yĩla Ngiteoni wavikie vo

Judges9:1 Na Avimeleki mwana wa Yelumbaali athi Sekemu kwa aaĩnaũme
Judges9:2 Nĩngũmwĩsũva
Judges9:3 Na mbaa ĩnaũme maneena ndeto ĩsu syonthe ũndũ wake matũnĩ ma andũ onthe ma Sekemu: na ngoo syoo syenda kũatĩĩa Avimeleki; nũndũ maisye
Judges9:4 Na mamũnenga ilungu sya vetha mĩongo mũonza kuma nyũmbanĩ ya Mbaali‐mbelithi
Judges9:5 Na athi nyũmbanĩ ya ĩthe ku Ovala
Judges9:6 Na andũ onthe ma Sekemu moombana vamwe
Judges9:7 Na yĩla mamũtavisye Yothamu
Judges9:8 Ĩvinda yĩmwe mĩtĩ nĩyaendie kwĩtĩkĩsya ũmwe mauta wĩthĩwe mũsumbĩ wayo; na yeea mũthata
Judges9:9 Ĩndĩ mũthata wamĩtavya
Judges9:10 Na mĩtĩ yeea mũkũyũ

Judges9:12 Na mĩtĩ yeea mũsavivũ
Judges9:13 Na mũsavivũ wamĩtavya
Judges9:14 Nĩvo ĩndĩ mĩtĩ yonthe yatavisye mũtae
Judges9:15 Na mũtae watavya mĩtĩ
Judges9:16 Na yu ĩndĩ
Judges9:17 (nũndũ nau nĩwamũkitĩe
Judges9:18 nenyu nĩmũmyũkĩlĩĩle nyũmba ya nau mũnthĩ ũũ
Judges9:19 ethĩwa ĩndĩ nĩmwĩkĩte Yelumbaali na nyũmba yake w’o na ũlũngalu mũnthĩ ũũ
Judges9:20 ĩndĩ ethĩwa ti ũu
Judges9:21 Na Yothamu asemba
Judges9:22 Na Avimeleki aĩ mũnene wa Isilaeli myaka ĩtatũ.
Judges9:23 Na Ngai atũma veva mũthũku katĩ wa Avimeleki na andũ ma Sekemu; na andũ ma Sekemu mamwĩka Avimeleki naĩ na ũkengani:
Judges9:24 nĩ kana ũla ũng’endu weekiwe andũ mĩongo mũonza ma Yelumbaali wũke
Judges9:25 Na andũ ma Sekemu maia oveesya mĩtumbĩnĩ ya iĩma
Judges9:26 Na Ngaali mwana wa Eveti ooka na ana‐a‐ĩthe
Judges9:27 Na mauma mathi mĩũndanĩ
Judges9:28 Na Ngaali mwana wa Eveti asya
Judges9:29 Nenda kethĩwa andũ aa me kw’okonĩ kwakwa! Nĩvo ĩndĩ nĩthĩwa nĩmũveta Avimeleki. Na amwĩa Avimeleki
Judges9:30 Na yĩla Nzevuli mũsumbĩki wa ndũa wewie ndeto sya Ngaali mwana wa Eveti
Judges9:31 Na atũma atũmwa na ũseleke kwa Avimeleki
Judges9:32 Na yu kwondũ wa ũu
Judges9:33 na kũkeethĩwa kĩoko
Judges9:34 Na Avimeleki ookĩla ũtukũ
Judges9:35 Na Ngaali mwana wa Eveti aumaala
Judges9:36 Na yĩla Ngaali wonie andũ
Judges9:37 Na Ngaali aneena ĩngĩ na asya
Judges9:38 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Nzevuli wamwĩie
Judges9:39 Na Ngaali aumaala e mbee wa andũ ma Sekemu
Judges9:40 Na Avimeleki amũkũa
Judges9:41 Na Avimeleki atũa Aluma: na Nzevuli alũngya Ngaali na ana‐a‐ĩthe matikatũe Sekemu.
Judges9:42 Na kweethĩwa ũnĩ ũsu
Judges9:43 Na oosa andũ na amaaan’ya nguthu itatũ
Judges9:44 Na Avimeleki
Judges9:45 Na Avimeleki okita na andũ ma ndũa ĩsu mũthenya ũsu w’onthe; na akwata ĩ ndũa
Judges9:46 Na yĩla andũ onthe ma mwako mũtũlu wa mũnyoolo wa Sekemu meewĩe ũvoo ũsu
Judges9:47 Na Avimeleki atavw’a kana andũ onthe ma mwako mũtũlu wa mũnyoolo wa Sekemu nĩmombanĩte vamwe.
Judges9:48 Na Avimeleki ambata kĩĩmanĩ kya Nzalĩmoni
Judges9:49 Na andũ asu onthe matema o take kĩla mũndũ ũvonge wake
Judges9:50 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Avimeleki waendie Thevesi

Judges9:52 Na Avimeleki avika vala ve ũ mwako mũtũlu wa mũnyoolo
Judges9:53 Na mũndũ mũka ũmwe alekya nthio ya ĩvia mũtwenĩ wa Avimeleki
Judges9:54 Nĩvo ĩndĩ wetie na mĩtũkĩ mwanake ũla wamũkuĩaa mĩio yake ya kaũ
Judges9:55 Na yila andũ ma Isilaeli moonie kana Avimeleki nĩwakw’a
Judges9:56 Ũu nĩw’o Ngai wamũĩvie Avimeleki ũthũku wake
Judges9:57 na Ngai nĩwaĩvanĩĩsye ũthũku w’onthe wa andũ ma Sekemu mĩtwenĩ yoo: na kĩumo kya Yothamu mwana wa Yelumbaali nĩkyamakwatie.

Judges13:2 Na kwaĩ mũndũ ũmwe wa ku Nzola
Judges13:3 Na mũlaĩka wa Yeova amumĩlĩla ũ mũndũ mũka
Judges13:4 Kwondũ wa ũu ĩndĩ ĩsũvĩe
Judges13:5 nũndũ
Judges13:6 Na ĩndĩ ũ mũndũ mũka ooka na atavya mũũme
Judges13:7 ĩndĩ ambĩa
Judges13:8 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Manoa wamũvoyie Yeova
Judges13:9 Na Ngai eethukĩĩsya wasya wa Manoa; na ũla mũlaĩka wa Ngai amũkĩa ũla mũndũ mũka ĩngĩ ailyĩ mũũndanĩ: ĩndĩ Manoa mũũme wake ndaĩ nake.
Judges13:10 Na ũ mũndũ mũka eekalaata
Judges13:11 Na Manoa ookĩla
Judges13:12 Na Manoa asya

Judges13:15 Na Manoa eea ũla mũlaĩka wa Yeova

Judges13:18 Na mũlaĩka wa Yeova amwĩa
Judges13:19 Na ĩndĩ Manoa oosanĩsya katena ka mbũi na nthembo ya mũtu
Judges13:20 Nũndũ kweethĩiwe
Judges13:21 Ĩndĩ ũla mũlaĩka wa Yeova ndanaumĩlĩla Manoa kana mũka ĩngĩ. Nĩvo ĩndĩ Manoa wamanyie kana eĩ mũlaĩka wa Yeova.
Judges13:22 Na Manoa eea mũka
Judges13:23 Ĩndĩ mũka amwĩa
Judges13:24 Na ũ mũndũ mũka asyaa mwana
Judges13:25 Na Veva wa Yeova ambĩlĩlya kũmwĩkĩthya maũndũ ku Maane‐ndani
Judges14:1 Na Samusoni atheea Timina
Judges14:2 Na ambata
Judges14:3 Nĩvo ĩndĩ ĩthe na nyinyia mamũkũlilye
Judges14:4 Ĩndĩ ĩthe na nyinyia matyaamanya kana ũndũ ũsu waĩ wa Yeova; nũndũ nĩwamanthaa ũndũ kwa Avilisiti. Na ĩvinda yĩu Avilisiti nĩmasumbĩkĩte Isilaeli.
Judges14:5 Na ĩndĩ Samusoni atheea Timina
Judges14:6 Na Veva wa Yeova ooka ĩũlũ wake na vinya
Judges14:7 Na atheea
Judges14:8 Na itinanga asyoka amũtwae; na aathũka asisye kĩla kimba kya mũnyambũ: na
Judges14:9 Na atwa na moko make
Judges14:10 Na ĩthe atheea kwa ũ mũndũ mũka: na Samusoni avoka mboka e kw’o; nũndũ nĩw’o anake meekaa.
Judges14:11 Na kweethĩwa
Judges14:12 Na Samusoni amea
Judges14:13 ĩndĩ ethĩwa mũtitonya kũndavya yo
Judges14:14 Na amea
Judges14:15 Na kweethĩwa mũthenya wa mũonza
Judges14:16 Na mũka wa Samusoni aĩa e mbee wake
Judges14:17 Na aĩa e mbee wake mĩthenya mũonza
Judges14:18 Na andũ ma ĩ ndũa mũthenya ũsu wa mũonza syũa yĩtanathũa mamũkũlya
Judges14:19 Na Veva wa Yeova ooka na vinya ĩũlũ wake
Judges14:20 Ĩndĩ mũka wa Samusoni anenganwe kwa mũtindan’ya wake

Judges15:7 Na Samusoni amea
Judges15:8 Na amavĩlĩa maũũ na mawaswa na ũai mũnene: na atheea na atũa mũvatĩnĩ wa ĩvĩa ya Etamu.

Judges15:10 Na andũ ma Yuta mamakũlya

Judges16:20 Na asya

Judges16:22 Indĩ nzw’ĩĩ sya mũtwe wake syambĩlĩlya kwĩana ĩngĩ ĩtina wa eenzwa.
Judges16:23 Na ala eaĩi ma Avilisiti moombana vamwe nĩ kana mamũthembee Ndakoni ngai yoo nthembo nene

Judges17:1 Na kwaĩ mũndũ wa nthĩ yĩ iĩma ya Evalaimu
Judges17:2 Na amwĩa inyia wake

Judges17:4 Na yĩla wamũtũngĩie inyia wake ũla vetha
Judges17:5 Na mũndũ ũsu Mika aĩ na nyũmba ya i ngai
Judges17:6 Mĩthenya ĩsu kũtyaĩ mũsumbĩ nthĩnĩ wa Isilaeli: kĩla mũndũ eekaa o ũndũ wonaa wĩ ũseo.

Judges17:10 Na Mika amwĩa

Judges17:12 Na Mika avatha ũla Mũlivai
Judges17:13 Na ĩndĩ Mika asya
Judges18:1 Mĩthenya ĩsu kũtyaĩ mũsumbĩ nthĩnĩ wa Isilaeli: na mĩthenya ĩsu mbaĩ ya Andani meemanthĩa ũtiĩwa matũae; nũndũ kũvika mũthenya ũsu ũtiĩwa woo ndwaĩ ũnamba ũmavalũkĩla mbaĩnĩ sya Isilaeli.
Judges18:2 Na ana ma Ndani matũma andũ atano ma mũvĩa woo kuma ũtalonĩ woo w’onthe
Judges18:3 Me vakuvĩ na nyũmba ya Mika
Judges18:4 Nake amea
Judges18:5 Na mamwĩa
Judges18:6 Na mũthembi amea
Judges18:7 Nĩvo ĩndĩ ala andũ atano maendie
Judges18:8 Na mavika kwa ana‐a‐inyia moo ku Nzola na Esitaoli: na ana‐a‐inyia mamakũlya
Judges18:9 Na mamea
Judges18:10 Yĩla mwĩthi
Judges18:11 Na kw’o kwauma andũ maana thanthatũ mekĩe mĩio ya kaũ ma mũvĩa wa Andani
Judges18:12 Na mambata
Judges18:13 Na mavĩta kuma ku mavika nthĩ yĩ iĩma ya Evalaimu
Judges18:14 Nĩvo ĩndĩ ala andũ atano ala maendie kũthiana nthĩ ya Laisa masũngĩie na mamea ana‐a‐ĩthe moo
Judges18:15 Nao meelelũkĩĩla vo
Judges18:16 Na ala andũ maana thanthatũ mekĩe mĩio ya kaũ
Judges18:17 Na ala andũ atano ala maendie kũthiana ĩla nthĩ mambata
Judges18:18 Na yĩla asu malikile nyũmbanĩ ya Mika
Judges18:19 Nao mamwĩa
Judges18:20 Na ngoo ya mũthembi yatana
Judges18:21 Na ĩndĩ meethyũũa na maenda
Judges18:22 Na yĩla maĩ kũasa na nyũmba ya Mika
Judges18:23 Na mamanĩĩsya ana ma Ndani. Nao mathyũũa mothyũ moo
Judges18:24 Nake asya
Judges18:25 Na andũ ma Ndani mamwĩa
Judges18:26 Na ana ma Ndani meendea: na yĩla Mika wonie kana me na vinya kwĩ we
Judges18:27 Namo matwaa kĩla Mika waseũvĩtye
Judges18:28 Na kũtyaĩ mũvonokya
Judges18:29 Na meeta syĩtwa ya ndũa ĩsu Ndani
Judges18:30 Na ana ma Ndani meeũngamĩsya ũla mũvw’anano mwasũvye; na Yonathani
Judges18:31 Na ĩndĩ meeũngamĩsya mũvw’anano mwasũvye wa Mika ũla waseũvĩtye
Judges19:1 Na kweethĩwa mĩthenya ĩsu
Judges19:2 Na mũndũ mũka ũsu ngombo amũthĩn’ya kwa kwĩka ũmalwaya
Judges19:3 Na mũũme ookĩla
Judges19:4 Na mũthoni
Judges19:5 Na kweethĩwa mũthenya wa kana
Judges19:6 Na ĩndĩ mekala nthĩ
Judges19:7 Na ũla mũndũ ookĩla nĩ kana aende; ĩndĩ mũthoni amũthetheesya mũno
Judges19:8 Na ookĩla kĩoko tene mũthenya wa katano nĩ kana athi; na ĩthe wa ũla mwĩĩtu amwĩa
Judges19:9 Na yĩla ũla mũndũ wokĩlile nĩ kana aende
Judges19:10 Ĩndĩ ũla mũndũ ndaaĩtĩkĩla kwĩkala ũtukũ ũsu
Judges19:11 Yĩla maĩ vakuvĩ na Yevusi
Judges19:12 Na vwana wake amwĩa
Judges19:13 Na amwĩa mũthũkũmi wake
Judges19:14 Na ĩndĩ mavĩta na meeendea; na syũa yamathũĩĩa me vakuvĩ na Ngivea
Judges19:15 Nao meelelũkĩĩla vo
Judges19:16 Na
Judges19:17 Nake ookĩlya metho make
Judges19:18 Nake amwĩa
Judges19:19 Ĩndĩ ve ũa na lĩu wa mang’oi maitũ; na ve lĩu na mbinyu nayo kwondũ wakwa
Judges19:20 Na ũla mũtumĩa asya
Judges19:21 Na ĩndĩ amũtwaa nyũmbanĩ yake
Judges19:22 Na makĩtan’ya ngoo syoo
Judges19:23 Na ũla mũndũ
Judges19:24 Sisya

Judges19:26 Nĩvo ĩndĩ mũndũ mũka ũsu wokie kĩoko kũitheana
Judges19:27 Na mwĩaĩi wake ookĩla kĩoko
Judges19:28 Na amwĩa
