Nehemiah12:35 na amwe ma ana ma athembi me na masoo: Nzekalia mwana wa Yonathani
Nehemiah12:36 vamwe na ana‐a‐ĩthe make
Nehemiah12:37 Na vakuvĩ na mbingĩlo ya nthongo ya manzĩ
Nehemiah12:38 Na nguthu ĩla ĩngĩ yamo ĩla yatũngaa mũvea yamathaũa
Nehemiah12:39 na mbee wa mbingĩlo ya Evalaimu
Nehemiah12:40 Ũu nĩw’o nguthu isu ilĩ sya ala matũngĩaa mũvea nyũmbanĩ ya Ngai syaũngamie
Nehemiah12:41 na athembi
Nehemiah12:42 na Maaseia
Nehemiah12:43 Na mathemba nthembo nyingĩ mũthenya ũsu
Nehemiah12:44 Na mũthenya ũsu andũ nĩmaiiwe masũvĩe tũsũmba tũla twa mothwii maie
Nehemiah12:45 Na masũvĩaa wĩaĩo wa Ngai woo
Nehemiah12:46 Nũndũ mĩthenyanĩ ya Ndaviti na Asavu ya tene kwaĩ mũtongoesya wa aini
Nehemiah12:47 Na mĩthenyanĩ ya Nzeluvaveli
Nehemiah13:1 Mũthenya ũsu nĩmasomie ĩvukunĩ ya Mose andũ makĩw’a; na nĩkwoonekie kũandĩkĩtwe nthĩnĩ wayo
Nehemiah13:2 nĩkwĩthĩwa matyaamathaũsya ana ma Isilaeli kĩmũtũ na manzĩ
Nehemiah13:3 Na kweethĩwa
Nehemiah13:4 Na ĩndĩ ũu ũtanekĩka
Nehemiah13:5 aĩ anamũseũvĩsya kasũmba kanene
Nehemiah13:6 Ĩndĩ ĩvinda yu yonthe ndyaĩ Yelusaleme; nũndũ nĩnaendie kwa mũsumbĩ mwaka wa mĩongo ĩtatũ na ĩlĩ wa kũsumbĩka kwa Alitasasita mũsumbĩ wa Mbaviloni: na ĩtina wa mĩthenya ĩmwe namwĩtya mũsumbĩ ũthei wa kũthi
Nehemiah13:7 na navika Yelusaleme
Nehemiah13:8 Na ũndũ ũsu wambĩw’ĩthya woo mũno: kwondũ wa ũu nekĩĩsya nza syĩndũ syonthe vyũ sya Tovia kũsyumya kasũmbanĩ.
Nehemiah13:9 Nĩvo ĩndĩ neeaie
Nehemiah13:10 Na namanya Alivai matyaanengwa ilungu syoo; na ĩndĩ Alivai na aini
Nehemiah13:11 Na ĩndĩ natetan’ya na asumbĩki
Nehemiah13:12 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Yuta onthe maetie kĩlungu kya ĩkũmi kya lĩu wa mbaa ngetha na mbinyu mbĩthĩ na mauta kũla kwiawa syĩndũ.
Nehemiah13:13 Na naia asũvĩi ma ũsũvĩaa kũla kwiawa ũthwii
Nehemiah13:14 Ame Ngai wakwa
Nehemiah13:15 Mĩthenya ĩsu nĩnoonie Yuta andũ amwe makĩkinyanga iangĩo sya mbinyu savatonĩ
Nehemiah13:16 O na andũ ma Tile nĩmatwĩe vo nthĩnĩ
Nehemiah13:17 Nĩvo ĩndĩ natetanisye na anene me ndaĩa ma Yuta
Nehemiah13:18 Aaĩthe menyu matyaaĩka ũu
Nehemiah13:19 Na kweethĩwa
Nehemiah13:20 Kwondũ wa ũu atandĩthya na athoosya ma mĩthemba yonthe ya syĩndũ makoma ũtee wa Yelusaleme ĩvinda yĩmwe kana kelĩ.
Nehemiah13:21 Nĩvo ĩndĩ namakũsĩĩie
Nehemiah13:22 Nakwa nameaĩa Alivai meevathan’ye methĩwe atheu
Nehemiah13:23 O na mĩthenya ĩsu nĩnoonie Ayuti ala matwaĩte aka ma Asitoti
Nehemiah13:24 na ana moo nĩmaneenaa nyunzu ya kĩthyomo kya Asitoti
Nehemiah13:25 Nakwa natetan’ya nao
Nehemiah13:26 Solomoni mũsumbĩ wa Isilaeli ndaaĩka naĩ maũndũnĩ asu? Ĩndĩ mbaĩnĩ nyingĩ vatyaĩ mũsumbĩ wailyĩ take
Nehemiah13:27 Tũkamwĩw’a inyw’ĩ ĩndĩ twĩke ũthũku ũũ w’onthe
Nehemiah13:28 Na mwana ũmwe wa Yoiata
Nehemiah13:29 Ame Ngai wakwa
Nehemiah13:30 Ũu nĩw’o namatheisye ngĩmavathan’ya na andũ onthe ma nthĩ ĩngĩ
Nehemiah13:31 na ũndũ wa nthembo ya ngũ
Esther1:1 Na kweethĩwa mĩthenyanĩ ya Aasuelo (Aasuelo ũsu nĩ ũla wasumbĩkĩte kuma India o na kũvika Ethiovia
Esther1:2 mĩthenya ĩsu
Esther1:3 mwaka wa katatũ wa kũsumbĩka kwake
Esther1:4 nĩvo wonanisye ũthwii wa ũsumbĩ wake mũnene na ndaĩa ya ũnene wake mwingĩ mĩthenya mingĩ
Esther1:5 Na matukũ asu meanĩa
Esther1:6 Vaniinĩtw’e ngũa nzaũ
Esther1:7 Na mamanenga manyw’ĩe mĩionĩ ya thaavu (mĩio ĩla yaĩ kĩvathũkan’yo ũmwe na ũla ũngĩ)
Esther1:8 Na kũnyw’a kũu kwaĩ o kwĩanana na mwĩao; vatyaĩ ũtonya kũingĩĩw’a: nũndũ ũu mũsumbĩ nĩwatw’ĩte kwa anene onthe ma nyũmba yake
Esther1:9 Nake Vasiti mũka wa mũsumbĩ avokea iveti ila syaĩ nyũmbanĩ ya kĩũsumbĩ ya mũsumbĩ Aasuelo mboka.
Esther1:10 Mũthenya wa mũonza
Esther1:11 mamũete Vasiti mũka wa mũsumbĩ mbee wa mũsumbĩ e na ngovia ya kĩũsumbĩ
Esther1:12 Ĩndĩ Vasiti mũka wa mũsumbĩ alea kũka kwondũ wa mwĩao wa mũsumbĩ ũla watwaĩwe nĩ ala avakũe: kwondũ wa ũu mũsumbĩ athilĩka mũno
Esther1:13 Nĩvo ĩndĩ mũsumbĩ wakũlilye andũ oĩ
Esther1:14 na ala mamũatĩĩe ũnenenĩ maĩ Kalisena
Esther1:15 Twĩmwĩka ata Vasiti mũka wa mũsumbĩ kwĩanana na mwĩao
Esther1:16 Na Memukani asũngĩa vala ve mũsumbĩ na anene mbee ũsumbĩnĩ
Esther1:17 Nũndũ wĩko ũũ wa mũka wa mũsumbĩ ũkanyaĩĩkw’a kwa aka onthe
Esther1:18 Na mũnthĩ ũũ aka ma anene me mbee ũsumbĩnĩ ma Velisia na Metia
Esther1:19 Ethĩwa nĩwendeesya mũsumbĩ
Esther1:20 Na yĩla ũtw’ĩo wa mũsumbĩ ũla wĩumya wĩnyaĩĩkw’a ũsumbĩnĩ wake w’onthe (nũndũ nĩ mũnene)
Esther1:21 Na ndeto ĩsu yendeesya mũsumbĩ na anene me mbee ũsumbĩnĩ; na mũsumbĩ eeka o kwĩanana na ndeto ya Memukani:
Esther1:22 nũndũ nĩwatwaie mavalũa ilungunĩ nene syonthe sya nthĩ sya mũsumbĩ
Esther2:1 Ĩtina wa maũndũ asu
Esther2:2 Nĩvo ĩndĩ athũkũmi ma mũsumbĩ ala mamũthũkũmaa mamwĩie
Esther2:3 na mũsumbĩ naie anene ilungunĩ nene syonthe sya nthĩ sya ũsumbĩ wake
Esther2:4 na mwĩĩtu ũla wĩendeesya mũsumbĩ natw’ĩke mũka wa mũsumbĩ vandũ va Vasiti. Na ũndũ ũsu wendeesya mũsumbĩ; na eeka ũu.
Esther2:5 Na kwaĩ Mũyuti ũmwe nyũmbanĩ ya ũsumbĩ ku Susani
Esther2:6 ũla watwaĩtwe kuma Yelusaleme na ala matavĩtwe vamwe na Yekonĩa mũsumbĩ wa Yuta
Esther2:7 Nake amũea Atasisa
Esther2:8 Na kweethĩwa
Esther2:9 Na ũla mwĩĩtu amwendeesya
Esther2:10 Esita ndaamanyĩthan’ya andũ make kana ũko wake; nũndũ Molitekai nĩwamwĩaĩĩte kana ndakaamanyĩthan’ye.
Esther2:11 Na Molitekai nĩwangangaa kĩla mũthenya mbee wa nza ya nyũmba ya aka
Esther2:12 Na ĩndĩ yĩla kyathĩ kyavikie kya kĩla mwĩĩtu kũenda kwa mũsumbĩ Aasuelo
Esther2:13 nĩvo ĩndĩ kĩla mwĩĩtu waendie kwa mũsumbĩ kũatĩĩa maũndũ aa: kĩla wendaa nĩwanengiwe kũthi nakyo kuma nyũmbanĩ ya aka kũvika nyũmbanĩ ya mũsumbĩ.
Esther2:14 Athi wĩoo
Esther2:15 Na ĩndĩ yĩla kyathĩ kya Esita kyavikie kya kũthi kwa mũsumbĩ
Esther2:16 Na ĩndĩ Esita atwawa kwa mũsumbĩ Aasuelo nyũmbanĩ yake ya kĩũsumbĩ mwei wa ĩkũmi
Esther2:17 Na mũsumbĩ endie Esita kwĩ aka ala angĩ onthe
Esther2:18 Nĩvo ĩndĩ mũsumbĩ wamavokee anene make onthe me mbee ũsumbĩnĩ na athũkũmi make mboka nene
Esther2:19 Na yĩla eĩtu asu atheu moombaniw’e ĩvinda ya kelĩ
Esther2:20 Esita ndaĩ anamba kũmanyĩthan’ya ũko wake kana andũ make; o tondũ Molitekai wamwĩaĩĩte: nũndũ Esita eekĩte o tondũ Molitekai wamwĩaĩaa
Esther2:21 Mĩthenya ĩsu
Esther2:22 Na ũndũ ũsu wamanyĩka nĩ Molitekai
Esther2:23 Na yĩla ũndũ ũsu wakũlanganilw’e
Esther3:1 Ĩtina wa maũndũ asu mũsumbĩ Aasuelo amũnenevya Amani mwana wa Ametatha Mũakaki
Esther3:2 Na athũkũmi onthe ma mũsumbĩ
Esther3:3 Nĩvo ĩndĩ athũkũmi ma mũsumbĩ
Esther3:4 Na ĩndĩ kweethĩwa
Esther3:5 Na yĩla Amani wonie kana Molitekai ndaakunama
Esther3:6 Ĩndĩ asũanĩa ndwĩanĩa kũmũkwata Molitekai e weka; nũndũ nĩmamũmanyĩthĩtye ũko wa andũ wa Molitekai: kwondũ wa ũu Amani amantha kũmananga Ayuti onthe ala maĩ ũsumbĩnĩ w’onthe wa Aasuelo
Esther3:7 Mwei wa mbee
Esther3:8 Na Amani amwĩa mũsumbĩ Aasuelo
Esther3:9 Ethĩwa nĩkwendeesya mũsumbĩ
Esther3:10 Na mũsumbĩ aumya ngome yake kyaanĩ kyake
Esther3:11 Na mũsumbĩ amwĩa Amani
Esther3:12 Nĩvo ĩndĩ aandĩki ma mũsumbĩ meetiwe mwei wa mbee
Esther3:13 Na mavalũa matwawa nĩ atwai ma mavalũa ilungunĩ nene syonthe sya nthĩ sya mũsumbĩ
Esther3:14 Na wumĩĩsyo wa ũla ũandĩko
Esther3:15 Atwai ma mavalũa mathi mekalaatĩte nũndũ wa mwĩao wa mũsumbĩ
Esther4:1 Na ĩndĩ yĩla Molitekai wamanyie w’onthe ũla wĩkĩtwe
Esther4:2 na ooka o vu mbee wa mbingĩlo ya kwa mũsumbĩ: nũndũ vatyaĩ ũtonya kũlika mbingĩlonĩ kwa mũsumbĩ ekĩe makunia.
Esther4:3 Na kĩla kĩlungu kĩnene kya nthĩ
Esther4:4 Na eĩtu athũkũmi ma Esita na avakũe ma kwake mooka na mamũtavya; na mũka wa mũsumbĩ eew’a woo mũnene mũno: na anengane ngũa ĩkekĩwe Molitekai
Esther4:5 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Esita wetie Athaki
Esther4:6 Na ĩndĩ Athaki aenda vala ve Molitekai vala vandũ vathanthau va ndũa
Esther4:7 Na Molitekai amũtavya w’onthe ũla ũmũkĩtĩkĩe
Esther4:8 Na ĩndĩ amũnenga wumĩĩsyo wa ũandĩko wa ũla ũtw’ĩo ũla watavaniw’e vu Susani wa kũmamina
Esther4:9 Na Athaki ooka na atavya Esita ndeto sya Molitekai.
Esther4:10 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Esita waneenie na Athaki
Esther4:11 Athũkũmi onthe ma mũsumbĩ
Esther4:12 Na matavya Molitekai ndeto sya Esita.
Esther4:13 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Molitekai wameaĩe mamũtũngĩe Esita ũsũngĩo
Esther4:14 Nũndũ ethĩwa ũkavindya ki ĩvinda yĩĩ
Esther4:15 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Esita wameaĩe mamũtũngĩe Molitekai ũsũngĩo
Esther4:16 Enda
Esther4:17 Na ĩndĩ Molitekai eeyĩendea
Esther5:1 Na ĩndĩ kweethĩwa mũthenya wa katatũ
Esther5:2 Na kweethĩwa
Esther5:3 Nĩvo ĩndĩ mũsumbĩ wamũkũlilye
Esther5:4 Na Esita amwĩa
Esther5:5 Nĩvo ĩndĩ mũsumbĩ waisye
Esther5:6 Na mũsumbĩ amũkũlĩlya Esita vu mbokanĩ ya mbinyu
Esther5:7 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Esita wasũngĩie
Esther5:8 Ethĩwa nĩnonete ũseo methonĩ ma mũsumbĩ
Esther5:9 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Amani aumaala mũthenya ũsu e mũtanu na e na mũyo ngoonĩ: ĩndĩ yĩla Amani wonie Molitekai mbingĩlonĩ kwa mũsumbĩ
Esther5:10 Ĩndĩ Amani eesiĩĩa mwene
Esther5:11 Na Amani amatalĩla ũnene wa mothwii make
Esther5:12 Na ĩngĩ Amani amea
Esther5:13 Ĩndĩ ũu w’onthe kwakwa no ta mana
Esther5:14 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Nzelesi mũka wake na anyanyae make onthe mamwĩie
Esther6:1 Ũtukũ ũsu mũsumbĩ ndaatonya kũkoma; nake eeaa mavuku ma molilikan’yo ma mavinda maetwe
Esther6:2 Na vooneka vaandĩkĩtwe
Esther6:3 Na mũsumbĩ akũlya
Esther6:4 Na mũsumbĩ akũlya
Esther6:5 Na athũkũmi ma mũsumbĩ mamwĩa
Esther6:6 Na ĩndĩ Amani alika nthĩnĩ. Na mũsumbĩ amũkũlya
Esther6:7 Na Amani amwĩa mũsumbĩ
Esther6:8 ngũa ya kĩũsumbĩ ĩetwe ĩla mũsumbĩ wakothaa kwĩkĩa
Esther6:9 na ngũa na mbalasi ninenganwe kw’okonĩ kwa ũmwe wa ala anene ma mũsumbĩ me mbee ũsumbĩnĩ
Esther6:10 Nĩvo indĩ mũsumbĩ wamwĩie Amani
Esther6:11 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Amani wosie ĩ ngũa na mbalasi
Esther6:12 Na Molitekai ooka ĩngĩ mbingĩlonĩ kwa mũsumbĩ. Ĩndĩ Amani eekalaata athi nyũmbanĩ kwake
Esther6:13 Na Amani atalĩla Nzelesi mũka wake na anyanyae make onthe kĩla ũndũ ũla wamũkĩtĩkĩa. Nĩvo ĩndĩ andũ oĩ make na Nzelesi mũka wake mamwĩie
Esther6:14 Na makĩneenanga nake
Esther7:1 Na ĩndĩ mũsumbĩ na Amani malika mbokanĩ ya Esita mũka wa mũsumbĩ.
Esther7:2 Na mũsumbĩ eea Esita ĩngĩ mũthenya wa kelĩ me mbokanĩ ya mbinyu
Esther7:3 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Esita mũka wa mũsumbĩ wasũngĩie na amwĩa
Esther7:4 nũndũ twĩ athoosye
Esther7:5 Nĩvo ĩndĩ mũsumbĩ Aasuelo waneenie na amũkũlya Esita mũka wa mũsumbĩ
Esther7:6 Na Esita amwĩa
Esther7:7 Na mũsumbĩ ookĩla e mũthilĩku kuma mbokanĩ ya mbinyu na aenda mũũndanĩ wa nyũmba nene ya ũsumbĩ: na Amani aũngama esũvane nũndũ wa thayũ wake vala ve Esita mũka wa mũsumbĩ; nũndũ nĩwonie kana ve ũthũku ũtw’ĩtwe nĩ mũsumbĩ.
Esther7:8 Nĩvo ĩndĩ mũsumbĩ wasyokie kuma mũũndanĩ wa nyũmba nene ya ũsumbĩ alike vala vandũ va ĩla mboka ya mbinyu; na Amani avalũkĩte ũkomonĩ ũla Esita wailyĩ. Nĩvo ĩndĩ mũsumbĩ waisye
Esther7:9 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Alivona
Esther7:10 Na ĩndĩ mamũsũsya Amani mũtĩnĩ mũtũlu ũla waseũvĩsye Molitekai. Na ĩndĩ ũthilĩku wa mũsumbĩ wausya.
Esther8:1 Mũthenya ũsu mũsumbĩ Aasuelo amũnenga Esita mũka nyũmba ya Amani
Esther8:2 Na mũsumbĩ aumya ngome yake
Esther8:3 Na Esita aneena o ĩngĩ mbee wa mũsumbĩ
Esther8:4 Nĩvo ĩndĩ mũsumbĩ watambũũkĩsye Esita ndata ya thaavu yake ya ũsumbĩ. Kwondũ wa ũu Esita ookĩla
Esther8:5 Na amwĩa
Esther8:6 nũndũ ndonya ata kũmĩĩsya kwona ũthũku ũla wĩũka kwa andũ makwa? Kana ndonya ata kũmĩĩsya kwona wanangĩko wa ũko wakwa?
Esther8:7 Nĩvo ĩndĩ mũsumbĩ Aasuelo weie Esita mũka na Molitekai Mũyuti
Esther8:8 Na ĩngĩ andĩkĩai Ayuti o tondũ mũkwenda
Esther8:9 Nĩvo ĩndĩ aandĩki ma mũsumbĩ meetiwe ĩvinda yĩu
Esther8:10 Na aandĩka syĩtwanĩ ya mũsumbĩ Aasuelo
Esther8:11 ala nthĩnĩ wamo mũsumbĩ amanenga Ayuti ala maĩ kĩla ndũa ũthei wa kũmbana
Esther8:12 o mũthenya ũmwe ilungunĩ nene syonthe sya nthĩ sya mũsumbĩ Aasuelo
Esther8:13 Wumĩĩsyo wa ũandĩko
Esther8:14 Kwondũ wa ũu atwai ma mavalũa ala matũlĩte mbalasi syĩ maũũ ila syekalaa ũthũkũminĩ wa mũsumbĩ mathi
Esther8:15 Na Molitekai aumaala kuma vala mũsumbĩ waĩ ekĩe ngũa ya kĩũsumbĩ ya vuluu na nzaũ
Esther8:16 Ayuti maĩ na kyeni na mũyo
Esther8:17 Na kĩla kĩlungu kĩnene kya nthĩ
Esther9:1 Na ĩndĩ mwei wa ĩkũmi na ĩlĩ
Esther9:2 Ayuti meeyũmbanĩsya ndũanĩ syoo ilungunĩ nene syonthe sya nthĩ sya mũsumbĩ Aasuelo
Esther9:3 Na anene onthe me mbee ũsumbĩnĩ ma ila ilungu nene sya nthĩ
Esther9:4 Nũndũ Molitekai aĩ mũnene nyũmbanĩ ya mũsumbĩ
Esther9:5 Na Ayuti makũna amaitha moo onthe na makũna ma ũvyũ
Esther9:6 Na nyũmbanĩ nene ya ũsumbĩ ku Susani
Esther9:7 Na Valisandatha
Esther9:8 na Volatha
Esther9:9 na Valimasita
Esther9:10 ala ana ĩkũmi ma Amani mwana wa Ametatha
Esther9:11 Mũthenya ũsu ũtalo wa ala mooaĩwe nyũmbanĩ nene ya ũsumbĩ ku Susani
Esther9:12 Na mũsumbĩ amwĩa Esita mũka
Esther9:13 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Esita waisye
Esther9:14 Na mũsumbĩ eeaa ũu wĩkwe: na ũtw’ĩo waumĩwe vu Susani; na masũsya ala ana ĩkũmi ma Amani.
Esther9:15 Na Ayuti ala maĩ Susani moombana ĩngĩ mũthenya wa ĩkũmi na ĩna wa mwei wa Atali
Esther9:16 Na Ayuti ala angĩ ala maĩ ilungunĩ nene sya nthĩ sya mũsumbĩ moombana
Esther9:17 Ũu weekiwe mũthenya wa ĩkũmi na ĩtatũ wa mwei wa Atali; na mũthenya wa ĩkũmi na ĩna waw’o mathũmũa
Esther9:18 Ĩndĩ Ayuti ala maĩ Susani moombana mũthenya wa ĩkũmi na ĩtatũ waw’o
Esther9:19 Kwondũ wa ũu Ayuti ma mĩsyĩ
Esther9:20 Na Molitekai aandĩka maũndũ asu
Esther9:21 kũmalũlũmĩlya kana masũvĩae mũthenya wa ĩkũmi na ĩna wa mwei wa Atali
Esther9:22 o mĩthenya ĩsu ĩla Ayuti mathũmũie kuma amaithanĩ moo
Esther9:23 Na Ayuti meetĩkĩla kwĩka ũndũ mambĩlĩlye
Esther9:24 nĩkwĩthĩwa Amani mwana wa Ametatha Mũakaki
Esther9:25 ĩndĩ yĩla ũvoo wavikie vala ve mũsumbĩ
Esther9:26 Kwondũ wa ũu meeta mĩthenya ĩsu Vulimu
Esther9:27 Ayuti meeaa
Esther9:28 na kana mĩthenya ĩsu ĩkalilikanawe na kũsũvĩawa kĩla nzyawanĩ
Esther9:29 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Esita mũka wa mũsumbĩ
Esther9:30 Na atwaa mavalũa kwa Ayuti onthe ilungunĩ nene sya nthĩ ĩana na mĩongo ĩlĩ na mũonza sya ũsumbĩ wa Aasuelo
Esther9:31 malũlũmĩlye mĩthenya ĩsu ya Vulimu mavindanĩ mayo ala maiĩtwe
Esther9:32 Na mwĩao wa Esita walũlũmĩlya maũndũ asu ma Vulimu; na waandĩkwa yĩla ĩvukunĩ.

Esther10:3 Nũndũ Molitekai ũsu Mũyuti aĩ wa kelĩ ũnenenĩ kwa mũsumbĩ Aasuelo
Job1:1 Kwaĩ mũndũ nthĩ ya Usi
Job1:2 Na asyaĩwe ana mũonza na eĩtu atatũ.
Job1:3 O na ũthwii wake naw’o waĩ malondu ngili mũonza
Job1:4 Na ana make maenda makĩvoka mboka nyũmbanĩ ya kĩla ũmwe mũthenya wake; na matũmana mameta eĩtu‐a‐inyia moo atatũ maye na kũnyw’a nao.

Job3:1 Ĩtina wa ũu Yovu aathamya kanyw’a wake

Job3:5 Kĩvindu na kyuu kya kĩkw’ũ nĩsyasye wasyo e syo; Ĩthweo nĩyĩkalae ĩũlũ waw’o; Kyonthe kĩla kĩtuma mũthenya wĩthĩwa mwiũ nĩkyũtĩsye.

Job3:7 Sisya

Job3:10 Nĩkwĩthĩwa ndwaavinga mĩomo ya ĩvu ya mwaitũ

Job3:12 Nĩkĩ mau mambosie? Kana nondo
Job3:13 Nũndũ yu nĩthĩwa ngomete na kũvindya; Nĩthĩwa ngomete too; na ĩndĩ nĩthĩwa nĩthũmũĩte
Job3:14 Vamwe na asumbĩ na atai ma kũũ nthĩ

Job3:16 Kana ta kĩvuno kĩvithe kĩvunĩtwe
Job3:17 Vau ala athũku nĩmaekaa kũthĩna; Na vau ala me na mĩnoo nĩmathũmũaa
Job3:18 Vau ala ove nĩmethũmũĩtye vamwe; Matyĩw’aa wasya wa mũũngamĩi.
Job3:19 Ala anini na ala anene me vo; Na mũthũkũmi nĩ mũthasye kuma kwa vwana wake.

Job5:1 Ĩtana yu; ve ũmwe wĩkũsũngĩa? Na ũkeethyũũĩa wĩva wa ala atheu?

Job5:3 Nĩnonete mũtumanu aitambũũkya mĩi: Ĩndĩ nĩnaumanĩe ũtũo wake na kĩthũlũmũko.
Job5:4 Syana syake syĩ kũasa na ũsũvĩo
Job5:5 Ala me na nzaa nĩmaĩsaa ngetha yasyo
Job5:6 Nũndũ ũnyamao ndumaa kĩtoonĩ

Job5:22 Ũkathekeea wanangĩko na nzaa; O na ndũkakĩa nyamũ sya nthĩ.

Job6:1 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Yovu asũngĩa na asya
Job6:2 A! Kethĩwa woo wakwa nũthimĩka
Job6:3 Nũndũ yu wĩthĩwa wĩ mũito kwĩ kĩthangathĩ kya maũkanga: Kwondũ wa ũu ndeto syakwa nivulũkaa.
Job6:4 Nũndũ mĩsyĩ ya Mwene Vinya W’onthe yĩ nthĩnĩ wakwa
Job6:5 Ĩng’oi ya kĩthekanĩ nĩyanasya yĩ na nyeki? Kana ng’ombe nĩyanasya ĩkĩya lĩu wayo?
Job6:6 Kĩndũ kĩte mũsamo nĩkĩĩka kĩte mũnyũ? Kana ve mũsamo mũuunĩ mweũ wa ĩtumbĩ?
Job6:7 Ngoo yakwa nĩleaa kwikiita; Nĩ ta lĩu wĩ tiiki kwakwa.
Job6:8 A! Kethĩwa ndonya kwona kĩla ngwĩtya; Na Ngai akanenga kĩndũ kĩla nĩ na mea makyo!
Job6:9 O atĩ kethĩwa Ngai mĩwendeew’a nĩ kũnganyanga; Atĩ akalekya kw’oko kwake
Job6:10 Ũu wĩthĩwe ũkiakisyo wakwa kũvika yu
Job6:11 Vinya wakwa nĩ mwaũ
Job6:12 Vinya wakwa nĩ vinya wa mavia? Kana mwĩĩ wakwa nĩ wa ũthuku?
Job6:13 Ti ũndũ ndi na ũtethyo nthĩnĩ wakwa
Job6:14 Ũla ũkilyĩ kũthelekela nĩwaĩle kwonw’a ũseo nĩ mũnyanyae; O ũla ũekaa kũmũkĩa Mwene Vinya W’onthe.
Job6:15 Ana‐a‐asa makwa nĩmekĩte ũkengani ta kalũsĩ
Job6:16 Tũla twiĩtw’e nĩ manzĩ momĩtw’e nĩ mbevo
Job6:17 Ĩvĩnda yĩla tũkũvyũva
Job6:18 Aendi ma kyalo ala maendaa na nzĩa yatw’o nĩmathũkaa; Nĩmambataa kũndũ kwanangĩku
Job6:19 Aendi ma kyalo ma Tema nĩmasiisye
Job6:20 Nĩmasonokiw’e nũndũ maĩ na wĩkwatyo; Nĩmookie vo
Job6:21 Na yu inyw’ĩ no vathei; Nĩmũkwona ũtĩsyo

Job6:27 Ĩĩ

Job10:1 Ngoo yakwa nĩkolete thayũ wakwa; Nganenga mũnyungunyĩsyo wakwa ũthei vyũ; Nganeena ũũnĩ wa ngoo yakwa.
Job10:2 Ngamwĩa Ngai
Job10:3 Nĩ ũseo kwaku kũthĩn’ya
Job10:4 Wĩ na metho ma mwĩĩ? Kana wonaa o tondũ mũndũ wonaa?
Job10:5 Mĩthenya yaku nĩ ta mĩthenya ya mũndũ
Job10:6 Ũndũ ũkũlanasya ũndũ wa ũthũku wakwa
Job10:7 O na kau nĩwĩsĩ atĩ ndi mũthũku
Job10:8 Moko maku nĩmangwatanisye na kũmbũmba Ngalĩ syonthe vamwe; ĩndĩ nũmbanangaa.
Job10:9 Lilikana
Job10:10 Ndũmbonoetye ta ĩia
Job10:11 Nũmbw’ĩkĩte kĩkonde na nyama
Job10:12 Nũnengete thayũ na ũseo wĩ wendo; Na ũsyaĩĩsyo waku nũsũvĩĩte veva wakwa.
Job10:13 Ĩndĩ maũndũ aa nĩwamavithie ngoonĩ yaku; Nĩnĩsĩ ũu wĩ kwaku:
Job10:14 Ethĩwa ngũvĩtya
Job10:15 Ethĩwa nĩ mũthũku
Job10:16 Na ethĩwa mũtwe wakwa nĩwĩtũlasya
Job10:17 Nĩwongeleelaa ngũsĩ syaku ĩũlũ wakwa. Na kũmbingĩvĩsya ũthatu waku: Nguthu na nguthu syĩ ũlũ wakwa.
Job10:18 Nĩkĩ ĩndĩ wambumisye ĩvunĩ? Nĩthĩwa naumiwe nĩ veva
Job10:19 Ngethĩwa ta ndyaaĩthĩwa; Ngethĩwa nakuiwe kuma ĩvunĩ kũvika mbũanĩ.
Job10:20 Mĩthenya yakwa ti mĩvũthũ? Eka ĩndĩ
Job10:21 Ndanamba kũthi vala ndakasyoka kuma vo
Job10:22 Nthĩ yĩ kĩvindu ta ũtukũ katĩ
Job11:1 Na ĩndĩ Nzovali Mũnaamathi asũngĩa
Job11:2 Ndeto mbingĩ mũno ityaĩle kũsũngĩwa? Na mũndũ wusũĩte kũneena nĩwaĩle kũtalĩlwa ũlũngalu?
Job11:3 Ngathĩĩo syaku nĩsyaĩle kũtuma andũ mavindya? Na yĩla ũũkaakasya
Job11:4 Nũndũ nũkwasya
Job11:5 A! Kethĩwa Ngai akaneena
Job11:6 Na kũkwon’ya syĩmbithĩ sya ũĩ! Nũndũ nake e na ũmanyi mwingĩ mũno. Manya ĩndĩ kana Ngai nũkũandũa kwaku ũndũ ũnini kwĩ ũla waĩle ũthũku waku.
Job11:7 Nũtonya kũmũmanya Ngai kwondũ wa kũmantha? Nũtonya kũmũmanya Mwene Vinya W’onthe ki?
Job11:8 Wĩ ĩũlũ ta ĩtu; ũtonya kwĩka ata? Mũliku kwĩ Seoli; ũtonya kũmanya kyaũ?
Job11:9 Ũthimi waw’o nĩ mũasa kwĩ nthĩ
Job11:10 Ethĩwa nũvĩtĩlaa
Job11:11 Nũndũ nake niwisi andũ me ũvũngũ: O na nĩwonaa ũthũku
Job11:12 Ĩndĩ mũndũ ũte kĩĩĩ nde na ũmanyi
Job11:13 Ethĩwa nũlũngalasya ngoo yaku
Job11:14 Ethĩwa ũthũku wĩ kw’okonĩ kwaku
Job11:15 Nĩ w’o ĩndĩ ũkookĩlya ũthyũ waku vate kalanga; Ĩĩ
Job11:16 Nũndũ ũkoolwa nĩ thĩna waku; Ũkoolilikana ta manzĩ ala mavĩtu.
Job11:17 Na thayũ waku ũkeethĩwa wĩsang’ũlĩtye kwĩ mũthenya katĩ; O na ethĩwa ve kĩvindu
Job11:18 Na ũkeethĩwa wĩyelele
Job11:19 O na ũkakoma
Job11:20 Ĩndĩ metho ma athũku makaya mbindu
Job12:1 Na ĩndĩ Yovu asũngĩa
Job12:2 Vate nzika no inyw’ĩ andũ ki
Job12:3 Ĩndĩ nĩ na ũmanyi tenyu; Ndi mũnyivu kĩlĩko kwĩ inyw’ĩ: Ĩĩ
Job12:4 Nyie nĩilyĩ ta mũndũ ũla ũthekeeawa nĩ mũtũi wake
Job12:5 Ũsũanĩonĩ wa ũla ũthũmũĩte ve kĩvũthya ũndũ wa thĩna; Nĩkyũmbanĩte kwondũ wa ala maũũ moo matendelũka.
Job12:6 Maeema ma avutani nĩmaunĩka
Job12:7 Ĩndĩ yu kũlya nyamũ
Job12:8 Kana neena na nthĩ
Job12:9 Nũũ ũla ũtesĩ kwondũ wa isu syonthe
Job12:10 Na thayũ wa kĩla kĩndũ kĩ thayũ wĩ kw’okonĩ kwake
Job12:11 Kũtũ kũtitataa ndeto
Job12:12 Ũĩ wĩ kwa andũ akũũ
Job12:13 Ũĩ na ũtonyi syĩ na Ngai; E na ũtao na ũmanyi.
Job12:14 Sisya
Job12:15 Sisya
Job12:16 Vinya na ũĩ syĩ nake; Mũkengwa na mũkengani nĩ make.
Job12:17 Nũtongoeasya atai mathi me mavũla
Job12:18 Nũthaasya syĩndũ syovete asumbĩ
Job12:19 Nũtongoeasya athembi mathi me mavũla; Na kwananga ala me na ũtonyi.
Job12:20 Nũvetaa ndeto sya ala maĩkĩĩawa
Job12:21 Nĩwonoasya kũvũthya ĩũlũ wa anene me mbee ũsumbĩnĩ
Job12:22 Nĩwumĩlasya maũndũ maliku kuma kĩvindunĩ
Job12:23 Nĩwingĩvasya mbaĩ
Job12:24 Nũvetaa ũmanyi anenenĩ ma andũ ma nthĩ
Job12:25 Nĩmavavataa kĩvindũnĩ vate kyeni; Na kũtuma malũalũa ta mũthengi.
Job13:1 Sisya
Job13:2 O ũndũ inyw’ĩ mwĩsĩ
Job13:3 Nĩw’o nenda kũneena na Mwene Vinya W’onthe
Job13:4 Ĩndĩ inyw’ĩ mwĩ atili ma movũngũ; Inyw’onthe mwĩ aiiti mate vata.
Job13:5 A! Kethĩwa inyw’ĩ mũkavindya ki! Ũu nĩw’o wĩthĩwa ũĩ wenyu.
Job13:6 Ĩw’ai yu ũndũ nĩsũanĩĩte
Job13:7 Mũkaneena ũndũ ũte ũlũngalu kwondũ wa Ngai
Job13:8 Mũkamwendeesya? Mũkateta kwondũ wa Ngai?
Job13:9 Nĩ ũseo akakwĩkuũa? Kana o tondũ mũndũ ũkengaa mũndũ
Job13:10 Nde ndĩi ya ũmũkan’ya
Job13:11 Ũnene wake ndũkamũtelemya
Job13:12 Mĩneeno yenyu ya ũlilikan’yo nĩ nthimo sya mũu
Job13:13 Vindyai
Job13:14 Nĩkĩ ngaũma nyama ya mwĩĩ wakwa
Job13:15 Sisya
Job13:16 Na ũũ naw’o ũkeethĩwa ũtangĩĩo wakwa
Job13:17 Ĩw’ai na kĩthing’ĩĩsyo kũneena kwakwa
Job13:18 Sisyai yu
Job13:19 Nũũ ũla wĩkananĩa nakwa? Ethĩwa ngavindya ngaumwa nĩ veva.
Job13:20 No maũndũ elĩ ndũkambĩke; Na ĩndĩ ndikevitha ũthyũnĩ waku:
Job13:21 Veta kw’oko kwaku kũasa nakwa; Na ũtĩsyo waku ndũkandelemye.
Job13:22 Na ĩndĩ ĩtana
Job13:23 Mothũku makwa na naĩ syakwa nĩ syĩana? Tuma nĩmanya kũvĩtya kwakwa na na yakwa.
Job13:24 Nĩkĩ ũvithaa ũthyũ waku
Job13:25 Ũkathĩn’ya ĩtũ yĩũlũkangaw’a? Na ũkaatĩĩa ũa wũmũ?
Job13:26 Nũndũ nũandĩkaa maũndũ me ũũ ĩũlũ wakwa
Job13:27 Nũmbĩkĩaa maũũ makwa mĩtĩnĩ ya kũmoveea
Job13:28 O na kau nĩilyĩ kĩndũ kyou kĩla kĩthelaa
Job14:1 Mũndũ
Job14:2 Nĩwumĩlaa ta ĩlaa
Job14:3 Naku wĩmũsalukĩlya metho maku ũla ũilyĩ ũu
Job14:4 Nũũ ũtonya kumya kĩndũ kĩtheu nthĩnĩ wa kĩla kĩte kĩtheu? Vaiĩ ũmwe.
Job14:5 Nũndũ mĩthenya yake nĩtw’ĩtwe
Job14:6 Eka ũmũsisya
Job14:7 Nũndũ ve wĩkwatyo ũndũ wa mũtĩ
Job14:8 O na ethĩwa mũi waw’o ũkakũĩa nthĩnĩ wa nthĩ
Job14:9 Ĩndĩ kwondũ wa mũuke wa manzĩ ũkaete wenze
Job14:10 Ĩndĩ mũndũ nũkusaa
Job14:11 O tondũ manzĩ manyivaa ũkanganĩ
Job14:12 Now’o mũndũ nũkomaa na ndokĩlaa: Kũvika yĩla matu matikethĩwa vo ĩngĩ
Job14:13 A! Kethĩwa ũkambitha nthĩnĩ wa Seoli
Job14:14 Ethĩwa mũndũ akakw’a
Job14:15 Naku wĩthĩwa wĩtana
Job14:16 Ĩndĩ yu nũtalaa matambya makwa: Ndũsyaĩĩasya naĩ yakwa?
Job14:17 Kũvĩtya kwakwa nĩkũsiĩlĩtwe mũvukonĩ
Job14:18 Ĩndĩ kĩĩma kĩiombokanga nĩkyanangĩkaa; Na ĩvia nĩyĩvetetwe kuma vandũ vayo;
Job14:19 Manzĩ nĩmathĩĩvaa mavia; Kũkĩla kwamo nĩkũkuaa kĩtoo kya nthĩ: O ta ũu naku nĩwanangaa wĩkwatyo wa mũndũ.
Job14:20 Nũmũkĩlasya vinya tene na tene
Job14:21 Ana make nĩmavikĩaa ndaĩa
Job14:22 Ĩndĩ mwĩĩ wake nĩwalasya
Job15:1 Na ĩndĩ Elivasi Mũtemani asũngĩa
Job15:2 Mũndũ mũĩ nĩwaĩle kũsũngĩa na ũmanyi wa mana
Job15:3 Nĩwaĩle kũneenan’ya na ndeto itauna
Job15:4 Ĩĩ
Job15:5 Nũndũ ũthũku waku nũmanyĩasya kanyw’a waku
Job15:6 Kanyw’a waku mwene nũkũtusaa mũvĩtan’ya
Job15:7 Nue mũndũ wa mbee wa kũsyawa? Kana wasyaiwe tene kwĩ iĩma?
Job15:8 Nĩwĩw’ĩte ũtao wa kĩmbithĩ wa Ngai? Na kũkũsiĩĩa ũĩ wĩthĩwe waku wĩ weka?
Job15:9 Wĩsĩ ũndũ wĩva
Job15:10 Ala me mbuĩ na atumĩa akũu mũno onthe me vamwe naitũ
Job15:11 Mokiakisyo ma Ngai nĩ manini kwaku
Job15:12 Nĩkĩ ngoo yaku ĩkũtwaaa kũasa? Na nĩkĩ metho maku mekũvenaven’ya na ngathĩĩo
Job15:13 Ũndũ ũkũthyũũa veva waku ũkite na Ngai
Job15:14 Mũndũ nĩ mwaũ
Job15:15 Sisya
Job15:16 Avukĩte ata ũla ũthatasya na nĩ mũvuku
Job15:17 Ngakwon’ya
Job15:18 (Ũndũ ũla andũ oi matavanĩtye Kuma kwa aaĩthe moo
Job15:19 Ala manengiwe ĩ nthĩ me oka
Job15:20 Mũndũ mũthũku nĩwaũnyaw’a nĩ woo mĩthenya yake yonthe
Job15:21 Kĩlonzo kya motĩsyo kĩ matũnĩ make; Ũunĩkonĩ mwanangi akamũkĩa.
Job15:22 Ndekwĩtĩkĩla atĩ akasyoka kuma kĩvindunĩ
Job15:23 Nĩwangangaa kũasa aimantha lĩu
Job15:24 Ũnyamao na woo mwingĩ niũmũtelemya; Nimũkĩlasya vinya
Job15:25 Nĩkwĩthĩwa nũmũtambũũkĩĩtye Ngai kw’oko kwake
Job15:26 Nũsembaa vala ũĩ na ngingo nyũmũ
Job15:27 Nĩkwĩthĩwa nũvw’ĩkĩte ũthyũ wake na ũnou wake
Job15:28 Na nĩwekalĩte ndũanĩ nthei
Job15:29 Ndakethĩwa mũthwii
Job15:30 Ndakauma kĩvindunĩ; Ũmũĩ ũkoomya mbonge syake
Job15:31 Ndakaĩkĩĩe vathei
Job15:32 Ũu ũkeanĩwa mbee wa ĩvinda yake
Job15:33 Akathingithya etĩkye nzavivũ syake ite mbĩu ta mũsavivũ
Job15:34 Nũndũ nguthu ya ala matakĩaa Ngai ndĩkethĩwa na ũsyao
Job15:35 Nĩmaitavaa ũthũku
Job16:1 Na ĩndĩ Yovu asũngĩa na asya
Job16:2 Nĩnĩw’ĩte maũndũ maingĩ ta asu: Inyw’onthe mwĩ akiakisya ma kũthĩn’ya.
Job16:3 Ndeto sya mana ikeethĩwa na mũminũkĩlyo? Kana nĩ kyaũ kĩla kĩkũthatasya ũsũngie?
Job16:4 O nakwa nĩndonya kũneena tenyu; Kethĩwa thayũ wenyu wĩ vandũ va thayũ wakwa
Job16:5 Ĩndĩ nĩthĩwa ngĩmwĩkĩa vinya na kanyw’a wakwa
Job16:6 O na kau nĩngũneena
Job16:7 Ĩndĩ yu nũnoetye: Nĩwanangĩte nguthu yakwa yonthe.
Job16:8 Naku nũngwete mũno
Job16:9 Nũndembũangĩte ũthatunĩ wake
Job16:10 Nĩmambathamĩsye kanyw’a woo; Nĩmangũnĩte ĩtau na kĩvũthya: Nĩmembũmbanĩsye.
Job16:11 Ngai nũnenganĩte nyie kwa ala matakĩaa Ngai
Job16:12 Nĩneethũmũĩtye na andilan’ya; Ĩĩ
Job16:13 Andũ make ma mata nĩmanthyũlũlũkaa; Nĩwatũaa kĩnyunyu kyakwa
Job16:14 Nũmbanangaa na wanangĩko ĩũlũ wa wanangĩko; Nũmbithũkĩaa ta ngũmbaũ.
Job16:15 Nĩndumĩte makunĩa makwete kĩkonde kyakwa
Job16:16 Ũthyũ wakwa nĩ mũtune kwondũ wa kũĩa
Job16:17 O na kau vati ũng’endu mokonĩ makwa
Job16:18 We nthĩ
Job16:19 O na yu
Job16:20 Anyanyawa nĩmambũthasya: Ĩndĩ itho yakwa nĩyĩmwĩtĩkĩĩasya Ngai methoi
Job16:21 Kana alũlũmĩlye kĩanda ĩ kya mũndũ mbee wa Ngai
Job16:22 Nũndũ myaka mĩvũthũ yavĩta
Job17:1 Veva wakwa nũminĩtwe
Job17:2 Vate ndĩi kwĩ akaakaan’ya vala nĩĩ
Job17:3 Yu nengane ngwatĩlĩlyo
Job17:4 Nũndũ nũvithĩte ngoo syoo itikamanye: Kwondũ wa ũu ndũkamanenevya.
Job17:5 Ũla ũnenganae anyanyae methĩwe mũtavo
Job17:6 Ĩndĩ nũndw’ĩkĩthĩtye wa kũvũthw’a nĩ andũ; Nao nĩmandwĩlaa mata ũthyũnĩ.
Job17:7 Itho yakwa nayo yĩ na mbindu nũndũ wa woo
Job17:8 Andũ alũngalu makaseng’w’a nĩ ũu. Na ũla ũte ĩvĩtyo akeethũlũmũĩla ũla ũtakĩaa Ngai.
Job17:9 Ĩndĩ ũla mũlũngalu akalũmya nzĩa yake
Job17:10 Ĩndĩ ũndũ wenyu inyw’onthe
Job17:11 Mĩthenya yakwa nĩ mĩvĩtu
Job17:12 Nĩmalyũlaa ũtukũ wĩthĩwe mũthenya: Nĩmekwasya
Job17:13 Ethĩwa nĩeteela Seoli vethĩwe nyũmba yakwa; Ethĩwa nalanĩtye ũkomo wakwa kĩvindunĩ;
Job17:14 Ethĩwa nĩtavĩtye wanangĩko
Job17:15 Wĩkwatyo wakwa ũĩva ĩndĩ? Na ũndũ wa wĩkwatyo wakwa
Job17:16 Ũkatheea kũvika ivingonĩ sya Seoli
Job18:1 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Mbilitati Mũsui wasũngĩie
Job18:2 Mũkamantha ndeto kũvika ĩndĩĩ? Sũanĩai
Job18:3 Nũndũ wa kĩ tũtalawa ta nyamũ Na kũtw’ĩka avuku mũsyaĩtye?
Job18:4 We ũla ũĩtembũanga ũthatunĩ waku
Job18:5 Ĩĩ
Job18:6 Kyeni kĩkeethĩwa kĩvindu ĩeemanĩ yake
Job18:7 Matambya ma vinya wake makavivinyawa
Job18:8 Nũndũ nĩwĩkĩtw’e kĩteinĩ nĩ maũũ make mwene
Job18:9 Kĩloo kĩkamũkwatya kĩtiinyo
Job18:10 Mũkwa nũvithĩtwe nthĩ kwondũ wake
Job18:11 Motĩsyo makamũtelemya kĩla ngalĩko
Job18:12 Vinya wake ũkaũmwa nĩ nzaa
Job18:13 Mamutha ma mwĩĩ wake makaanangwa
Job18:14 Akaumw’a ĩeemanĩ yake yĩla ũĩkĩĩaa; Na akatwawa vala ve mũsumbĩ wa motĩsyo.
Job18:15 Kĩla kĩte kyake kĩkekalaa ĩeemanĩ yake: Mũvĩlĩtĩ ũkanyaĩĩkw’a ũtũonĩ wake.
Job18:16 Mĩi yake ĩkoomĩla ĩtheo
Job18:17 Ũlililan’yo wake ũkaaa nthĩ
Job18:18 Akalũngw’a kuma kyeninĩ kũvika kĩvindunĩ
Job18:19 Ndakethĩwa na mwana kana nzũkũlũ katĩ wa andũ make
Job18:20 Ala makoka ĩtina makaseng’w’a nĩ mũthenya wake
Job18:21 Nĩ w’o motũo ma ala matakĩaa Ngai mailyĩ
Job19:1 Na ĩndĩ Yovu asũngĩa na asya
Job19:2 Mũkathatya ngoo yakwa kũvika ĩndĩĩ
Job19:3 Mavinda aa ĩkũmi nĩmũmbũthĩtye: Mũtisonokaa ũndũ wa kũnthĩn’ya na vinya.
Job19:4 O na ethĩwa nĩ w’o nĩnĩvĩtĩtye
Job19:5 Ethĩwa nĩ w’o mũkeenenevya ĩũlũ wakwa
Job19:6 Manyai yu kana Ngai nũngĩlĩtye vinya ũvoonĩ wakwa
Job19:7 Sisya
Job19:8 Nĩwiiĩte nzĩa yakwa ũndũ ndatonya kũvita
Job19:9 Nũmbenete ndaĩa yakwa
Job19:10 Nũnomboangĩte kĩla ngalĩko
Job19:11 Nũmbakanĩsye ũthilĩku wake
Job19:12 Nguthu syake nĩsyũkaa vamwe
Job19:13 Nĩwĩkĩtye ana‐a‐asa makwa kũasa nakwa
Job19:14 Andũ makwa nĩ athelu
Job19:15 Ala mekalaa nyũmbanĩ yakwa
Job19:16 Nĩngũmwĩta mũthũkũmi wakwa na ndambĩtĩka
Job19:17 Mĩthũmũ yakwa nĩ mĩeni kwa kĩveti kyakwa
Job19:18 O na syana nini nimbũthasya; Ethĩwa nĩngũkĩla
Job19:19 Anyanyawa onthe ala twĩsene nĩmanthĩthaa
Job19:20 Ĩvĩndĩ yakwa nĩyĩlũmanĩtye na kĩkonde kyakwa na nyama syakwa
Job19:21 Mbĩw’ĩai tei
Job19:22 Nĩkĩ mũũnthĩn’ya o ta Ngai
Job19:23 A! Kethĩwa ndeto syakwa nĩ nandĩke yu! A! Kethĩwa nĩ nandĩke ĩvukunĩ!
Job19:24 Kethĩwa nivanĩĩwa ĩvianĩ tene na tene
Job19:25 Ĩndĩ ngalĩ ĩ yakwa nĩnĩsĩ Mwovosya wakwa e thayũ
Job19:26 Na ĩtina wa kwanangĩka kwa kĩkonde kyakwa
Job19:27 Ũla nyie
Job19:28 Ethĩwa mwĩasya
Job19:29 Kĩai ũvyũ: Nũndũ ũthilĩku nũetae mosilĩlo ma ũvyũ
Job20:1 Na ĩndĩ Nzovali Mũnaamathi asũngĩa
Job20:2 Kwondũ wa ũu mosũanĩo makwa nĩmeũnzũngĩa
Job20:3 Nĩnĩw’ĩte ũkan’yo ũla ũnzonokasya; Na veva wa ũmanyi wakwa nũũnzũngĩa.
Job20:4 Ndũũmanya ũu kuma tene
Job20:5 Kana kũkĩlya vinya kwa ala athũku nĩ kwa ĩvinda ĩkuvĩ
Job20:6 O na ethĩwa ũasa wake ũkambata kũvika matunĩ
Job20:7 Ĩndĩ akaaa tene na tene ta mai make mwene: Ala mamwonete makasya
Job20:8 Akaũlũka ta ndoto
Job20:9 Itho yĩla yamwonie yĩtikamwona ĩngĩ; O na vandũ vake vatikamwona ĩngĩ.
Job20:10 Syana syake ikamantha ũseo kwa ngya
Job20:11 Mavĩndĩ make nĩmausũĩte wana wake
Job20:12 O na kau ũthũku wĩ mũyo kanyw’anĩ wake
Job20:13 O na nũwĩw’ĩaa tei
Job20:14 Ĩndĩ lĩu wake nũalyũkĩle maanĩ make
Job20:15 Nũmeletye ũthwii
Job20:16 Akoonga ũoi wa syĩko: Ũĩmĩ wa nzoka mbai ũkamũaa.
Job20:17 Ndakasiasya mbũsĩ
Job20:18 Kĩla wenoesya akatũnga
Job20:19 Nũndũ nũthĩnĩtye ngya na kwitia; Nũomboete nyũmba na vinya
Job20:20 Nĩkwĩthĩwa ndaamanya ũuu nthĩnĩ wake
Job20:21 Kũtyaĩ kĩndũ kĩtiele kĩla ũtaakĩmina; Kwondũ wa ũu ũunĩko wake ndũkekala.
Job20:22 Wusũunĩ wa wĩanĩu wake akeethĩwa mũvivinye: Kw’oko kwa kĩla mũndũ ũla wĩ thĩanĩ kũkooka ĩũlũ wake.
Job20:23 Yĩla ũkilĩlye kusũsya ĩvu yake
Job20:24 Akakĩĩa mĩio ya kaũ ya iaa
Job20:25 Nũkusasya
Job20:26 Kĩvindu kyonthe nĩkiĩtwe kwondũ wa mothwii make: Mwaki ũtakanĩtw’e nĩ mũndũ ũkamũmina; Ũkamina kĩla kĩtiele ĩeemanĩ yake.
Job20:27 Matu makoonan’ya ũthũku wake
Job20:28 Wingĩvo wa nyũmba yake ũkaenda; Ũthwii wake ũkaenda ũvĩtĩte mũthenya wa ũthilĩku wake.
Job20:29 Kyu nĩkyo kĩanda kya mũndũ mũthũku kyumĩte kwa Ngai
Job21:1 Na ĩndĩ Yovu asũngĩa
Job21:2 Ĩw’ai na kĩthing’ĩĩsyo ndeto syakwa; Na ũũ nĩwĩthĩwe mokiakisyo menyu.
Job21:3 Ndekai
Job21:4 Ngalĩ ĩ yakwa
Job21:5 Nzisyai
Job21:6 O yĩla ngũlilikana nĩngũũũya
Job21:7 Nĩkĩ ala athũku mekalaa thayũ
Job21:8 Ũsyao woo nũlũlũmĩlw’e vamwe nao mene
Job21:9 Nyũmba syoo syĩ na mũuo vate w’ĩa
Job21:10 Nzaũ yoo nĩsyaĩthasya
Job21:11 Nĩmaumaalasya twana twoo tũnini ta ndĩthya ya mbũi na malondu
Job21:12 Nĩsinaa na kathembe na mbeve
Job21:13 Mĩthenya yoo maminĩaa ũunĩkonĩ
Job21:14 Na mamwĩa Ngai
Job21:15 Mwene Vinya W’onthe nĩ kyaũ
Job21:16 Sisya
Job21:17 Taa wa ala athũku ũvoaw’a mavinda meana ata? Kana wanangĩko woo mũnene kũmokĩa? Kana Ngai kũaan’ya mawoo ũthatunĩ wake?
Job21:18 Kana mailyĩ mavuthĩ mbee wa kĩseve
Job21:19 Inyw’ĩ mwĩasya
Job21:20 Metho make mwene nĩmone wanangĩko wake mwene
Job21:21 Nũndũ e vata mwaũ na nyũmba yake ĩtina wake
Job21:22 Mũndũ o na wĩva akamũmanyĩsya Ngai ũmanyi
Job21:23 Mũndũ nũkusaa e na vinya wake mwĩanĩu
Job21:24 Ndoo syake nĩ mbusũu ĩia
Job21:25 Na ũngĩ nũkusaa e na woo wa ngoo
Job21:26 Nĩmakomaa ũndũ ũmwe kĩtoonĩ
Job21:27 Sisya

Job21:30 Atĩ mũndũ mũthũku nũsũvĩawa kũvika mũthenya wa wanangĩko mũnene? Atĩ nĩmatongoeaw’a kũvika mũthenya wa ũthilĩku?
Job21:31 Nũũ ũla wĩmũtavĩsya ũthyũnĩ mũendele wake? Na nũũ ũla wĩmũĩva ũndũ wĩkĩte?

Job22:1 Na ĩndĩ Elivasi Mũtemani asũngĩa

Job22:4 Nĩ ũndũ wa kũmũkĩa kwaku

Job22:6 Nũndũ nĩwosete ngwatĩlĩlyo sya mwana‐a‐au mana
Job22:7 Ndũmanengete ala me na mĩnoo manzĩ ma ũnyw’a
Job22:8 Ĩndĩ ũndũ wa ngũmbaũ

Job23:1 Na ĩndĩ Yovu asũngĩa na asya
Job23:2 O na ũmũnthĩ mũnyungunyĩsyo wakwa wĩ na ũlei: Ĩkũna yakwa nĩ ĩito kwĩ kũluma kwakwa.
Job23:3 A! Kethĩwa nĩnĩsĩ vala ndonya kũmwona! Kethĩwa nĩmbika o kĩvĩlanĩ kyake!
Job23:4 Ngethĩwa ngia ũvoo wakwa ũatianĩe mbee wake
Job23:5 Ngethĩwa ngĩmanya ndeto ila wĩnzũngĩa
Job23:6 Akakĩlan’ya vinya nakwa ũnenenĩ wa vinya wake? Aiee; ĩndĩ akambĩthukĩĩsya.
Job23:7 Vo ũla mũlũngalu akethĩwa atonya kũsũanĩa nake; Kwondũ wa ũu ngethĩwa nĩvonokete tene na tene kuma kwa mũsili wakwa.
Job23:8 Sisya
Job23:9 Nĩendaa kw’okonĩ kwa aka

Job23:12 Ndinasyoka na ĩtina na kũtia mĩao ya ilomo syake; Niĩte ndeto sya kanyw’a wake kũvĩtũka lĩu wakwa ũla wĩ vata.
Job23:13 Ĩndĩ e na kĩlilikano kĩmwe

Job23:17 Nũndũ ndyaavetwa kĩvindu kĩtanoka
Job24:1 Nĩkĩ mavinda mayiĩtw’e nĩ Mwene Vinya W’onthe? Na nĩkĩ ala mamwĩsĩ matyonaa mĩthenya yake?
Job24:2 Nĩvo maĩ amwe ala makũĩĩasya syambo sya mĩvaka; Nĩmavutanaa ndĩthya sya mbũi na malondu
Job24:3 Nĩmatavaa ĩng’oi ya ala makw’ĩĩwe nĩ aaĩthe; Nĩmosaa ng’ombe ya mũndũ mũka ndiwa yĩthĩwe ngwatĩlĩlyo.
Job24:4 Nĩmathũkasya athĩni maume nzĩanĩ: Ngya syonthe sya nthĩ nĩsyĩvithaa.
Job24:5 Sisya
Job24:6 Nĩmakethaa lĩu woo mũũndanĩ; Na nĩmethĩanasya ngethanĩ ya mĩsavivũ ya ala athũku.
Job24:7 Nĩmakomaa ũtukũ w’onthe me athei mate na ngũa
Job24:8 Me na ũthithu wa mĩono ya mbua ya iĩmanĩ
Job24:9 Nĩvo maĩ ala makusasya ala makw’ĩĩwe nĩ aaĩthe kũmaumya nondonĩ
Job24:10 Na kwondũ wa ũu niendaa syĩ nthei ite na ngũa
Job24:11 Niseũvasya mauta me nthĩnĩ wa maũvai ma andũ asu; Nikinyangĩaa nzavivũ iangĩonĩ syoo
Job24:12 Andũ nĩmalumaa me ndũanĩ yĩ andũ aingĩ
Job24:13 Asu nĩ ma ala mang’endeaa kyeni; Matyĩsĩ nzĩa syakyo
Job24:14 Mũaani nĩwũkĩlaa kwĩ w’oa; Nĩwũaaa ngya na athĩni; Na ũtukũ nĩ ta kĩng’ei.
Job24:15 O na itho ya kĩlaalai nĩyeteelaa ũmithi
Job24:16 Kĩvindunĩ nĩmavũthũaa nyũmba: Nĩmevingĩa mũthenya; Matyĩsĩ kyeni.
Job24:17 Nũndũ kĩoko kwa asu onthe nĩ ta kĩvindu kya ngokomi; Nũndũ nĩmesĩ motĩsyo ma kĩvindu kya ngokomi.
Job24:18 Nĩmavĩtaa mĩtũkĩ ĩũlũ wa manzĩ; Kĩanda kyoo nĩkĩumanĩwe nthĩ: Matyathũkĩlaa nzĩanĩ yĩ mĩũnda ya mĩsavivũ.
Job24:19 Mũnyao na muutĩa niminaa manzĩ ma ĩa: Now’o Seoli vamekaa ala mavĩtĩtye.
Job24:20 Ĩvu yĩkamũla; Kĩinyu kĩkamũya na mũyo; Ndakalilikanwa ĩngĩ; Na ũla ũte ũlũngalu ũkatũlwa ta mũtĩ.
Job24:21 Nũminaa ngũngũ ĩla ĩtasyaaa
Job24:22 Ĩndĩ Ngai nũsũvĩaa na vinya wake ũla wĩ na ũtonyi: Ũla ũte na wĩkwatyo wa thayũ nĩwũkĩlaa.
Job24:23 Ngai nũmanengae kwĩyelela

Job28:4 Nĩwĩnzaa ĩima kũasa na vala andũ matũaa; Nĩmolawa nĩ ũkinyĩlo wa kũũ; Nĩmeũsũnzũlw’a kũasa na andũ

Job28:11 Nũvingĩaa tũlũsĩ tũikavivũke; Na kĩla kĩvithe nũetae kyeninĩ.
Job28:12 Ĩndĩ ũĩ ũkooneka va? Na vandũ va ũmanyi nĩ va?

Job28:22 Wanangĩko na kĩkw’ũ nikwasya

Job28:28 Na amwĩa mũndũ
Job29:1 Na Yovu aneena ngelekan’yo yake ĩngĩ
Job29:2 A! Kethĩwa nĩilyĩ o tondũ nailyĩ myei ya tene
Job29:3 Yĩla taa wake wakeneaa mũtwenĩ wakwa
Job29:4 O tondũ nailyĩ wĩunĩ wa mĩthenya yakwa
Job29:5 Yĩla Mwene Vinya W’onthe waĩ nakwa
Job29:6 Yĩla matambya makwa mathambaw’a na mauta
Job29:7 Yĩla naumaalaa mbingĩlonĩ ya ndũa
Job29:8 Anake mambona nĩmeevithaa
Job29:9 Anene nĩmeesiĩĩaa kũneena
Job29:10 Wasya wa anene me ndaĩa nĩwakilasya
Job29:11 Nũndũ yĩla kũtũ kwambĩw’aa
Job29:12 Nĩkwĩthĩwa nĩnavonokasya ngya ila syakayaa
Job29:13 Ũathimo wa ũla wakilĩlye kwaa nĩwambũkĩaa; Na natumaa ngoo ya mũndũ mũka ndiwa yina ũndũ wa ũtanu.
Job29:14 Nekĩaa ũlũngalu
Job29:15 Nakwa naĩ metho kwa ililinda
Job29:16 Na naĩ ĩthe wa athĩni: Na ũvoo wa ũla ndaamanya nĩnoomanthaa.
Job29:17 Na natũlaa ngambu sya ũla ũte mũlũngalu
Job29:18 Nĩvo ĩndĩ naisye
Job29:19 Mũi wakwa nũtambũũkĩte manzĩnĩ
Job29:20 Ũnene wakwa nĩ mweũ nthĩnĩ wakwa
Job29:21 Andũ nĩmambĩthukĩĩasya
Job29:22 Ndeto syakwa syathela matyaneenaa ĩngĩ; Na kũneena kwakwa nĩkwavolotangaa ĩũlũ woo.
Job29:23 Na nĩmambeteelaa ta kweteela mbua; Na nĩmaathamasya kanyw’a woo mũno ta kwosa mbua ya uũa.
Job29:24 Nĩnamasiasya na ũtanu
Job29:25 Nĩnamanyuvĩaa nzĩa yoo
Job30:1 Ĩndĩ yu ala anini kwĩ nyie nĩmeũmbũthya
Job30:2 Ĩĩ
Job30:3 Nĩ amosu nũndũ wa kwaĩwa na yũa; Nĩmavevetaa nthĩ nyũmũ
Job30:4 Nĩmovaa kyũnyũ vakuvĩ na ikuthu; Na mĩi ya mũlutemu nĩ lĩu woo.
Job30:5 Nĩmalũngĩtw’e kuma katĩ wa andũ; Nĩmauĩtye ũkemi ĩtina woo ta kũatĩĩa kĩng’ei;
Job30:6 Kwondũ wa ũu nĩmatũaa myandanĩ yi ũtĩsyo
Job30:7 Nĩmekwanĩsya ikuthunĩ; Mombanĩte ungu wa syĩnyeelya.
Job30:8 Nĩ syana sya ndia
Job30:9 Na yu nĩtw’ĩkĩte wathi woo
Job30:10 Nĩmanthĩthaa
Job30:11 Nũndũ nũthaĩtye ĩkanda yake
Job30:12 Kw’okonĩ kwakwa kwa aũme nguthu ya imaamai nĩyũkĩlaa; Nĩmalutaa maũũ makwa maende ũtee
Job30:13 Nĩmaanangaa nzĩa yakwa
Job30:14 Nĩmokaa o ta kũvĩtĩla ũvũthũenĩ mũnene: Katĩ wa ũomboku nĩmembonoeasya.
Job30:15 Motĩsyo nĩmethyũũĩte mambũkĩe; Nĩmaatĩĩaa ndaĩa yakwa ta kĩseve; Na ũunĩko wakwa nũvĩtĩe ta ĩthweo.
Job30:16 Na yu ngoo yakwa nĩyĩtĩkĩte nthĩnĩ wakwa; Mĩthenya ya thĩna nĩngwatĩte.
Job30:17 Ũtukũ mavĩndĩ makwa nĩmasinangĩawa nthĩnĩ wakwa
Job30:18 Kwondũ wa vinya mũnene wa Ngai ngũa yakwa nĩ ngalyũku; Nĩngwete ta kala ya ĩkoti yakwa.
Job30:19 Nũmbĩkĩtye ndakanĩ
Job30:20 Nĩkwĩkaĩlaa
Job30:21 Nũalyũkĩte wĩthĩwe mwai kwakwa; Nũnthĩnasya na vinya wa kw’oko kwaku.
Job30:22 Nũmbũkĩlasya kĩsevenĩ
Job30:23 Nũndũ nĩnĩsĩ ũkambikya kĩkw’ũnĩ
Job30:24 O na ũu w’onthe mũndũ ndatambũũkasya kw’oko aivalũka? Kana wanangĩkonĩ wake mũnene kwondũ wa ũu ndakayaa one ũtethyo?
Job30:25 Ndyaaĩa kwondũ wa ũla waĩ thĩnanĩ? Ngoo yakwa ndĩaĩw’a woo kwondũ wa mũthĩni?
Job30:26 Yĩla namanthie ũseo
Job30:27 Ngoo yakwa nĩnĩkũũũya
Job30:28 Nĩendaa na kĩmeto vate syũa: Nĩũngamaa ũmbanonĩ
Job30:29 Nyie nĩ mwana‐a‐ĩthe wa mbĩwa
Job30:30 Kĩkonde kyakwa nĩ kiũ
Job30:31 Kwondũ wa ũu mbeve yakwa nĩalyũkĩte ĩkatw’ĩka ya kũmeta
Job31:1 Nyie nĩnatianĩe ũtianĩo na metho makwa; Ndonya ata ĩndĩ kũsisya mwĩĩtu mũtheu?
Job31:2 Nũndũ kĩanda nĩ kyaũ kuma ĩũlũ kwa Ngai
Job31:3 Ti wanangĩko mũnene kwa ala mate alũngalu
Job31:4 Nake ndekwona mĩendele yakwa? Na kũtala matambya makwa onthe?
Job31:5 Ethĩwa nĩnaendanisye na ũvũngũ
Job31:6 (Nyie nĩthimwe na kĩthimi kya katĩ
Job31:7 Ethĩwa matambya makwa nĩmeelelũkile kũtia nzĩa
Job31:8 Nĩvo ĩndĩ nĩvuĩe
Job31:9 Ethĩwa ngoo yakwa nĩyasengasengiwe nĩ mũndũ mũka
Job31:10 Nĩvo ĩndĩ kĩveti kyakwa nĩkĩthiĩe ũngĩ
Job31:11 Nũndũ yĩu nĩ ĩvĩtyo yai; Ĩĩ
Job31:12 Nũndũ nĩ mwaki ũla ũminaa kũvika wanangĩko
Job31:13 Ethĩwa nĩnĩvũthĩtye ũvoo wa mũthũkũmi wakwa mũndũ mũũme kana mũndũ mũka
Job31:14 Ngeeka ata ĩndĩ yĩla Ngai wĩũkĩla? Na yĩla wĩsila
Job31:15 Ũla wambũmbĩe ĩvunĩ ndaamũmba? Na ti ũmwe ũla watũmbĩe ĩvunĩ?
Job31:16 Ethĩwa nĩnaimie ngya kĩla syendete
Job31:17 Kana naya kĩlungu kyakwa nĩ nyioka
Job31:18 (Aiee
Job31:19 Ethĩwa nĩnoonie mũndũ o na wĩva akyaa nũndũ wa kwaĩwa nĩ ngũa
Job31:20 Ethĩwa kĩnyunyu kyake kĩtyaangathima
Job31:21 Ethĩwa nĩnĩmũkĩlĩĩlye ũla wakw’ĩĩwe nĩ ĩthe kw’oko kwakwa
Job31:22 Nĩvo ĩndĩ kĩtuo kyakwa kĩkavũkĩle kĩkombenĩ kya kĩtuo
Job31:23 Nũndũ wanangĩko mũnene wumĩte kwa Ngai nĩ ũtĩsyo kwakwa
Job31:24 Ethĩwa ndw’ĩte thaavu wĩkwatyo wakwa
Job31:25 Ethĩwa nĩnatanie nũndũ wa ũthwii wakwa kwingĩva
Job31:26 Ethĩwa nĩnasiisye syũa yĩla yatisaa
Job31:27 Na ngoo yakwa yasengasengwa na kĩmbithĩ
Job31:28 Ĩsu nayo nĩ naĩ ya kũsilĩlwa nĩ asili; Nũndũ nĩthĩwa nakaĩa Ngai ũla wĩ ĩũlũ.
Job31:29 Ethĩwa nĩnĩtanie nũndũ wa wanangĩko wa ũla wamenie
Job31:30 (Ĩĩ
Job31:31 Ethĩwa andũ ma ĩeema yakwa matyaasya
Job31:32 (Mwĩkali wa ũeni ndaakoma nzĩanĩ nene; Ĩndĩ nĩnamũvingũĩaa mũendi wa kyalo mĩomo yakwa);
Job31:33 Ethĩwa ta Atamu nĩnavw’ĩkie mavĩtyo makwa
Job31:34 Nũndũ nĩnakĩie wingĩ wa andũ
Job31:35 A! Kethĩwa nĩ na ũmwe wa kũmbĩthukĩĩsya! (Sisya
Job31:36 Vate ndĩi nĩũkua kĩtuonĩ kyakwa; Nĩwoveea kwakwa ta ngovia ya ũsumbĩ:
Job31:37 Nĩmũtavya ũtalo wa matambya makwa; Nĩmũthengeea ta mũnene wĩ mbee ũsumbĩnĩ.
Job31:38 Ethĩwa nthĩ yakwa nĩnĩũndonzanĩlya
Job31:39 Ethĩwa nĩnaĩe mosyao mayo vate mbesa
Job31:40 Thangila nimee vandũ va nganũ
Job32:1 Na ĩndĩ andũ asu atatũ nĩmaekie kũsũngĩa Yovu
Job32:2 Nĩvo ĩndĩ ũthilĩku wa Eliu mwana wa Mbalakeli Mũvusi
Job32:3 O na ĩngĩ ũthilĩku wake wamakanĩa anyanyae make atatũ
Job32:4 Eliu aĩ aneteela kũneena na Yovu
Job32:5 Na yĩla Eliu wonie kana vati ũsungĩo kanyw’anĩ wa andũ asu atatũ
Job32:6 Na Eliu mwana wa Mbalakeli asũngĩa na asya
Job32:7 Naisye
Job32:8 Ĩndĩ kwĩ veva nthĩnĩ wa mũndũ
Job32:9 Ti ala anene me na ũĩ
Job32:10 Kwondũ wa ũu nasya
Job32:11 Sisyai
Job32:12 Ĩĩ
Job32:13 Ĩsũvĩei mũtikese kũneena
Job32:14 Nũndũ ndaambelekelya ndeto syake; O nakwa ndikamũsũngĩa na ndeto syenyu.
Job32:15 Nĩmeũseng’a
Job32:16 Nakwa ngeeteela
Job32:17 Nakwa nĩngũsũngĩa ngalĩ ĩ yakwa
Job32:18 Nũndũ nĩ mũsũu ndeto; Nĩngũthing’ĩĩw’a nĩ veva nthĩnĩ wakwa.

Job32:20 Nakwa nĩngũneena
Job32:21 Nĩngũmwĩsũva

Job33:1 Ĩndĩ
Job33:2 Sisya yu

Job33:5 Ethĩwa nũtonya

Job33:14 Nũndũ Ngai nũneenaa ĩmwe

Job33:19 Nake nũkũnĩawa nĩ kyalya ũkomonĩ wake
Job33:20 Na kwondũ wa ũu thayũ wake nũthĩthaa lĩu

Job33:22 Ĩĩ

Job33:26 Nũmũvoyaa Ngai
Job33:27 Nĩwĩnĩaa mbee wa andũ

Job33:31 Sisya nesa

Job33:33 Ethĩwa ti ũu
Job34:1 Na ũndũ ũngĩ Eliu asũngĩa na asya
Job34:2 Ĩw’ai ndeto syakwa
Job34:3 Nũndũ kũtũ nĩkũtataa ndeto
Job34:4 Twĩnyuvĩe ũndũ ũla ũlũngalu: Tũmanye katĩ waitũ ene ũla ũseo.
Job34:5 Nũndũ Yovu nũneenete
Job34:6 O na kau ũlũngalu wakwa wĩ vo nĩngũtalwa nĩ mũneeni wa ũvũngũ; Wũkite wakwa ndũvoeka
Job34:7 Nĩ mũndũ wĩva ũilyĩ Yovu
Job34:8 Ũla ũtindanasya na eki ma naĩ
Job34:9 Nũndũ nake nũneenete
Job34:10 Kwondũ wa ũu mbĩthukĩĩsyai
Job34:11 Nũndũ akamũĩva mũndũ wĩa wake
Job34:12 Ĩĩ
Job34:13 Nũũ ũla wamũnengie wĩaĩo ĩũlũ wa nthi? Kana nũũ ũla wiĩte nthĩ yonthe?
Job34:14 Ethĩwa akeelekelya ngoo yake mwene kwĩsisya
Job34:15 Mĩĩ yonthe ĩkaaa vamwe
Job34:16 Ethĩwa yu wĩ na ũmanyi
Job34:17 O na ũmwe ũla ũmenaa ũsili wa katĩ akasumbĩka? Na ũkamũtw’a mũvĩtan’ya ũla mũlũngalu na wĩ ũtonyi?—
Job34:18 Ũla ũtavasya mũsumbĩ
Job34:19 Ũla ũtonaa anene me mbee ũsumbĩnĩ ta kĩndũ
Job34:20 Kavinda kanini nĩmakusaa o ũtukũ katĩ; Andũ nĩmathingithaw’a
Job34:21 Nũndũ metho make nĩmasiasya nzĩa sya mũndũ
Job34:22 Vati kĩvindu
Job34:23 Nũndũ nde vata kũsũanĩanga ũndũ wa mũndũ
Job34:24 Nũtilangaa ngũmbaũ ilungu na nzĩa itamanyĩka
Job34:25 Kwondũ wa ũu nũsiasya mawĩa moo; Na nũmakũlumanasya ũtukũ
Job34:26 Nũmakũnaa ta andũ athũku Ala angĩ mamasyaĩtye;
Job34:27 Nũndũ nĩmaathũkie maeka kũmũatĩĩa
Job34:28 Kwondũ wa ũu matuma kĩĩo kya ngya kĩmũvikĩa
Job34:29 Yĩla ũnenganae ũkilyo
Job34:30 Nĩ kana ũla ũtakĩaa Ngai ndakasũmbĩke
Job34:31 Nũndũ ve ũmwe waamwĩa Ngai
Job34:32 Ũndũ ũla ndekwona manyĩsya nyie: Ethĩwa nĩnĩkĩte naĩ
Job34:33 Ũĩvanĩsyo wake ũkeethĩwa ta ũndũ ũkwenda
Job34:34 Andũ me na ũmanyi makambĩa
Job34:35 Yovu aneenaa ate na ũmanyi
Job34:36 Nenda kethĩwa Yovu ũkatatwa kũvika mũminũkĩlyo
Job34:37 Nũndũ nĩwongeleelaa naĩ yake ũng’endu; Nũkũnangĩaa mbĩ syake katĩ waitũ
Job35:1 Na ũndũ ũngĩ Eliu asũngĩa na asya
Job35:2 Nũkũsũanĩa ũu nũkwaĩle

Job35:4 Nĩngũũsũngĩa

Job35:9 Nũndũ wa wingĩ wa mathĩna andũ nĩmakayaa; Nũndũ wa kw’oko kwa ũla wĩ ũtonyi nĩmauaa mbu.

Job35:11 Ũla ũtũmanyĩasya kũvĩtũka nyamũ sya nthĩ

Job36:6 Ndasũvĩaa thayũ wa ũla mũthũku

Job37:1 Ĩĩ
Job37:2 Ĩw’a

Job37:4 Ĩtina waw’o wasya nũlitũkaa; Nũtundumaa na wasya wa ũnene wake; Na ndasiĩĩaa motisi yĩla wasya wake wĩw’ĩka.
Job37:5 Ngai nũtundumaa na ũseng’ya na wasya wake; Nĩwĩkaa maũndũ manene
Job37:6 Nũndũ nũtavasya ĩa
Job37:7 Nũsiĩĩaa kw’oko kwa kĩla mũndũ
Job37:8 Nĩvo nyamũ ilikaa mawĩvithonĩ
Job37:9 Kuma motheinĩ ma ngalĩ ya ĩtheo kĩuutani nĩkyũkaa
Job37:10 Kwondũ wa nĩthũmũ ya Ngai manzĩ momĩtw’e nĩ mbevo nĩmonekaa; Na ũthanthau wa manzĩ ũikoomatana.

Job37:16 Naku nĩwĩsĩ ũndũ mathweo masũnzũlĩtw’e
Job37:17 Ũndũ ngũa syaku syĩ na muutĩa
Job37:18 Naku nũtonya kũtambũũkya ĩtu wĩ nake
Job37:19 Tũmanyĩsye ũla twĩneena nake; Nũndũ tũtitonya kũneena tũlũngalĩtye nũndũ wa kĩvindu.
Job37:20 Akatavw’a kana nĩenda kũneena? Kana mũndũ akenda kũmelw’a vyũ?
Job37:21 Na yu andũ matyonaa kyeni kĩla kĩtisaa matunĩ; Ĩndĩ kĩseve nĩkĩvĩtaa
Job37:22 Kuma ngalĩ ya ĩũlũ ũtisu ta thaavu nĩwũkaa: Ngai e na ũnene wa ũtĩsya ĩũlũ wake.
Job37:23 Ũndũ wa Mwene Vinya W’onthe
Job37:24 Kwondũ wa ũu andũ mamũkĩaa: Ndasiasya andũ ala me na ũĩ ngoonĩ.
Job38:1 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Yeova wasũngĩie Yovu e kĩlinginĩ
Job38:2 Ũũ nũũ ũla wĩkĩaa ũtao kĩvindu Na ndeto ite na ũmanyi?
Job38:3 Ĩvotoe kĩnyunyu kyaku yu ta mũndũ; Nũndũ ngakũkũlya
Job38:4 Waĩ va yĩla naiaa myambĩlĩlyo ya nthĩ? Neena
Job38:5 Nũũ ũla weaie ithimo syayo
Job38:6 Myambĩlĩlyo yayo yalũlũmĩlw’e na kyaũ? Kana nũũ waiie ĩvia ya kĩkotonĩ kyayo
Job38:7 Yĩla ndata sya kĩoko syainie vamwe
Job38:8 Kana nũũ ũla wavingĩie ũkanga na mĩomo
Job38:9 Yĩla naseũvisye mathweo methĩwe ngũa yaw’o

Job38:11 Na kwasya
Job38:12 Waaĩaĩa kĩoko kuma mĩthenya yaku yambĩlĩlya
Job38:13 Nĩ kana kũvike itulunĩ sya nthĩ

Job38:15 Na kyeni kya ala athũku nĩkĩsiĩĩawa
Job38:16 Naku waalika mbulutinĩ sya ũkanga? Kana waatambũka syũngũlũtũnĩ sya kyũngũ?
Job38:17 Mbingĩlo sya kĩkw’ũ nĩsyavuaniw’e kwaku? Kana waaona mbingĩlo sya kyuu kya kĩkw’ũ?
Job38:18 Waamanya nthĩ ũthanthau wayo? Neena
Job38:19 Nzĩa nĩ yĩva ya kũthi ũtũonĩ wa kyeni? Na ũndũ wa kĩvindu
Job38:20 Ũndũ ũkĩtwaa mũvakanĩ wakyo
Job38:21 Vate nzika
Job38:22 Waavota vala ĩa yiawa
Job38:23 Ĩla niĩte ũndũ wa ĩvinda ya thĩna
Job38:24 Kyeni kĩaanaw’a na nzĩa yĩva
Job38:25 Nũũ ũla watũĩte ũkinyĩlo wa manzĩ maingĩ
Job38:26 Kuasya mbua nthĩ vala vate mũndũ; Weũnĩ ũla ũte mũndũ;
Job38:27 Kũkolethya nthĩ mbanangĩku na nthei
Job38:28 Mbua yĩ ĩthe? Kana nũũ ũla wasyaie mavoloto ma ĩmwe?
Job38:29 Manzi momĩtw’e nĩ mbevo maumie ĩvunĩ yaũ? Na ĩmwe ya ĩtunĩ yĩla yakamĩtw’e nĩ mbevo
Job38:30 Manzĩ mevithaa na kũtw’ĩka ta ĩvia
Job38:31 Nũtonya kwovanĩa Kĩeemea
Job38:32 Nũtonya kumĩlya nguthu ya ndata syĩtawa Masalothi ĩvinda yasyo? Kana nũtonya kũtongoesya Ayisi vamwe na ũkondo wayo?
Job38:33 Nĩwĩsĩ motw’ĩo ma matu? Nũtonya kũlũlũmĩlya ũsumbĩko wamo kũũ nthĩ?
Job38:34 Nũtonya kũkĩlya wasya waku kũvika mathweonĩ
Job38:35 Nũtonya kumĩlya motisi
Job38:36 Nũũ ũla wekĩie ũĩ nthĩnĩ? Kana nũũ wanengie kĩlilikano ũmanyi?
Job38:37 Nũũ ũtonya kũtala mathweo kwondũ wa ũĩ? Kana nũũ ũtonya kũmatulũla masũva ma ĩtu
Job38:38 Yĩla mũthanga ũkwatanaa na ũitw’ĩka mũmũ
Job38:39 Nũtonya kũsyĩmĩa mũnyambũ mũka sya nzyĩma
Job38:40 Yĩla yoveeasya isumonĩ syayo
Job38:41 Nũũ ũnengae ngũngũũ kya nzyĩma yayo
Job39:1 Nĩwĩsĩ ĩvinda ya kũsyaa ya mbũi sya kĩthekanĩ ila syĩ mavianĩ? Kana nũtonya kũmanya yĩla ndaatai isyaaa?
Job39:2 Nũtonya kũtala myei ĩla ikwĩanĩsya? Kana nĩwĩsĩ ĩvinda yĩla isyaaa?
Job39:3 Nitindiaa
Job39:4 Maswii masyo nĩmaĩsaa vinya
Job39:5 Nũũ ũla ũtũmĩte ĩng’oi ya kĩthekanĩ yĩende yĩ ĩthasye? Kana nũũ ũthaĩtye kĩla kyovete ĩng’oi yĩla yĩendaa mĩtũkĩ
Job39:6 Yĩla naseũvĩsye weũ wĩthĩwe mũsyĩ wayo
Job39:7 Nayo yĩvũthasya kĩtuu kya ndũa
Job39:8 Ũthanthau wa iĩma nĩ kĩsesi kyayo
Job39:9 Mboo ĩkendeew’a nĩ ũkũthũkũma? Kana ĩkekalaa vakuvĩ na kĩĩthĩsyo kyaku?
Job39:10 Nũtonya kwova mboo na mũkwa wayo mũkaonĩ? Kana ĩkenza myandanĩ ĩkũatĩĩe?
Job39:11 Ũkamĩĩkĩĩa nũndũ vinya wayo nĩ mũnene? Kana ũkamĩtianĩsya na wĩa waku?
Job39:12 Ũkamĩĩkĩĩa atĩ ĩkenũkya mbeũ syaku
Job39:13 Nthwau sya nyaa nĩkũnanganaw’a na ngathĩĩo; Ĩndĩ nĩ nzĩa na maw’ĩa ma wendo?
Job39:14 Nũndũ nĩtiaa matumbĩ mayo ĩũlũ wa mũthanga
Job39:15 Na kũlwa kana kũũ nĩkũtonya kũmakinyanga
Job39:16 Nĩtwĩkaa tũswii twayo na vinya
Job39:17 Nĩkwĩthĩwa Ngai nũmĩimĩthĩtye ũĩ
Job39:18 Ĩvinda yĩla ĩyũkĩlasya ĩũlũ
Job39:19 Nue ũmĩnengete mbalasi vinya wayo? Nue ũmĩvw’ĩkĩte ngingo yayo ũea ũtetemaa?
Job39:20 Nue ũtumaa ĩtũlĩla ta ngie? Ũnene wa kũtiva kwayo nĩ wa kũtĩsya.
Job39:21 Nĩvulasya na kũũ mwandanĩ
Job39:22 Nĩvũthasya w’ĩa
Job39:23 Thyaka nũmĩlonzanĩlasya
Job39:24 Nĩmelasya nthĩ na wai na ũthatu mũnene; O na ndĩtĩkĩlaa kana soo nĩwakaya.
Job39:25 O yĩla soo wesa ũvuvwa ĩkyasya
Job39:26 Nĩ kwondũ wa ũĩ waku kĩlũĩ kĩũlũkaa kĩvolelete
Job39:27 Nĩ ũndũ wa mwĩao waku ndiũ yambataa
Job39:28 Nĩyĩkalaa ũkeanĩ
Job39:29 Ĩ vo nĩthianaa sya nzyĩma; Metho mayo mamyonaa yĩ kũasa.
Job39:30 Tũswii twayo natw’o nĩtũnyusaa nthakame: Na vala ve oawa
Job40:1 O na ĩngĩ Yeova asũngĩa Yovu
Job40:2 Mũtetan’ya akatetan’ya na Mwene Vinya W’onthe? Ũla ũkananĩa na Ngai
Job40:3 Na ĩndĩ Yovu asũngĩa Yeova
Job40:4 Sisya
Job40:5 Nĩneenete ĩmwe
Job40:6 Na ĩndĩ Yeova asũngĩa Yovu e kĩlinginĩ
Job40:7 Ĩvotoe kĩnyunyu kyaku yu ta mũndũ: Ngakũkũlya
Job40:8 Ũkaalyũla ũtw’ĩo wakwa? Ũkatw’a atĩ nyie nĩ na ĩvĩtyo
Job40:9 Kana wĩ na kw’oko ta Ngai? Na nũtonya kũtunduma na wasya take?
Job40:10 Ĩyanakavye yu na ũnene na ũsumbĩko; Na kwĩvw’ĩka ndaĩa na ũsũng’wa.
Job40:11 Onosya wusũu wa ũthatu waku; Na sisya kĩla mwĩkathĩĩi
Job40:12 Sisya kĩla mwĩkathĩĩi
Job40:13 Mavithe kĩtoonĩ vamwe; Move mothyũ moo vandũnĩ vavithe.
Job40:14 Nĩvo ĩndĩ nĩumbũla ũndũ waku Kana kw’oko kwaku mwene kwa aũme nĩkũtonya ũkũtangĩĩa.
Job40:15 Sisya yu
Job40:16 Sisya yu
Job40:17 Nĩvyũlasya kĩsithe kyayo ta mũtĩ wa mũkũũ: Malangũ ma mawaswa mayo nĩmakwatanĩte.
Job40:18 Mavĩndĩ mayo nĩ ta mĩtote ya ũthuku; Mamutha mayo nĩ ta ivingi sya iaa.
Job40:19 Nĩ nene katĩ wa mawĩa ma Ngai: Na ũla wamyũmbie nĩwe ũla wamĩnengie ũvyũ wayo.
Job40:20 Nĩ w’o iĩma nimeasya lĩu wayo
Job40:21 Nĩkomaa ĩtina wa mĩtĩ yĩ muunyĩ Wĩvithonĩ wa mĩangi na ndakanĩ.
Job40:22 Mĩtĩ ĩsu nĩmĩvw’ĩkaa na muunyĩ wayo; Mĩtĩ ĩla ĩmeaa kalũsĩnĩ nĩmĩthyũlũlũkaa.
Job40:23 Sisya
Job40:24 Mũndũ o na wĩva nũmĩkwata ĩsyaĩĩsye
Job41:1 Nũtonya kũkusya leviathani na ngolya ya ũkwatya makũyũ? Kana kũvinyĩĩa ũĩmĩ wayo na ĩkanda?
Job41:2 Nũtonya kwĩkĩa ĩkanda ĩnyiũũnĩ yayo? Kana kũtonya mũkuthũ ũkambuu wayo na kavoloi?
Job41:3 Ĩkakwĩsũva na mawĩsũvano maingĩ? Kana ĩkakũtavya ndeto mbololo?
Job41:4 Ĩkatianĩa ũtianĩo naku
Job41:5 Ũkathaũka nayo ta nyũnyi? Kana ũkamyova kwondũ wa athũkũmi maku eĩtu?
Job41:6 Nguthu sya atei ma makũyũ ikamĩtw’ĩkĩthya ũtandĩthyo wasyo? Ikamĩaan’ya katĩ wa atandĩthya?
Job41:7 Nũtonya kusũsya kĩkonde kyayo na mĩw’a ya kĩaa
Job41:8 Ilĩĩla kw’oko kwaku ĩũlũ wayo; Lilikana kaũ ũsu
Job41:9 Sisya
Job41:10 Vati ũla mwai ũla ũtakĩa kũmĩamũkya; Nũũ ĩndĩ ũtonya kũũngama mbee wakwa?
Job41:11 Nũũ ũla wambie kũnenga
Job41:12 Ndikavindya ũndũ wa mamutha mayo
Job41:13 Nũũ ũtonya kũmyumya ngũa yayo ya ĩũlũ? Nũũ wĩlika ngambuunĩ syayo?
Job41:14 Nũũ ũtonya kũvingũa mĩomo ya ũthyũ wayo? Ũtee wa maeo mayo kwĩ ũtĩsyo.
Job41:15 Makwaũ mayo me vinya nĩmo ngathĩĩo yayo
Job41:16 Yĩmwe yĩthengeanĩe na yĩngĩ
Job41:17 Nĩmakwatanĩte yĩmwe na yĩngĩ; Makwatene
Job41:18 Kwathimũa kwayo kũkenasya kyeni
Job41:19 Momũĩ makanu maumaa kanyw’anĩ wayo
Job41:20 Syũki nĩyumaa manyiũũnĩ mayo
Job41:21 Mĩthũmũ yayo nĩyakanasya makaa
Job41:22 Ngingonĩ yayo nĩvekalaa vinya
Job41:23 Makwaũ ma mwĩĩ wayo nĩmakwatanĩte: Nĩmomanĩle ĩũlũ wayo; matitonya kumĩka.
Job41:24 Ngoo yayo nĩ nũmu ta ĩvia; Ĩĩ
Job41:25 Yĩla yũkĩlaa
Job41:26 Ethĩwa mũndũ nũmĩkũnaa na ũvyũ
Job41:27 Nĩtalaa kĩaa ta ũa
Job41:28 Mũsyĩ ndũtonya kũtuma ĩkĩa: Mavia ma kĩkũtha malyũlawa nĩyo ta ũa.
Job41:29 Nzũma nitalawa ta ũa: Nĩthekeaa kwĩkw’a kwa katumo.
Job41:30 Ungu wayo nĩ ya ilĩo mbũĩ: Nĩvinyĩĩaa ĩũlũ wa ndaka ta kĩvũi.
Job41:31 Nĩtumaa kyũngũ kĩtheũka ta mbisũ: Nĩtw’ĩkĩthasya ũkanga ta mbisũ ya mauta ma ũvaka.
Job41:32 Nĩtumaa nzĩa ĩtisatisa ĩtina wayo; Mũndũ akasũanĩa kyũngũ kĩ mbuĩ.
Job41:33 Ĩũlũ wa nthĩ vati tayo
Job41:34 Nĩsiasya kĩla kĩndũ kĩ ĩũlũ: Nĩ mũsumbĩ ĩũlũ wa ana onthe ma ngathĩĩo.
Job42:1 Na ĩndĩ Yovu asũngĩa Yeova
Job42:2 Nĩnĩsĩ nũtonya kwĩka maũndũ onthe
Job42:3 Ũũ nũũ ũla ũvithaa ũtao vate ũmanyi? Kwondũ wa ũu nĩnĩneenete ũndũ ndaamanya
Job42:4 Ĩw’a
Job42:5 Nĩneew’ĩte ũvoo waku kwa kwĩw’a na kũtũ; Ĩndĩ yu itho yakwa nĩyĩũkwona:
Job42:6 Kwondũ wa ũu nĩngwĩthĩtha
Job42:7 Na kweethĩwa
Job42:8 Yu kwondũ wa ũu
Job42:9 Na ĩndĩ Elivasi Mũtemani na Mbilitati Mũsui na Nzovali Mũnamaathi maenda
Job42:10 Na Yeova amũtũngĩa Yovu kũtavĩwa kwake
Job42:11 Nĩvo ĩndĩ ana‐a‐inyia make onthe
Job42:12 Na ĩndĩ Yeova aathima mũminũkĩlyo wa Yovu kũvĩtũka wambĩlĩlyo wake: na aĩ na malondu ngili ĩkũmi na inya
Job42:13 O na aĩ na ana mũonza na eĩtu atatũ.
Job42:14 Na eeta syĩtwa ũa ũla wa mbee
Job42:15 Na nthĩ yonthe vatyaoneka aka maĩ anake ta eĩtu ma Yovu: na ĩthe woo amanenga ũtiĩwa katĩ wa ana‐a‐inyia moo.
Job42:16 Na ĩtina wa ũu Yovu ekala thayũ myaka ĩana na mĩongo ĩna
Job42:17 Na ĩndĩ Yovu akw’a
Psalms1:1 Kũathimwa nĩ mũndũ ũla ũtaendaa ũtaonĩ wa ala athũku
Psalms1:2 Ĩndĩ ũtanu wake wĩ mĩaonĩ ya Yeova; Na asũanĩaa mĩao yake mũthenya na ũtukũ.
Psalms1:3 Na akeethĩwa ailyĩ ta mũtĩ ũvandĩtwe ũtee wa mbũsĩ syĩ manzĩ
Psalms1:4 Ala athũku matiilyĩ ũu
Psalms1:5 Kwondũ wa ũu athũku matikaũngama ũsilĩlonĩ
Psalms1:6 Nũndũ Yeova nĩwĩsĩ nzĩa ya ala alũngalu; Ĩndĩ nzĩa ya athe ĩkaaa.
Psalms2:1 Mbaĩ ilonzanĩlasya kĩ? Na ngo sya andũ kũsũanĩa ũndũ wa mana?
Psalms2:2 Asumbĩ ma nthĩ nĩmeyũmanĩlye
Psalms2:3 Tũtusangei syĩndũ ila imovaa
Psalms2:4 We ũla ũilyĩ matunĩ akatheka: Mwĩaĩi akamathekeea.
Psalms2:5 Nĩvo ĩndĩ ũkaneena namo ũthilĩkunĩ wake
Psalms2:6 Nakwa nĩniĩte mũsumbĩ wakwa Kĩĩmanĩ kyakwa kĩtheu kya Saioni.
Psalms2:7 Nĩngũtavan’ya ũvoo wa ũla ũtw’ĩo: Yeova ambĩa
Psalms2:8 Mbĩtya
Psalms2:9 Ũkamananga na ndata ya kĩaa; Ũkamang’atangan’ya matilĩkangane tũlungu ta mbisũ ya mũmbi.
Psalms2:10 Kwondũ wa ũu ĩthĩwai na ũĩ
Psalms2:11 Thũkũmai Yeova mũkĩmũkĩa
Psalms2:12 Mũmumunyei ũla mwana
Psalms3:1 Yeova
Psalms3:2 Nĩ aingĩ ala maasya ũndũ wa thayũ wakwa
Psalms3:3 Ĩndĩ we
Psalms3:4 Nĩngũmwĩkaĩla Yeova na kanyw’a wakwa
Psalms3:5 Nyie nĩnakomie na nalĩkwa; Na navindũka; nĩkwĩthĩwa Yeova nĩwe ũndw’ĩĩkaa.
Psalms3:6 Ndikakĩa andũ ngili makũmi Ala mambũkĩlĩle ngalĩ syonthe.
Psalms3:7 Ũkĩla
Psalms3:8 Yeova ũtangĩĩo nĩ waku: Ũathimo waku wĩthĩwe ĩũlũ wa andũ maku.
Psalms4:1 Nzũngĩa yĩla nĩkwĩkaĩla
Psalms4:2 Inyw’ĩ ana ma andũ
Psalms4:3 Ĩndĩ manyai kana Yeova nũvathĩte kwondũ wake ũla ũmũkĩaa Ngai: Yeova akeew’a yĩla ngũmwĩkaĩla.
Psalms4:4 Ĩthĩwai na w’ĩa
Psalms4:5 Umyai nthembo sya ũlũngalu
Psalms4:6 Nĩ aingĩ ala mekwasya
Psalms4:7 Nũmbĩkĩĩte ũtanu ngoonĩ yakwa
Psalms4:8 Ngakoma na mũuo na ĩngĩ ngalĩkwa; Nĩkwĩthĩwa nue
Psalms5:1 Ĩthukĩĩsye ndeto syakwa
Psalms5:2 Ĩthukĩĩsye wasya wa kĩĩo kyakwa
Psalms5:3 Ame Yeova
Psalms5:4 Nũndũ we ndwĩ Ngai ũla ũtanaw’a nĩ ũthũku: Ũthũku ndũkatũa naku.
Psalms5:5 Ala ekathĩĩi matikaũngama methonĩ maku: Nũmenaa onthe ala mekaa naĩ.
Psalms5:6 Ũkaananga ala maneenaa movũngũ: Yeova nũthĩthaa mũndũ ũla ũng’aatũkaw’a nĩ nthakame o na mũkengani.
Psalms5:7 Ĩndĩ nyie
Psalms5:8 Ndongoeasya
Psalms5:9 Nĩkwĩthĩwa vai ũĩkĩĩthyo kanyw’anĩ woo; Nthĩnĩ woo no ũthũku mũthei; Mĩmeo yoo nĩ mbũa mbingũe; Nĩmendeeasya na ndeto sya ũkathĩĩo na nĩmĩ syoo.
Psalms5:10 Matw’ĩĩe nĩ avĩtan’ya
Psalms5:11 Ĩndĩ matane onthe ala mekwĩvitha nthĩnĩ waku
Psalms5:12 Nũndũ ũkamũathima ũla mũlũngalu; Naku Yeova
Psalms6:1 Ame Yeova
Psalms6:2 Mbĩw’ĩa tei
Psalms6:3 O na ngoo yakwa nĩnĩkũũũya mũno: Naku
Psalms6:4 Syoka
Psalms6:5 Nĩkwĩthĩwa kĩkw’ũnĩ ndũlilikanawa: Ku Seoli nũũ ũla ũkakũtũngĩa mũvea?
Psalms6:6 Nĩnĩnoetwe nĩ kũluma kwakwa; Kĩla ũtukũ nĩindaa ũkomo wakwa methoinĩ; Ũkomo wakwa nĩngũnyithya na methoi makwa.
Psalms6:7 Itho yakwa nĩyĩũseekea nũndũ wa kũmaka; Nĩyĩũkũa nũndũ wa nthũ syakwa syonthe.
Psalms6:8 Umai vaa nĩĩ
Psalms6:9 Yeova nĩwĩw’ĩte kũvoya kwakwa; Yeova akeetĩkĩla mboya yakwa.
Psalms6:10 Amaitha makwa onthe makasonokw’a na kũũũya mũno: Makasyoka na ĩtina
