Psalms97:1 Yeova nũsumbĩkaa; nthĩ nĩyĩw’e mũyo; Wingĩ wa ithama ũtane.
Psalms97:2 Mathweo na kĩvindu nimũthyũlũlũkĩte: Ũlũnglu na sila wa katĩ nĩ wambĩlĩlyo wa kĩvĩla kyake kya ũsumbĩ.
Psalms97:3 Mwaki nũendaa mbee wake
Psalms97:4 Motisi make nĩmamulĩkile nthĩ: Nthĩ yoona na yatetema.
Psalms97:5 Iĩma syatweka ta ĩseso vala ve Yeova
Psalms97:6 Matu nĩmatavanasya ũlũngalu wake
Psalms97:7 Onthe ala mathũkũmaa mĩvw’anano myasũvye nĩmasonokw’e
Psalms97:8 Saioni nĩkyeewie na kyatana
Psalms97:9 Nũndũ we
Psalms97:10 Inyw’ĩ ala mũmwendaa Yeova
Psalms97:11 Kyeni nĩkĩvuĩĩtwe kwondũ wa ala alũngalu
Psalms97:12 Ĩthĩwai na mũyo nthĩnĩ wa Yeova
Psalms98:1 Mwinĩei Mwĩaĩi wathi weũ; Nũndũ nĩwĩkĩte maũndũ ma ũseng’ya: Kw’oko kwake kwa aũme
Psalms98:2 Yeova nũmanyĩthanĩtye ũtangĩĩo wake: Ũlũngalu wake nĩwonanĩtye ũtheinĩ i mbaĩ syene.
Psalms98:3 Nũlilikanĩte ũseo wake wĩ wendo na kĩthito kyake kyelekele nyũmba ya Isilaeli: Itulu syonthe sya nthĩ nĩsyonete ũtangĩĩo wa Ngai waitũ.
Psalms98:4 Ũkĩlĩlyai Yeova wasya wa ũtanu
Psalms98:5 Inĩai Yeova mũkĩmũkumya mwĩ na mbeve; Mwĩ na mbeve na wasya wĩ mũyo.
Psalms98:6 Mwĩ na masoo na wasya wa soo mũkelemu Ũkĩlyai wasya wa ũtanu mbee wa Mũsumbĩ
Psalms98:7 Ũkanga nũlitũke
Psalms98:8 Manzĩ maingĩ makũnangan’ye mbĩ syamo; Tũlĩma nĩtwine vamwe nũndũ wa ũtanu
Psalms98:9 Mbee wa Yeova; nũndũ nĩwũkĩte asilĩle nthĩ: Akasilĩla nthĩ na ũlũngalu
Psalms99:1 Yeova nũsumbĩkaa; ngo sya andũ iteteme: Nĩwĩkalaa ĩũlũ wa akeluvi; nthĩ nĩthingithangw’e.
Psalms99:2 Yeova nĩ mũnene ku Saioni; Nake e ĩũlũ mũno wa ngo syonthe sya andũ.
Psalms99:3 Nitaĩe syĩtwa yaku ĩnene na ya ũtĩsya: Nake nĩ mũtheu.
Psalms99:4 Vinya wa mũsumbĩ naw’o nĩwendaa sila wa katĩ; Nũlũmasya ũlũngalu; Nũsilaa sila wa katĩ na wa ũlũngalu nthĩnĩ wa Yakovo.
Psalms99:5 Nenevyai Yeova Ngai waitũ
Psalms99:6 Mose na Aluni amwe ma athembi make
Psalms99:7 Aneenaa nao e nthĩnĩ wa kĩtuĩ kya mũumbĩ: Nao makwata mokũsĩ make
Psalms99:8 Nĩwamasũngĩie
Psalms99:9 Nenevyai Yeova Ngai waitũ
Psalms100:1 Ũkĩlĩlyei Yeova wasya wa ũtanu
Psalms100:2 Mũthũkũmei Yeova na mũyo: Ũkai mbee wake mwinĩte.
Psalms100:3 Manyai kana Yeova nĩwe Ngai: Nĩwe ũla watũmbie
Psalms100:4 Votelai mbingĩlonĩ syake mwĩ na mũvea
Psalms100:5 Nũndũ Yeova nĩ mũseo; ũseo wake wĩ wendo nĩwĩkalaa tene na tene
Psalms101:1 Ngaina ũndũ wa ũseo wĩ wendo na ũsili wa katĩ: Ngaina ngĩkũkumya
Psalms101:2 Nyie ngeekaa na kĩlĩko mũendelenĩ mwĩanĩu: Ame ũkoka kwakwa ĩndĩĩ? Ngaendelaa nyũmbanĩ yakwa nĩ na ngoo mbĩanĩu.
Psalms101:3 Ndikaia kĩndũ kĩthũku mbee wa metho makwa: Nĩnĩmenaa wĩa wa ala mathũkaa ũtee; Ndũkalũman’ya nakwa.
Psalms101:4 Ngoo yĩ ngũlũ ĩkauma vala nĩĩ: Ndikamanya ũndũ ũthũku.
Psalms101:5 O ũla ũsukaa mũtũi wake na kĩmbithĩ
Psalms101:6 Metho makwa makeethĩwa ĩũlũ wa ala me kĩthito ma ĩ nthĩ
Psalms101:7 Ũla ũkenganaa ndakatũa nyũmbanĩ yakwa: Ũla ũneenaa ũvũngũ ndakalũlũmĩlw’a mbee wa metho makwa.
Psalms101:8 Kĩoko na kĩoko ngaanangaa ala athũku onthe ma ĩ nthĩ; Nĩvete eki ma ũthũku onthe maume ndũanĩ ya Yeova.
Psalms102:1 Ĩw’a mboya yakwa
Psalms102:2 Ndũkambithe ũthyũ waku mũthenya wa thĩna wakwa: Tea kũtũ kwaku; Mũthenya ũla nĩkaya wĩnzũngĩa mĩtũkĩ.
Psalms102:3 Nũndũ mĩthenya yakwa nĩnĩũthela ta syũki
Psalms102:4 Ngoo yakwa nĩkũnĩtwe ta nyeki
Psalms102:5 Nũndũ wa wasya wa kũluma kwakwa Mavĩndĩ makwa nĩmalũmanĩtye na nyama syakwa.
Psalms102:6 Nĩilyĩ ta ngunĩ ya weũnĩ; Nĩtw’ĩkĩte ta ndundu ya kũndũ kũtie.
Psalms102:7 Nĩnzyaĩĩasya
Psalms102:8 Amaitha makwa mambũthasya mũthenya w’onthe; Ala manthatĩaa nĩmanumanĩaa.
Psalms102:9 Nũndũ nĩĩte mũu ta lĩu
Psalms102:10 Nũndũ wa kũthilĩka kwaku na ũthatu waku: Nũndũ nũmbũkĩlĩtye
Psalms102:11 Matukũ makwa mailyĩ ta muunyĩ ũla ũendeee; Na nĩnũmĩte ta nyeki.
Psalms102:12 Ĩndĩ we
Psalms102:13 We ũkookĩla na kwĩw’ĩa Saioni tei; Nũndũ nĩ ĩvinda ya kũmĩw’ĩa tei
Psalms102:14 Nũndũ athũkũmi maku nĩmendeew’e nĩ mavia mayo
Psalms102:15 Kwondũ wa ũu i mbaĩ ikakĩa syĩtwa ya Yeova
Psalms102:16 Nũndũ Yeova nĩwakĩte Saioni; Nĩwonekete ũtheunĩ mũtisu wake.
Psalms102:17 Nĩwĩtĩkĩlaa mboya ya ngya
Psalms102:18 Ũũ ũkaandĩkwa kwondũ wa nzyawa ĩla yĩũka; Na andũ ala makasyawa makamũtaĩa Yeova.
Psalms102:19 Nũndũ nũsyaĩtye nthĩ e ũtũlunĩ wa vandũ vake vatheu; Yeova e ĩtunĩ nĩwasyaisye nthĩ;
Psalms102:20 Ew’e kũvevũũka kwa ũla mwove; Kũthasya asu ala matw’ĩĩwe kũkw’a;
Psalms102:21 Nĩ kana andũ matonye kũtavan’ya syĩtwa ya Yeova ku Saioni
Psalms102:22 O yĩla ngo sya andũ ikũmbana
Psalms102:23 Nĩwaolile vinya wakwa nzĩanĩ; Nĩwakuvĩvisye matukũ makwa.
Psalms102:24 Nasya
Psalms102:25 O tene tene we nĩwakwatisye wambĩlĩlyo wa nthĩ; Na matu nĩ wĩa wa moko maku.
Psalms102:26 Syo ikaaa
Psalms102:27 Ĩndĩ nue ũla wĩkalaa o ũndũ ũmwe
Psalms102:28 Syana sya athũkũmi maku ikaendeeaa
Psalms103:1 Mũtaĩe Yeova
Psalms103:2 Mũtaĩe Yeova
Psalms103:3 Ũla ũkũekeeaa mothũku maku onthe; Ũla ũvoasya mowau maku onthe;
Psalms103:4 Ũla wovoasya thayũ waku kuma wanangĩkonĩ; Ũla ũkwĩkĩaa ngovia ya ũsumbĩ ya ũseo wĩ wendo na matei mololo;
Psalms103:5 Ũla ũvũnasya kwenda kwaku na maũndũ maseo
Psalms103:6 Yeova nĩwĩkaa meko malũngalu
Psalms103:7 Nĩwamanyĩthisye Mose nzĩa syake
Psalms103:8 Yeova e tei na nĩ mũseo
Psalms103:9 Ndakateta mavinda onthe; O na ndekalasya ũthatu wake tene na tene.
Psalms103:10 Ndatwĩkĩte kwĩanana na naĩ sitũ
Psalms103:11 Nũndũ o tondũ matu me kũasa ĩũlũ wa nthĩ
Psalms103:12 O tondũ kũasavĩte kuma wumĩlonĩ wa syũa kũvika ũthũĩlonĩ wayo
Psalms103:13 O tondũ ĩthe wĩw’ĩaa syana syake tei
Psalms103:14 Nũndũ nĩwĩsĩ wũmbe witũ; Nũlilikanaa kana twĩ kĩtoo.
Psalms103:15 Na ũndũ wa mũndũ
Psalms103:16 Nũndũ kĩseve nĩkĩvĩtĩlaa ĩũlũ wayo
Psalms103:17 Ĩndĩ ũseo wĩ wendo wa Yeova nĩ kuma tene na tene kũvika tene na tene ĩũlũ wa ala mamũkĩaa
Psalms103:18 Kwa ala malũmasya ũtianĩo wake
Psalms103:19 Yeova nũlũlũmĩlye kĩvĩla kyake kya ũsumbĩ matunĩ; Na ũsumbĩ wake ũsumbĩkĩte ĩũlũ wa onthe.
Psalms103:20 Mũtaĩei Yeova
Psalms103:21 Mũtaĩei Yeova
Psalms103:22 Mũtaĩei Yeova
Psalms104:1 Taĩa Yeova
Psalms104:2 Ũla wĩvw’ĩkaa mwene kyeni ta kwĩvw’ĩka ngũa; Ũla ũtambũũkasya matu ta suka;
Psalms104:3 Ũla wiaa mĩamba ya tũsũmba twake manzĩnĩ; Ũla ũtw’ĩkĩthasya mathweo ĩkasya yake; Ũla ũkinyĩlaa ĩũlũ wa nthwau sya kĩseve;
Psalms104:4 Ũla ũtusaa iseve atũmwa make; Itw’ĩki sya mwaki athũkũmi make;
Psalms104:5 Ũla wambĩlĩlye myambĩlĩlyo ya nthĩ
Psalms104:6 We nĩwamĩvw’ĩkie na kyũngũ ta kũvw’ĩka ngũa; Manzĩ mekala ĩũlũ wa iĩma.
Psalms104:7 Kwondũ wa ũkan’yo waku makĩa; Kwondũ wa wasya wa kĩtundumo kyaku meekalaata mathi
Psalms104:8 (Iĩma syookĩla
Psalms104:9 Nĩwiĩte mũvaka nĩ kana matikokĩle; Matikaasyoke ĩngĩ na kũvw’ĩka nthĩ.
Psalms104:10 Nĩwumĩlasya mbuluti sya manzĩ syandanĩ; Nĩmasembaa katĩ wa iĩma.
Psalms104:11 Mainyuwa nĩ kĩla nyamũ ya kĩtheka; Mang’oi ma kĩthekanĩ makĩlaũkw’a.
Psalms104:12 Ũtee wamo nyũnyi sya yayaya syĩ na wĩkalo wasyo; Ikinĩa mbongenĩ.
Psalms104:13 Nũnyithasya iĩma kuma tũsũmbanĩ twake: Nthĩ nĩyusũĩtwe nĩ ũsyao wa mawĩa maku.
Psalms104:14 Nũmeasya nyeki ũndũ wa indo Na nyũnyi nũndũ wa ũtethyo wa mũndũ; Kana aumye lĩu nthĩ
Psalms104:15 Na mbinyu ĩla ĩtanasya ngoo ya mũndũ
Psalms104:16 Mĩtĩ ya Yeova nĩkolete
Psalms104:17 Vala nyũnyi syakaa ndala syasyo: Na ũndũ wa ĩsaũ
Psalms104:18 Iĩma ndũlu syĩ kwondũ wa mbũi sya kĩthekanĩ; Mavia nĩ wĩvitho wa inyowe.
Psalms104:19 Aiie mwei ũndũ wa mavinda: Syũa nĩyĩsĩ ũthũĩlo wayo.
Psalms104:20 Nũetae kĩvindu
Psalms104:21 Mĩnyambũ ya mũika ĩlũmĩlaa sya nzyĩma syayo
Psalms104:22 Syũa yauma
Psalms104:23 Mũndũ nũendaa wĩanĩ wake Na aitethya wĩa wake kũvika wĩoo.
Psalms104:24 A! Yeova
Psalms104:25 Ũkanga nĩ ũya
Psalms104:26 Nĩvo vaendelaa ngalawa; Nĩvo ve leviathani ĩla wamyũmbie ĩthaũkae nthĩnĩ waw’o.
Psalms104:27 Isu syonthe nikweteele
Psalms104:28 Nĩwinengae
Psalms104:29 Nũvithaa ũthyũ waku
Psalms104:30 Nũtũmaa Veva waku
Psalms104:31 Ũtheu mũtisu wa Yeova nĩwĩkale tene na tene; Yeova natanĩe mawĩa make:
Psalms104:32 We ũla ũsiasya nthĩ
Psalms104:33 Ngamwinĩa Yeova o yĩla nĩ thayũ: Ngaina ngĩkatha Ngai wakwa o yĩla nĩĩkalaa.
Psalms104:34 Kĩsũanĩo kyakwa kĩthĩwe kĩ mũyo kwake: Ngatanaa nthĩnĩ wa Yeova.
Psalms104:35 Athe nĩmathele nthĩ. Na ala athũku matikaaĩthĩwe ĩngĩ. Taĩa Yeova
Psalms105:1 Tũngĩai Yeova mũvea
Psalms105:2 Mwinĩei
Psalms105:3 Ĩkathĩĩei syĩtwanĩ yake ĩtheu: Ngoo sya ala mamanthaa Yeova nitane.
Psalms105:4 Mũmanthei Yeova na vinya wake; Manthai ũthyũ wake tene na tene.
Psalms105:5 Lilikanai mawĩa make ma ũseng’ya ala wĩkĩte
Psalms105:6 Inyw’ĩ ũsyao wa Avalaamu mũthũkũmi wake
Psalms105:7 We nĩ Yeova Ngai waitũ: Mosilĩlo make me nthĩ yonthe.
Psalms105:8 Nũlilikanaa ũtianĩo wake tene na tene
Psalms105:9 Ũtianĩo ũla watianĩe na Avalaamu
Psalms105:10 Na kũwũlũlũmĩlya kwa Yakovo kwĩthĩwa mwamũlo
Psalms105:11 Akyasya
Psalms105:12 Yĩla maĩ o andũ anini ũtalonĩ
Psalms105:13 Na mangangaa kuma mbaĩnĩ kũthi mbaĩnĩ
Psalms105:14 Ndaaeka mũndũ ameke ũthũku; Ĩĩ
Psalms105:15 Akyasya
Psalms105:16 Na eeta yũa yũke ĩũlũ wa nthĩ; Atũlan’ya vyũ ndata ya lĩu.
Psalms105:17 Atũma mũndũ mbee woo; Yosevu athoow’a ethĩwe ngombo:
Psalms105:18 Mamwĩw’ĩthya maũũ make woo na mbĩngũ: Eekĩwa mĩnyololonĩ ya kĩaa
Psalms105:19 Kũvika ĩvinda yĩla ndeto yake yeanĩie
Psalms105:20 Mũsumbĩ atũmana na amũthasya; O mũsumbĩki wa ngo sya andũ
Psalms105:21 Amũtw’a mwĩaĩi wa nyũmba yake
Psalms105:22 Ove anene make me mbee ũsumbĩnĩ o ũndũ ũnũkwenda
Psalms105:23 Isilaeli nake nĩwokie Misili; Na Yakovo nĩwekalile ũeni nthĩ ya Amu.
Psalms105:24 Na nĩwaingĩvisye andũ make mũno
Psalms105:25 Nĩwathyũũie ngoo syoo imene andũ make
Psalms105:26 Atũmie Mose mũthũkũmi wake
Psalms105:27 Meeka mawonan’yo make katĩ wamo
Psalms105:28 Atũma kĩvindu
Psalms105:29 Aalyũla kĩw’ũ kyoo nthakame
Psalms105:30 Nthĩ yoo yeelatwa nĩ syoa Tũsũmbanĩ twa asumbĩ moo.
Psalms105:31 Aneena
Psalms105:32 Amanenga mbua ya mavia vandũ va mbua
Psalms105:33 O na akũna mĩsavivũ yoo na mĩkũyũ yoo
Psalms105:34 Aneena
Psalms105:35 Na syaya syamina nyũnyi syonthe sya nthĩ yoo
Psalms105:36 O na ĩngĩ akũna ũsyao wa mbee w’onthe wa nthĩ yoo
Psalms105:37 Na amaumya me na vetha na thaavu; Na kũtyaĩ mũndũ ũmwe mwonzu katĩ wa mbaĩ syake.
Psalms105:38 Misili yaĩ ndanu yĩla maumie; Nũndũ kũkĩwa kwoo nĩkwavalũkile ĩũlũ woo
Psalms105:39 Atambũũkasya ĩthweo ũndũ wa kũvw’ĩka
Psalms105:40 Mavoya
Psalms105:41 Avingũie ĩvia
Psalms105:42 Nũndũ alilikanile ndeto yake ntheu
Psalms105:43 Na aumaalya andũ make na mũyo
Psalms105:44 Na amanenga nthĩ sya i mbaĩ; Na moosa kĩla kyanoewe nĩ ngo sya andũ kĩthĩwe kyoo:
Psalms105:45 Nĩ kana matonye kũkwata myamũlo yake
Psalms106:1 Taĩai Yeova. Tũngĩai Yeova mũvea; nũndũ nĩ mũseo; Nũndũ ũseo wake wĩ wendo nĩwĩkalaa tene na tene.
Psalms106:2 Nũũ ũla ũtonya kũweta meko ma Yeova me ũtonyi
Psalms106:3 Kũathimwa nĩ ala malũmasya sila wa katĩ
Psalms106:4 Ndilikana
Psalms106:5 Nĩ kana none ũunĩko wa anyuvwa maku
Psalms106:6 Nĩtũvĩtĩtye twĩ na aaĩthe maitũ
Psalms106:7 Aaĩthe maitũ matyaamanya syama syaku me Misili; Matyaalilikana wingĩ wa moseo maku me wendo
Psalms106:8 Ĩndĩ amatangĩĩa kwondũ wa syĩtwa yake
Psalms106:9 O na akan’ya Ũkanga Mũtune
Psalms106:10 Na amatangĩĩa kuma kw’okonĩ kwa ũla wamamenete
Psalms106:11 Na manzĩ mavw’ĩka nthũ syoo; Vatyaatiala o na ũmwe wamo.
Psalms106:12 Nĩvo ĩndĩ meetĩkĩlile ndeto syake; Maina ndaĩa yake.
Psalms106:13 Mĩtũkĩ moolwa nĩ mawĩa make; Matyaaeteela ũtao wake
Psalms106:14 Ĩndĩ makwatĩwe nĩ ĩtomo ĩnene weũnĩ
Psalms106:15 Na amanenga kĩla mavoyie
Psalms106:16 O na ĩngĩ mamwĩw’ĩĩa Mose kĩwĩu mwakonĩ wa maeema
Psalms106:17 Nthĩ yaathamya na yamelya Ndathani
Psalms106:18 Na mwaki wakanĩa nguthunĩ yoo; Ũlĩlĩnzĩ wa mwaki wavĩvya athe.
Psalms106:19 Maseũvĩsye kasaũ Olevu
Psalms106:20 Ũũ nĩw’o makũanisye ndaĩa yoo Na mũvwanĩle wa ng’ombe ĩla ĩĩsaa nyeki.
Psalms106:21 Moolwa nĩ Ngai Mũtangĩĩi woo
Psalms106:22 Mawĩa ma ũseng’ya nthĩ ya Amu
Psalms106:23 Kwondũ wa ũu asya kana nũnũũmananga
Psalms106:24 Ĩĩ
Psalms106:25 Ĩndĩ manyungunyĩĩsye maeemanĩ moo
Psalms106:26 Kwondũ wa ũu amevĩtĩa
Psalms106:27 Na kana akanangĩa ũsyao woo katĩ wa i mbaĩ
Psalms106:28 O na ĩngĩ meekwatan’ya na Mbaaliveoli
Psalms106:29 Ũu nĩw’o mamũthatisye na mĩkĩle yoo; Na ũthĩn’yo wamakuthũkĩa.
Psalms106:30 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Vineasi waũngamie
Psalms106:31 Na ũu watalilwe kwake kwĩthĩwa nĩ ũlũngalu
Psalms106:32 O na ĩngĩ mamũthatĩsya manzĩnĩ ma Meliva
Psalms106:33 Nĩkwĩthĩwa nĩmathatisye veva wake
Psalms106:34 Matyaaananga i ngo sya andũ
Psalms106:35 Ĩndĩ meevulan’ya na i mbaĩ
Psalms106:36 Na kũthũkũma mĩvw’anano yasyo
Psalms106:37 Ĩĩ
Psalms106:38 Na metĩkya nthakame ĩte ĩvĩtyo
Psalms106:39 Ũu nĩw’o mavukiw’e nĩ mawĩa moo
Psalms106:40 Kwondũ wa ũu ũthilĩku wa Yeova wakanĩe andũ make
Psalms106:41 Na amanengane kw’okonĩ kwa i mbaĩ; Na ala mamamenaa mamasumbĩka.
Psalms106:42 O na amaitha moo mamathĩn’ya
Psalms106:43 Mavinda maingĩ nĩwamavonokasya; Ĩndĩ maĩ ang’endu kwĩtaanĩ kwoo
Psalms106:44 Ĩndĩ o na ũu w’onthe asisya thĩna woo
Psalms106:45 Na alilikana ũtianĩo wake kwondũ woo
Psalms106:46 Atuma mew’ĩawa tei Nĩ onthe ala mamatavie.
Psalms106:47 Tũtangĩĩe
Psalms106:48 Nataĩwe Yeova
Psalms107:1 Mũtũngĩei Yeova mũvea; nũndũ nĩ mũseo; Nũndũ ũseo wake wĩ wendo nĩwĩkalaa tene na tene.
Psalms107:2 Ovosye ma Yeova nĩmasye ũu
Psalms107:3 Na amombanisye kuma i nthĩ
Psalms107:4 Mangangaa weũnĩ nzĩanĩ ya yalata; Matyaona ndũa matũa.
Psalms107:5 Me na nzaa na waũni
Psalms107:6 Nĩvo ĩndĩ meekaĩlile Yeova thĩnanĩ woo
Psalms107:7 O na amatongoesya na nzĩa ndũngalu
Psalms107:8 A! Kana andũ mataĩe Yeova nũndũ wa ũseo wake wĩ wendo
Psalms107:9 Nũndũ nũvũnasya ngoo ĩla yĩ na vata
Psalms107:10 Ala mekalĩte kĩvindunĩ na kyuunĩ kya kĩkw’ũ
Psalms107:11 Nĩkwĩthĩwa nĩmang’endee ndeto sya Ngai
Psalms107:12 Kwondũ wa ũu atheesya ngoo syoo na ũthũkũmi wĩ vinya; Mavalũka nthĩ
Psalms107:13 Nĩvo ĩndĩ meekaĩlile Yeova thĩnanĩ woo
Psalms107:14 Amaumya kĩvindunĩ na kyuunĩ kya kĩkw’ũ
Psalms107:15 A! Kana andũ mataĩe Yeova nũndũ wa ũseo wake wĩ wendo
Psalms107:16 Nũndũ nĩwanangie mbingĩlo sya ũthuku
Psalms107:17 Ndia nũndũ wa mavĩtyo masyo
Psalms107:18 Ngoo syasyo nitiikĩawa nĩ mĩthemba yonthe ya lĩu; Na nithengeeaa vakuvĩ na mbingĩlo sya kĩkw’ũ.
Psalms107:19 Nĩvo imwĩkaĩlaa Yeova thĩnanĩ wasyo
Psalms107:20 Nũtũmaa ndeto yake
Psalms107:21 A! Kana andũ mataĩe Yeova nũndũ wa ũseo wake wĩ wendo
Psalms107:22 Na nĩmathembe nthembo sya mũvea
Psalms107:23 Ala maendaa ũkanganĩ me ngalawanĩ
Psalms107:24 Asu monaa mawĩa ma Yeova
Psalms107:25 Nĩwĩaaa
Psalms107:26 Makyambata ĩũlũ matunĩ
Psalms107:27 Makĩlũalũw’a kũũ na kũũ
Psalms107:28 Na nĩvo meekaĩla Yeova thĩnanĩ woo
Psalms107:29 Nũkilĩthasya kĩseve kĩnene
Psalms107:30 Nĩvo ĩndĩ meũtana nĩkwĩthĩwa nĩsyakilya; Na ĩndĩ nũmaetae kĩthũmũonĩ kĩla mekwendaa.
Psalms107:31 A! Kana andũ mataĩe Yeova nũndũ wa ũseo wake wĩ wendo
Psalms107:32 O na nĩmamũnenevye ũmbanonĩ wa andũ
Psalms107:33 Nũalyũlaa mbũsĩ ikatw’ĩka weũ
Psalms107:34 Nthĩ yĩ ũsyao ĩkatw’ĩka yalata yĩ mũnyũ
Psalms107:35 Nũalyũlaa weũ ũkatw’ĩka ndia ya manzĩ
Psalms107:36 Na aimatũsya ala me na nzaa kw’o
Psalms107:37 Na kũvuĩa mĩũnda
Psalms107:38 O na nũmaathimaa
Psalms107:39 Na ĩngĩ
Psalms107:40 Nĩwonoasya kĩvũthya ĩũlũ wa anene me mbee ũsumbĩnĩ
Psalms107:41 Ĩndĩ nĩwĩkalasya ũla mũthĩni ĩũlũ mũno kuma thĩnanĩ
Psalms107:42 Ala alũngalu makoona ũu
Psalms107:43 Ũla wĩ na ũĩ akakwata maũndũ aa; Na makasũanĩa moseo me wendo ma Yeova.
Psalms108:1 Ngoo yakwa nĩlũmĩte
Psalms108:2 Amũkai
Psalms108:3 Ngakũtũngĩa mũvea
Psalms108:4 Nũndũ ũseo waku wĩ wendo nĩ mũnene ĩũlũ wa matu; Na w’o waku nũvikĩte matunĩ.
Psalms108:5 Ũnenevw’e ĩũlũ wa matu
Psalms108:6 Nĩ kana endwa maku matonye kũvonokw’a
Psalms108:7 Ngai nũneenete ũtheunĩ wake: ngatana; Ngaaan’ya Sekemu
Psalms108:8 Ngileati nĩ yakwa; Manase nĩ yakwa; O na Evalaimu nĩ wa kũsesea mũtwe wakwa; Yuta nĩ ndata yakwa ya ũsumbĩ.
Psalms108:9 Moavi nĩ mbisũ yakwa ya kũthambĩa; Ngekya kĩatũ kyakwa ĩũlũ wa Etomu; Ngamyuĩsya ngemi Vilisitia.
Psalms108:10 Nũũ ũla wĩndwaa nthĩnĩ wa ndũa mbiie? Nũũ ũla wĩndongoesya kũvika Etomu?
Psalms108:11 Tuue watwĩkisye ũtee
Psalms108:12 Tũtetheesye kwa ĩla nthũ; Nũndũ ũtethyo wa mũndũ nĩ wa mana.
Psalms108:13 Kwondũ wa Ngai tũkeekaa na ũkũmbaũ: Nũndũ nĩwe ũla ũkakinyanga nthũ sitũ.
Psalms109:1 Ndũkavindye
Psalms109:2 Nũndũ kanyw’a wa ũla mwathe na kanyw’a wa ũkengani nĩmambathamĩsye: Nĩmaneenee na nĩmĩ ngengani.
Psalms109:3 O na nĩmanthyũlũlũkĩte na ndeto sya kĩmena
Psalms109:4 Nũndũ wa wendo wakwa mo nĩ nthũ syakwa: Ĩndĩ nĩnĩnenganĩte mboyanĩ.
Psalms109:5 Ĩndĩ nĩmandĩvĩte ũthũku vandũ va ũseo
Psalms109:6 Ia mũndũ mũthũku ĩũlũ wake; Na nthũ ĩũngame ngalĩ ya kw’oko kwake kwa aũme.
Psalms109:7 Akĩsilĩlwa
Psalms109:8 Matukũ make nĩmethĩwe manini; Na ũngĩ nakwate wĩa wake.
Psalms109:9 Syana syake ikw’ĩĩwe nĩ aaĩthe
Psalms109:10 Syana syake syĩthĩwe mbangangi
Psalms109:11 Mũandũi nĩose syonthe ila wĩ nasyo; Na aeni nĩmatave sya wĩa wake.
Psalms109:12 O na kũtikethĩwe ũmwe wa kũmwĩka nesa; O na kũtikethĩwe o na ũmwe wa kwĩw’ĩa syana syake ndiwa tei.
Psalms109:13 Ũsyaanĩo wake ũvetwe; Nzyawanĩ ĩla yũkĩte syĩtwa yoo yanangwe.
Psalms109:14 Ũthũku wa aaĩthe make ũlilikanwe nĩ Yeova; Na naĩ ya inyia wake ndĩkaanangwe.
Psalms109:15 Nĩmekalae mbee wa Yeova ĩndĩ yonthe
Psalms109:16 Nĩkwĩthĩwa ndaalilikana kwonan’ya ũseo
Psalms109:17 Ĩĩ
Psalms109:18 O na ĩngĩ eevw’ĩka kĩumo ta kwĩvw’ĩka ngũa yake
Psalms109:19 Kĩtw’ĩke kwake o ta ngũa ĩla wĩvw’ĩkaa
Psalms109:20 Yĩĩ nĩyo ĩtuvi ya nthũ syakwa kuma kwa Yeova
Psalms109:21 Ĩndĩ ĩka nakwa kwondũ wa syĩtwa yaku
Psalms109:22 Nũndũ nĩ ngya na mũthĩni
Psalms109:23 Nĩnĩendete o ta muunyĩ ũla ũendeeaa: Nĩnĩlelũkangaw’a o ta ngie.
Psalms109:24 Mau makwa nĩ monzu ũndũ wa kũtĩĩa kũya; Na mwĩĩ wakwa nũnyivĩwe nĩ ũnou.
Psalms109:25 O na ĩngĩ nĩtw’ĩkĩte kĩvũthya kwoo: Yĩla mekũmbona
Psalms109:26 Ndethya
Psalms109:27 Nĩ kana mamanye kana kũũ nĩ kw’oko kwaku; Na kana we
Psalms109:28 Mo nĩmaumane
Psalms109:29 Nthũ syakwa ivw’ĩkwe ũndũ ũte ndaĩa
Psalms109:30 Ngamũtũngĩa Yeova mũvea mũnene na kanyw’a wakwa; Ĩĩ
Psalms109:31 Nũndũ akaũngama ngalĩ ya kw’oko kwa aũme kwa mũthĩni
Psalms110:1 Yeova emwĩa Mwiaĩi wakwa
Psalms110:2 Yeova akatambũũkya ndata ya vinya waku kuma Saioni: Sumbĩka katĩ wa amaitha maku.
Psalms110:3 Andũ maku nĩmeĩthembaa na ngoo ya kwenda Mũthenya wa vinya waku
Psalms110:4 Yeova nĩwĩvĩtĩte
Psalms110:5 Mwĩaĩi e ngalĩ ya kw’oko kwa aũme kwaku Akakũna asumbĩ mũthenya wa kũthilĩka kwake.
Psalms110:6 Akasilaa katĩ wa i mbaĩ
Psalms110:7 Akanyw’ĩa ma kalũsĩ ku nzĩanĩ: Kwondũ wa ũu akookĩlya mũtwe.
Psalms111:1 Mũtaĩeĩ Yeova. Ngamũtũngĩa Yeova mũvea na ngoo yakwa yonthe
Psalms111:2 Mawĩa ma Yeova nĩ manene
Psalms111:3 Wĩa wake wĩ ndaĩa na ũnene; Na ũlũngalu wake nĩwĩkalaa tene na tene.
Psalms111:4 Nũtumaa mawĩa make ma ũseng’ya malilikanwa: Yeova nĩ mũseo na e tei.
Psalms111:5 Nũmanengete lĩu ala mamũkĩaa: Akalilikanaa ũtianĩo wake ĩndĩ yonthe.
Psalms111:6 Nĩwonetye andũ make vinya wa mawĩa make
Psalms111:7 Mawĩa ma moko make nĩmo w’o na ũsili wa katĩ; Mawĩaĩo make onthe nĩ malũmu.
Psalms111:8 Nĩmalũlũmĩlw’e tene na tene; Nĩmekawa nthĩnĩ wa w’o na ũlũngalunĩ.
Psalms111:9 Nũtũmĩte wovosyo kwa andũ make; Nĩwĩaĩte ũtianĩo wake tene na tene: Syĩtwa yake nĩ ĩtheu na ya kũtaĩwa.
Psalms111:10 Kũmũkĩa Yeova nĩkw’o wambĩlĩlyo wa ũĩ; Ũmanyi mũseo wĩ na onthe ala mekaa mĩao yake: Kũtaĩwa kwake nĩkwĩkalaa tene na tene.
Psalms112:1 Mũtaĩei Yeova. Nĩmũathime mũndũ ũla ũmũkĩaa Yeova
Psalms112:2 Ũsyao wake ũkeethĩwa wĩ na ũtonyi kũũ nthĩ: Nzyawa ya mũlũngalu ĩkaathimwa.
Psalms112:3 Ũthwii na syĩndũ syĩ nyũmbanĩ yake; Na ũlũngalu wake nĩwĩkalaa tene na tene.
Psalms112:4 Kyeni nĩkyumĩlĩlaa alũngalu kĩvindunĩ: Nake nĩ mũseo
Psalms112:5 Nĩ kũseo kwa mũndũ ũla wĩkaa na ĩnee na kũkovethya; Akaseũvya ũvoo wake ũsilĩlonĩ.
Psalms112:6 Nũndũ ndakathingithangw’a o na ĩndĩĩ; Ũla mũlũngalu nũkalilikanwa tene na tene.
Psalms112:7 Ndakakĩa maũvoo mathũku: Ngoo yake nĩlũmĩte
Psalms112:8 Ngoo yake nĩlũmĩte ndakakĩa
Psalms112:9 Nũũanĩtye
Psalms112:10 Ũla mũthũku akoona ũu
Psalms113:1 Mũtaĩei Yeova. Mũtaĩei
Psalms113:2 Syĩtwa ya Yeova nĩyĩtaĩwe Kuma yu na kũvika tene na tene.
Psalms113:3 Kuma syũa yauma kũvika yathũa Syĩtwa ya Yeova nĩ ya kũtaĩwa.
Psalms113:4 Yeova e ĩũlũ wa mbaĩ syonthe
Psalms113:5 Nũũ ũilyĩ ta Yeova Ngai waitũ
Psalms113:6 Ũla wĩnyivasya asisye Syĩndũ syĩ ĩtunĩ na nthĩ?
Psalms113:7 Nĩwũkĩlasya ngya kũmyumya kĩtoonĩ
Psalms113:8 Nĩ kana amwĩkalye nthĩ vamwe na anene me mbee ũsumbĩnĩ
Psalms113:9 Nũtumaa mũndũ mũka ngũngũ ekala nyũmbanĩ
Psalms114:1 Yĩla Isilaeli waumie Mĩsili
Psalms114:2 Yuta atw’ĩka vandũ vake vatheu
Psalms114:3 Ũkanga nĩwoonie ũu
Psalms114:4 Iĩma syatũlĩlanga ta ndũũme
Psalms114:5 Wĩ na kĩ
Psalms114:6 Inyw’ĩ iĩma
Psalms114:7 We nthĩ
Psalms114:8 Ũla waalyũlile ĩvia yatw’ĩka ndia ya manzĩ
Psalms115:1 Ti vaitũ
Psalms115:2 Nũndũ wa kĩ i mbaĩ syaasye
Psalms115:3 Ĩndĩ Ngai waitũ e matunĩ: Nĩwĩkĩte o ũndũ wendie.
Psalms115:4 Mĩvw’anano yoo nĩ vetha na thaavu
Psalms115:5 Yĩ na makanyw’a
Psalms115:6 Yĩ na matũ
Psalms115:7 Yĩ na moko
Psalms115:8 Ala mamĩseũvasya makeethĩwa mailyĩ tayo; Ĩĩ
Psalms115:9 We Isilaeli
Psalms115:10 We nyũmba ya Aluni
Psalms115:11 Inyw’ĩ ala mũkĩaa Yeova
Psalms115:12 Yeova nũtũlilikanĩte; akatũathima: Akaathima nyũmba ya Isilaeli; Akaathima nyũmba ya Aluni.
Psalms115:13 Akaathima ala makĩaa Yeova
Psalms115:14 Yeova namwingĩvye mbee na mbee
Psalms115:15 Nĩmũathimĩtwe nĩ Yeova
Psalms115:16 Matu nĩ matu ma Yeova; Ĩndĩ nthĩ nũnengete ana ma andũ.
Psalms115:17 Akw’ũ matitaĩaa Yeova
Psalms115:18 Ĩndĩ ithyĩ tũkataĩa Yeova Kuma yu na kũvika tene na tene. Mũtaĩei Yeova.
Psalms116:1 Nĩnĩmwendaa Yeova
Psalms116:2 Nĩkwĩthĩwa nũteete kũtũ kwake kwakwa
Psalms116:3 Ndii sya kĩkw’ũ nĩsyeendingĩlĩte
Psalms116:4 Nĩvo ĩndĩ neekaĩlile syĩtwa ya Yeova: Ame Yeova
Psalms116:5 Yeova nĩ mũseo
Psalms116:6 Yeova nũsũvĩaa ala mate ũmanyi: Nĩnanyiviw’e
Psalms116:7 Syoka ũthũmũonĩ waku
Psalms116:8 Nũndũ nũvonoketye thayũ wakwa kuma kĩkw’ũnĩ
Psalms116:9 Ngaendelaa mbee wa Yeova Nthi ya ala me thayũ.
Psalms116:10 Nĩngwĩtĩkĩla
Psalms116:11 Mĩtũkĩnĩ yakwa nĩnaisye
Psalms116:12 Nĩmũnenga Yeova kĩ Kwondũ wa moseo make onthe kwakwa?
Psalms116:13 Ngoosa kĩkombe kya ũtangĩĩo
Psalms116:14 Ngeanĩsya mawĩvĩto makwa kwa Yeova
Psalms116:15 Methonĩ ma Yeova kĩ vata mũno Kĩkw’ũ kya atheu make.
Psalms116:16 Ame Yeova
Psalms116:17 Ngakũthembea nthembo ya mũvea
Psalms116:18 Ngeanĩsya mawĩvĩto makwa kwa Yeova
Psalms116:19 Nthĩnĩ wa nza sya nyũmba ya Yeova
Psalms117:1 Mũtaĩei Yeova
Psalms117:2 Nũndũ ũseo wake wĩ wendo nĩ mũnene kwitũ; Na w’o wa Yeova nĩwĩkalaa tene na tene. Mũtaĩei Yeova.
Psalms118:1 Mũtũngĩei Yeova mũvea; nũndũ nĩ mũseo; Nũndũ ũseo wake wĩ wendo nĩwĩkalaa tene na tene.
Psalms118:2 Yu Isilaeli naneene
Psalms118:3 Yu nyũmba ya Aluni nĩneene
Psalms118:4 Ala makĩaa Yeova maneene
Psalms118:5 Nĩ ũnyamaonĩ wakwa nĩnamwĩkaĩlile Yeova: Yeova nĩwanzũngĩie na ambĩkalya vandũ vaamu.
Psalms118:6 Yeova e ngalĩ yakwa; ndikakĩa: Mũndũ atonya kũmbĩka ata?
Psalms118:7 Yeova e ngalĩ yakwa katĩ wa ala mandethasya: Kwondũ wa ũu ngoona kwenda kwakwa kũkĩkwa ĩũlũ wa ala mamenaa.
Psalms118:8 Nĩ kavaa kwĩvitha nthĩnĩ wa Yeova Kwĩ kwĩkwatya mũndũ.
Psalms118:9 Nĩ kavaa kwĩvitha nthĩnĩ wa Yeova Kwĩ kwĩkwatya anene me mbee ũsumbĩnĩ.
Psalms118:10 Mbaĩ syonthe ninthyũlũlũkĩte: Syĩtwanĩ ya Yeova ngaiveta.
Psalms118:11 Ninthyũlũlũkĩte; ĩĩ
Psalms118:12 Ninthyũlũlũkĩte ta nzũkĩ; nivoetwe ta mwaki wa mĩw’a: Syĩtwanĩ ya Yeova ngaiveta.
Psalms118:13 Nĩwanduutile mũno nĩ kana nĩvalũke; Ĩndĩ Yeova nĩwandethisye.
Psalms118:14 Yeova nĩ vinya wakwa na wathi wakwa; Na nũtw’ĩkĩte ũtangĩĩo wakwa.
Psalms118:15 Wasya wa kũtana na wa ũtangĩĩo wĩ maeemanĩ ma ala alũngalu: Kw’oko kwa aũme kwa Yeova nĩkwĩkaa na ũtonyi.
Psalms118:16 Kw’oko kwa aũme kwa Yeova nĩ kũtaĩe: Kw’oko kwa aũme kwa Yeova nĩkwĩkaa na ũtonyi.
Psalms118:17 Ndikakw’a
Psalms118:18 Yeova nũnzilĩlĩte mũno; Ĩndĩ ndaanengane nĩkw’e.
Psalms118:19 Mbingũĩa mbingĩlo sya ũlũngalu: Ngailikĩla
Psalms118:20 Ĩno nĩyo mbingĩlo ya Yeova; Ala alũngalu makamĩvotela.
Psalms118:21 Ngakũtũngĩa mũvea; nũndũ nũnzũngĩĩte
Psalms118:22 Ĩvia yĩla aki maleile Nĩyĩtw’ĩkĩte ĩnene ya kĩkotonĩ.
Psalms118:23 Ũu nĩ wĩko wa Yeova; Nĩ ũseng’yo methonĩ maitũ.
Psalms118:24 Ũũ nĩ mũthenya ũla Yeova ũseũvĩtye; Tũkatana na kũwĩw’ĩa mũyo.
Psalms118:25 Tangĩĩa yu
Psalms118:26 Nĩ mũathime ũla wũkaa syĩtwanĩ ya Yeova: Nĩtũmũathimĩte inyw’ĩ twĩ nyũmbanĩ ya Yeova.
Psalms118:27 Yeova nĩ Ngai
Psalms118:28 Nue Ngai wakwa
Psalms118:29 Mũtũngĩei Yeova mũvea; nũndũ nĩ mũseo; Nũndũ ũseo wake wĩ wendo nĩwĩkalaa tene na tene.
Psalms119:1 Nĩ aathime ala eanĩu nzĩanĩ
Psalms119:2 Nĩ aathime ala masũvĩaa mokũsĩ make
Psalms119:3 Ĩĩ
Psalms119:4 Nũtwĩaĩĩte mawĩaĩo maku
Psalms119:5 A! Kethĩwa nzĩa syakwa nilũlũmĩlwa Kũkwata myamũlo yaku!
Psalms119:6 Nĩvo ĩndĩ ndikasonokw’a
Psalms119:7 Ngakũtũngĩa mũvea nĩ na ũlũngalu ngoonĩ
Psalms119:8 Ngakwata myamũlo yaku: Ndũkaandeke nongi.
Psalms119:9 Mwanake akatheasya nzĩa yake na kyaũ? No ũndũ wa kũmĩsũvĩa kwĩanana na ndeto yaku.
Psalms119:10 Nĩkũmanthĩte na ngoo yakwa yonthe: Ndũkandeke nangangae kuma mĩaonĩ yaku.
Psalms119:11 Nĩniĩte ndeto yaku ngoonĩ yakwa
Psalms119:12 Wĩ mũtaĩĩku
Psalms119:13 Nĩnĩtavanĩtye na ilomo syakwa Motw’ĩo onthe ma kanyw’a waku.
Psalms119:14 Nĩnĩtanĩte nzĩanĩ ya mokũsĩ maku
Psalms119:15 Ngasũanĩaa mawĩaĩo maku
Psalms119:16 Ngeetanĩthasya myamũlonĩ yaku: Ndikolwa nĩ ndeto yaku.
Psalms119:17 Mwĩke mũthũkũmi waku na ũlau
Psalms119:18 Salukya metho makwa
Psalms119:19 Nyie nĩ mwĩkali wa ũeninĩ kũũ nthĩ: Ndũkambithe mĩao yaku.
Psalms119:20 Ngoo yakwa nĩ ndũle nĩ mea Ala yĩ namo ũndũ wa motw’ĩo maku mavinda onthe.
Psalms119:21 Nũkanĩtye ekathĩĩi ala maumanĩwe
Psalms119:22 Mbetea kĩvũthya na ntheko; Nũndũ nĩnzũvĩĩte mokũsĩ maku.
Psalms119:23 O na anene me mbee ũsumbĩnĩ mekala nthĩ na kũneenea naĩ; Ĩndĩ mũthũkũmi waku alilikana myamũlo yaku.
Psalms119:24 O na mokũsĩ maku nĩ ũtanu wakwa Na nĩ atai makwa.
Psalms119:25 Ngoo yakwa nĩlũmanĩtye na kĩtoo: Nthayũũkya kwĩanana na ndeto yaku.
Psalms119:26 Nĩnatavanisye nzĩa syakwa
Psalms119:27 Manyĩthya nyie nzĩa ya mawĩaĩo maku: Nakwa ngasũanĩa mawĩa maku ma ũseng’ya.
Psalms119:28 Ngoo yakwa nĩnĩũtwekw’a nĩ woo: Mbĩkĩa vinya kwĩanana na ndeto yaku.
Psalms119:29 Mbetea nzĩa ya ũvũngũ; Na nenga mĩao yaku na ũseo mwingĩ.
Psalms119:30 Nĩnĩnyuvĩte nzĩa ya kĩthito: Nĩniĩte motw’ĩo maku mbee wakwa.
Psalms119:31 Nĩngũlũman’ya na mokũsĩ maku: Ame Yeova
Psalms119:32 Ngasemba nzĩanĩ ya mĩao yaku
Psalms119:33 Manyĩsya nyie
Psalms119:34 Nenga ũmanyi
Psalms119:35 Ndwaĩthasya nzĩanĩ ya mĩao yaku; Nũndũ nĩtanĩaa nthĩnĩ wayo.
Psalms119:36 Elekelya ngoo yakwa mokũsĩnĩ maku
Psalms119:37 Thyũũa metho makwa matikasisye maũndũ ma mana
Psalms119:38 Lũlũmĩlya ndeto yaku kwa mũthũkũmi waku
Psalms119:39 Mbetea kũvũthw’a kwakwa kũla nĩkĩaa; Nũndũ motw’ĩo maku nĩ maseo.
Psalms119:40 Sisya
Psalms119:41 Moseo maku me wendo namo mambũkĩe
Psalms119:42 Kwondũ wa ũu ngeethĩwa na ũsũngĩo kwa ũla ũmbũthasya; Nũndũ nĩnĩĩkĩĩaa ndeto yaku.
Psalms119:43 Ndũkaaumye nongi ndeto ya w’o kanyw’anĩ wakwa; Nũndũ nĩnĩkwatĩtye motw’ĩo maku.
Psalms119:44 Kwondũ wa ũu ngakwata mĩao yaku ĩndĩ yonthe Kũvika tene na tene.
Psalms119:45 Na ngaendaa nĩ mũthasye; Nũndũ nĩnĩmanthĩte mawĩaĩo maku.
Psalms119:46 O na ĩngĩ ngaweta mokũsĩ maku mbee wa asumbĩ
Psalms119:47 Ngeetanĩthasya mĩaonĩ yaku
Psalms119:48 O na ĩngĩ ngookĩlĩlya moko makwa mĩao yaku
Psalms119:49 Lilikana ndeto kwa mũthũkũmi waku
Psalms119:50 Nĩyo ũkiakisyo wakwa thĩnanĩ wakwa; Atĩ ndeto yaku nĩnthayũũkĩtye.
Psalms119:51 Ekathĩĩi nĩmanthekeee mũno: Ĩndĩ ndyaaathũka ũtee kuma mĩaonĩ yaku.
Psalms119:52 Nĩnĩlilikanĩte motw’ĩo maku ma tene
Psalms119:53 Ũthatu mwakanu nũngwatĩte
Psalms119:54 Myamũlo yaku yĩthĩawa mbathi syakwa Nyũmbanĩ ya ũeni wakwa.
Psalms119:55 Nĩnĩlilikanĩte syĩtwa yaku ũtukũ
Psalms119:56 Ũũ nĩthĩawa naw’o
Psalms119:57 Yeova nĩ kĩanda kyakwa: Nĩnaĩtye kana ngakwata ndeto syaku.
Psalms119:58 Nĩneesũvanie ũseo kwaku na ngoo yakwa yonthe: Mbĩw’ĩa tei kwĩanana na ndeto yaku.
Psalms119:59 Nĩnasũanĩie mĩendele yakwa
Psalms119:60 Nĩneekalaatile
Psalms119:61 Ndii sya athũku nĩsyeendingĩlĩte; Ĩndĩ ndyaaũlwa nĩ mĩao yaku.
Psalms119:62 Ũtukũ katĩ ngookĩlaa nĩkũtũngĩe mũvea Nũndũ wa motw’ĩo maku malũngalu.
Psalms119:63 Nĩ mũtindan’ya wa onthe ala makũkĩaa
Psalms119:64 Ame Yeova
Psalms119:65 Nĩwĩkĩte mũthũkũmi waku nesa
Psalms119:66 Manyĩsya nyie kwonaa katĩ o na ũmanyi; Nũndũ nĩnĩtĩkĩlĩte mĩao yaku.
Psalms119:67 Ndanamba kũthĩnw’a naendaa ngyanganga; Ĩndĩ yu nĩngwataa ndeto yaku.
Psalms119:68 We wĩ mũseo
Psalms119:69 Ekathĩĩi nĩmanzeũvĩsye ũvũngũ: Ngakwata mawĩaĩo maku na ngoo yakwa yonthe.
Psalms119:70 Ngoo syoo nĩ nou ta mathunya; Ĩndĩ nyie nĩtanaa mĩaonĩ yaku.
Psalms119:71 Nĩ ũseo kwakwa nathĩniw’e; Nĩ kana nĩmanyĩsye myamũlo yaku.
Psalms119:72 Mwĩao wa kanyw’a waku nĩ kavaa kwakwa Kwĩ ngili sya thaavu na vetha.
Psalms119:73 Moko maku nĩmambũmbie na manzeũvya: Nenga ũmanyi
Psalms119:74 Ala makũkĩaa makambona na kũtana
Psalms119:75 Nĩnĩsĩ
Psalms119:76 Nĩngũkwĩsũva
Psalms119:77 Matei maku mololo nĩmambũkĩe
Psalms119:78 Ekathĩĩi nĩmasonokw’e; nũndũ nĩmambalũkĩtye na ũvũngũ: Ĩndĩ ngasũanĩaa mawĩaĩo maku.
Psalms119:79 Ala maũkĩaa nĩmenthyũũĩe; Na makamanya mokũsĩ maku.
Psalms119:80 Ngoo yakwa nĩyĩthĩwe mbĩanĩu myamũlonĩ yaku
Psalms119:81 Ngoo yakwa yĩ na mũnyalo kwondũ wa ũtangĩĩo waku; Ĩndĩ nĩkwatasya ndeto yaku.
Psalms119:82 Metho makwa nĩmeũseekea kwondũ wa ndeto yaku
Psalms119:83 Nũndũ nĩndw’ĩkĩte ta kathatwa ka mbinyu ke vala ve syũki; Ĩndĩ ndyũlawa nĩ myamũlo yaku.
Psalms119:84 Mĩthenya ya mũthũkũmi waku nĩ yĩana? Ũkamasilĩla ala manthĩnasya ĩndĩĩ?
Psalms119:85 Ekathĩĩi nĩmenzĩte maima ũndũ wakwa
Psalms119:86 Mĩao yaku yonthe nĩ ya kũĩkĩĩwa: Nĩmanthĩnasya na ũvũngũ; ndethya.
Psalms119:87 Maĩ vakuvĩ kũmbeta ĩũlũ wa nthĩ; Ĩndĩ ndyaatia mawĩaĩo maku.
Psalms119:88 Nthayũũkya kwĩanana na ũseo waku wĩ wendo
Psalms119:89 Tene na tene
Psalms119:90 Kĩthito kyaku nĩ kya nzyawa syonthe: Nũlũlũmĩlĩtye nthĩ
Psalms119:91 Nĩmekalaa ũmũnthĩ kwĩanana na motw’ĩo maku; Nũndũ syĩndũ syonthe nĩ athũkũmi maku.
Psalms119:92 Kethĩwa mĩao yaku ndĩaĩ ũtanu wakwa
Psalms119:93 Ndikolwa nongi nĩ mawĩaĩo maku; Nũndũ nũnthayũũkĩtye namo.
Psalms119:94 Nyie nĩ waku
Psalms119:95 Ala athũku nĩmambeteele
Psalms119:96 Nĩnonete mũminũkĩlyo wa wĩanĩu w’onthe; Ĩndĩ mwĩao waku nĩ mũthanthau mũno.
Psalms119:97 Mĩao yaku ko nĩnĩmyendetee! Nĩyo nzũanĩaa mũthenya w’onthe.
Psalms119:98 Mĩao yaku nĩtuma nĩthĩwa na ũĩ kwĩ amaitha makwa; Nũndũ yĩ nakwa mavinda onthe.
Psalms119:99 Nĩ na ũmanyi kũvĩtũka amanyĩsya makwa onthe; Nũndũ mokũsĩ maku nĩ ũsũanĩo wakwa.
Psalms119:100 Nĩnĩmanyaa kũvĩtũka ala akũũ
Psalms119:101 Nĩnziĩĩĩte maũũ makwa na kĩla nzĩa nthũku
Psalms119:102 Ndyaaathũka kuma motw’ĩonĩ maku; Nũndũ nũmanyĩĩtye nyie.
Psalms119:103 A! Ndeto syaku syĩ mũyo kaakaanĩ wakwa! Ĩĩ
Psalms119:104 Kwondũ wa mawĩaĩo maku nĩnosaa ũmanyi: Kwondũ wa ũu nĩnĩmenaa kĩla nzĩa ya ũvũngũ.
Psalms119:105 Ndeto yaku nĩ taa wa maũũ makwa
Psalms119:106 Nĩnĩavĩte
Psalms119:107 Nĩngũthĩnw’a mũno: Nthayũũkya
Psalms119:108 Osa
Psalms119:109 Thayũ wakwa wĩ kw’okonĩ kwakwa ĩndĩ yonthe; Ĩndĩ ndyũlawa nĩ mĩao yaku.
Psalms119:110 Ala athũku nĩmandeie na kĩtei; Ĩndĩ ndyaanganga kũma mawĩaĩonĩ maku.
Psalms119:111 Nĩnosete mokũsĩ maku methĩwe ta ũtiĩwa tene na tene; Nũndũ nĩmo ũtanu wa ngoo yakwa.
Psalms119:112 Nĩnelekelye ngoo yakwa kwĩka myamũlo yaku Tene na tene
Psalms119:113 Nĩmenaa ala me na mĩtwe ĩlĩ; Ĩndĩ nĩnendaa mĩao yaku.
Psalms119:114 Nue vandũ vakwa va kwĩvitha na ngao yakwa: Nĩnĩkwatasya ndeto yaku.
Psalms119:115 Umai vala nĩĩ
Psalms119:116 Ndw’ĩĩka kwĩanana na ndeto yaku
Psalms119:117 Ndw’ĩĩka
Psalms119:118 Nũmatw’ĩkĩthĩtye ma mana onthe ala mavĩtanĩasya myamũlo yaku; Nũndũ ũkengani woo nĩ ũvũngũ.
Psalms119:119 Nũvetaa kũasa athũku onthe ma nthĩ ta mavuthĩ: Kwondũ wa ũu nĩnendaa mokũsĩ maku.
Psalms119:120 Mwĩĩ wakwa nũtetemaa nũndũ wa ũkũkĩa; Na nĩngũkĩa mosilĩlo maku.
Psalms119:121 Nĩnĩsilĩte sila wa katĩ na kwĩka ũlũngalu: Ndũkandiĩe athĩn’ya makwa.
Psalms119:122 Ĩthĩwa mũĩkĩĩwa kwa mũthũkũmi waku kwondũ wa ũseo: Ndũkaeke ekathĩĩi manthĩn’ye.
Psalms119:123 Metho makwa nĩmeũseekea kwondũ wa ũtangĩĩo waku
Psalms119:124 Mwĩke mũthũkũmi waku kwĩanana na ũseo waku wĩ wendo
Psalms119:125 Nyie nĩ mũthũkũmi waku; nenga ũmanyi
Psalms119:126 Nĩ ĩvinda ya Yeova ya kũtethya wĩa; Nũndũ nĩmatw’ĩkĩthĩtye mĩao yaku ya mana.
Psalms119:127 Kwondũ wa ũu nĩnendaa mĩao yaku Kwĩ thaavu
Psalms119:128 Kwondũ wa ũu mawĩaĩo maku onthe maũndũnĩ onthe nĩtĩkĩlaa nĩ ma w’o; Na nĩmenaa kĩla nzĩa ya ũvũngũ.
Psalms119:129 Mokũsĩ maku nĩ ma ũseng’ya; Kwondũ wa ũu ngoo yakwa nĩmakwataa.
Psalms119:130 Ũvuan’yo wa ndeto syaku nũetae kyeni; Nũnengae ũmanyi ala mate naw’o.
Psalms119:131 Nĩnaathamisye kanyw’a wakwa mũno
Psalms119:132 Ĩnthyũũĩe
Psalms119:133 Lũlũmĩlya matambya makwa ndetonĩ yaku; Na ndũkaeke ũthũku o na wĩva ũnzumbĩke.
Psalms119:134 Mbovosya nume ũthĩn’yonĩ wa andũ: Na ĩndĩ ngakwataa mawĩaĩo maku.
Psalms119:135 Ũthyũ waku ũmũtisĩae mũthũkũmi waku; Na kũmanyĩsya nyie myamũlo yaku.
Psalms119:136 Mbũsĩ sya manzĩ itheeaa kuma methonĩ makwa
Psalms119:137 Wĩ mũlũngalu
Psalms119:138 Nĩwĩaĩte mokũsĩ maku ũlũngalunĩ Na kĩthitonĩ ki.
Psalms119:139 Nĩnĩminĩtwe nĩ kĩwĩu kyakwa
Psalms119:140 Ndeto yaku nĩ ntheu mũno; Kwondũ wa ũu mũthũkũmi waku nũmyendaa.
Psalms119:141 Nyie nĩ mũnini na mũvũthye; ĩndi ndyũlawa nĩ mawĩaĩo maku.
Psalms119:142 Ũlũngalu waku nĩ ũlũngalu wa tene na tene
Psalms119:143 Thĩna na woo ningwatĩte; Ĩndĩ mĩao yaku nĩ ũtanu wakwa.
Psalms119:144 Mokũsĩ maku nĩ malũngalu tene na tene; Nenga ũmanyi
Psalms119:145 Nĩnĩkaĩlĩte na ngoo yakwa yonthe; nzũngĩa
Psalms119:146 Nĩnĩkwĩkaĩlĩte; ndangĩĩa
Psalms119:147 Nĩnaumaalile kĩoko kũitheana
Psalms119:148 Metho makwa mosyaĩĩsyonĩ ma ũtukũ nĩmasalukĩtye
Psalms119:149 Ĩthukĩĩsye wasya wakwa kwĩanana na ũseo waku wĩ wendo: Nthayũũkya
Psalms119:150 Manthengeeaa vakuvĩ ala mavikĩlaa ũthũku; Me kũasa na mĩao yaku.
Psalms119:151 Wĩ vakuvĩ
Psalms119:152 Kuma tene nĩnamanyie kuma mokũsĩnĩ maku
Psalms119:153 Sũanĩa ũndũ wa thĩna wakwa
Psalms119:154 Ndetea
Psalms119:155 Ũtangĩĩo wĩ kũasa na ala athũku; Nũndũ matimanthaa myamũlo yaku.
Psalms119:156 Matei maku mololo nĩ manene
Psalms119:157 Athĩn’ya makwa na nthũ syakwa nĩ mbingĩ; Ĩndĩ ndyaaathũka kuma mokũsĩnĩ maku.
Psalms119:158 Nĩnoonie nzeleke
Psalms119:159 Sũanĩa ũndũ nendete mawĩaĩo maku: Nthayũũkya
Psalms119:160 Kũmbanw’a kwa ndeto yaku yonthe nĩ w’o; Na kĩla ũmwe wa motw’ĩo maku malũngalu nĩwĩkalaa tene na tene.
Psalms119:161 Anene me mbee ũsumbĩnĩ nĩmathĩnĩtye vate kĩtumi; Ĩndĩ ngoo yakwa nĩkĩaa nũndũ wa ndeto syaku.
Psalms119:162 Nĩtanĩaa ndeto yaku
Psalms119:163 Nĩmenaa na kũthĩtha ũvũngũ; Ĩndĩ nĩnendaa mĩao yaku.
Psalms119:164 Nĩkũtaĩaa mavinda mũonza kĩla mũthenya
Psalms119:165 Ala mendaa mĩao yaku me na mũuo mũnene; Na mati na ũndũ wa kũmalulutĩkya.
Psalms119:166 Nĩnĩkwatĩtye ũtangĩĩo waku
Psalms119:167 Ngoo yakwa nĩkwatĩte mokũsĩ maku; Na nĩnĩmendete mũno.
Psalms119:168 Nĩngwatĩte mawĩaĩo maku na mokũsĩ maku; Nũndũ mĩendele yakwa yonthe yĩ mbee waku
Psalms119:169 Kũkaya kwakwa nĩkũthengeee mbee waku
Psalms119:170 Wĩsũvano wakwa nĩwũke vala ũĩ: Mbonokya kwĩanana na ndeto yaku.
Psalms119:171 Ilomo syakwa nĩsyumye ndaĩa; Nũndũ nũmanyĩasya nyie myamũlo yaku.
Psalms119:172 Ũĩmĩ wakwa nũkumye ndeto yaku; Nũndũ mĩao yaku yonthe nĩ mĩlũngalu.
Psalms119:173 Kw’oko kwaku nĩkwĩyũmban’ye kũndethya; Nũndũ nĩnĩnyuvĩte mawĩaĩo maku.
Psalms119:174 Nĩnendete mũno ũtangĩĩo waku
Psalms119:175 Thayũ wakwa nĩwĩkalae
Psalms119:176 Nĩnaĩte ta ĩlondu yau; mantha mũthũkũmi waku; Nũndũ ndyũlawa nĩ mĩao yaku.
Psalms120:1 Ũnyamaonĩ wakwa nĩnamwĩkaĩlile Yeova
Psalms120:2 Vonokya thayũ wakwa
Psalms120:3 Ũkanengwa kyaũ
Psalms120:4 Ũilyĩ mĩsyĩ myũĩ ya ala me ũtonyi
Psalms120:5 Woo nĩ wakwa
Psalms120:6 Thayũ wakwa wĩkalĩte ĩvinda ĩasa ũtwĩe Vamwe na ũla ũmenaa mũuo.
Psalms120:7 Nyie nĩ wa mũuo: Indĩ yĩla ngũneena
Psalms121:1 Ngookĩlĩlya iĩma metho makwa: Ũtethyo wakwa wĩuma va?
Psalms121:2 Ũtethyo wakwa nĩwumaa kwa Yeova
Psalms121:3 Ndakaeka kũũ kwakwa kũthingithangw’e: Ũla ũkũsũvĩaa ndakombosya.
Psalms121:4 Sisya
Psalms121:5 Yeova nĩwe mũsũvĩi waku: Yeova nĩwe muunyĩ waku ngalĩ ya kw’oko kwaku kwa aũme.
Psalms121:6 Syũa yĩtikakũkũna mũthenya
Psalms121:7 Yeova akakũsũvĩaa kwa ũthũku w’onthe; Akasũvĩaa thayũ waku.
Psalms121:8 Yeova akasũvĩaa kumaala kwaku na kũsyoka kwaku Kuma yu na kũvika tene na tene.
Psalms122:1 Naĩ na ũtanu yĩla mambĩie
Psalms122:2 Maũũ maitũ nĩmaũngamĩte Mbingĩlonĩ syaku
Psalms122:3 Yelusaleme
Psalms122:4 Vala mbaĩ syambataa
Psalms122:5 Nũndũ kw’o ivĩla sya ũsumbĩ nĩsiĩtwe ũndũ wa ũsilĩlo
Psalms122:6 Voyai ũndũ wa mũuo wa Yelusaleme: Makaathimĩka ala makwendaa.
Psalms122:7 Mũuo nĩwĩthĩwe nthĩnĩ wa maũvai maku
Psalms122:8 Kwondũ wa ana‐a‐asa na atindan’ya makwa
Psalms122:9 Kwondũ wa nyũmba ya Yeova Ngai waitũ Ngakũmanthĩa ũseo.
Psalms123:1 Nĩngũkũkĩlĩlya metho makwa
Psalms123:2 Sisya
Psalms123:3 Twĩw’ĩe tei
Psalms123:4 Thayũ witũ usũĩtwe mũno Nĩ kũvũĩwa ngũĩ nĩ ala methũmũĩtye
Psalms124:1 Kethĩwa ti ũndũ wa Yeova ũla waĩ ngalĩ ĩla yaitũ
Psalms124:2 Kethĩwa ti ũndũ wa Yeova ũla waĩ ngalĩ ĩla yaitũ
Psalms124:3 Methĩwa matũmelilye twĩ thayũ
Psalms124:4 Manzĩ methĩwa matũvw’ĩkie
Psalms124:5 Manzĩ ala mekathĩĩaa methĩwa mavĩtĩle ĩũlũ wa mathayũ maitũ.
Psalms124:6 Nataĩwe Yeova
Psalms124:7 Thayũ witũ nũvonokete ta nyũnyi yumĩte kĩteinĩ kya atei mayo: Kĩtei nĩ kĩtw’ĩku
Psalms124:8 Ũtethyo witũ wĩ syĩtwanĩ ya Yeova
Psalms125:1 Ala mamũĩkĩĩaa Yeova Mailyĩ kĩĩma kya Saioni
Psalms125:2 O tondũ iĩma ithyũlũlũkĩte Yelusaleme
Psalms125:3 Nũndũ ndata ya ũsumbĩ ya ũthũku ndĩkekala ĩũlũ wa ũtiĩwa wa alũngalu; Kana ala alũngalu matikaatambũũkye moko moo meke ũthũku.
Psalms125:4 Mekae nesa
Psalms125:5 Ĩndĩ ũndũ wa ala methyũũaa maende nzĩanĩ syoo nthyoeku
Psalms126:1 Yĩla Yeova watũngie ala masyokie Saioni
Psalms126:2 Nĩvo kanyw’a witũ wausũiwe nĩ kũtheka
Psalms126:3 Yeova nũtwĩkĩte maũndũ manene
Psalms126:4 Tũtũnge tume kũtavwanĩ kwitũ
Psalms126:5 Ala mavuĩaa na methoi makaketha na ũtanu.
Psalms126:6 Ũla umaalaa akĩĩa
Psalms127:1 Keka Yeova wakaa nyũmba
Psalms127:2 Nĩ mana kwenyu kũkĩla tene
Psalms127:3 Sisya
Psalms127:4 Ta mĩsyĩ kw’okonĩ kwa ngũmbaũ
Psalms127:5 Nĩ mũtanu mũndũ ũla wĩ na thyaka wake usũĩtwe nĩsyo: Matikasonoka
Psalms128:1 Nĩ mũathime kĩla mũndũ ũla ũkĩaa Yeova
Psalms128:2 Nũndũ ũkaĩsaa wĩa wa moko maku: Ũkeethĩwa wĩ na ũtanu
Psalms128:3 Kĩveti kyaku kĩkeethĩwa ta mũsavivũ wĩ ũsyao
Psalms128:4 Sisya
Psalms128:5 Yeova nakũathime e Saioni: Naku ũkyona ũseo wa Yelusaleme mĩthenya yonthe ya thayũ waku.
Psalms128:6 Ĩĩ
Psalms129:1 Nĩmanthĩnĩtye mavinda maingĩ kuma wana wakwa
Psalms129:2 Nĩmanthĩnĩtye mavinda maingĩ kuma wana wakwa: Ĩndĩ matyaangĩlya vinya.
Psalms129:3 Aĩmi nĩmenzie mũongonĩ wakwa; Maasavisye mĩkao yoo.
Psalms129:4 Yeova nĩ mũlũngalu: Nũtilanĩtye ndii sya ala athũku.
Psalms129:5 Nĩmasonokw’e na kũtũngwa na ĩtina
Psalms129:6 Nĩmethĩwe ta nyeki syĩ ĩũlũ wa nyũmba
Psalms129:7 Mũkethi ndausũasya ngundi ya kw’oko kwake nasyo
Psalms129:8 O na ala mavĩtaa matiasya
Psalms130:1 Nĩ syũngũnĩ nene nĩnĩkwĩkaĩlĩte
Psalms130:2 Mwĩaĩi
Psalms130:3 Ethĩwa we
Psalms130:4 Ĩndĩ ve ũekeo kwaku
Psalms130:5 Nĩngũmweteela Yeova
Psalms130:6 Ngoo yakwa nĩyeteelaa Mwĩaĩi Kwĩ ũndũ asyaĩĩsya meteelaa kũkye; Ĩĩ
Psalms130:7 We Isilaeli
Psalms130:8 Nake akoovosya Isilaeli Kuma mothũkunĩ make onthe.
Psalms131:1 Yeova
Psalms131:2 Nĩ w’o nĩvindĩthĩtye na kũkilĩthya ngoo yakwa; Ta kana kaaĩu ke na inyia wako
Psalms131:3 We Isilaeli
Psalms132:1 Yeova
Psalms132:2 Ũndũ wamwĩvĩtĩe Yeova
Psalms132:3 Vate ndĩi ndikalika wĩkalonĩ wa nyũmba yakwa
Psalms132:4 Ndikanenga metho makwa too
Psalms132:5 Kũvika noona vandũ va Yeova
Psalms132:6 Sisya
Psalms132:7 Tũkalika mawĩkalonĩ make; Tũkathaithĩaa kavĩlanĩ kake ka nyaĩĩ.
Psalms132:8 Ũkĩla
Psalms132:9 Athembi maku nĩmavw’ĩkwe ũlũngalu; Na atheu maku nĩmokĩlye mawasya na ũtanu.
Psalms132:10 Kwondũ wa mũthũkũmi waku Ndaviti Ndũkathyũũe ũthyũ wa mwĩtĩkĩw’a mauta waku.
Psalms132:11 Yeova nĩwĩvĩtĩe Ndaviti w’o; Ndakamwĩthyũĩa: Ma ũsyao wa mwĩĩ waku ngamekalya kĩvĩlanĩ kyaku kya ũsumbĩ.
Psalms132:12 Ethĩwa syana syaku ikakwata ũtianĩo wakwa Na ũkũsĩ wakwa ũla ngaimanyĩsya
Psalms132:13 Nũndũ Yeova nũnyuvĩte Saioni; Nũmyendete yĩthĩwe ũtũo wake.
Psalms132:14 Vaa nĩ vandũ vakwa va ũthũmũa tene na tene: Ngekalaa vaa; nũndũ nĩnĩvendete.
Psalms132:15 Ngaathima sya ũya sya vo mũno: Ngavũn’ya ngya sya vo na lĩu
Psalms132:16 O na ngavw’ĩka athembi ma vo ũtangĩĩo; Na atheu ma vo makookĩlya mawasya manene na ũtanu.
Psalms132:17 Vu ngathongooesya ũvya wa Ndaviti: Nĩniĩte taa kwondũ wa mwĩtĩkĩw’a mauta wakwa.
Psalms132:18 Amaitha make ngamavw’ĩka nthoni; Ĩndĩ ngovia yake ya ũsumbĩ ĩkaathimĩka ĩũlũ wake mwene.
Psalms133:1 Sisyai
Psalms133:2 Nĩ ta ala mauta maĩ vata mũno me mũtwe
Psalms133:3 Ta ĩmwe ya kĩĩma kya Elimoni
Psalms134:1 Sisyai
Psalms134:2 Ũkĩlyai moko menyu melekele vala vandũ vatheu
Psalms134:3 Yeova nakũathime e Saioni; O ũla watw’ĩkĩthisye ĩtu na nthĩ.
Psalms135:1 Mũtaĩei Yeova. Taĩai syĩtwa ya Yeova: Mũtaĩei
Psalms135:2 Inyw’ĩ ala mũũngamaa nyũmbanĩ ya Yeova Nthĩnĩ wa nza sya nyũmba ya Ngai waitũ.
Psalms135:3 Mũtaĩei Yeova; nũndũ Yeova nĩ mũseo: Inai mũkĩkumya syĩtwa yake; nũndũ ũũ nĩ ũseo.
Psalms135:4 Nũndũ Yeova nĩwenyuvĩe Yakovo
Psalms135:5 Nũndũ nĩnĩsĩ Yeova nĩ mũnene
Psalms135:6 Ũndũ o na wĩva ũla Yeova wendie
Psalms135:7 Ũla ũtumaa mũki kwambata kuma itulunĩ sya nthĩ; Ũla ũseũvĩasya mbua motisi; Ũla wumasya kĩseve ũthwiinĩ wake;
Psalms135:8 Ũla woaie kĩla kyasyaĩtwe mbee kya nthĩ ya Misili
Psalms135:9 Ũla waetie syama na moseng’yo katĩ waku
Psalms135:10 Ũla wakũnie mbaĩ nyingĩ
Psalms135:11 Sioni mũsumbĩ wa Aamoli
Psalms135:12 Na anengane nthĩ yoo yĩthĩwe ũtiĩwa
Psalms135:13 Syĩtwa yaku
Psalms135:14 Nũndũ Yeova akasilĩla andũ make
Psalms135:15 Mĩvw’anano ya i mbaĩ nĩ vetha na thaavu
Psalms135:16 Yĩ na makanyw’a
Psalms135:17 Yĩ na matũ
Psalms135:18 Ala mamĩseũvasya makeethĩwa mailyĩ tayo; Ĩĩ
Psalms135:19 We nyũmba ya Isilaeli
Psalms135:20 We nyũmba ya Livai
Psalms135:21 Nataĩwe Yeova ku Saioni
Psalms136:1 Mũtũngĩei Yeova mũvea; nũndũ nĩ mũseo; Nũndũ ũseo wake wĩ wendo nĩwĩkalaa tene na tene.
Psalms136:2 Mũtũngĩei mũvea Ngai wa i ngai; Nũndũ ũseo wake wĩ wendo nĩwĩkalaa tene na tene.
Psalms136:3 Mũtũngĩei mũvea Mwĩaĩi wa eaĩi; Nũndũ ũseo wake wĩ wendo nĩwĩkalaa tene na tene.
Psalms136:4 We ũla e weka wĩkaa moseng’yo manene; Nũndũ ũseo wake wĩ wendo nĩwĩkalaa tene na tene:
Psalms136:5 Ũla ũndũ wa ũmanyi watw’ĩkĩthisye matu; Nũndũ ũseo wake wĩ wendo nĩwĩkalaa tene na tene:
Psalms136:6 Ũla walanilye nthĩ ĩũlũ wa manzĩ; Nũndũ ũseo wake wĩ wendo nĩwĩkalaa tene na tene:
Psalms136:7 Ũla wombie syeni nene; Nũndũ ũseo wake wĩ wendo nĩwĩkalaa tene na tene:
Psalms136:8 Syũa ya kũsumbĩka mũthenya; Nũndũ ũseo wake wĩ wendo nĩwĩkalaa tene na tene;
Psalms136:9 Mwei na ndata sya kũsumbĩka ũtukũ; Nũndũ ũseo wake wĩ wendo nĩwĩkalaa tene na tene:
Psalms136:10 Ũla wakũnie Misili makithathinĩ moo; Nũndũ ũseo wake wĩ wendo nĩwĩkalaa tene na tene;
Psalms136:11 Na aumisye Isilaeli katĩ woo; Nũndũ ũseo wake wĩ wendo nĩwĩkalaa tene na tene;
Psalms136:12 Na kw’oko kwĩ vinya
Psalms136:13 Ũla waaanĩlye Ũkanga Mũtune katĩ; Nũndũ ũseo wake wĩ wendo nĩwĩkalaa tene na tene;
Psalms136:14 Na avĩtĩlya Isilaeli katĩ waw’o; Nũndũ ũseo wake wĩ wendo nĩwĩkalaa tene na tene;
Psalms136:15 Ĩndĩ aanangĩa Valao na nguthu yake Ũkanganĩ Mũtune; Nũndũ ũseo wake wĩ wendo nĩwĩkalaa tene na tene:
Psalms136:16 Ũla watongoesye andũ make weũnĩ; Nũndũ ũseo wake wĩ wendo nĩwĩkalaa tene na tene:
Psalms136:17 Ũla wakũnie asumbĩ anene; Nũndũ ũseo wake wĩ wendo nĩwĩkalaa tene na tene;
Psalms136:18 Na kũaa asumbĩ me nguma; Nũndũ ũseo wake wĩ wendo nĩwĩkalaa tene na tene:
Psalms136:19 Sioni mũsumbĩ wa Aamoli; Nũndũ ũseo wake wĩ wendo nĩwĩkalaa tene na tene;
Psalms136:20 Na Oku mũsumbĩ wa Mbasani; Nũndũ ũseo wake wĩ wendo nĩwĩkalaa tene na tene;
Psalms136:21 Na anengane nthĩ yoo yĩthĩwe ũtiĩwa; Nũndũ ũseo wake wĩ wendo nĩwĩkalaa tene na tene;
Psalms136:22 O ũtiĩwa wa Isilaeli mũthũkũmi wake; Nũndũ ũseo wake wĩ wendo nĩwĩkalaa tene na tene:
Psalms136:23 Ũla watũlilikanile tũte ndaĩa; Nũndũ ũseo wake wĩ wendo nĩwĩkalaa tene na tene;
Psalms136:24 Na nũtũvonoketye kuma nthũnĩ sitũ; Nũndũ ũseo wake wĩ wendo nĩwĩkalaa tene na tene:
Psalms136:25 Ũla ũnengae mĩĩ yonthe lĩu; Nũndũ ũseo wake wĩ wendo nĩwĩkalaa tene na tene.
Psalms136:26 Mũtũngĩei mũvea Ngai wa ĩtunĩ; Nũndũ ũseo wake wĩ wendo nĩwĩkalaa tene na tene.
Psalms137:1 Ndee sya mbũsĩ sya Mbaviloni
Psalms137:2 Mĩtĩnĩ ĩla ĩmeaa katĩ wasyo Nĩtwanĩkie mbeve sitũ.
Psalms137:3 Nũndũ kw’o ala matũtwaie matũtavĩte matũkũlilye mbathi
Psalms137:4 Twina ata wathi wa Yeova Twĩ nthĩ ĩngĩ?

Psalms137:9 Akeethĩwa mũtanu
Psalms138:1 Ngakũtũngĩa mũvea na ngoo yakwa yonthe: Ngaina ngĩũkumĩsya mbee wa i ngai.

Psalms138:3 Mũthenya ũla neetanie now’o wanzũngĩie

Psalms138:7 O na ngĩendela thĩnanĩ

Psalms139:1 Ame Yeova
Psalms139:2 Nĩwĩsĩ kwĩkala nthĩ kwakwa

Psalms139:5 Nũnziĩĩĩte ĩtina na mbee
Psalms139:6 Ũmanyi ta ũsu nĩ ũseng’yo kũmbĩtũka; Nĩ mũtũlu
Psalms139:7 Nithi ku nume vala ve Veva waku? Kana nĩkĩĩa va nume vala ũĩ?
Psalms139:8 Ethĩwa ngambata ĩtunĩ
Psalms139:9 Ethĩwa ngoosa nthwau sya kĩoko
Psalms139:10 O na vo kw’oko kwaku kũkandongoesya
Psalms139:11 Ethĩwa ngasya
Psalms139:12 O na kĩvindu kĩtikwĩvitha
Psalms139:13 Nũndũ nĩwambũmbie ilungu sya nthĩnĩ: Nĩwambw’ĩkie ĩvunĩ ya mwaitũ.
Psalms139:14 Ngakũtũngĩa mũvea; nũndũ nũmbĩtwe wa kũkĩwa na kũseng’ya: Mawĩa maku nĩ ma ũseng’ya; Na ũu ngoo yakwa nĩyĩsĩ nesa ki.
Psalms139:15 Wũmbe wakwa ndwaakũvithwa
Psalms139:16 Metho maku nĩmoonie ndanombĩka; Na ĩvukunĩ yaku mamutha nĩmaandĩkĩtwe onthe
Psalms139:17 O na mosũanĩo maku ũndũ mean’ya vata kũla nĩĩ

Psalms139:24 Noisisya ethĩwa ve nzĩa nthũku nthĩnĩ wakwa
Psalms140:1 Ame Yeova

Psalms140:3 Nĩmoĩvĩtye nĩmĩ syoo ta sya nzoka; Ũoi wa syĩmbuva wĩ ungu wa ilomo syoo.

Psalms142:1 Nĩmwĩkaĩlaa Yeova na wasya wakwa; Nĩmwĩsũvaa Yeova na wasya wakwa.

Psalms142:3 Yĩla veva wakwa wanthelekele
Psalms142:4 Sisya kw’oko kwakwa kwa aũme
Psalms142:5 Nĩnakwĩkaĩlile
Psalms142:6 Ĩthukĩĩsye kũkaya kwakwa; Nũndũ nĩnyivĩtw’e mũno: Mbonokya kwa ala manthĩnasya; Nũndũ me vinya kwĩ nyie.
Psalms142:7 Umya thayũ wakwa kolokolonĩ
Psalms143:1 Ĩw’a mboya yakwa
Psalms143:2 Na ndũkakwatye sila na mũthũkũmi waku; Nũndũ methonĩ maku vai mũndũ wĩ thayũ mũlũngalu.
Psalms143:3 Nũndũ mũmaitha nũthĩnĩtye ngoo yakwa; Nũkũnĩte thayũ wakwa ũkavika nthĩ: Nũmbĩkalĩtye kũndũ kwĩ kĩvindu
Psalms143:4 Kwondũ wa ũu veva wakwa nũthelekele nthĩnĩ wakwa; Ngoo yakwa nthĩnĩ nĩnĩkũũũya.
Psalms143:5 Nĩngũlilikana mĩthenya ya tene; Nĩngũsũanĩa meko maku onthe; Nĩngũsũanĩa wĩa wa moko maku.
Psalms143:6 Nĩngũkũtambũũkĩsya moko makwa: Ngoo yakwa yĩ na waũni ũndũ waku
Psalms143:7 Ĩkalaate kũnzũngĩa
Psalms143:8 Mbĩw’ĩthasya ũseo waku wĩ wendo kĩoko; Nũndũ nĩngũĩkĩĩaa: Manyĩthasya nzĩa ĩla naĩle kũendelaa; Nũndũ nĩngũkĩlĩlasya ngoo yakwa.
Psalms143:9 Ame Yeova

Psalms145:5 Ngasũanĩaa ũnene mũnene wa ndaĩa yaku
Psalms145:6 Na andũ makaneenaa ũndũ wa ũtonyi wa meko maku ma kũtĩsya; Nakwa ngatavanasya ũnene waku.
Psalms145:7 Makawetaa ũlilikan’yo wa ũseo waku mũnene
Psalms145:8 Yeova nĩ mũseo
Psalms145:9 Yeova nĩ mũseo kwa onthe; Na matei make mololo me ĩũlũ wa mawĩa make onthe.
Psalms145:10 Mawĩa maku onthe makakũtũngĩaa mũvea
Psalms145:11 Makawetaa ndaĩa ya ũsumbĩ waku

Psalms145:13 Ũsumbĩ waku nĩ ũsumbĩ wa tene na tene

Psalms145:20 Yeova nũsũvĩaa onthe ala mamwendaa; Ĩndĩ ala athũku onthe akamananga.
Psalms145:21 Kanyw’a wakwa ũkaneena ndaĩa ya Yeova; Na mĩĩ yonthe nĩtaĩe syĩtwa yake ĩtheu tene na tene.
Psalms146:1 Mũtaĩei Yeova. Taĩa Yeova
Psalms146:2 Yĩla nĩ thayũ ngataĩaa Yeova: Ngamwĩnĩaa Ngai wakwa ndaĩa yĩla nĩ thayũ.
Psalms146:3 Ndũkaĩkĩĩe anene me mbee ũsumbĩnĩ
Psalms146:4 Mĩthũmũ yake nĩyumaa
Psalms146:5 Nĩ mũtanu ũla wĩ na Ngai wa Yakovo wa kũmũtethya
Psalms146:6 Ũla watw’ĩkĩthisye ĩtu na nthĩ. Na ũkanga
Psalms146:7 Ũla ũsilaa sila wa katĩ kwondũ wa ala mathĩnaw’a; Ula ũnengae ala me na nzaa lĩu. Yeova nũthaasya ovwa;
Psalms146:8 Yeova nũsalukasya metho ma ilalinda; Yeova nĩũkĩlasya ala makunamĩte; Yeova nũmendaa ala alũngalu;
Psalms146:9 Yeova nũsũvĩaa ekali ma ũeninĩ; Nũũngamasya ũla wakw’ĩĩwe nĩ ĩthe na ndiwa; Ĩndĩ nzĩa ya ala athũku nũkulumanasya.
Psalms146:10 Yeova akasumbĩkaa tene na tene
Psalms147:1 Mũtaĩei Yeova; Nũndũ nĩ ũseo kũmũkumya Ngai waitũ; Nũndũ nĩkwendeeasya
Psalms147:2 Yeova nĩwakaa Yelũsaleme; Nĩwũmbanasya alũngw’a ma Isilaeli.
Psalms147:3 Nũvoasya ala matũlĩkile ngoo
Psalms147:4 Nũtalaa ndata ũndũ syĩana; Nũsyĩtaa syonthe na masyĩtwa masyo.
Psalms147:5 Mwĩaĩi waitũ nĩ mũnene
Psalms147:6 Yeova nũũngamasya ala auu: Nũmatheeasya nthĩ ala athũku.
Psalms147:7 Mwinĩei Yeova na mũvea; Mwinĩei Ngai waitũ ndaĩa na mbeve
Psalms147:8 Ũla ũvw’ĩkaa matu mathweo
Psalms147:9 Nũnengae nyamũ lĩu wayo
Psalms147:10 Ndatanaw’a nĩ vinya wa mbalasi: Ndendeeaw’a nĩ maũũ ma mũndũ.
Psalms147:11 Yeova nĩwendeeaw’a nĩ ala mamũkĩaa
Psalms147:12 Taĩa Yeova
Psalms147:13 Nũndũ nũsyĩkĩĩte vinya ivingi sya mbingĩlo syaku; Nũathimĩte syana syaku ila syĩ nthĩnĩ waku.
Psalms147:14 Nũtumaa mũuo mĩvakanĩ yaku; Nũkũvũnasya na nganũ ila nzeo mbee.
Psalms147:15 Nũetae mwĩao wake ĩũlũ wa nthĩ; Ndeto yake nĩsembaa mĩtũkĩ mũno.
Psalms147:16 Nũnenganae ĩa ta w’ĩa wa malondu; Nũnyaĩĩkasya ĩmwe yĩkamĩtw’e nĩ mbevo ta mũu.
Psalms147:17 Nĩwĩkasya manzĩ make momĩtw’e nĩ mbevo me tũlungu: Nũũ ũtonya kũũngama mbee wa mbevo yake?

Psalms147:19 Nĩwonanasya ndeto yake kwa Yakovo
Psalms147:20 Ndaaĩka mbaĩ o na yĩva ta ũu; Na ũndũ wa motw’ĩo make
Psalms148:1 Mũtaĩei Yeova. Mũtaĩĩei Yeova kuma matunĩ; Mũtaĩĩei motũlunĩ.

Psalms148:5 Nitaĩe syĩtwa ya Yeova; Nũndũ we nĩweaie
Psalms148:6 O na nĩwilũlũmĩlĩtye tene na tene: Nũtw’ĩte ũtw’ĩo ũla ũtakavĩta.
Psalms148:7 Taĩai Yeova kũũ nthĩ
Psalms148:8 Mwaki na mbua ya mavia
Psalms148:9 Iĩma na tũlĩma tw’onthe; Mĩtĩ yĩ ũsyao na mĩtĩ ya mĩkũũ yonthe;
Psalms148:10 Nyamũ na indo syonthe; Tũsamũ tũla tũtambũkaa na nyũnyi ila iũlũkaa;
Psalms148:11 Asumbĩ ma nthĩ na ngo syonthe sya andũ; Anene me mbee ũsumbĩnĩ na asili onthe ma nthĩ;
Psalms148:12 Anake o na eĩtu atheu; Atumĩa na syana:
Psalms148:13 Nĩmataĩe syĩtwa ya Yeova; Nũndũ syĩtwa yake yoka nĩ ĩnenevye; Ũtheu mũtisu wake wĩ ĩũlũ wa nthĩ na matu.
Psalms148:14 Nĩwũkĩlĩtye ũvya wa andũ make
Psalms149:1 Mũtaĩei Yeova. Mũkumyei Yeova na wathi weũ
Psalms149:2 Isilaeli namũtanĩe ũla wamũmbie: Syana sya Saioni nitane ũndũ wa mũsumbĩ woo.
Psalms149:3 Nitaĩe syĩtwa yake ikĩsũnga: Nĩsine ikĩmũtaĩa na kĩthembe na mbeve.
Psalms149:4 Nũndũ Yeova nũtanĩaa andũ make: Akaanakavya ala auu na ũtangĩĩo.
Psalms149:5 Atheu nĩmekathĩĩe ndaĩanĩ: Nĩmaine ũndũ wa ũtanu me mokomonĩ moo.
Psalms149:6 Motaĩo manene ma Ngai methĩwe makanyw’anĩ moo
Psalms149:7 Meĩvanĩsye kwa i mbaĩ
Psalms149:8 Move asumbĩ moo na mĩnyololo
Psalms149:9 Meanĩsye ũsilĩlo ĩũlũ woo ũla ũandĩkĩtwe: Ndaĩa ĩno yĩ na atheu make onthe. Mũtaĩei Yeova.
Psalms150:1 Mũtaĩei Yeova. Mũtaĩĩei Ngai vandũnĩ vake vatheu: Mũtaĩĩei ku yayayanĩ ya vinya wake.
Psalms150:2 Mũtaĩei ũndũ wa meko make me ũtonyi: Mũtaĩei kwĩanana na ũnene wake mũnene.
Psalms150:3 Mũtaĩei na wasya wa soo: Mũtaĩei na kĩnanda na mbeve.
Psalms150:4 Mũtaĩei na kĩthembe na kũsũnga: Mũtaĩei na syĩndũ sya kũinga syĩ ndii
Psalms150:5 Mũtaĩei na tũmasaya twĩ wasya mũnene: Mũtaĩei na tũmasaya twĩ wasya mũtũlu mũno.
Psalms150:6 Kĩla kĩndũ kĩ mĩthũmũ nĩkĩtaĩe Yeova. Mũtaĩei Yeova.
Proverbs1:1 Nthimo sya Solomoni mwana wa Ndaviti

Proverbs1:3 Kwosa ũmanyĩsyo wa kwĩka ũĩ
Proverbs1:4 Kũmũnenga ũla ũte ũmanyi kĩlĩko
Proverbs1:5 Nĩ kana mũndũ ũla mũĩ ew’e
Proverbs1:6 Kũmanya nthimo
Proverbs1:7 Kũmũkĩa Yeova nĩ wambĩlĩlyo wa ũmanyi; Ĩndĩ ala atumanu mavũthasya ũĩ na ũmanyĩsyo.
Proverbs1:8 Mwana wakwa
Proverbs1:9 Nũndũ makeethĩwa ta ngovia ya mumo mũtwenĩ waku
Proverbs1:10 Mwana wakwa
Proverbs1:11 Ethĩwa makakwĩa
Proverbs1:12 Tũmamelye me thayũ ta Seoli
Proverbs1:13 Tũkoona syĩndũ syonthe syĩ vata mũno; Tũkausũsya nyũmba sitũ na mũtavo:
Proverbs1:14 Ũkekye mũlimano waku vamwe naitũ; Ithyonthe tũkeethĩwa na ngusu ĩmwe:
Proverbs1:15 Mwana wakwa
Proverbs1:16 Nũndũ maũũ moo masembaa meke ũthũku
Proverbs1:17 Nũndũ nĩ mana kũtambũũkya kĩtei Nyũnyi yene:
Proverbs1:18 Na asu moveeasya nthakame yoo ene; Moveeasya na kĩmbithĩ mathayũ moo ene.
Proverbs1:19 Nĩ w’o itilyĩ nzĩa sya kĩla ũmwe wĩ na ĩtomo ya ũtandĩthyo; Nĩyĩvetaa thayũ wa ene mayo.
Proverbs1:20 Ũĩ nũkayĩaa na wasya mũnene nzĩanĩ nene; Nĩumĩasya wasya waw’o kũndũnĩ kwaamu;
Proverbs1:21 Nũkayĩaa vandũ va ndaĩa va kũmbanĩa; Ũlikĩlonĩ wa mbingĩlo
Proverbs1:22 Inyw’ĩ mũte ũmanyi
Proverbs1:23 Ĩthyũũe kwondũ wa kũkanw’a ninyie: Sisyai
Proverbs1:24 Nĩkwĩthĩwa nĩnĩtanĩte
Proverbs1:25 Ĩndĩ nĩmũtw’ĩte motao makwa onthe mana
Proverbs1:26 O nakwa ngatheka mũthenyanĩ wa wanangĩko wenyu mũnene; Ngavũa ngũĩ yĩla w’ĩa wenyu wĩũka;
Proverbs1:27 Yĩla w’ĩa wenyu wĩũka ta kĩlingi
Proverbs1:28 Nĩvo ĩndĩ makengaĩla
Proverbs1:29 Nũndũ nĩmamenie ũmanyi
Proverbs1:30 Matyaaĩtĩkĩla motao makwa
Proverbs1:31 Kwondũ wa ũu makaya ũsyao wa mĩendele yoo ene
Proverbs1:32 Nũndũ kũsyoka na ĩtina kwa ala mate ũmanyi kũkamoaa
Proverbs1:33 Ĩndĩ o ũla ũmbĩthukĩĩsya akatũaa eyelelye
Proverbs2:1 Mwana wakwa
Proverbs2:2 O na kũtea kũtũ kwaku wose ũĩ
Proverbs2:3 Ĩĩ
Proverbs2:4 Ethĩwa ũkoomantha ta vetha
Proverbs2:5 Nĩvo ĩndĩ wĩmanya kũmũkĩa Yeova
Proverbs2:6 Nũndũ Yeova nũnenganae ũĩ; Kanyw’anĩ wake vaumaa ũmanyĩsyo na ũmanyi:
Proverbs2:7 Aiaa ũĩ mwĩanĩu kwondũ wa ala alũngalu; Nake nĩ ngao kwa ala maendaa wĩanĩunĩ;
Proverbs2:8 Kana atonye kũsũvĩa nzĩa sya ũsili wa katĩ
Proverbs2:9 Nĩvo ĩndĩ wĩmanya ũlũngalu na usili wa w’o
Proverbs2:10 Nũndũ ũĩ ũkalika ngoonĩ yaku
Proverbs2:11 Kĩlĩko kĩkakũsyaĩĩasya; Ũmanyi ũkakũsũvĩaa:
Proverbs2:12 Kũũvonokya kuma mĩendelenĩ mĩthũku
Proverbs2:13 Ala matiaa nzĩa sya ũlũngalu
Proverbs2:14 Ala matanaw’a nĩ kwĩka ũthũku
Proverbs2:15 Ala athyoekangu mĩendelenĩ yoo
Proverbs2:16 Kũũvonokya kwa mũndũ mũka mũeni
Proverbs2:17 Ũla wũlawa nĩ mũnyanyae wake wa ũika wake
Proverbs2:18 Nũndũ nyũmba yake yangĩe kĩkw’ũnĩ
Proverbs2:19 Kũti waasyoka ĩngĩ alika kwake
Proverbs2:20 Nĩ kana ũende mũendelenĩ wa andũ aseo
Proverbs2:21 Nũndũ ala alũngalu makatũa ĩ nthĩ
Proverbs2:22 Ĩndĩ ala athũku makavetwa kuma ĩ nthĩ
Proverbs3:1 Mwana wakwa
Proverbs3:2 Nũndũ ĩkakwongeleela mĩthenya mingĩ
Proverbs3:3 Ndũkaaĩtĩkĩle ũseo na w’o ikũtie: Syoveee ngingonĩ yaku; Iandĩke ĩsengeanĩ ya ngoo yaku:
Proverbs3:4 Na ĩndĩ ũkoona ũseo na ũmanyi mũseo Methonĩ ma Ngai na ma mũndũ.
Proverbs3:5 Ĩkĩĩa Yeova na ngoo yaku yonthe
Proverbs3:6 Mĩendelenĩ yaku yonthe mũkũsĩĩe we
Proverbs3:7 Ndũkethĩwe na ũĩ wa metho maku mwene; Mũkĩe Yeova
Proverbs3:8 Ũkakwĩkĩa vinya mũkonyo waku
Proverbs3:9 Mũtaĩe Yeova na syĩndũ syaku
Proverbs3:10 Na kwondũ wa ũu makũmbĩ maku makausũwa nĩ wingĩ
Proverbs3:11 Mwana wakwa
Proverbs3:12 Nũndũ ũla Yeova ũmwendaa nũmũkanasya
Proverbs3:13 Mũndũ nĩ mũtanu ũla wonaa ũĩ
Proverbs3:14 Nũndũ kwĩthĩwa naw’o kwĩ kavaa kwĩ kwĩthĩwa na vetha
Proverbs3:15 Wĩ na vata mũno kwĩ tũvila twa maliani: Na vati kĩmwe kya syĩndũ ila ũtonya kwenda kĩtonya kũvw’ananw’a naw’o.
Proverbs3:16 Mĩthenya mingĩ yĩ kw’okonĩ kwaw’o kwa aũme; Kw’okonĩ kwaw’o kwa aka ve mothwii na ndaĩa.
Proverbs3:17 Mĩendele yaw’o nĩ mĩendele ya kwendeesya
Proverbs3:18 Nĩ mũtĩ wa thayũ kwa ala mokwataa: Na kĩla ũmwe nĩ mũtanu ũla wĩkalaa naw’o.
Proverbs3:19 Yeova kwondũ wa ũĩ nĩwakwatisye wambĩlĩlyo wa nthĩ; Kwondũ wa ũmanyi nĩwalũlũmĩlye matu.
Proverbs3:20 Kwondũ wa ũmanyi wake syũngũ nĩsyavingũkie
Proverbs3:21 Mwana wakwa
Proverbs3:22 Kwondũ wa ũu ikeethĩwa thayũ wa ngoo yaku
Proverbs3:23 Nĩvo ĩndĩ wĩendaa mĩendelenĩ yaku wĩyelele
Proverbs3:24 Yĩla wĩkoma
Proverbs3:25 Ndũkakĩe w’ĩa wa kĩthũlũmũko
Proverbs3:26 Nũndũ Yeova akeethĩwa ũĩkĩĩi waku
Proverbs3:27 Ndũkamaime ũndũ ũseo ala maĩlwe nĩw’o
Proverbs3:28 Ndũkatavye mũtũi waku
Proverbs3:29 Ndũkasũanĩĩe mũtũi waku ũthũku
Proverbs3:30 Ndũkatetan’ye na mũndũ vate kĩtumi
Proverbs3:31 Ndũkamwĩw’ĩe kĩwĩu mũndũ wa ũng’endu
Proverbs3:32 Nũndũ ũla wĩ ngũlũ nĩ ũthatyo kwa Yeova; Ĩndĩ ũnyanya wake nĩ wake na ũla mũlũngalu.
Proverbs3:33 Kĩumo kya Yeova kĩ nyũmbanĩ ya ũla mũthũku; Ĩndĩ nũathimaa ũtũo wa ala alũngalu.
Proverbs3:34 Vate ndĩi nũvũthasya ala mavũthasya; Ĩndĩ anengae mumo ala menyivasya.
Proverbs3:35 Ala oĩ makatiĩwa ndaĩa; Ĩndĩ nthoni ikeethĩwa ũnene wa ndia.
Proverbs4:1 Ĩw’ai
Proverbs4:2 Nũndũ nĩngũmũnenga ũmanyĩsyo mũseo; Mũtikatie mĩao yakwa.
Proverbs4:3 Nũndũ naĩ mwana kwa ĩthe wakwa
Proverbs4:4 Na amanyĩisye
Proverbs4:5 Ĩyosee ũĩ
Proverbs4:6 Ndũkaotie
Proverbs4:7 Ũĩ nĩ ũndũ ũnene mbee; kwondũ wa ũu ĩyosee ũĩ; Ĩĩ
Proverbs4:8 Ũnenevye
Proverbs4:9 Ũkanenga mũtwe waku ngovia ya mumo; Ngovia ya ũsumbĩ ya ũseo ũkakũnenga.
Proverbs4:10 Ĩw’a
Proverbs4:11 Nĩnaũmanyĩsya nzĩanĩ ya ũĩ; Nĩnaũtongoesya nzĩanĩ sya ũlũngalu.
Proverbs4:12 Yĩla wĩendeeaa
Proverbs4:13 Kwata ũlũmye ũmanyĩsyo; ndũkaeke ũthi: Ũsũvĩe; nũndũ nĩ thayũ waku.
Proverbs4:14 Ndũkalike nzĩanĩ ya ala athũku
Proverbs4:15 Myathũkĩe
Proverbs4:16 Nũndũ matikoma
Proverbs4:17 Nũndũ maĩsaa lĩu wa ũthũku
Proverbs4:18 Ĩndĩ nzĩa ya alũngalu nĩ ta kyeni kya kũikya
Proverbs4:19 Mũendele wa ũthũku nĩ ta kĩvindu: Matyĩsĩ kĩla kĩmalulutĩkasya.
Proverbs4:20 Mwana wakwa
Proverbs4:21 Itikaaume methonĩ maku; Syĩkalye ngoonĩ yaku nthĩnĩ.
Proverbs4:22 Nũndũ nĩsyo thayũ kwa ala masyonaa
Proverbs4:23 Ĩkalya ngoo yaku na ũthangaau w’onthe; Nũndũ maũndũ ma thayũ maumaa kwayo.
Proverbs4:24 Veta kwaku kanyw’a wĩ ũng’endu
Proverbs4:25 Metho maku masisye o mbee ki
Proverbs4:26 Tindimalya nzĩa ya nyaĩĩ syaku
Proverbs4:27 Ndũkaaĩthyũũe ngalĩ ya kw’oko kwa aũme kana kwa aka: Umya kũũ kwaku ũthũkunĩ.
Proverbs5:1 Mwana wakwa
Proverbs5:2 Nĩ kana ũtonye kũsũvĩa kĩlĩko
Proverbs5:3 Nũndũ ilomo sya mũndũ mũka mũeni ilovotangasya ũkĩ wa nzũkĩ
Proverbs5:4 Ĩndĩ mũminũkĩlyonĩ e ũũ ta mũtĩ wĩ ũũ
Proverbs5:5 Maũũ make matheeaa kĩkw’ũnĩ; Matambya make malũmanĩtye na Seoli;
Proverbs5:6 Kwondũ wa ũu ndonaa nzĩa ndindimalu ya thayũ: Mĩendele yake ti mĩlũmu
Proverbs5:7 Na yu kwondũ wa ũu
Proverbs5:8 Veta mũendele waku kũasa nake
Proverbs5:9 Ndũkese kũnenga angĩ ndaĩa yaku
Proverbs5:10 Aeni matikese kusũwa nĩ vinya waku
Proverbs5:11 Naku ũkesa kũĩa mũminũkĩlyonĩ waku
Proverbs5:12 Na kwasya
Proverbs5:13 O na ndaaĩthukĩĩsya wasya wa amanyĩsya makwa
Proverbs5:14 Natielye o vanini nĩthĩwe ũthũkunĩ w’onthe Nĩ nthĩnĩ wa ũmbano na ĩkomano.
Proverbs5:15 Nyusaa manzĩ kuma kĩthimanĩ kyaku mwene kĩla kyakĩtwe
Proverbs5:16 Mbuluti syaku nĩsyaĩle kũnyaĩĩkw’a kũũ na kũũ
Proverbs5:17 Methĩwe kwondũ waku wĩ weka
Proverbs5:18 Nthongo yaku nĩathimwe; Noitanĩa kĩveti kyaku kya ũthoo.
Proverbs5:19 Ta ndaatai nga yĩ wendo na ngondi nga yendeeasya
Proverbs5:20 Nũndũ nĩkĩ we
Proverbs5:21 Nũndũ mĩendele ya mũndũ yĩ mbee wa metho ma Yeova; Na nũtindimalasya nzĩa syake syonthe.
Proverbs5:22 Mothũku make mwene makakwata ũla mũthũku
Proverbs5:23 Akakw’a ũndũ wa kwaa ũmanyĩsyo; Na ũtumanunĩ wake mũnene akaa.

Proverbs6:2 Nũkwatĩtw’e nĩ ndeto sya kanyw’a waku
Proverbs6:3 Ĩka ũũ yu
Proverbs6:4 Ndũkaeke metho maku makome
Proverbs6:5 Ĩvonokye ta kĩlong’a kuma kw’okonĩ kwa mũsyĩmi
Proverbs6:6 Enda vala ve nditikũ
Proverbs6:7 Ila ite mũnene
Proverbs6:8 Syĩyiĩaa lĩu wasyo ĩvinda ya syũa
Proverbs6:9 Ũkakoma kũvika ĩndĩĩ
Proverbs6:10 No kũkomanga vanini
Proverbs6:11 O ta ũu ũkya waku ũkooka ta mũvutani

Proverbs6:14 Ũla ngoonĩ yake ve ngũlũ
Proverbs6:15 Kwondũ wa ũu wanangĩko wake mũnene ũkooka na kĩthũlũmũko; O mĩtũkĩ akaanangĩka vate mũiito.
Proverbs6:16 Ve maũndũ thanthatũ ala Yeova ũmenete; Ĩĩ

Proverbs6:18 Ngoo ĩla ĩsũanĩaa maũndũ mathũku

Proverbs6:20 Mwana wakwa
Proverbs6:21 Myoveee ngoonĩ yaku ĩndĩ yonthe; Myoveee ngingonĩ yaku.
Proverbs6:22 Yĩla wĩendaa ĩkakũtongoeasya; Yĩla wĩkomaa
Proverbs6:23 Nũndũ mwĩao nĩ taa; na mĩao nĩ kyeni; Na mokan’yo ma ũmanyĩsyo nĩ nzĩa ya thayũ:
Proverbs6:24 Kũkũsũvĩa vala ve mũndũ mũka mũthũku
Proverbs6:25 Ndũkew’ĩe mũmbĩlwe wake mũseo ĩtomo ngoonĩ yaku; O na ndũketĩkĩle akũkwate na ilomo sya metho make.
Proverbs6:26 Nũndũ wa ĩlwaya mũndũ mũũme nũvikaa vala ũtonya kwaĩwa nĩ kalungu ka mũkate; Na kĩlaalai nĩkĩsyĩmaa thayũ ũla wĩ vata mũno.
Proverbs6:27 Mũndũ nũtonya kũkua mwaki kĩthũinĩ kyake
Proverbs6:28 Kana mũndũ nũtonya kũkinyĩla ĩũlũ wa makaa me mwaki
Proverbs6:29 No ta ũu ũla ũlikaa kwa kĩveti kya mũtũi wake; O ũla ũkĩkiita ndatĩa kũsilĩlwa.
Proverbs6:30 Andũ mativũthasya kĩng’ei
Proverbs6:31 Ĩndĩ ethĩwa kĩkakwatwa
Proverbs6:32 Ũla wĩkaa ũlaalai na mũndũ mũka nde na ũmanyi: Ũla ũkwenda kwananga ngoo yake mwene nũwĩkaa.
Proverbs6:33 Mawũkite na kwanangĩwa ndaĩa akakwata
Proverbs6:34 Nũndũ kĩwĩu nĩ ũthatu mwai wa mũndũ; Nake ndakew’ĩa tei mũthenya wa kũĩvanĩsya.

Proverbs7:22 Nake nũmũatĩĩaa mĩtũkĩ

Proverbs9:1 Ũĩ nĩwakĩte nyũmba yaw’o; Nĩwasũvĩtye ituĩ mũonza syaw’o:
Proverbs9:2 Nĩwũaĩte nyamũ syaw’o; nũvulanĩtye mbinyu yaw’o; O na nĩwalanĩtye mesa yaw’o:
Proverbs9:3 Nũtũmĩte eĩtu maw’o; Nĩwũkĩlĩlasya wasya kũndũnĩ kũtũlu mbee kwa ndũa:
Proverbs9:4 Ũla ũte na ũĩ
Proverbs9:5 Ũkai
Proverbs9:6 Ekai
Proverbs9:7 Ũla ũmwonasya mũkaakaan’ya mavĩtyo nĩwĩyoseaa kũumangwa; Na ũla ũkanasya mũndũ mũthũku nĩwĩyoseaa ĩlanga.
Proverbs9:8 Ndũkakan’ye mũkaakaan’ya
Proverbs9:9 Manyĩsya mũndũ mũĩ
Proverbs9:10 Kũmũkĩa Yeova nĩkw’o wambĩlĩlyo wa ũĩ; Na kũmũmanya Ũla Mũtheu nĩkw’o ũmanyi.
Proverbs9:11 Nũndũ kwondũ wakwa mĩthenya yaku ĩkaingĩvw’a
Proverbs9:12 Ethwa wĩ mũĩ wĩ mũĩ kwondũ waku mwene; Na ethĩwa nũkaakaanasya
Proverbs9:13 Mũndũ mũka mũtumanu e na kĩlonzo; Nde ũmanyi
