Proverbs9:15 Amete ala meũvĩta
Proverbs9:16 Ũla ũte na ũĩ
Proverbs9:17 Manzĩ moyĩtwe me mũyo
Proverbs9:18 Ĩndĩ ũ mũndũ ndesĩ atĩ akw’ũ me vo; Aeni ma ũ mũndũ mũka me syũngũnĩ sya Seoli.
Proverbs10:1 Nthĩmo sya Solomoni. Mwana mũĩ nũtanĩthasya ĩthe; Ĩndĩ mwana mũtumanu nĩ kĩmako kya inyia wake.
Proverbs10:2 Syĩndũ syũmbanĩtw’e na ũthũku itiunaa; Ĩndĩ ũlũngalu nũvonokasya kuma kĩkw’ũnĩ.
Proverbs10:3 Yeova ndakaeka ngoo ya ũla mũlũngalu ĩnyale; Ĩndĩ nũluutĩĩlaa ũtee kwenda kwa ũla mũthũku.
Proverbs10:4 Ũla ũtethasya wĩa na kw’oko kũleelu nũtw’ĩkaa ngya; Ĩndĩ kw’oko kwa ũla mũthingu nĩkũthuasya.
Proverbs10:5 Ũla wũmbanasya ĩvinda ya syũa nĩ mwana mũĩ; Ĩndĩ ũla ũkomaa ĩvinda ya ngetha nĩ mwana ũla ũsonokasya.
Proverbs10:6 Moathimo me ĩũlũ wa mũtwe wa ũla mũlũngalu; Ĩndĩ ũng’endu nũtumĩaw’a kanyw’anĩ wa ũla mũthũku.
Proverbs10:7 Ũlilikano wa ũla mũlũngalu nĩ mũathimĩku; Ĩndĩ syĩtwa ya mũthũku yĩkoa.
Proverbs10:8 Ala oĩ ngoonĩ makoosa mĩao; Ĩndĩ ndia ĩla ĩvulũkaa ndeto ĩkavalũka.
Proverbs10:9 Ũla ũendaa na mĩendele myaĩlu aendaa na ũĩkĩĩi; Ĩndĩ ũla welelũkasya mĩendele yake akamanyĩka.
Proverbs10:10 Ũla ũvenanĩasya na itho aetae woo; Ĩndĩ ndia ĩla ĩvulũkaa ndeto ĩkavalũka.
Proverbs10:11 Kanyw’a wa alũngalu nĩ nthongo ya thayũ; Ĩndĩ ũng’endu nũtumĩaw’a kanyw’anĩ wa ũla mũthũku.
Proverbs10:12 Kĩmena nĩkyũkĩlasya mateta; Ĩndĩ wendo nũvw’ĩkaa mavĩtyo onthe.
Proverbs10:13 Ũĩ nĩwonekaa ilomonĩ sya ũla ũvathũkanasya maũndũ; Ĩndĩ ndata nĩ ya mũongo wa ũla ũte na ũmanyi.
Proverbs10:14 Andũ oĩ maiaa ũmanyi; Ĩndĩ kanyw’a wa ũla mũtumanu nĩ wanangĩko wa yu.
Proverbs10:15 Syĩndũ sya mũndũ mũthwii nĩ ndũa yake yĩ vinya: Wanangĩko wa ngya nĩ ũkya woo.
Proverbs10:16 Wĩa wa ũla mũlũngalu wangĩe thayũnĩ; Wongeleko wa ũla mũthũku welekele naĩnĩ.
Proverbs10:17 Ũla wĩw’aa aikanw’a e nzĩanĩ ya thayũ; Ĩndĩ ũla ũleaa ũkan’yo nũvĩtasya.
Proverbs10:18 Ũla ũvithaa kĩmena nĩ wa ilomo ineenaa ũvũngũ; Na ũla ũneenaa nzukũ nĩ ndia.
Proverbs10:19 Wingĩnĩ wa ndeto vatyaa ĩvĩtyo; Ĩndĩ ũla ũsiĩĩaa ilomo syake nĩwĩkaa na ũĩ.
Proverbs10:20 Ũĩmĩ wa ũla mũlũngalu nĩ ta vetha mũseo: Ngoo ya ũla mũthũku nĩ ya vata mũnini.
Proverbs10:21 Ilomo sya mũlũngalu niathĩasya aingĩ; Ĩndĩ atumanu makusaa nũndũ wa kwaa ũmanyi.
Proverbs10:22 Ũathimo wa Yeova
Proverbs10:23 Nĩ ta ĩthaũ kwa ndia kwĩka ũthũku; Now’o ũilyĩ ũĩ kwa mũndũ wĩ na ũmanyi.
Proverbs10:24 W’ĩa wa mũthũku
Proverbs10:25 Yĩla kĩlingi kyavĩta
Proverbs10:26 Tondũ siki ũtilyĩ maeonĩ
Proverbs10:27 Kũmũkĩa Yeova nĩkwongelaa mĩthenya; Ĩndĩ myaka ya athũku ĩkakuvĩvw’a.
Proverbs10:28 Wĩkwatyo wa mũlũngalu ũkeethĩwa ũtanu; Ĩndĩ weteelo wa mũthũku ũkaa.
Proverbs10:29 Nzĩa ya Yeova nĩ ngome yĩ vinya kwa mũlũngalu; Ĩndĩ nĩ wanangĩko kwa eki ma naĩ.
Proverbs10:30 Mũlũngalu ndakavetwa nongi; Ĩndĩ mũthũku ndakatũa ĩ nthĩ.
Proverbs10:31 Kanyw’a wa mũlũngalu nĩwumasya ũĩ; Ĩndĩ ũĩmĩ wĩ ngũlũ ũkatilwa.
Proverbs10:32 Ilomo sya mũlũngalu nĩsyĩsĩ kĩla kĩtĩkĩlĩkaa; Ĩndĩ kanyw’a wa mũthũku nũneenaa na ngũlũ.
Proverbs11:1 Kĩthimi kya ũkengani nĩ ũthatyo kwa Yeova; Ĩndĩ ĩvia yĩla yĩthimaa w’o nĩ ũtanu wake.
Proverbs11:2 Yĩla ngathĩĩo yoka
Proverbs11:3 Wĩanĩu wa ala alũngalu ũkamatongoeasya; Ĩndĩ ngũlũ sya nzeleke ikasyananga.
Proverbs11:4 Ũthwii ndwĩuna mũthenya wa ũthilĩku; Ĩndĩ ũlũngalu nũvonokasya kuma kĩkw’ũnĩ
Proverbs11:5 Ũlũngalu wa ũla mwĩanĩu ũkalũngalya mũendele wake; Ĩndĩ ũla mũthũku akavalũka kwondũ wa ũthũku wake mwene.
Proverbs11:6 Ũlũngalu wa ala alũngalu ũkamavonokya; Ĩndĩ nzeleke ikakwatwa nĩ naĩ syasyo.
Proverbs11:7 Yĩla mũndũ mũthũku ũkusaa
Proverbs11:8 Ũla mũlũngalu nũvonokaw’a kuma thĩnanĩ; Na ũla mũthũku nũlikaa vandũ vake.
Proverbs11:9 Mũndũ ũtakĩaa Ngai nĩwanangaa mũtũi wake na kanyw’a wake; Ĩndĩ kwondũ wa ũmanyi ũla mũlũngalu akavonokw’a.
Proverbs11:10 Yĩla kũendaa nesa kwa ala alũngalu
Proverbs11:11 Kwondũ wa ũathimo wa alũngalu ndũa nĩtaĩawa; Ĩndĩ nĩng’uthũlangawa nĩ kanyw’a wa athũku.
Proverbs11:12 Ũla ũvũthasya mũtũi wake nde na ũĩ; Ĩndĩ mũndũ wĩ na ũmanyi nũvindasya.
Proverbs11:13 Ũla wangangaa e mũsukani nũvuanasya nzama; Ĩndĩ ũla wa veva wĩ kĩthito nũvithaa ũndũ.
Proverbs11:14 Vala vate ũtongoi mũĩ
Proverbs11:15 Ũla ũtw’ĩkaa mũĩkĩĩwa kwondũ wa mũeni akathĩnw’a nĩ ũu; Ĩndĩ ũla ũmenaa ũvoo wa ũĩkĩĩthyo ũsu nĩ mwĩyelelu.
Proverbs11:16 Mũndũ mũka mũseo nĩwĩkwatĩlaa ndaĩa; Na andũ ang’endu nĩmekwatĩlaa ũthwii.
Proverbs11:17 Mũndũ wĩ tei nĩwĩkaa ngoo yake nesa; Ĩndĩ ũla mwai nũthĩnasya mwĩĩ wake mwene.
Proverbs11:18 Ũla mũthũku nĩwĩyoseaa ĩtuvi ya ũkengani; Ĩndĩ ũla ũvuĩaa ũlũngalu e na ĩtuvi yĩte ngana.
Proverbs11:19 Ũla mũlũmu ũlũngalunĩ akavikĩa thayũ; Ũla ũatĩĩaa ũthũku ekaa ũu kũvikĩa kĩkw’ũ kyake.
Proverbs11:20 Ala me ngũlũ ngoonĩ nĩ ũthatyo kwa Yeova; Ĩndĩ ala eanĩu mĩendelenĩ yoo nĩ ũtanu wake.
Proverbs11:21 O na ethĩwa kw’oko kũkakwatana na kw’oko
Proverbs11:22 Ta ngome ya thaavu ĩnyiũũnĩ ya ngũlũe
Proverbs11:23 Kwenda kwa alũngalu no ũseo; Ĩndĩ weteelo wa ala athũku nĩ ũthilĩku.
Proverbs11:24 Kwĩ ũla ũnyaĩĩkaa
Proverbs11:25 Mũndũ mũlau akeethĩwa mũnou; Na ũla ũnyithasya akanyithw’a mwene.
Proverbs11:26 Ũla ũimanaa lĩu wa mbaa ngetha
Proverbs11:27 Ũla ũmanthaa ũseo na kĩthing’ĩĩsyo nũmanthaa ũndũ ũseo; Ĩndĩ ũla ũmanthaa ũthũku
Proverbs11:28 Ũla ũĩkĩĩaa ũthwii wake akavalũka; Ĩndĩ ũla mũlũngalu akaaĩlaa ta ĩtũ yĩũ.
Proverbs11:29 Ũla ũthĩnasya nyũmba yake mwene akatiĩwa kĩseve; Na ũla mũtumanu akeethĩwa mũthũkũmi wa ũla mũĩ ngoo.
Proverbs11:30 Ũsyao wa ũla mũlũngalu nĩ mũtĩ wa thayũ; Na ũla mũĩ nĩwĩtĩkĩlĩthasya andũ.
Proverbs11:31 Sisya
Proverbs12:1 O ũla wendaa kwonw’a mavĩtyo eendaa ũmanyi; Ĩndĩ ũla ũmenaa ũkan’yo nĩ ta nyamũ.
Proverbs12:2 Mũndũ mũseo akoona ũseo kwa Yeova; Ĩndĩ mũndũ wa mosũanĩo mathũku akamũtw’a mũvĩtan’ya.
Proverbs12:3 Mũndũ ndakalũlũmĩlw’a nĩ ũthũku; Ĩndĩ mũi wa ũla mũlũngalu ndũkathingithangw’a.
Proverbs12:4 Mũndũ mũka mwaĩlu nĩ ngovia ya ũsumbĩ ya mũũme wake; Ĩndĩ ũla ũsonokasya nĩ ta wou mavĩndĩnĩ make.
Proverbs12:5 Mosũanĩo ma ala alũngalu nĩ ma katĩ; Ĩndĩ motao ma ala athũku nĩ ũkengani.
Proverbs12:6 Ndeto sya ala athũku nĩ sya kwoveesya nthakame; Ĩndĩ kanyw’a wa ala alũngalu ũkamavonokya.
Proverbs12:7 Ala athũku nĩmanangawa
Proverbs12:8 Mũndũ akataĩwa kwĩanana na ũĩ wake; Ĩndĩ ũla wĩ na ngoo yĩ ngũlũ akavũthw’a.
Proverbs12:9 E kavaa ũla ũtalawa ta vathei
Proverbs12:10 Mũndũ mũlũngalu nũsiasya thayũ wa nyamũ yake; Ĩndĩ matei mololo ma ũla mũthũku no wai.
Proverbs12:11 Ũla ũĩmaa nthĩ yake akeethĩwa na lĩu mwingĩ; Ĩndĩ ũla ũatĩĩaa andũ mate kĩĩĩ nde na ũmanyi.
Proverbs12:12 Ũla mũthũku nĩwendaa kĩtei kya ala athe; Ĩndĩ mũi wa ũla mũlũngalu nũsyaa ũsyao.
Proverbs12:13 Ĩvĩtyonĩ ya ilomo ve kĩtei kwa mũndũ mũthũku; Ĩndĩ ũla mũlũngalu akauma thĩnanĩ.
Proverbs12:14 Mũndũ akeanĩw’a nĩ ũseo kwondũ wa ũsyao wa kanyw’a wake; Na meko ma moko ma mũndu makatũngwa kwake.
Proverbs12:15 Nzĩa ya ndia nĩ ya w’o methonĩ mayo e yo; Ĩndĩ ũla mũĩ nĩwĩthukĩĩasya ũtao.
Proverbs12:16 Ũthatu wa ndia nũmanyĩkaa ũtheinĩ; Ĩndĩ mũndũ wĩ kĩlĩko nũvithaa nthoni.
Proverbs12:17 Ũla ũneenaa w’o nĩwonanasya ũlũngalu; Ĩndĩ ngũsĩ ya ũvũngũ
Proverbs12:18 Ve ũla ũneenaa mĩtũkĩ ateũsũanĩa ta kũtonyanga kwa ũvyũ; Ĩndĩ ũĩmĩ wa ũla mũĩ nũvoasya.
Proverbs12:19 Kĩlomo kya w’o kĩkalũlũmĩlw’a tene na tene; Ĩndĩ ĩũmĩ ũneenaa ũvũngũ no wa kavinda kanini.
Proverbs12:20 Ũkengani wĩ ngoonĩ ya ala masũanĩaa ũthũku; Ĩndĩ ala maseũvasya maũndũ ma mũuo kwoo nĩ ũtanu.
Proverbs12:21 Vati ũthũku ũkekĩka kwa ũla mũlũngalu; Ĩndĩ ũla mũthũku akausũwa nĩ ũthũku.
Proverbs12:22 Ilomo ila ineenaa ũvũngũ nĩ ũthatyo kwa Yeova; Ĩndĩ ala mekaa w’o nĩ ũtanu wake.
Proverbs12:23 Mũndũ wĩ kĩlĩko nũvithaa ũmanyi; Ĩndĩ ngoo ya ndia nĩtavanasya ũtumanu.
Proverbs12:24 Kw’oko kwa ũla mũthingu kũkasumbĩka; Ĩndĩ ũla mũtulu akathũkũmĩthw’a.
Proverbs12:25 Kĩmako ngoonĩ ya mũndũ nĩkĩminamasya; Ĩndĩ ndeto nzeo nĩmĩtanasya.
Proverbs12:26 Ũla mũlũngalu nĩ mũtongoi wa mũtũi wake; Ĩndĩ mũendele wa ala athũku nũmavĩtĩthasya.
Proverbs12:27 Mũndũ mũtulu ndavĩvasya kĩla wosaa aisyĩma; Syĩndũ syĩ vata mũno sya andũ nĩ kwondũ wa ala athingu.
Proverbs12:28 Mũendelenĩ wa ũlũngalu ve thayũ; Na nzĩanĩ yaw’o vati kĩkw’ũ.
Proverbs13:1 Mwana mũĩ nĩwĩw’aa ũmanyĩsyo wa ĩthe wake; Ĩndĩ mũkaakaan’ya ndew’aa ũkan’yo.
Proverbs13:2 Mũndũ akaya ũseo kwondũ wa ũsyao wa kanyw’a wake; Ĩndĩ ngoo ya nzeleke ĩkaya ũng’endu.
Proverbs13:3 Ũla ũsũvĩaa kanyw’a wake nĩwĩkalasya thayũ wake; Ĩndĩ ũla ũtumũkanganasya ilomo syake mũno akeethĩwa na wanangĩko.
Proverbs13:4 Ngoo ya ũla mũtulu nĩyendaa
Proverbs13:5 Mũndũ mũlũngalu nũmenaa movũngũ; Ĩndĩ mũndũ mũthũku nĩ ũtiiki
Proverbs13:6 Ũlũngalu nũsũvĩaa ũla mũlũngalu nzĩanĩ; Ĩndĩ ũthũku nĩwanangaa mũndũ mwathe.
Proverbs13:7 Kwĩ ũla wĩthuasya
Proverbs13:8 Mbovosya ya thayũ wa mũndũ nĩ ũthwii wake; Ĩndĩ ngya ndĩw’aa ũkan’yo.
Proverbs13:9 Kyeni kya ũla mũlũngalu nĩkĩtanaa; Ĩndĩ taa wa ũla mũthũku ũkavow’a.
Proverbs13:10 Kwondũ wa ngathĩĩo nĩkũkaa ngananĩo; Ĩndĩ kwa ala mataawa nesa kwĩ ũĩ.
Proverbs13:11 Ũthwii ũla wonekaa na nzĩa ĩtaĩle ũkaolwa; Ĩndĩ ũla ũmbanasya kwondũ wa wĩa akeethĩwa na wongeleko.
Proverbs13:12 Wĩkwatyo ũla ũtĩaa nũwaasya ngoo; Ĩndĩ kĩla kyendetwe kyooka
Proverbs13:13 O ũla ũvũthasya ndeto nĩwĩeteae wanangĩko; Ĩndĩ ũla ũkĩaa mwĩao akatuvwa.
Proverbs13:14 Mwĩao wa ũla mũĩ nĩ nthongo ya thayũ
Proverbs13:15 Ũmanyi mũseo nũetae ũseo; Ĩndĩ nzĩa ya mũvĩtan’ya nĩ nyũmũ.
Proverbs13:16 Kĩla mũndũ wĩ kĩlĩko nũtethasya wĩa na ũmanyi; Ĩndĩ ndia nĩyonanasya ũtumanu wayo.
Proverbs13:17 Mũtũmwa mũthũku nũvalũkaa naĩnĩ; Ĩndĩ mũtũmwa wĩ kĩthito nĩ wa ũvosya.
Proverbs13:18 Ũkya na nthoni ikeethĩwa sya ũla ũleaa kwonw’a mavĩtyo; Ĩndĩ ũla wĩtĩkĩlaa ũkan’yo akataĩwa.
Proverbs13:19 Ũla wendetwe weanĩw’a nĩ mũyo wa ngoo; Ĩndĩ nĩ ũthatyo kwa ndia kũtia naĩ.
Proverbs13:20 Endaa na andũ oĩ
Proverbs13:21 Ũthũku nũatĩĩaa andũ athe; Ĩndĩ ala alũngalu makaĩvwa ũseo.
Proverbs13:22 Mũndũ mũseo nũtiĩaa esũkũũe make ũtiĩwa; Na ũthwii wa mũndũ mwathe wiawa kwondũ wa alũngalu.
Proverbs13:23 Lĩu mwingĩ wĩ kũĩmanĩ kwa ngya; Ĩndĩ kwĩ kĩla kyanangĩtwe kwondũ wa ũsili ũte wa katĩ.
Proverbs13:24 Ũla ũimaa mwana wake ndata yake nũmenaa mwana wake; Ĩndĩ ũla ũmwendaa nũmũkũnaa mavinda maĩle.
Proverbs13:25 Ũla mũlũngalu nũĩsaa akavũn’ya thayũ wake; Ĩndĩ ĩvu ya ũla mũthũku yĩkeew’a nzaa.
Proverbs14:1 Kĩla mũndũ mũka mũĩ nĩwakaa nyũmba yake; Ĩndĩ ũla mũtumanu nũomboaa na moko make mwene.
Proverbs14:2 Ũla ũkinyaa ũlũngalunĩ wake nũkĩaa Yeova; Ĩndĩ ũla wĩ ngũlũ mĩendelenĩ yake nũmũvũthasya.
Proverbs14:3 Kanyw’anĩ wa ũla mũtumanu ve ndata kwondũ wa ngathĩĩo yake; Ĩndĩ ilomo sya ala oĩ ikamasũvĩa.
Proverbs14:4 Vala vate ng’ombe
Proverbs14:5 Ngũsĩ yĩ kĩthito ndĩneenaa ũvũngũ; Ĩndĩ ngũsĩ ngengani ĩneenaa movũngũ.
Proverbs14:6 Mũkaakaan’ya nũmanthaa ũĩ
Proverbs14:7 Lika vala va mũndũ mũtumanu
Proverbs14:8 Ũĩ wa ũla wĩ kĩlĩko nĩ kũmanya mũendele wake; Ĩndĩ ũtumanu wa ndia nĩ ũkengani.
Proverbs14:9 Nthembo kwondũ wa ĩvĩtyo nĩthekeeawa nĩ ndia; Ĩndĩ katĩ wa alũngalu kwĩ kwendana kũseo.
Proverbs14:10 Ngoo nĩyĩsĩ ũũ wayo e yo; Na mũeni ndelikasya ũtanunĩ wayo.
Proverbs14:11 Nyũmba ya ũla mũthũku ĩkang’uthũlwa; Ĩndĩ ĩeema ya ũla mũlũngalu yĩkaathimĩka.
Proverbs14:12 Ve nzĩa ĩla ĩilyĩ ta ya w’o kwa mũndũ; Ĩndĩ mũminũkĩlyo wayo nĩ nzĩa sya kĩkw’ũ.
Proverbs14:13 O na kũthekanĩ ngoo yĩ na woo; Na mũminũkĩlyo wa ũtanu nĩ kĩmako.
Proverbs14:14 Ũla ũsyokete na ĩtina ngoonĩ yake akausũwa nĩ mĩendele yake mwene; Na mũndũ mũseo akeanĩw’a kuma nthĩnĩ wake mwene.
Proverbs14:15 Ũla ũte ũmanyi nĩwĩtĩkĩlaa kĩla ndeto; Ĩndĩ ũla wĩ kĩlĩko asiasya ũndũ ũendaa.
Proverbs14:16 Mũndũ mũĩ nũkĩaa na kũtia ũthũku; Ĩndĩ ndia nĩendaa yĩng’athĩlĩtye
Proverbs14:17 Ũla ũthataa mĩtũkĩ akeka na ũtumanu; Na mũndũ wĩ mosũanĩo mathũku nũmenawa.
Proverbs14:18 Ala mate ũmanyi matiĩawa ũtumanu; Ĩndĩ ala me kĩlĩko mekĩawa ngovia ya ũmanyi.
Proverbs14:19 Ala athe makunamaa mbee wa ala aseo; Na ala athũku
Proverbs14:20 Ngya nĩmenawa o na nĩ mũtũi wayo mwene; Ĩndĩ mũthwii e na anyanyae aingĩ.
Proverbs14:21 Ũla ũvũthasya mũtũi wake nĩwĩkaa naĩ; Ĩndĩ ũla ũsyĩw’ĩaa ngya tei nĩ mũtanu.
Proverbs14:22 Maivĩtasya ala masũanĩaa ũthũku? Ĩndĩ tei na w’o ikeethĩwa sya ala masũanĩaa ũseo.
Proverbs14:23 Wĩanĩ w’onthe ve ũtandĩthyo; Ĩndĩ kũneena kwa ilomo kwangĩĩtye ũkyanĩ.
Proverbs14:24 Ngovia ya ũsumbĩ ya ala oĩ nĩ ũthwii woo; Ĩndĩ ũtumanu wa ndia no ũtumanu.
Proverbs14:25 Ngũsĩ ya w’o nĩvonokasya mathayũ; Ĩndĩ ũla ũneenaa movũngũ nũkenganaa.
Proverbs14:26 Nthĩnĩ wa kũmũkĩa Yeova ve ũĩkĩĩi wĩ vinya; Na syana syake ikeethĩwa na wĩvitho.
Proverbs14:27 Kũmũkĩa Yeova nĩ nthongo ya thayũ
Proverbs14:28 Wingĩnĩ wa andũ nĩvo ve ndaĩa ya mũsumbĩ; Ĩndĩ ũolekunĩ wa andũ ve wanangĩko wa mũnene wĩ mbee ũsumbĩnĩ.
Proverbs14:29 Ũla mũmĩĩsya wa kũthata nĩ wa ũmanyi mwingĩ; Ĩndĩ ũla wĩ mĩtũkĩ vevanĩ nũnenevasya ũtumanu.
Proverbs14:30 Ngoo nduu nĩ thayũ wa mwĩĩ; Ĩndĩ kĩwĩu nĩ wou wa mavĩndĩ.
Proverbs14:31 Ũla ũthĩnasya ngya nũvũthasya Mũmbi wake; Ĩndĩ ũla ũmew’ĩaa athĩni tei nũmũtaĩaa.
Proverbs14:32 Ũla mũthũku nũtheeaw’a kwĩkanĩ kwake kũthũku; Ĩndĩ ũla mũlũngalu kĩkw’ũnĩ kyake e na wĩvitho.
Proverbs14:33 Ũĩ nĩwĩkalaa ngoonĩ ya ũla wĩ na ũmanyi; Ĩndĩ kĩla kĩ nthĩnĩ wa ndia nĩkĩvuanaw’a.
Proverbs14:34 Ũlũngalu nũnenevasya mbaĩ; Ĩndĩ naĩ nĩvũthĩthasya ũko o na wĩva wa andũ.
Proverbs14:35 Wonan’yo wa ũseo wa mũsumbĩ welekele mũthũkũmi ũla wĩkaa na ũĩ; Ĩndĩ ũthilĩku wake ũkeethĩwa ĩũlũ wa ũla ũsonokasya.
Proverbs15:1 Ũsũngĩo mwololo nũthyũũaa ũthilĩku; Ĩndĩ ndeto mbai nĩyũkĩlasya ũthatu.
Proverbs15:2 Ũĩmĩ wa ala oĩ nũneenaa ũmanyi katĩ; Ĩndĩ kanyw’a wa ndia nĩwonoasya ũtumanu.
Proverbs15:3 Metho ma Yeova me kĩla vandũ
Proverbs15:4 Ũĩmĩ mũuu nĩ mũtĩ wa thayũ; Ĩndĩ ngũlũ syaw’o nĩ kũtũlĩka kwa veva.
Proverbs15:5 Ndia nĩvũthasya kwonw’a mavĩtyo nĩ ĩthe wayo; Ĩndĩ ũla wĩtĩkĩlaa ũkan’yo nĩwosaa kĩlĩko.
Proverbs15:6 Nyũmbanĩ ya mũlũngalu ve ũthwii mwie mwingĩ; Ĩndĩ motandĩthyonĩ ma ala athũku ve thĩna.
Proverbs15:7 Ilomo sya ala oĩ ninyaĩĩkasya ũmanyi; Ĩndĩ ngoo ya mũtumanu ndĩkaa ũu.
Proverbs15:8 Nthembo ya ũla mũthũku nĩ ũthatyo kwa Yeova; Ĩndĩ mboya ya ũla mũlũngalu nĩ ũtanu wake.
Proverbs15:9 Mũendele wa ũla mũthũku nĩ ũthatyo kwa Yeova; Ĩndĩ nũmwendaa ũla ũatĩĩaa ũlũngalu.
Proverbs15:10 Ve kũsilĩlwa kwai kwa ũla ũtiaa ĩ nzĩa; Na ũla ũmenaa kũkanw’a akakw’a.
Proverbs15:11 Seoli na Avatoni kwĩ ũtheinĩ mbee wa Yeova; Nĩ mbee veana ata ngoo sya ana ma andũ!
Proverbs15:12 Mũkaakaan’ya ndendaa kũkanw’a; Ndaendaa kwa ũla mũĩ.
Proverbs15:13 Ngoo ndanu nĩtanĩthasya ũthyũ; Ĩndĩ ũndũ wa woo wa ngoo veva nũtũlĩkaa.
Proverbs15:14 Ngoo ya ũla wĩ na ũmanyi nĩmanthaa ũĩ; Ĩndĩ kanyw’a wa ndia nũĩsaa ũtumanu.
Proverbs15:15 Mĩthenya yonthe ya ala mathĩnaa nĩ mĩthũku; Ĩndĩ ũla wĩ na ngoo ndanu e na mboka ĩtatw’ĩkanaa.
Proverbs15:16 Kavaa kĩndũ kĩnini
Proverbs15:17 Kavaa kũya nyũnyi
Proverbs15:18 Mũndũ mũthilĩku nĩwũkĩlasya ngananĩo; Ĩndĩ mũmĩĩsya wa kũthata mũuasya ĩteta.
Proverbs15:19 Nzĩa ya ũla mũtulu ĩilyĩ ta wiio wa mĩw’a; Ĩndĩ nzĩa ya ũla mũlũngalu nĩtw’ĩkĩthaw’a lelũ.
Proverbs15:20 Mwana mũĩ nũtanĩthasya ĩthe; Ĩndĩ mũndũ mũtumanu nũvũthasya inyia wake.
Proverbs15:21 Ũtumanu nĩ ũtanu kwa ũla ũte na ũĩ; Ĩndĩ mũndũ wĩ na ũmanyi nũlũngalasya mũendele wake.
Proverbs15:22 Vala vate ũtao
Proverbs15:23 Mũndũ e na ũtanu ũsũngĩonĩ wa kanyw’a wake; Na ndeto ĩvindanĩ yayo
Proverbs15:24 Kwa ũla mũĩ nzĩa ya thayũ ĩelete ĩũlũ
Proverbs15:25 Yeova akakũanĩsya na mĩi nyũmba ya ekathĩĩi; Ĩndĩ akalũlũmĩlya mũvaka wa mũndũ mũka ndiwa.
Proverbs15:26 Mosũanĩo mathũku nĩ ũthatyo kwa Yeova; Ĩndĩ ndeto nzeo nĩ ntheu.
Proverbs15:27 Ũla wĩ na ĩtomo ya ũtandĩthyo nũthĩnasya nyũmba yake mwene; Ĩndĩ ũla ũmenaa mavaki akekala thayũ.
Proverbs15:28 Ngoo ya ũla mũlũngalu nĩsũanĩaa kũsũngĩa; Ĩndĩ kanyw’a wa ũla mũthũku nĩwonoasya maũndũ mathũku.
Proverbs15:29 Yeova e kũasa na ũla mũthũku; Ĩndĩ nĩwĩw’aa mboya ya ũla mũlũngalu.
Proverbs15:30 Kyeni kya metho nĩkĩtanasya ngoo; Na maũvoo maseo manoasya mavĩndĩ.
Proverbs15:31 Kũtũ kũla kwĩthukĩĩasya ũkan’yo wa thayũ Kũkekala katĩ wa ala oĩ.
Proverbs15:32 Ũla ũleaa kwonw’a mavĩtyo nũvũthasya thayũ wake mwene; Ĩndĩ ũla wĩthukĩĩasya ũkan’yo nĩwosaa ũmanyi.
Proverbs15:33 Kũmũkĩa Yeova nĩ ũmanyĩsyo wa ũĩ; Na wĩnyivyo ũtongoeasya ndaĩa.
Proverbs16:1 Maũndũ maseũvye ma ngoo nĩ ma mũndũ; Ĩndĩ ũsũngĩo wa ũĩmĩ wumaa vala ve Yeova.
Proverbs16:2 Mĩendele yonthe ya mũndũ nĩ mĩtheu methonĩ make mwene; Ĩndĩ Yeova athimaa maveva.
Proverbs16:3 Mwiĩe Yeova mawĩa maku
Proverbs16:4 Yeova nũseũvĩtye kĩla kĩndũ na kĩtumi kyakyo; Ĩĩ
Proverbs16:5 Kĩla mũndũ ũla wĩ na ngathĩĩo ngoonĩ nĩ ũthatyo kwa Yeova: O na ethĩwa kw’oko kũkakwatana na kw’oko
Proverbs16:6 Kwondũ wa tei na w’o ũthũku nũvw’ĩkĩkaa; Na kwondũ wa kũmũkĩa Yeova andũ nĩmatiaa ũthũku.
Proverbs16:7 Yĩla mĩendele ya mũndũ yendeesya Yeova
Proverbs16:8 Kavaa kĩndũ kĩnini
Proverbs16:9 Ngoo ya mũndũ nĩsũanĩaa nzĩa yake; Ĩndĩ Yeova atongoeasya matambya make.
Proverbs16:10 Ũvuan’yo mwaĩlu wĩ ilomonĩ sya mũsumbĩ; Kanyw’a wake ndũkavĩtya kũtw’anĩ.
Proverbs16:11 Kĩthimi kya w’o na latili sya w’o nĩ sya Yeova; Mavia onthe ma mũvuko ala mathimaa nĩ wĩa wake.
Proverbs16:12 Nĩ ũthatyo kwa asumbĩ kwĩka ũthũku; Nũndũ kĩvĩla kya ũsumbĩ nĩkĩlũmaw’a nĩ ũlũngalu.
Proverbs16:13 Ilomo ila ineenaa ũlũngalu nĩ ũtanu wa asumbĩ; Na mamwendaa ũla ũneenaa w’o.
Proverbs16:14 Ũthilĩku wa mũsumbĩ nĩ ta atũmwa ma kĩkw’ũ; Ĩndĩ mũndũ mũĩ akoousya.
Proverbs16:15 Kyeninĩ kya ũthyũ wa mũsumbĩ ve thayũ; Na kwonan’ya kwake kwa ũseo nĩ ta ĩthweo ya mbua ya uũa.
Proverbs16:16 Kaĩ nĩ kavaa mũno kwĩthĩwa na ũĩ kwĩ thaavu! Ĩĩ
Proverbs16:17 Lelũ wa ala alũngalu nĩ kũtia ũthũku; Ũla ũsũvĩaa mũendele wake nũsũvĩaa thayũ wake.
Proverbs16:18 Ngathĩĩo nĩtongoeasya wanangĩko
Proverbs16:19 Nĩ kavaa kwĩthĩwa na veva wa wĩnyivyo vamwe na ngya
Proverbs16:20 Ũla wĩthukĩĩasya ndeto akona ũseo; Na ũla ũmũĩkĩĩaa Yeova nĩ mũtanu.
Proverbs16:21 Ala oĩ ngoonĩ maketwa ma kĩlĩko; Na mũyo wa ilomo nĩwingĩvasya momanyĩsyo.
Proverbs16:22 Ũmanyi nĩ mbuluti ya thayũ kwa ũla wĩ naw’o; Ĩndĩ kwonw’a mavĩtyo kwa ndia nĩ ũtumanu wasyo.
Proverbs16:23 Ngoo ya ũla mũĩ nĩmanyĩasya kanyw’a wake. Na kwongela ũmanyĩsyo ilomonĩ syake.
Proverbs16:24 Ndeto nzeo nĩ ta ĩwa
Proverbs16:25 Ve nzĩa ĩla ĩilyĩ ta ya w’o kwa mũndũ
Proverbs16:26 Nzaa ya mũthũkũmi nĩthũkũmaa kwondũ wake; Nũndũ kanyw’a wake nũmũthing’ĩĩsya.
Proverbs16:27 Mũndũ ũte kĩĩĩ nũsũanĩaa ũthũku; Na ilomonĩ syake kwĩ ta mwaki ũvĩvasya.
Proverbs16:28 Mũndũ wĩ ngũlũ nũnyaĩĩkasya ĩteta; Na ũla ũneenaa na kĩwe ataanasya anyanya anene.
Proverbs16:29 Mũndũ mũng’endu asengasengaa mũtũĩ wake
Proverbs16:30 Ũla ũlalasya metho make
Proverbs16:31 Mũtwe wĩ mbuĩ nĩ ngovia ya ũsumbĩ ya ndaĩa; Ũkooneka nzĩanĩ ya ũlũngalu.
Proverbs16:32 Mũmĩĩsya wa kũthata e kavaa kwĩ ũla wĩ na ũtonyi; Na ũla ũsumbĩkaa veva wake
Proverbs16:33 Mũlimano nĩwĩkĩtwe ngũanĩ; Ĩndĩ ũndũ ũkethĩwa no kwondũ wa Yeova.
Proverbs17:1 Nĩ kavaa kalungu komũ ka ũya
Proverbs17:2 Mũthũkũmi ũla wĩkaa na ũĩ akasumbĩka mwana ũla ũsonokasya
Proverbs17:3 Na mbisũ ya kũthesya nĩ kwondũ wa vetha
Proverbs17:4 Mwĩki wa naĩ nĩwĩthukĩĩasya ilomo nthũku; Na mũneeni wa ũvũngũ nũteaa kũtũ ew’e ũĩmĩ mũthũku.
Proverbs17:5 Ũla ũthekeeaa ngya nũvũthasya Mũmbi wake; Na ũla ũtanaw’a nĩ wanangĩko mũnene ndakatĩa kũkũnwa.
Proverbs17:6 Nzũkũlũ nĩ ngovia ya ũsumbĩ ya andũ akũũ; Na ũtaĩo wa syana nĩ aaĩthe masyo.
Proverbs17:7 Kũneena kũseo kũtiaĩle ndia; Nĩ mbee mũno ilomo ila ineenaa ũvũngũ kũlea kwaĩla mũnene wĩ mbee ũsumbĩnĩ.
Proverbs17:8 Ĩvaki nĩ ta kavila ke thooa mũnene methonĩ ma ũla wĩ nayo; O vala yĩelekela
Proverbs17:9 Ũla ũvw’ĩkaa ĩvĩtyo nũmanthaa wendo; Ĩndĩ ũla ũtindaa aineena ũndũ
Proverbs17:10 Ũkan’yo ũlikaa mũno mũndũnĩ wĩ na ũmanyi Kwĩ makũnwa ĩana nthĩnĩ wa ndia.
Proverbs17:11 Mũndũ mũthũku nũmanthaa no ũng’endu; Kwondũ wa ũu mũtũmwa mwai akatũmwa okite nake.
Proverbs17:12 Kavaa nduva ĩvenetwe tũswii twayo kũkomana na mũndũ
Proverbs17:13 Ũla ũtũngaa ũthũku vandũ va ũseo
Proverbs17:14 Wambĩlĩlyo wa ĩteta nĩ ta yĩla mũndũ wavũthũa manzĩ; Kwondũ wa ũu eka ngananĩo
Proverbs17:15 Ũla ũtalĩlaa athũku ũlũngalu
Proverbs17:16 Nĩkĩ mbesa syĩ kw’okonĩ kwa ndia ĩthooe ũĩ
Proverbs17:17 Mũnyanya nĩwendanaa ĩndĩ yonthe; Na mwana‐a‐ĩthe asyaiwe kwondũ wa kũthĩnũkasya.
Proverbs17:18 Mũndũ ũte ũmanyi nũkwatanasya moko
Proverbs17:19 Ũla wendaa ĩteta endaa ĩvĩtyo: Ũla ũkĩlasya mbingĩlo yake ĩũlũ mũno nũmanthaa wanangĩko.
Proverbs17:20 Ũla wĩ na ngoo ngengani ndonaa ũseo o na wĩva; Na ũla wĩ na ũĩmĩ wĩ ngũlũ nũvalũkaa ũthũkunĩ.
Proverbs17:21 Ũla ũsyaaa ndia ekaa ũu kwa woo wake; Na ĩthe wa ndia nde na ũtanu nongi.
Proverbs17:22 Ngoo ndanu nĩ mũiito mũseo; Ĩndĩ veva mũtũlĩku ũtumaa mavĩndĩ moma.
Proverbs17:23 Mũndũ mũthũku nĩwosaa ĩvaki kuma kĩthũinĩ
Proverbs17:24 Ũĩ wĩ mbee wa ũthyũ wa ũla wĩ na ũmanyi; Ĩndĩ metho ma ndia me itulunĩ sya nthĩ.
Proverbs17:25 Mwana mũtumanu nĩ woo kwa ĩthe wake
Proverbs17:26 O na kũsilĩla ala alũngalu ti ũseo
Proverbs17:27 Ũla ũsũvĩaa ndeto syake e na ũĩ; Na ũla wĩ na veva mũuu nĩ mũndũ wĩ na ũmanyi.
Proverbs17:28 O na ndia
Proverbs18:1 Ũla wĩvathaa amanthaa kwenda kwake mwene
Proverbs18:2 Ndia ndĩtanĩaa ũmanyi
Proverbs18:3 Yĩla mũthũku woka
Proverbs18:4 Ndeto sya kanyw’a wa mũndũ nĩ ta syũngũ; Mbuluti ya ũĩ nĩ ta kalũsĩ kavĩtĩtye.
Proverbs18:5 Kwendeesya mũndũ mũthũku ti ũseo
Proverbs18:6 Ilomo sya ndia nilikaa ngananĩonĩ
Proverbs18:7 Kanyw’a wa ndia nĩ wanangĩko wayo
Proverbs18:8 Ndeto sya ũla ũneenaa na kĩwe nĩ ta tũlungu tũseo twa lĩu
Proverbs18:9 O na ũla mũleelu wĩanĩ wake Nĩ mwana‐a‐inyia wa mwanangi.
Proverbs18:10 Syĩtwa ya Yeova nĩ mwako mũtũlu wa mũnyoolo
Proverbs18:11 Syĩndũ sya mũndũ mũthwii nĩ ndũa yake yĩ vinya
Proverbs18:12 Wanangĩko ũtanamba kũka ngoo ya mũndũ yĩ na wĩng’athĩlĩlyo; Na wĩnyivyo ũtongoeasya ndaĩa.
Proverbs18:13 Ũla ũsũngĩaa atanamba kwĩw’a
Proverbs18:14 Veva wa mũndũ ũkatw’ĩĩka wonzu wake; Ĩndĩ veva mũtũlĩku nũũ ũtonya kũmĩĩsya?
Proverbs18:15 Ngoo ya ũla wĩ na kĩlĩko nĩyosaa ũmanyi; Na kũtũ kwa ũla mũĩ nĩkũmanthaa ũmanyi.
Proverbs18:16 Mũthĩnzĩo wa mũndũ nũmwonasya mwanya
Proverbs18:17 Ũla wambaa kũtetea ũvoo wake nĩwonekaa ta mũlũngalu; Ĩndĩ mũtũi wake ooka nũmũvuanasya.
Proverbs18:18 Kũlimana nĩkũtumaa ngananĩo ithela
Proverbs18:19 Mwana‐a‐asa alulutĩkw’a nĩ vinya kũtũngĩka kwĩ ndũa yĩ vinya; Na ngananĩo ta isu nĩ ta ivingi sya nyũmba nene yĩ kĩemo.
Proverbs18:20 Ĩvu ya mũndũ yĩkausũw’a nĩ ũsyao wa kanyw’a wake; Akeanĩaw’a nĩ wingĩvo wa ilomo syake.
Proverbs18:21 Kĩkw’ũ na thayũ syĩ vinyanĩ wa ũĩmĩ; Na ala mawendaa makaĩsaa ũsyao waw’o.
Proverbs18:22 Ũla ũmeasya kĩveti nũmeasya kĩndũ kĩseo; Na kwona ũseo kuma kwa Yeova.
Proverbs18:23 Ngya nĩsyĩsũvanaa; Ĩndĩ athwii masũngĩaa na vinya.
Proverbs18:24 Ũla ũtumaa ndũũ na andũ aingĩ ekaa ũu ũndũ wa wanangĩko wake mwene; Ĩndĩ ve mũnyanya ũla ũlũmanasya mũno kwĩ mwana‐a‐inyia.
Proverbs19:1 Kavaa ngya ĩla ĩkinyaa wĩanĩũnĩ wayo Kwĩ ũla wĩ na ngũlũ ilomonĩ syake na nĩ ndia.
Proverbs19:2 O na ĩngĩ
Proverbs19:3 Ũtumanu wa mũndũ nũthũkasya mũendele wake; Na ngoo yake nĩmũnyungunyĩasya Yeova.
Proverbs19:4 Ũthwii nĩwongelaa anyanya aingĩ; Ĩndĩ ngya nĩtaanaw’a na mũnyanyae wayo.
Proverbs19:5 Ngũsĩ ya ũvũngũ ndĩkatĩa kũkũnwa; Na ũla ũneenaa movũngũ ndakavonoka.
Proverbs19:6 Aingĩ makeesũva ũseo wa mũndũ mũlau; Na kĩla mũndũ nĩ mũnyanya wa ũla ũnenganae mĩthĩnzĩo.
Proverbs19:7 Ana‐a‐inyia onthe ma ngya nĩmamĩmenaa: Nĩ mbee veana ata anyanyae mayo kũthi kũasa nayo! Nũmaatĩĩaa na ndeto
Proverbs19:8 Ũla wĩthĩawa na ũĩ nĩwendaa thayũ wake mwene: Ũla ũsũvĩaa ũmanyi akoona ũseo.
Proverbs19:9 Ngũsĩ ya ũvũngũ ndĩkatĩa kũkũnwa; Na ũla ũneenaa movũngũ akaaa.
Proverbs19:10 Maũndũ ala mendeeasya thayũ ti maĩlu kwondũ wa ndia; Nĩ mbee veana ata kũlea kwaĩla
Proverbs19:11 Kĩlĩko kya mũndũ nĩkĩtumaa ethĩwa mũmĩĩsya wa kũthata; Na nĩ ndaĩa yake kũekea ĩvĩtyo.
Proverbs19:12 Ũthilĩku wa mũsumbĩ nĩ ta kũluma kwa mũnyambũ; Ĩndĩ kwonan’ya kwake kwa ũseo nĩ ta ĩmwe nyekinĩ.
Proverbs19:13 Mwana mũtumanu nĩ wanangĩko mũnene wa ĩthe wake; Na mateta ma kĩveti nĩ kũvolotanga kũtatw’ĩkanaa.
Proverbs19:14 Nyũmba na mothwii nĩ ũtiĩwa kuma kwa aaĩthe; Ĩndĩ kĩveti kĩ kĩlĩko kyumaa kwa Yeova.
Proverbs19:15 Ũtulu nĩwĩkasya toonĩ mũnene; Na mũndũ mũtulu akeew’aa nzaa.
Proverbs19:16 Ũla ũkwataa mwĩao nũsũvĩaa thayũ wake; Ĩndĩ ũla ũte kĩio ũndũ wa mĩendele yake akakw’a.
Proverbs19:17 Ũla wĩw’ĩaa ngya tei akovethasya Yeova
Proverbs19:18 Kũna mwana waku
Proverbs19:19 Mũndũ wa ũthilĩku mũnene akakua ũsilĩlo
Proverbs19:20 Ĩw’a ũtao
Proverbs19:21 Kwĩ mosũanĩo maingĩ ngoonĩ ya mũndũ; Ĩndĩ ũtao wa Yeova
Proverbs19:22 Kĩla kĩtuma mũndũ kwendwa nĩ ũseo wake; Na mũndũ ngya e kavaa kwĩ mũneeni wa ũvũngũ.
Proverbs19:23 Kũmũkĩa Yeova nĩkũetae thayũ; Na ũla wĩ nakw’o akekalaa eanĩwe; Ndakokĩwa nĩ ũthũku.
Proverbs19:24 Mũndũ mũtulu nũindaa kw’oko kwake ĩsaaninĩ
Proverbs19:25 Kũna mũkaakaan’ya
Proverbs19:26 Ũla ũmũng’endeaa ĩthe
Proverbs19:27 Eka
Proverbs19:28 Ngũsĩ ĩte vata nĩthekeeaa ũsili wa katĩ; Na kanyw’a wa ũla mũthũku nũmelasya ũthũku.
Proverbs19:29 Mosilĩlo nĩmaseũvĩaw’a akaakaan’ya
Proverbs20:1 Mbinyu nĩ mũkaakaan’ya
Proverbs20:2 Ũtĩsyo wa mũsumbĩ nĩ ta kũluma kwa mũnyambũ: Ũla ũmũthatasya nũvĩtĩasya thayũ wake mwene.
Proverbs20:3 Nĩ ndaĩa ya mũndũ kwĩkala kũasa na ĩteta; Ĩndĩ kĩla ndia ĩkatetanasya.
Proverbs20:4 Mũndũ mũtulu nũleaa kũĩma nũndũ wa ĩvinda ya mbevo; Kwondũ wa ũu akavoya ĩvinda ya ngetha
Proverbs20:5 Ũtao ngoonĩ ya mũndũ nĩ ta kyũngũ; Ĩndĩ mũndũ wĩ ũmanyi akookusya wume.
Proverbs20:6 Andũ aingĩ matavanasya kĩla ũmwe ũseo wake mwene; Ĩndĩ mũndũ wĩ kĩthito nũũ ũtonya kũmwona?
Proverbs20:7 Mũndũ mũlũngalu ũla ũendaa wĩanĩunĩ wake
Proverbs20:8 Mũsumbĩ ũla wĩkalaa kĩvĩlanĩ kya ũsumbĩ kya kũsila Nũvalaanasya ũthũku w’onthe na metho make.
Proverbs20:9 Nũũ ũtonya kwasya
Proverbs20:10 Mavia ala mathimaa matailyĩ ũndũ ũmwe
Proverbs20:11 O na kana nĩkemanyĩthanasya kwondũ wa meko mako
Proverbs20:12 Kũtũ kũla kwĩw’aa
Proverbs20:13 Ndũkende too
Proverbs20:14 Nĩ kĩthũku
Proverbs20:15 Ve thaavu
Proverbs20:16 Osa ngũa yake ũla mũĩkĩĩthya kwondũ wa mũeni; Noimwĩkalya ethĩwe ngwatĩlĩlyo ũla mũĩkĩĩthya kwondũ wa andũ ma nthĩ ĩngĩ.
Proverbs20:17 Lĩu wa ũvũngũ wĩ mũyo kwa mũndũ; Ĩndĩ ĩtina kanyw’a wake ũkausũa thaathai.
Proverbs20:18 Kĩla ũsũanĩo ũlũlũmĩlaw’a nĩ ũtao; Na kwatya kaũ kwondũ wa ũtongoi mũĩ.
Proverbs20:19 Ũla ũendaa kũũ na kũũ e mũsukani nũvuanasya nzama: Kwondũ wa ũu ndũkatindan’ye na ũla ũtumũkanganasya ilomo syake mũno.
Proverbs20:20 O ũla ũumaa ĩthe kana nyinya
Proverbs20:21 Ũtiĩwa nũtonya kwoswa mĩtũkĩ wambĩlĩlyonĩ; Ĩndĩ mũminũkĩlyo waw’o ndũkaathimwa.
Proverbs20:22 Ndũkasye
Proverbs20:23 Mavia ala mathimaa matailyĩ ũndũ ũmwe nĩ ũthatyo kwa Yeova; Na kĩthimi kya ũkengani ti kĩseo.
Proverbs20:24 Mĩendele ya mũndũ yumaa kwa Yeova; Mũndũ atonya ata ĩndĩ kũmanya nzĩa yake?
Proverbs20:25 Nĩ kĩtei kwa mũndũ kũneena na mĩtũkĩ
Proverbs20:26 Mũsumbĩ mũĩ aũlũkasya ala athũku
Proverbs20:27 Veva wa mũndũ nĩ taa wa Yeova
Proverbs20:28 Ũseo na w’o masũvĩaa mũsumbĩ; Na kĩvĩla kyake kya ũsumbĩ nĩkĩtw’ĩĩkawa nĩ ũseo.
Proverbs20:29 Ndaĩa ya anake nĩ vinya woo; Na wanake wa atumĩa nĩ mũtwe wĩ mbuĩ.
Proverbs20:30 Makũna ala mokitĩthasya matheasya ũthũku; Na makũna makĩlika nthĩnĩ ki.
Proverbs21:1 Ngoo ya mũsumbĩ yĩ kwiokonĩ kwa Yeova ta mokinyĩlo ma manzĩ: Nake amĩthyũũaa o vala ũnũkwenda.
Proverbs21:2 Kĩla mũendele wa mũndũ nĩ mũlũngalu methonĩ make mwene; Ĩndĩ Yeova athimaa ngoo.
Proverbs21:3 Kwĩka ũlũngalu na ũsili wa katĩ Nĩkwĩtĩkĩlawa nĩ Yeova kwĩ nthembo.
Proverbs21:4 Mũsyaĩlye wa mĩng’athĩlĩlyo
Proverbs21:5 Mosũanĩo ma ala athingu maelete wingĩnĩ wa syĩndũ; Ĩndĩ kĩla mũndũ ũla wĩkalaataa ekalaataa kũvika akaĩwe tũ.
Proverbs21:6 Kwosa mothwĩĩ kwondũ wa ĩũmĩ ũla ũneenaa ũvũngũ Nĩ mũki ũtwaawa kũũ na kũũ nĩ ala mamanthaa kĩkw’ũ.
Proverbs21:7 Ũng’endu wa ala athũku ũkamatwaa kũasa
Proverbs21:8 Mũendele wa ũla ũitavĩwe nĩ naĩ nĩ mũthyoeku mũno; Ĩndĩ ũndũ wa ũla mũtheu
Proverbs21:9 Nĩ kavaa kwĩkalaa kĩkotonĩ kya nyũmba ĩũlũ
Proverbs21:10 Ngoo ya ũla mũthũku nĩyendaa ũthũku: Mũtũi wake ndonaa ũseo methonĩ make.
Proverbs21:11 Yĩla mũkaakaan’ya wakũnwa
Proverbs21:12 Mũndũ mũlũngalu nũsũanĩaa ũndũ wa nyũmba ya ũla mũthũku
Proverbs21:13 O ũla ũkunĩkaa matũ matikew’e kĩĩo kya ngya
Proverbs21:14 Mũthĩnzĩo kĩmbithĩnĩ nũvoovasya ũthatu; Na mũthĩnzĩo kĩthũinĩ nũvoovasya ũthilĩku mwai.
Proverbs21:15 Nĩ ũtanu kwa ala alũngalu kũsila katĩ; Ĩndĩ nĩ wanangiko kwa eki ma ũthũku.
Proverbs21:16 Mũndũ ũla wangangaa kuma nzĩanĩ ya ũmanyi Akathũmũa ũmbanonĩ wa akw’ũ.
Proverbs21:17 Ũla wendaa motanu akeethĩwa mũndũ ngya: Ũla wendaa mbinyu na mauta ndakethĩwa mũthwii.
Proverbs21:18 Ũla mũthũku nĩ mbovosya kwondũ wa ũla mũlũngalu; Na nzeleke nĩyũkaa vandũ va ũla mũlũngalu.
Proverbs21:19 Nĩ kavaa kũtũaa nthĩ yĩ yalata
Proverbs21:20 Ve syĩndũ syĩ vata mũno o na mauta ũtũonĩ wa ala oĩ; Ĩndĩ mũndũ mũtumanu nĩwimelasya.
Proverbs21:21 Ũla ũatĩĩaa ũlũngalu na ũseo Nĩwonaa thayũ
Proverbs21:22 Mũndũ mũĩ nũlĩsaa alike ndũanĩ ya ala me na ũtonyi
Proverbs21:23 Ũla ũsũvĩaa kanyw’a wake na ũĩmĩ wake Nũsũvĩaa ngoo yake mathĩna.
Proverbs21:24 Mũndũ e na ngathĩĩo na wĩng’athĩlĩlyo
Proverbs21:25 Kwenda kwa ũla mũtulu nĩkũmũaaa; Nũndũ moko make nĩmaleaa kũtethya wĩa.
Proverbs21:26 Kwĩ ũla wĩw’aa ĩtomo na ũtoonu mũthenya w’onthe; Ĩndĩ ũla mũlũngalu nũnenganae na ndaimaa.
Proverbs21:27 Nthembo ya ũla mũthũku nĩ ũthatyo: Nĩ mbee veana ata
Proverbs21:28 Ngũsĩ ya ũvũngũ ĩkaaa; Ĩndĩ mũndũ ũla wĩw’aa akaneenaa ĩndĩ yonthe.
Proverbs21:29 Mũndũ mũthũku nĩwetasya ũthyũ wake; Ĩndĩ ũndũ wa ũla mũlũngalu
Proverbs21:30 Vati ũĩ kana ũmanyi Kana ũtao ũtonya kũkita na Yeova.
Proverbs21:31 Mbalasi nĩyũmbanĩtw’e ũndũ wa mũthenya wa kaũ; Ĩndĩ ũkĩlyo nĩ wa Yeova.
Proverbs22:1 Nĩ kavaa kũnyuva syĩtwa ĩseo kwĩ mothwii manene
Proverbs22:2 Athwii na ngya makomanaa vamwe: Yeova nĩwe mũmbi woo onthe.
Proverbs22:3 Mũndũ wĩ kĩlĩko nĩwonaa ũthũku
Proverbs22:4 Ĩtuvi ya wĩnyivyo na kũmũkĩa Yeova Nĩ ũthwii
Proverbs22:5 Mĩw’a na itei syĩ nzĩanĩ ya ala me na ngũlũ: Ũla ũsũvĩaa ngoo yake akeethĩwa kũasa nasyo.
Proverbs22:6 Manyĩsya kana nzĩa ĩla kaĩle kũendaa nayo
Proverbs22:7 Mũthwii nũsumbĩkaa ngya; Na ũla ũkovaa nĩ mũthũkũmi wa ũla ũkovethasya.
Proverbs22:8 Ũla ũvuĩaa ũthũku akaketha wanangĩko mũnene; Na ndata ya ũthilĩku wake ĩkaa vinya.
Proverbs22:9 Ũla wĩ na itho ĩlau akaathimwa; Nũndũ nũnengae ngya kuma lĩunĩ wake.
Proverbs22:10 Mwĩkye nza mũkaakaan’ya
Proverbs22:11 Ũla wendaa ũtheu wa ngoo
Proverbs22:12 Metho ma Yeova masũvĩaa ũla wĩ na ũmanyi; Ĩndĩ nĩwanangaa ndeto sya nzeleke.
Proverbs22:13 Mũndũ mũtulu easya
Proverbs22:14 Kanyw’a wa aka aeni nĩ ĩima ĩliku; Ũla ũthĩthawa nĩ Yeova akavalũka nthĩnĩ wayo.
Proverbs22:15 Ũtumanu nĩwovetwe ngoonĩ ya kana; Ĩndĩ ndata ya kwon’ya mavĩtyo ĩkoolũngya kũasa nako.
Proverbs22:16 Ũla ũthĩnasya ngya nĩ kana aingĩvye ũtandĩthyo wake
Proverbs22:17 Tea kũtũ kwaku
Proverbs22:18 Nũndũ nĩ ũndũ wa kwendeesya ethĩwa ũkasyĩkalya nthĩnĩ waku
Proverbs22:19 Nĩ kana ũĩkĩĩi waku wĩthĩwe nthĩnĩ wa Yeova
Proverbs22:20 Ndikũandĩkĩe maũndũ manene Ma motao na ũmanyi
Proverbs22:21 Nĩtume ũmanya ki ndeto sya w’o
Proverbs22:22 Ndũkavute ngya
Proverbs22:23 Nũndũ Yeova akamatetea
Proverbs22:24 Ndũkatume ndũũ na ũla ũthataa; Na ndũkaendan’ye na mũndũ ũthilĩkaa:
Proverbs22:25 Ndũkese kwĩmanyĩsya mĩendele yake
Proverbs22:26 O na ndũkethĩwe ũmwe wa ala makwatanasya moko
Proverbs22:27 Ethĩwa ndwĩ na kya kũĩva
Proverbs22:28 Ndũkaakũĩĩsye kyambo kya mũvaka wa tene
Proverbs22:29 Nũkwona mũndũ mũthingu wĩanĩ wake? Akaũngama mbee wa asumbĩ; Ndakaũngama mbee wa andũ mate na nguma.
Proverbs23:1 Yĩla wĩĩkala nthĩ kũya na mũsumbĩki. Sũanĩa mũno ũla wĩ mbee waku;
Proverbs23:2 Nokĩkĩa kavyũ mũmeonĩ waku
Proverbs23:3 Ndũkende sya ũya syake nzeo; Nũndũ nĩ malĩu ma ũkengani.
Proverbs23:4 Ndũkenosye wĩthĩwe mũthwii; Ekana na ũĩ waku mwene.
Proverbs23:5 Ũkaketeea kĩla kĩte vo? Nũndũ vate ndĩi mothwii nĩmeseũvĩasya nthwau
Proverbs23:6 Ndũkaye lĩu wa ũla wĩ na itho ĩthũku
Proverbs23:7 Nũndũ
Proverbs23:8 Kalungu kala waya ũkakatavĩka
Proverbs23:9 Ndũkaneene ndia ĩkĩw’a; Nũndũ ĩkavũthya ũĩ wa ndeto syaku.
Proverbs23:10 Ndũkaakũĩĩsye kyambo kya mũvaka wa tene; Na ndũkalike mĩũndanĩ ya ala makw’ĩĩwe nĩ aaĩthe:
Proverbs23:11 Nũndũ Mwovosya woo e na vinya; Akamatetanĩsya kwaku.
Proverbs23:12 Nengane ngoo yaku ũmanyĩsyonĩ
Proverbs23:13 Ndũkasiĩĩe ũkan’yo kwa kana; Nũndũ ethĩwa ũkakakũna na ndata
Proverbs23:14 Ũkakakũna na ndata
Proverbs23:15 Mwana wakwa
Proverbs23:16 Ĩĩ
Proverbs23:17 Ngoo yaku ndĩkamew’ĩe andũ athe kĩwĩu; Ĩndĩ ĩthĩwa ũkĩmũkĩa Yeova mũthenya w’onthe:
Proverbs23:18 Nũndũ vate ndĩi kwĩ ĩtuvi; Na wĩkwatyo waku ndũkavetwa.
Proverbs23:19 Ĩw’a we
Proverbs23:20 Ndũkethĩwe katĩ wa anywi ma mbinyu Katĩ wa ayi ma nyama na ũtoonu:
Proverbs23:21 Nũndũ mũnywi na mũyi makavika ũkyanĩ; Na kwombosya nĩkũmũvw’ĩkaa mũndũ matani.
Proverbs23:22 Ĩthukĩĩsye au ũla wakũsyaie
Proverbs23:23 Thooa w’o
Proverbs23:24 Ĩthe wa ũla mũlũngalu akatana mũno; Na ũla wĩsyaa kana koĩ akeethĩwa na ũtanu kwondũ wako.
Proverbs23:25 Au na mwenyu methĩwe na mũyo
Proverbs23:26 Mwana wakwa
Proverbs23:27 Nũndũ ĩlwaya nĩ mũtaũ mũliku; Na mũndũ mũka wa nthĩ ĩngĩ nĩ ĩima ĩtheke.
Proverbs23:28 Ĩĩ
Proverbs23:29 Nũũ wĩ na woo? Nũũ wĩ na kĩmako? Nũũ wĩ na ngananĩo? Nũũ wĩ na mũnyungunyĩsyo? Nũũ wĩ na mawũkite vate kĩtumi? Nũũ wĩ na metho matune?
Proverbs23:30 Ala mekalaa ĩvinda ĩasa mainyw’a; Ala maendaa mamanthe mbinyu mbulan’ye.
Proverbs23:31 Ndũkasisye mbinyu yĩla yatunĩva
Proverbs23:32 Mũminũkĩlyo nĩũmanaa ta nzoka
Proverbs23:33 Metho maku makoona maũndũ maeni
Proverbs23:34 Ĩĩ
Proverbs23:35 Ũkasya
Proverbs24:1 Ndũkamew’ĩe kĩwĩu andũ athũku; O na ndũkende kwĩthĩwa nao.
Proverbs24:2 Nũndũ ngoo syoo nĩsũanĩaa kũthĩn’ya
Proverbs24:3 Kwondũ wa ũĩ nyũmba nĩyakawa; Na kwondũ wa ũmanyi nĩlũmaw’a;
Proverbs24:4 Na kwondũ wa ũĩ tũsũmba nĩtusũaw’a Mothwii onthe me vata mũno na ma kwendeesya.
Proverbs24:5 Mũndũ mũĩ e na vinya; Ĩĩ
Proverbs24:6 Nũndũ kwondũ wa ũtongoi mũĩ ũkakwatya kaũ waku; Na wingĩnĩ wa atai kwĩ ũkĩlyo.
Proverbs24:7 Ũĩ wĩ ĩũlũ mũno kũmĩvĩtũka ndia: Ndĩathamĩasya kanyw’a wayo mbingĩlonĩ.
Proverbs24:8 Ũla ũsũanĩaa kwĩka ũthũku
Proverbs24:9 Ũsũanĩo wa ũtumanu nĩ naĩ; Na mũkaakaan’ya nĩ ũthatyo wa andũ.
Proverbs24:10 Ethĩwa nũnyalaa mũthenya wa thĩna
Proverbs24:11 Vonokya ala matwaawa kĩkw’ũnĩ
Proverbs24:12 Ethĩwa wĩasya
Proverbs24:13 Mwana wakwa
Proverbs24:14 O ta ũu ũkamanya ũĩ ũilyĩ ũu kwa ngoo yaku; Ethĩwa nũwonete
Proverbs24:15 We mũndũ mũthũku ndũkoveesye ũtũo wa ũla mũlũngalu; Ndũkaanange vandũ vake va ũthũmũa:
Proverbs24:16 Nũndũ mũndũ mũlũngalu nũvalũkaa mavinda mũonza
Proverbs24:17 Ndũkatane yĩla mũmaitha waku ũvalũkaa
Proverbs24:18 Yeova ndakese kũwona
Proverbs24:19 Ndũkenyamasye ũndũ wa eki ma ũthũku; O na ndũkamew’ĩe kĩwĩu ala athũku:
Proverbs24:20 Nũndũ kũikethĩwa ĩtuvi ya mũndũ mũthũku; Taa wa ũla mũthũku ũkavow’a.
Proverbs24:21 Mwana wakwa
Proverbs24:22 Nũndũ wanangĩko woo mũnene ũkookĩla na kĩthũlũmũko; Na kwananga kwa asu elĩ
Proverbs24:23 Ii nasyo nĩ ndeto sya ala oĩ. Kwendeesya andũ ũkĩsila ti kũseo.
Proverbs24:24 Ũla ũtavasya ũla mũthũku
Proverbs24:25 Ĩndĩ ala mamũkanasya makeethĩwa atanu
Proverbs24:26 Nũmumunyaa ilomo Ũla ũsũngĩaa ũsũngĩo wa w’o.
Proverbs24:27 Seũvya wĩa waku na ku nza
Proverbs24:28 Ndũkamũkũsĩĩe mũtũi waku vate kĩtumi; Na ndũkakengane na ilomo syaku.
Proverbs24:29 Ndũkasye
Proverbs24:30 Navĩtĩla ũtee wa mũũnda wa mũndũ mũtulu
Proverbs24:31 Na
Proverbs24:32 Nĩvo ĩndĩ nasiisye
Proverbs24:33 Too mũnini
Proverbs24:34 O ta ũu ũkya waku ũkooka ta mũvutani
Proverbs25:1 Ii nasyo nĩ nthimo sya Solomoni
Proverbs25:2 Nĩ ũtaĩo wa Ngai kũvitha ũndũ; Ĩndĩ ũtaĩo wa asumbĩ nĩ kũmantha ũndũ.
Proverbs25:3 O tondũ matunĩ kũtũlĩte
Proverbs25:4 Umya makwaũ nthĩnĩ wa vetha
Proverbs25:5 Umya ala athũku mbee wa mũsumbĩ
Proverbs25:6 Ndũkenenevye vala ve mũsumbĩ
Proverbs25:7 Nũndũ nĩ kavaa ũkewa
Proverbs25:8 Ndũkaumaale mĩtũkĩ ũkatete
Proverbs25:9 Ĩoan’ye na mũtũi waku
Proverbs25:10 Ũla ũmĩw’aa ndakese ũkũuma
Proverbs25:11 Ndeto ĩneenawa ĩvinda yayo Nĩ ta mosyao ma mũevo ma thaavu kĩkavũnĩ kya vetha.
Proverbs25:12 Ta ngome ya kũtũ ya thaavu
Proverbs25:13 Ta mbevo ya ĩa ĩvinda ya ngetha
Proverbs25:14 Ta mathweo na kĩseve vate mbua
Proverbs25:15 Kwondũ wa kũmĩĩsya ĩvinda ĩasa mũsumbĩki nũtonya kũkikw’a
Proverbs25:16 Nĩwonete ũkĩ wa nzũkĩ? Ya ũla ũkwĩanĩe
Proverbs25:17 Kũũ kwaku kũikethĩwe nyũmbanĩ ya mũtũi waku kaingĩ
Proverbs25:18 Mũndũ ũla ũmũkũsĩĩa mũtũi wake ũvũngũ Nĩ kĩiva kya mũtĩ
Proverbs25:19 Uĩkĩĩi mũndũnĩ ũte kĩthito ĩvinda ya thĩna Nĩ ta ĩeo ĩtũlĩku
Proverbs25:20 O tondũ mũndũ ũla wumasya ngũa ĩvinda ya mbevo
Proverbs25:21 Ethĩwa mũmaitha waku e na nzaa
Proverbs25:22 Nũndũ ũkamũmbĩĩa makaa ma mwaki mũtwenĩ wake
Proverbs25:23 Kĩseve kyumĩte ngalĩ ya ĩũlũ nĩkĩetae mbua; Now’o ũĩmĩ wĩ nzuku ũetae ũthyũ mũthatu.
Proverbs25:24 Nĩ kavaa kũtũa kĩkotonĩ kya nyũmba ĩũlũ
Proverbs25:25 Ta manzĩ mathithu kwa mũndũ wĩ waũni
Proverbs25:26 Ta nthongo nthokoan’ye
Proverbs25:27 Ti ũseo kũya ũkĩ wa nzũkĩ mwingĩ; No ta ũu andũ kũmantha ndaĩa yoo ene nĩ ũthũku.
Proverbs25:28 Ũla ũtasiĩĩaa veva wake Nĩ ta ndũa ĩla ĩomboetwe na ĩte na maũvai.
Proverbs26:1 Ta ĩa ĩvinda ya syũa
Proverbs26:2 Ta mũthoonzwe kwanganganĩ kwaw’o
Proverbs26:3 Kĩvoko kwondũ wa mbalasi
Proverbs26:4 Ndũkasũngĩe ndia kwĩanana na ũtumanu wayo
Proverbs26:5 Sũngĩa ndia kwĩanana na ũtumanu wayo
Proverbs26:6 Ũla ũtũmaa ũvoo na kw’oko kwa ndia Nũtilaa maũũ make mwene
Proverbs26:7 Maũũ ma ala mathuaa nĩmaseesangaa; Now’o ĩilyĩ ngelekan’yo kanyw’anĩ wa ndia.
Proverbs26:8 Ta mũndũ ũla woveeaa ĩvia kĩkũthanĩ
Proverbs26:9 Ta mwĩw’a ũla ũtonyaa kw’oko kwa mũthengi
Proverbs26:10 Ta mũndũ wa ũta ũla wũkitaa onthe
Proverbs26:11 Ta ngitĩ ĩla ĩalũkĩlaa matavĩka mayo
Proverbs26:12 Nũkwona mũndũ ũla wĩyonaa mwene ta mũĩ? Kavaa kwĩkwatya ndia kwĩ ũsu.
Proverbs26:13 Ũla mũtulu easya
Proverbs26:14 O tondũ mũomo wĩalyũlĩlaa ikwatinĩ syaw’o
Proverbs26:15 Ũla mũtulu nũindaa kw’oko kwake ĩsaaninĩ; Nĩ mĩnoo kwake kũkũete ĩngĩ kanyw’anĩ wake.
Proverbs26:16 Ũla mũtulu nĩwĩyonaa ta mũĩ Kwĩ andũ mũonza ala matonya kwonan’ya kĩtumi.
Proverbs26:17 Ũla ũvĩtaa
Proverbs26:18 Ta mũndũ wa ndũũka ũla wĩkasya isinga
Proverbs26:19 Now’o mũndũ ũilyĩ ũla ũkengaa mũtũĩ wake
Proverbs26:20 Nũndũ kũte ngũ mwaki nũvoaa; Na vala vate ũla ũneenaa na kĩwe
Proverbs26:21 O tondũ makaa mailyĩ vala ve makaa makanu
Proverbs26:22 Ndeto sya ũla ũneenaa na kĩwe nĩ ta tũlungu tũseo twa lĩu
Proverbs26:23 Ilomo mbyũvu na ngoo nthũku Iilyĩ ta mũio wa yũmba ũvakĩtwe makwaũ ma vetha.
Proverbs26:24 Ũla ũmenanaa evithanasya na ilomo syake; Ĩndĩ nĩwiaa ũkengani nthĩnĩ wake:
Proverbs26:25 Yĩla ũnũũneena nesa
Proverbs26:26 O na ethĩwa kĩmena kyake nĩkĩkwĩvw’ĩka ũĩ wa ũkengani
Proverbs26:27 O ũla wĩnzaa ĩima akavalũka nthĩnĩ wayo; Na ũla ũvingilitasya ĩvia
Proverbs26:28 Ũĩmĩ ũla ũneenaa ũvũngũ nũmenaa ala wũkitĩte; Na kanyw’a wa kwendeesya na ndeto sya ũkathĩĩo nũomboaa.
Proverbs27:1 Ndũkekathĩĩe ũndũ wa ũnĩ; Nũndũ ndwĩsĩ ũndũ mũthenya ũtonya kumĩlya.
Proverbs27:2 Mũndũ ũngĩ nakũtaĩe
Proverbs27:3 Ĩvia nĩ ĩito
Proverbs27:4 Ũthilĩku nĩ mwai
Proverbs27:5 Kavaa ũkan’yo wĩ ũtheinĩ Kwĩ wendo ũvithĩtwe.
Proverbs27:6 Mawũkite ma mũnyanya nĩ ma kĩthito; Ĩndĩ momumunyo ma mũmaitha nĩ maingĩ.
Proverbs27:7 Mũndũ ũvũnĩte nũmenaa ĩwa; Ĩndĩ kwa mũndũ wĩ na nzaa kĩla kĩndũ kĩ ũũ kĩ mũyo.
Proverbs27:8 Ta nyũnyi ĩla yangangaa ĩkĩtia ndala yayo
Proverbs27:9 Mauta na syĩndũ ila inyungaa nesa matanĩthasya ngoo
Proverbs27:10 Mũnyanyau waku mwene
Proverbs27:11 Mwana wakwa
Proverbs27:12 Mũndũ wĩ kĩlĩko nĩwonaa ũthũku na kwĩvitha; Ĩndĩ ala mate ũmanyi nĩmaendeeaa na kũthĩna.
Proverbs27:13 Osa ngũa yake ũla mũĩkĩĩthya kwondũ wa mũeni; Noimwĩkalya ethĩwe ngwatĩlĩlyo ũla mũĩkĩĩthya kwondũ wa mũndũ mũka wa nthĩ ĩngĩ.
Proverbs27:14 Ũla ũathimaa mũnyanyae wake na wasya mũnene
Proverbs27:15 Kũvolotanga ĩvinda yonthe mũthenya wa mbua nyingĩ Na mũndũ mũka ũla ũtetanasya nĩ ũndũ ũmwe:
Proverbs27:16 Ũla ũkenda kũmũsiĩĩa asiĩĩaa kĩseve; Na kw’oko kwake kwa aũme nĩkwakwata mauta.
Proverbs27:17 Kĩaa nĩkĩnoaa kĩaa; O ta ũu mũndũ nũnoaa ũthyũ wa mũnyanyae.
Proverbs27:18 O ũla ũsũvĩaa mũkũyũ akaya ũsyao waw’o; Na ũla ũtaĩaa vwana wake akataĩwa.
Proverbs27:19 O tondũ kũilyĩ manzĩnĩ ũthyũ nĩwelekelaa ũthyũ
Proverbs27:20 Seoli na Avatoni kũtikolaa nongi; Na metho ma mũndũ matikolaa nongi.
Proverbs27:21 Mbisũ ya ũthesya nĩ kwondũ wa vetha
Proverbs27:22 O na ethĩwa ũkakimĩa ndia ndĩĩnĩ na mũthi vamwe na nganũ mbũe
Proverbs27:23 Ĩthĩwa na kĩthito ũndũ wa kũmanya ũndũ ndĩthya syaku sya mbũi na malondu iilyĩ
Proverbs27:24 Nũndũ ũthwii ti wa tene na tene; Na ngovia ya ũsumbĩ nĩyĩkalaa mosyaanĩonĩ onthe?
Proverbs27:25 Nyeki nyũmũ nikuĩtwe
Proverbs27:26 Tũtena twa malondu nĩ kwondũ wa ngũa syaku
Proverbs27:27 Na kũkeethĩwa ĩia ya mbũi yĩanĩe lĩu waku
Proverbs28:1 Ala athũku nĩmakĩaa yĩla vate mũndũ ũmaatĩĩe; Ĩndĩ ala alũngalu nĩ ngũmbaũ ta mũnyambũ.
Proverbs28:2 Kwondũ wa ĩvĩtyo ya nthĩ anene me mbee ũsumbĩnĩ nĩ aingĩ; Ĩndĩ kwondũ wa andũ me ũmanyi na ũĩ nĩendeeaa kwĩkala.
Proverbs28:3 Mũndũ mũthĩni ũla ũthĩnasya ngya Nĩ ta mbua ĩtwaĩthasya ĩla ĩtatiaa lĩu o na wĩva.
Proverbs28:4 Ala matiaa mĩao mataĩaa ala athũku; Ĩndĩ ala makwataa mĩao makananĩaa nao.
Proverbs28:5 Andũ athũku matimanyaa ũsili wa katĩ; Ĩndĩ ala mamanthaa Yeova mamanyaa maũndũ onthe.
Proverbs28:6 Kavaa ngya ĩla ĩendaa wĩanĩunĩ wayo
Proverbs28:7 O ũla ũkwataa mĩao nĩ mwana mũĩ; Ĩndĩ ũla ũtindanasya na ayi nũsonokasya ĩthe.
Proverbs28:8 Ũla wongelaa ũthwii wake kwondũ wa kũkovethya atũngĩwe ũtandĩthyo na wongeleko
Proverbs28:9 Ula ũthyũũaa kũtũ kwake ndakew’e mĩao
Proverbs28:10 Ũla ũtumaa ũla mũlũngalu atũũa nzĩanĩ nthũku
Proverbs28:11 Mũndũ mũthwii nĩwĩyonaa mwene ta mũĩ; Ĩndĩ ngya ĩla yĩ na ũmanyi nĩmũthianaa.
Proverbs28:12 Yĩla mũlũngalu wakĩlya vinya
Proverbs28:13 Ũla ũvw’ĩkaa mavĩtyo make ndakaathimĩka; Ĩndĩ ũla ũmaumbũlaa na kũmatia akeew’ĩwa tei.
Proverbs28:14 Mũndũ nĩ mũtanu ũla ũkĩaa mavinda onthe; Ĩndĩ ũla wũmasya ngoo yake akavalũka ũthũkunĩ.
Proverbs28:15 Ta mũnyambũ ũkĩluma
Proverbs28:16 Mũnene wĩ mbee ũsumbĩnĩ ũla ũte ũmanyi nĩ mũthĩn’ya mũnene; Ĩndĩ ũla ũmenaa ĩtomo akongeleela mĩthenya yake.
Proverbs28:17 Mũndũ ũla ũitavĩwe nĩ nthakame ya mũndũ o na wĩva Akakĩĩa yĩla ĩimanĩ; mũndũ o na wĩva ndakaamũsiĩĩe.
Proverbs28:18 O ũla ũendaa na mĩendele myaĩlu akavonokw’a; Ĩndĩ ũla wĩ na ngũlũ mĩendelenĩ yake akavalũka mĩtũkĩ.
Proverbs28:19 Ũla ũĩmaa nthĩ yake akeethĩwa na lĩu mwingĩ; Ĩndĩ ũla ũatĩĩa andũ mate kĩĩi akeethĩwa na ũkya mwĩanĩu.
Proverbs28:20 Mũndũ wĩ kĩthito akaingĩvĩwa nĩ moathimo; Ĩndĩ ũla wĩkalaataa ethĩwe na ũthwii ndakatĩa kũkũnwa.
Proverbs28:21 Kwĩthĩwa na wendeesyo wa andũ ti ũseo; O na mũndũ kũvĩtya ũndũ wa kĩlungu kya kĩmũtũ.
Proverbs28:22 Ũla wĩ na itho ĩthũku nĩwĩkalaataa kũatĩĩa ũthwii
Proverbs28:23 Ũla ũkanasya mũndũ
Proverbs28:24 Ũla ũmũvutaa ĩthe wake kana nyinyia
Proverbs28:25 Ũla wĩ veva mũtoonu nĩwũkĩlasya ĩteta; Ĩndĩ ũla ũmũĩkĩĩaa Yeova akeethĩwa mũnou.
Proverbs28:26 Ũla ũĩkĩĩaa ngoo yake mwene nĩ ndia; Ĩndĩ ũla ũendaa na ũĩ
Proverbs28:27 Ũla ũnengae ngya ndakaĩwa nĩ kĩndũ; Ĩndĩ ũla ũvithaa metho make akeethĩwa na iumo nyingĩ
Proverbs28:28 Yĩla athũku mookĩla
Proverbs29:1 Ũla aikanw’a kaingĩ ũmasya ngingo yake Akaanangwa na kĩthũlũmũko
Proverbs29:2 Yĩla ala alũngalu maingĩva
Proverbs29:3 Ũla wendaa ũĩ nũtanĩthasya ĩthe wake; Ĩndĩ ũla ũtindanasya na malwaya nĩwanangaa syĩndũ syake.
Proverbs29:4 Mũsumbĩ nũlũlũmĩlasya nthĩ kwondũ wa ũsili wa katĩ; Ĩndĩ ũla wumĩthasya mĩthĩnzĩo na vinya nũmĩkulumanasya.
Proverbs29:5 Mũndũ ũla wendeeasya mũtũi wake na ndeto sya ũkathĩĩo Alanĩlasya matambya make kĩtei.
Proverbs29:6 Ĩvĩtyonĩ ya mũndũ mũthũku ve kĩtei; Ĩndĩ ũla mũlũngalu nĩwinaa na kũtana.
Proverbs29:7 Ũla mũlũngalu nũsiasya ũvoo wa ngya; Ũla mũthũku nde na ũĩ omanye.
Proverbs29:8 Akaakaan’ya makwatasya ndũa mwaki; Ĩndĩ andũ oĩ mathyũũaa ũthilĩku ũtee.
Proverbs29:9 Ethĩwa mũndũ mũĩ e na ngananĩo na mũndũ mũtumanu
Proverbs29:10 Ala mang’aatũkĩtw’e nĩ nthakame mamenaa ũla mwĩanĩu; Na ũndũ wa alũngalu
Proverbs29:11 Ndia nĩneenaa ũthatu wayo w’onthe; Ĩndĩ mũndũ mũĩ nĩwũsiĩĩaa na kũkilĩthya.
Proverbs29:12 Ethĩwa mũsumbĩki nĩwĩthukĩĩasya ũvũngũ
Proverbs29:13 Mũndũ ngya na mũthĩn’ya makomanaa vamwe; Yeova nĩwĩkĩaa kyeni metho ma asu elĩ.
Proverbs29:14 Mũsumbĩ ũla ũsilĩlaa ngya na kĩthito
Proverbs29:15 Ndata na ũkan’yo ninenganae ũĩ: Ĩndĩ kana kala kalekaw’a kathi ũndũ kekwenda kasonokasya inyia wako.
Proverbs29:16 Yĩla athũku maingĩva
Proverbs29:17 Mwon’ya mwana waku mavĩtyo
Proverbs29:18 Vala vate woni
Proverbs29:19 Mũthũkũmi ndonaw’a mavĩtyo na ndeto; O na kau mũmanyaa
Proverbs29:20 Nũkwona mũndũ wĩ mĩtũkĩ ya kũneena ndetonĩ syake? Kavaa kwĩkwatya ndia kwĩ ũsu.
Proverbs29:21 Ũla ũeaa mũthũkũmi wake akĩmũsũvĩa kuma e kana Mũminũkĩlyo akeethĩwa kwake ta mwana.
Proverbs29:22 Mũndũ mũthatu nĩwũkĩlasya ĩteta
Proverbs29:23 Ngathĩĩo ya mũndũ ĩkamũtheesya; Ĩndĩ ũla wĩ na veva wa wĩnyivyo akoosa ndaĩa.
Proverbs29:24 O ũla wĩ ngwatanĩo na kĩng’ei amenaa thayũ wake mwene; Nĩwĩw’aa wĩvĩto na ndaneenaa.
Proverbs29:25 Kũkĩa mũndũ nĩkũetae kĩtei; Ĩndĩ ũla ũmũĩkĩĩaa Yeova akekalaa ate na mũisyo.
Proverbs29:26 Aingĩ nĩmamanthaa ũseo kwa mũsumbĩki; Ĩndĩ ũsilĩlo wa mũndũ nĩwumaa vala ve Yeova.
Proverbs29:27 Mũndũ ũte na ũlũngalu nĩ ũthatyo kwa ũla mũlũngalu; Na ũla mũlũngalu ĩ nzĩanĩ nĩ ũthatyo kwa ala athũku.
Proverbs30:1 Ndeto sya Akuli mwana wa Yake; ũtao. Ũ mũndũ amwĩa Ithieli
Proverbs30:2 Vate ndĩi nĩilyĩ ta nyamũ kũvĩtũka mũndũ o na wĩva
Proverbs30:3 Na ndimanyĩte ũĩ
Proverbs30:4 Nũũ ũla wambatie ĩtunĩ
Proverbs30:5 Kĩla ndeto ya Ngai nĩ ndate: Nake nĩ ngao ya ala mevithaa nthĩnĩ wake.
Proverbs30:6 Ndũkongele ndeto syake
Proverbs30:7 Maũndũ elĩ nĩngwĩtĩtye; Ndũkamambate ndanamba ũkw’a:
Proverbs30:8 Veta kũasa nakwa maũndũ ma mana na movũngũ; Ndũkanenge ũkya kana ũthwii; Ngathĩsya lĩu ũla ũmbĩanĩe:
Proverbs30:9 Ndikese kũvũna vyũ
Proverbs30:10 Ndũkamũsuke mũthũkũmi kwa vwana wake
Proverbs30:11 Ve nzyawa ĩla ĩumaa ĩthe wayo
Proverbs30:12 Ve nzyawa ĩla ntheu methonĩ mayo
Proverbs30:13 Ve nzyawa a! Metho mayo me na mĩtũlyo! Na ilomo sya metho moo nĩsyũkĩlĩtw’e.
Proverbs30:14 Ve nzyawa maeo mayo nĩ ta mbyũ
Proverbs30:15 Nthambaa yĩ na eĩtu elĩ
Proverbs30:16 Seoli; na ĩvu yĩtasyaaa; Nthĩ ĩtakolaa kĩw’ũ; Na mwaki ũla ũtaneenaa
Proverbs30:17 Itho yĩla yĩmũthekeea ĩthe
Proverbs30:18 Kwĩ maũndũ atatũ me ũseng’yo kũmbĩtũka
Proverbs30:19 Nzĩa ya ndiũ yayayanĩ; Nzĩa ya nzoka ĩũlũ wa ĩvia; Nzĩa ya ngalawa katĩ wa ũkanga; Na nzĩa ya mũndũ mũũme na mwĩĩtu.
Proverbs30:20 Now’o kũilyĩ nzĩa ya mũndũ mũka kĩlaalai; Nũĩsaa na kũvangũla kanyw’a wake
Proverbs30:21 Nũndũ wa maũndũ atatũ nthĩ nĩtetemaa
Proverbs30:22 Nũndũ wa mũthũkũmi yĩla ũtw’ĩka mũsumbĩ; Na ndia yĩla yavũna lĩu;
Proverbs30:23 Nũndũ wa mũndũ mũka kũmenwa e mũtwae; Na mwĩĩtu mũthũkũmi e mũtiĩwa wa vivi wake.
Proverbs30:24 Kwĩ syĩndũ inya ila nini ĩũlũ wa nthĩ
Proverbs30:25 Nditikũ nĩ andũ mate vinya
Proverbs30:26 Inyowe nĩ andũ mate vinya
Proverbs30:27 Ngie iti na mũsumbĩ
Proverbs30:28 Ĩtelembũ nĩyĩkwataa na moko mayo
Proverbs30:29 Kwĩ syĩndũ itatũ ila syaĩlaa mũtambĩlyenĩ wasyo
Proverbs30:30 Mũnyambũ
Proverbs30:31 Ngitĩ yĩ ũsembi; o na nthenge; Na mũsumbĩ ũla ũtang’endeeka.
Proverbs30:32 Ethĩwa nĩwĩkĩte ũtumanu ũkĩtũlya mwene
Proverbs30:33 Nũndũ kũthuka ĩia nĩkũetae mauta
Proverbs31:1 Ndeto sya mũsumbĩ Lemueli; ũtao ũla inyia wake wamũtaie.
Proverbs31:2 Nata
Proverbs31:3 Ndũkanenge aka vinya waku
Proverbs31:4 Ti ũndũ wa asumbĩ
Proverbs31:5 Matikese kũnyw’a na kũlwa nĩ mĩao
Proverbs31:6 Mũnenge ũla ũkilĩlye kwaa kĩla kĩtoonasya
Proverbs31:7 Nanyw’e
Proverbs31:8 Athamya kanyw’a waku kwondũ wa ala matatonya kũneena
Proverbs31:9 Athamya kanyw’a waku
Proverbs31:10 Nũũ ũtonya kũmwona mũndũ mũka mwaĩlu? Nũndũ e vata mũno kwĩ tũvila twa maliani.
Proverbs31:11 Ngoo ya mũũme wake nĩmũĩkĩĩaa
Proverbs31:12 Nake nũmwĩkaa ũseo na ti ũthũku Mĩthenya yonthe ya thayũ wake.
Proverbs31:13 Nũmanthaa w’ĩa wa malondu na katane
Proverbs31:14 Ailyĩ ngalawa sya athoosya; Aetae lĩu wake kuma kũasa.
Proverbs31:15 Nake nĩwũkĩlaa kwĩ o ũtukũ
Proverbs31:16 Nũsũanĩaa ũndũ wa mũũnda
Proverbs31:17 Nũvotoaa kĩnyunyu kyake vinya
Proverbs31:18 Nũmanyaa kana syĩndũ syake sya ũthoosya syĩ ũuno; Taa wake ndũvoaa ũtukũ.
Proverbs31:19 Nũkwataa na moko make kamũtĩ ka ũkwata maw’ĩa
Proverbs31:20 Nũtambũũkasya moko make ũndũ wa ngya; Ĩĩ
Proverbs31:21 Ndakĩaa mbevo ya ĩa kwondũ wa andũ ma nyũmba yake; Nũndũ andũ onthe ma nyũmba yake nĩmavw’ĩkĩtwe ngũa ndune mũno.
Proverbs31:22 Nĩwĩseũvĩasya mĩto mĩseo mũno; Ngũa yake nĩ katane nzeo na ĩla ndune mũno.
Proverbs31:23 Mũũme wake nĩwĩsĩkĩwe mbingĩlonĩ
Proverbs31:24 Nũtumaa ngũa sya katane na kwithoosya
Proverbs31:25 Vinya na ũnene nĩ ngũa syake; Nake nũthekeea ĩvinda yũkĩte.
Proverbs31:26 Nĩwathamasya kanyw’a wake na ũĩ; Na mwĩao wa ũseo wĩ ũĩmĩnĩ wake.
Proverbs31:27 Nũsiasya nesa mĩendele ya andũ ma nyũmba yake
Proverbs31:28 Syana syake nĩsyũkĩlaa
Proverbs31:29 Eĩtu aingĩ nĩmekĩte ũla waĩle
Proverbs31:30 Wũmbe nĩ ũkengani
Proverbs31:31 Ũmũnenge wa ũsyao wa moko make; Na mawĩa make nĩmamũtaĩĩe mbingĩlonĩ.
Ecclesiastes1:1 Ndeto sya mũtavan’ya
Ecclesiastes1:2 No mana
Ecclesiastes1:3 Mũndũ e na ũunĩko mwaũ ũndũ wa wĩa wake w’onthe ũla wĩthĩnĩasya ĩtheo wa syũa?
Ecclesiastes1:4 Nzyawa ĩmwe nĩvĩtaa
Ecclesiastes1:5 O na syũa nĩyumaa
Ecclesiastes1:6 Kĩseve nĩkĩendaa kwelekela ngalĩ ya ĩtheo
Ecclesiastes1:7 Mbũsĩ syonthe niendaa ũkanganĩ
Ecclesiastes1:8 Maũndũ onthe nĩmausũĩtwe nĩ mĩnoo; mũndũ ndatonya kũneenekya; itho yĩtikolaa kwona
Ecclesiastes1:9 Kĩla kyaĩ kw’o nokyo kĩkethĩwa; na ũndũ ũla weekiwe now’o ũla ũkekwa: na kũti ũndũ weũ ĩtheo wa syũa.
Ecclesiastes1:10 Ve kĩndũ kĩla kĩtonya kũwetwa ũndũ wakyo
Ecclesiastes1:11 Kũti ũlilikano wa nzyawa sya mbee; o na kũtikethĩwa ũlilikano wa nzyawa sya ĩtina ila ikoka
Ecclesiastes1:12 Nyie Mũtavany’a naĩ mũsumbĩ ĩũlũ wa Isilaeli ku Yelusaleme.
Ecclesiastes1:13 Na neekĩa ngoonĩ yakwa kũmantha na kũthiana na nzĩa ya ũĩ ũvoo wa maũndũ onthe ala mekawa ĩtheo wa ĩtu: nĩ thĩna mũnene ũla Ngaĩ ũnengete ana ma andũ mathĩnaw’e nĩw’o.
Ecclesiastes1:14 Nĩnonete mawĩa onthe ala mekawa ĩtheo wa syũa; na
Ecclesiastes1:15 Kĩla kĩthyoeku kĩtitonya kũlũngalw’a; na kĩla kĩte vo kĩtitonya kũtalwa.
Ecclesiastes1:16 Nĩnaneenanisye na ngoo yakwa
Ecclesiastes1:17 Na neekĩa ngoonĩ yakwa nĩmanye ũĩ
Ecclesiastes1:18 Nũndũ nthĩnĩ wa ũĩ mwingĩ kwĩ woo mwingĩ; na ũla wingĩvasya ũmanyi nĩwingĩvĩĩasya woo.
Ecclesiastes2:1 Nĩnaneenie ngoonĩ yakwa
Ecclesiastes2:2 Naisye ũndũ wa kũtheka
Ecclesiastes2:3 Namanthie ngoonĩ yakwa ũndũ ndonya kũtanĩthya mwĩĩ wakwa na mbinyu
Ecclesiastes2:4 Nĩneeseũvĩsye mawĩa manene
Ecclesiastes2:5 nĩneeseũvĩsye mĩũnda na kũndũ kwanake vyũ
Ecclesiastes2:6 nĩneeseũvĩsye ndia sya manzĩ
Ecclesiastes2:7 nĩnathooie athũkũmi aũme na eĩtu
Ecclesiastes2:8 o na nĩneeyũmbanĩsye vetha na thaavu
Ecclesiastes2:9 Kwondũ wa ũu naĩ mũnene
Ecclesiastes2:10 Na o kĩla metho makwa mendaa ndyaamavata; ndyaaima ngoo yakwa ũtanu o na wĩva; nũndũ ngoo yakwa yatanaa nũndũ wa wĩa wakwa w’onthe; na ũu waĩ kĩanda kyakwa kwondũ wa wĩa wakwa w’onthe.
Ecclesiastes2:11 Na ĩndĩ nasisya wĩa w’onthe ũla moko makwa meekie
Ecclesiastes2:12 Na ĩndĩ neethyũũa nĩsisye
Ecclesiastes2:13 Na ĩndĩ noona kana ũĩ nũvĩtũkĩte motanu kũasa
Ecclesiastes2:14 Metho ma mũndũ mũĩ me mũtwe kwake
Ecclesiastes2:15 Nĩvo ĩndĩ naisye ngoonĩ yakwa
Ecclesiastes2:16 Nũndũ ũndũ wa mũndũ mũĩ
Ecclesiastes2:17 Kwondũ wa ũu namena thayũ
Ecclesiastes2:18 Na namena wĩa wakwa w’onthe ũla neethĩnĩsye ĩtheo wa syũa
Ecclesiastes2:19 Na ũla wĩsĩ nũũ ethĩwa akethĩwa mũndũ mũĩ kana ndia? Ĩndĩ nake akethĩwa ĩũlũ wa wĩa wakwa w’onthe ũla neethĩnĩsye
Ecclesiastes2:20 Kwondũ wa ũu nĩneethyũũie nĩtume ngoo yakwa ĩyĩtũka ũndũ wa wĩa w’onthe ũla neethĩnĩsye ĩtheo wa syũa.
Ecclesiastes2:21 Nũndũ kwi mũndũ ũla ũtethasya wĩa wake na ũĩ
Ecclesiastes2:22 Nũndũ mũndũ e na kyaũ kwondũ wa wĩa wake w’onthe
Ecclesiastes2:23 Nũndũ mĩthenya yake yonthe no mawoo
Ecclesiastes2:24 Kũti ũndũ ũseo kwa mũndũ kũvĩtũka kũya na kũnyw’a
Ecclesiastes2:25 Nũndũ nũũ ũtonya kũya
Ecclesiastes2:26 Nũndũ mũndũ ũla ũmwendeeasya Ngai nũmũnengae ũĩ

Ecclesiastes3:7 ĩvinda ya kũtembũa

Ecclesiastes3:9 Mũtethya wa wĩa e na ũunĩko mwaũ ũndũnĩ ũla ũtethasya?
Ecclesiastes3:10 Nĩnonete thĩna ũla Ngai ũnengete ana ma andũ mathĩnaw’e nĩw’o.
Ecclesiastes3:11 Nũseũvĩtye kĩla kĩndũ kĩthĩwe kĩseo mũno ĩvindanĩ yakyo: o na nĩwiĩte nthĩ yonthe ngoonĩ syoo
Ecclesiastes3:12 Nĩnĩsĩ vati ũndũ ũseo kwoo

Ecclesiastes3:22 Kwondũ wa ũu noonie vati ũndũ ũseo mbee
Ecclesiastes4:1 Na ĩndĩ nasyoka na noona mathĩna onthe ala mekawa ĩtheo wa syũa: na
Ecclesiastes4:2 Kwondũ wa ũu nataĩa ala akw’ũ ala makwie tene kwĩ ala me thayũ kũvika yu;
Ecclesiastes4:3 ĩĩ
Ecclesiastes4:4 Nĩvo ĩndĩ noonie wĩa w’onthe na kĩla wĩa wĩ na ũtũĩka
Ecclesiastes4:5 Ndia nĩkwatanasya syaa syayo
Ecclesiastes4:6 Ũvĩ ũmwe wusĩe
Ecclesiastes4:7 Nĩvo ĩndĩ nasyokie na noona no mana ĩtheo wa syũa.

Ecclesiastes4:16 Kũtyaĩ mũmĩnũkĩlyo wa andũ onthe
Ecclesiastes5:1 Sũvĩa kũũ kwaku yĩla ũendaa nyũmbanĩ ya Ngai; nũndũ kũthengeea wĩw’e kwĩ kavaa kwĩ kũnengane nthembo ya ndia: nũndũ ityĩsĩ nĩsyĩkaa ũthũku.
Ecclesiastes5:2 Ndũkethĩwe ũkĩvulũka na kanyw’a waku
Ecclesiastes5:3 Nũndũ ndoto nĩyũkaa nũndũ wa wĩa kwingĩva
Ecclesiastes5:4 Yĩla weevĩtĩa Ngai wĩvĩto
Ecclesiastes5:5 Nĩ kavaa ũkalea kwĩvĩta
Ecclesiastes5:6 Ndũkaeke kanyw’a waku ũvĩtĩthya mwĩĩ waku; o na ndũkaneene mbee wa ũla mũlaĩka atĩ nĩ ĩvĩtyo: nũndũ wa kĩ Ngai ũthataa akĩw’a wasya waku
Ecclesiastes5:7 Nũndũ wingĩvonĩ wa ndoto kwĩ maũndũ ma mana
Ecclesiastes5:8 Ethĩwa wĩona kũthĩnw’a kwa ngya
Ecclesiastes5:9 Na ũndũ ũngĩ ũtandĩthyo wa nthĩ nĩ wa onthe: mũsumbĩ we mwene athũkũmawa nĩ mũũnda.
Ecclesiastes5:10 Ũla wendaa vetha ndakeanĩwa nĩ vetha; kana ũla wendaa wingĩ vamwe na wingĩvo: o na ũu naw’o nĩ mana.
Ecclesiastes5:11 Yĩla syĩndũ syaingĩva
Ecclesiastes5:12 Too kwa mũndũ ũtethasya wĩa wĩ mũyo
Ecclesiastes5:13 Kwĩ ũthũku wĩ woo ũla nonete ĩtheo wa syũa
Ecclesiastes5:14 na mothwii asu makyanangĩka kwondũ wa ũndũ ũthũku; na ethĩwa nake nũsyaĩte mwana
Ecclesiastes5:15 O ũndũ waumie ĩvunĩ ya nyinyia
Ecclesiastes5:16 O na ũu naw’o nĩ ũthũku wĩ woo
Ecclesiastes5:17 O na mĩthenya yake yonthe aĩaa kĩvindunĩ
Ecclesiastes5:18 Sisya
Ecclesiastes5:19 O na kĩla mũndũ ũla Ngai ũmũnengete ũthwii na syĩndũ nyingĩ
Ecclesiastes5:20 Nũndũ ndakalilikana mũno mĩthenya ya thayũ wake; nĩkwĩthĩwa Ngai nũmũsũngĩaa ũtanunĩ wa ngoo yake.
Ecclesiastes6:1 Ve ũthũku ũla nonete ĩtheo wa syũa
Ecclesiastes6:2 mũndũ ũla Ngai ũmũnengae ũthwii
Ecclesiastes6:3 Ethĩwa mũndũ akasyaa syana ĩana
Ecclesiastes6:4 nũndũ nĩkyũkaa kya mana
Ecclesiastes6:5 o na ĩngĩ kityaona syũa kana ũyĩmanya; kyu kĩ na ũthũmũo kũte ũla ũngĩ:
Ecclesiastes6:6 ĩĩ
Ecclesiastes6:7 Wĩa w’onthe wa mũndũ nĩ kwondũ wa kanyw’a wake
Ecclesiastes6:8 Nũndũ ũla mũĩ akĩlĩtye ndia na kyaũ? Kana ũla ngya e na kyaũ
Ecclesiastes6:9 Kwona kwa metho kwĩ kavaa kwĩ kwanganga na wendi; o na ũu nĩ mana na ta kũsemban’ya na kĩseve.
Ecclesiastes6:10 O kĩla kyaĩ kw’o
Ecclesiastes6:11 Nĩkwĩthĩwa kwĩ syĩndũ nyingĩ ila singĩvasya maũndũ ma mana
Ecclesiastes6:12 Nũndũ nũũ ũla wĩsĩ ũla ũseo kwa mũndũ thayũnĩ wake
Ecclesiastes7:1 Syĩtwa ĩseo yĩ kavaa kwĩ mauta me vata mũno; na mũthenya wa kũkw’a wĩ kavaa kwĩ mũthenya wa kũsyawa kwa mũndũ.
Ecclesiastes7:2 Nĩ kavaa kũthi nyũmbanĩ ya kũmetea kwĩ kũthi nyũmbanĩ ya kũĩĩwa mboka: nũndũ ũu nĩ mũminũkĩlyo wa andũ onthe; na ũla wĩ thayũ akaia ũndũ ũsu ngoonĩ yake.
Ecclesiastes7:3 Woo wĩ kavaa kwĩ kũtheka; nũndũ kwondũ wa woo kwoneka ũthyũnĩ ngoo nĩnĩũtanw’a.
Ecclesiastes7:4 Ngoo ya ũla mũĩ yĩ nyũmbanĩ ya kũmetea; ĩndĩ ngoo sya ndia syĩ nyũmbanĩ ya kũtanĩa.
Ecclesiastes7:5 Nĩ kavaa kwĩw’a ũkan’yo wa ũla mũĩ
Ecclesiastes7:6 O tondũ kũilyĩ kũlalamũka kwa mĩw’a ungu wa mbisũ
Ecclesiastes7:7 Vate ndĩi kũvutana nĩkũmũtw’ĩkĩthasya mũndũ mũĩ mũtumanu; na ĩvaki nĩyanangaa ũmanyi.
Ecclesiastes7:8 Mũminũkĩlyo wa ũndũ nĩ kavaa kwĩ wambĩlĩlyo; na mũmĩĩsya vevanĩ nĩ kavaa kwĩ mwĩkathĩĩi vevanĩ.
Ecclesiastes7:9 Ndũkethĩwe wĩ mĩtũkĩ kũthata vevanĩ waku; nũndũ ũthatu wĩkalaa kĩthũinĩ kya ndia.
Ecclesiastes7:10 Ndũkasye
Ecclesiastes7:11 Ũĩ nĩ mũseo o ta ũtiĩwa; nĩ mũseo mbee kwa ala monaa syũa.
Ecclesiastes7:12 Nũndũ ũĩ nĩ ũsũvĩo
Ecclesiastes7:13 Sũanĩa wĩa wa Ngai: nũndũ nũũ ũtonya kũlũngalya kĩla we wathyoekisye?
Ecclesiastes7:14 Mũthenya wa ũunĩko tana
Ecclesiastes7:15 Ũũ w’onthe nĩnonete mĩthenyanĩ yakwa ya mana: ve ũndũ mũlũngalu ũla waaa ũlũngalunĩ wake
Ecclesiastes7:16 Ndũkethĩwe na ũlũngalu mũvĩtũku; na ndũkethĩwe na ũĩ mũvĩtũku: wĩyanangĩa mwene kĩ?
Ecclesiastes7:17 Ndũkethĩwe na ũthũku mũvĩtũku
Ecclesiastes7:18 Nĩ ũseo ũkwate ũndũ ũũ; ĩĩ
Ecclesiastes7:19 Uĩ nĩ vinya kwa mũndũ ũla wĩ na ũĩ kũvĩtũka asumbĩki ĩkũmi ala me ndũani.
Ecclesiastes7:20 Vate ndĩi kũti mũndũ mũlũngalũ ĩũlũ wa nthĩ
Ecclesiastes7:21 O na ndũkethukĩĩsye ndeto syonthe ila ĩneenawa
Ecclesiastes7:22 nũndũ mavinda maingĩ ngoo yaku nayo nĩyĩsĩ kana we mwene nũumĩte angĩ.
Ecclesiastes7:23 Ũu w’onthe nĩndatĩte kwa ũĩ: naisye
Ecclesiastes7:24 Ũla wĩ kw’o
Ecclesiastes7:25 Nĩneethyũũie
Ecclesiastes7:26 Nakwa nĩngwona wĩ ũũ kwĩ kĩkw’ũ mũndũ mũka ũla ngoo yake yĩ itei na mĩkwa
Ecclesiastes7:27 Sisya
Ecclesiastes7:28 Ũndũ ũla ngoo yakwa yendaa kũmantha ĩndĩ ndĩnamba kũwona: mũndũ mũũme ũmwe katĩ wa ngili nĩnonete; ĩndĩ mũndũ mũka katĩ wa asu onthe ndyaona.
Ecclesiastes7:29 Sisya
Ecclesiastes8:1 Nũũ ũilyĩ ta mũndũ mũĩ? Na nũũ ũla wĩsĩ ũalyũlo wa ũndũ? Ũĩ wa mũndũ nũtisangĩthasya ũthyũ wake
Ecclesiastes8:2 Nĩngũkũtaa
Ecclesiastes8:3 Ndũkekalaate kuma vala ũĩ: ndũkething’ĩĩsye ũndũnĩ ũthũku: nũndũ nĩwĩkaa o ũndũ ũla ũmwendeeasya.
Ecclesiastes8:4 Nũndũ ndeto ya mũsumbĩ yĩ na vinya; na nũũ ũtonya kũmwĩa
Ecclesiastes8:5 O ũla ũkakwata mwĩao ndakamanya ũndũ ũthũku; na ngoo ya mũndũ mũĩ nĩmanyaa ĩvinda na ũsilĩlo:
Ecclesiastes8:6 nũndũ kwondũ wa kĩla ũndũ kwĩ ĩvinda na ũsilĩlo; nĩkwĩthĩwa thĩna wa mũndũ nĩ mũnene ĩũlũ wake:
Ecclesiastes8:7 nũndũ ndesĩ ũla ũkethĩwa; nũndũ nũũ ũtonya kũmũtavya kũkethĩwa ata?
Ecclesiastes8:8 Vati mũndũ ũla wĩ na vinya ĩũlũ wa veva
Ecclesiastes8:9 Ũũ w’onthe nĩnonete

Ecclesiastes8:12 O na ethĩwa mũndũ mwathe akeeka ũthũku mavĩnda ĩana
Ecclesiastes8:13 ĩndĩ kũtikethĩwa ũseo kwa ũla mũthũku o nake ndakongeleela mĩthenya yake

Ecclesiastes8:16 Yĩla nanenganie ngoo yakwa ĩmanye ũĩ
Ecclesiastes8:17 nĩvo ĩndĩ noonĩe wĩa w’onthe wa Ngai
Ecclesiastes9:1 Ũu w’onthe naia ngoonĩ yakwa
Ecclesiastes9:2 Maũndũ onthe mokaa ũndũ ũmwe kwa onthe; ve ũndũ ũmwe kwa ũla mũlũngalu na kwa ũla mũthũku; kwa ũla mũseo na kwa ũla mũtheu na ũla mũvuku; kwa ũla ũthembaa na kwa ũla ũtathembaa; o tondũ ũla mũseo ũilyĩ
Ecclesiastes9:3 Ũũ nĩ ũthũku maũndũnĩ onthe ala mekawa ĩtheo wa syũa
Ecclesiastes9:4 Indĩ kwa ũla ũkwatene na onthe ala me thayũ kwĩ wĩkwatyo; nũndũ ngitĩ yĩ thayũ yĩ kavaa kwĩ mũnyambũ mũkw’ũ.
Ecclesiastes9:5 Nũndũ ala me thayũ mesĩ makakw’a; ĩndĩ ala akw’ũ matyĩsĩ ũndũ o na wĩva
Ecclesiastes9:6 Wendo woo
Ecclesiastes9:7 Ĩendee
Ecclesiastes9:8 Ngũa syaku nĩsyĩthĩwe syĩ nzaũ mavinda onthe; na mũtwe waku ndũkaanyĩvĩwe nĩ mauta.
Ecclesiastes9:9 Ĩkala na ũtanu na kĩveti kĩla ũkyendete mĩthenya yonthe ya thayũ waku wa mana
Ecclesiastes9:10 O ũla kw’oko kwaku kwona wa kwĩka
Ecclesiastes9:11 Nĩneethyũũie
Ecclesiastes9:12 Nũndũ mũndũ nake ndamanyaa ĩvinda yake: ta makũyũ ala makwataw’a kĩteinĩ kĩthũku
Ecclesiastes9:13 O na nĩnonete ũĩ ĩtheo wa syũa ta ũũ
Ecclesiastes9:14 Kwaĩ ndũa nini
Ecclesiastes9:15 Na nthĩnĩ wayo kwoonekie mũndũ mũĩ ngya
Ecclesiastes9:16 Nĩvo ĩndĩ naisye
Ecclesiastes9:17 Ndeto sya ũla mũĩ ikĩthukĩĩw’a na ũuu nĩ kavaa kwĩ kĩlonzo kya ũla ũsumbĩkaa katĩ wa ndia.
Ecclesiastes9:18 Ũĩ wĩ kavaa kwĩ mĩio ya kaũ; ĩndĩ mũndũ ũmwe mwathe nĩwanangaa ũseo mwingĩ.
Ecclesiastes10:1 Ngi ngw’ũ nitumaa mauta ma mũseũvya wa syĩndũ ĩla ĩnyungaa nesa maumya mũuke mũthũku; o ta ũu ũtumanu mũnini nũvĩtĩte ũĩ na ndaĩa.
Ecclesiastes10:2 Ngoo ya mũndũ mũĩ yĩ kw’okonĩ kwake kwa aũme
Ecclesiastes10:3 Ĩĩ
Ecclesiastes10:4 Ethĩwa veva wa mũsumbĩki nũũkũkĩlĩla ndũkaume vandũ vaku; nũndũ ũuu nũvoovasya movĩtyo manene.
Ecclesiastes10:5 Kwĩ ũthũku ũla nonete ĩtheo wa syũa
Ecclesiastes10:6 ũtumanu nĩwiĩtwe motũlunĩ manene
Ecclesiastes10:7 Nĩnonete athũkũmi makuĩtwe nĩ mbalasi
Ecclesiastes10:8 Ũla wĩĩnza ĩima akavalũka nthĩnĩ wayo; na o ũla wĩvũthũa wako nzoka ĩkamũũma.
Ecclesiastes10:9 O ũla walasya mavia akakũnwa nĩmo; na ũla watũaa mĩtĩ elikasya mũisyonĩ.
Ecclesiastes10:10 Ethĩwa kĩaa nĩ kĩtuvu
Ecclesiastes10:11 Ethĩwa nzoka nĩyaũma ĩtanamba kũvoovw’a nĩvo ĩndĩ kũti ũtandĩthyo wa mũvoosya.
Ecclesiastes10:12 Ndeto sya kanyw’a wa mũndũ mũĩ nĩ nzeo; ĩndĩ ilomo sya ndia ĩkamĩmelya.
Ecclesiastes10:13 Wambĩlĩlyo wa ndeto sya kanyw’a wayo nĩ ũtumanu; na mũminũkĩlyo wa kũneena kwayo nĩ ũũũki mũthũku.
Ecclesiastes10:14 O na ndia nĩyingĩvasya ndeto: ĩndĩ mũndũ ndamanya ũndũ ũkethĩwa; na ũndũ ũla ũkethiwa ĩtina wake
Ecclesiastes10:15 Wĩa wa ndia nũnoasya kĩla ĩmwe yasyo; nũndũ ndĩsĩ ũndũ ĩtonya kũthi ndũanĩ.
Ecclesiastes10:16 Woo nĩ waku
Ecclesiastes10:17 Wĩ na ũtanu
Ecclesiastes10:18 Nũndũ wa ũtulu kĩala nĩkĩlikaa nthĩnĩ; na kwondũ wa ũtulu wa moko nyũmba nĩyuasya.
Ecclesiastes10:19 Mboka nĩvokawa ũndũ wa kũtheka
Ecclesiastes10:20 Ndũkamũume mũsumbĩ
Ecclesiastes11:1 Ĩkya kĩmũtũ kyaku ĩũlũ wa manzĩ; nũndũ ũkakyona ĩtina wa mĩthenya mingĩ.
Ecclesiastes11:2 Nenga andũ mũonza kĩlungu
Ecclesiastes11:3 Ethĩwa mathweo nĩmausũĩtwe nĩ mbua
Ecclesiastes11:4 Ũla ũsiasya kĩseve ndakavuĩa; na ũla ũsiasya mathweo ndakaketha.
Ecclesiastes11:5 O ũndũ ũtesĩ nzĩa ya kĩseve
Ecclesiastes11:6 Kĩoko vuĩa mbeũ syaku
Ecclesiastes11:7 Nĩ w’o kyeni kĩ mũyo
Ecclesiastes11:8 Ĩĩ
Ecclesiastes11:9 Tana
Ecclesiastes11:10 Kwondũ wa ũu veta woo ngoonĩ yaku
Ecclesiastes12:1 O na lilikana Mũmbi waku mĩthenya ya wana waku mĩthenya mĩthũku ĩtanamba kũka
Ecclesiastes12:2 syũa
Ecclesiastes12:3 mũthenya ũla asũvĩi ma nyũmba makatetema
Ecclesiastes12:4 na mĩomo ĩkavĩngwa nzĩanĩ nene; yĩla wasya wa kũthia wĩnyiva
Ecclesiastes12:5 ĩĩ
Ecclesiastes12:6 ũlii wa vetha ũtanamba kũthaw’a
Ecclesiastes12:7 na kĩtoo kĩisyoka nthĩ o ũndũ kyailyĩ
Ecclesiastes12:8 No mana
Ecclesiastes12:9 Na ũndũ ũngĩ
Ecclesiastes12:10 Mũtavan’ya nĩwatatie kwona ndeto syĩ mũyo
Ecclesiastes12:11 Ndeto sya ũla mũĩ iilyĩ ta mĩsenge; na ndeto sya anene ala mombanasya
Ecclesiastes12:12 Na mbee wa ũu
Ecclesiastes12:13 Ũũ nĩw’o mũminũkĩlyo wa ũvoo; w’onthe nĩwĩw’ĩkĩte: Kĩa Ngai
Ecclesiastes12:14 Nũndũ Ngaĩ akaete kĩla wĩa ũsilĩlonĩ
SongOfSongs1:1 Wathi wa mbathi
SongOfSongs1:2 We namumunye nyie na momumunyo ma kanyw’a wake: Nũndũ wendo waku wĩ kavaa kwĩ mbinyu.
SongOfSongs1:3 Mauta maku me mũuke mũseo; Syĩtwa yaku nĩ ta mauta metĩkye; Kwondũ wa ũu eĩtu atheu nĩmakwendaa.
SongOfSongs1:4 Ngusya; naitũ nĩtũũkũvikĩla tũsembete: Mũsumbĩ nĩwandetie tũsũmbanĩ twake; Tũkatana na kũkwĩw’ĩa mũyo; Tũkaweta wendo waku kũte mbinyu: Nĩmakwendaa na w’o.

Isaiah1:1 Woni wa Isaia mwana wa Amosu
Isaiah1:2 Ĩw’ai
Isaiah1:3 Ng’ombe nĩyĩsĩ mwene wayo
Isaiah1:4 A! Mbaĩ mbathe
Isaiah1:5 Nũndũ wa kĩ mũũkũnangwa kũvika na yu
Isaiah1:6 Kuma ũnyaĩĩ wa kũũ o na kũvika mũtwe vati vandũ vaima; no mawũkite
Isaiah1:7 Nthĩ yenyu nĩ nthei; ndũa syenyu nivĩvĩtw’e na mwaki; aeni nĩmekũmina nthĩ yenyu mwene
Isaiah1:8 Na mwĩĩtu wa Saioni nũtiĩtwe ta ĩlwanda mũũndanĩ wa mĩsavivũ
Isaiah1:9 Keka Yeova wa nguthu watũtiĩe ũtialo mũnini mũno
Isaiah1:10 Ĩthukĩĩsyei ndeto ya Yeova inyw’ĩ ala mũsumbĩkaa Sotomo; teai matũ mwĩw’e mĩao ya Ngai waitũ
Isaiah1:11 Wingĩ wa nthembo syenyu ũmbaĩlĩte kyaũ? Easya ũu Yeova; nĩnĩkolete nthembo sya kũvĩvw’a sya ndũũme
Isaiah1:12 Yĩla mũkaa kwĩyonan’ya mbee wakwa
Isaiah1:13 Mũtikaete nthembo ingĩ sya mana; ũvani nĩ ũthatyo kwakwa; mwei mũtisu na savato
Isaiah1:14 Ngoo yakwa nĩmenaa myei yenyu mĩtisu
Isaiah1:15 Na yĩla mwĩtambũũkya moko menyu
Isaiah1:16 Thambai
Isaiah1:17 ĩmanyĩsyei kwĩka nesa; manthai sila wa katĩ
Isaiah1:18 Ũkai yu
Isaiah1:19 Ethĩwa mũkeetĩkĩla na kwĩw’a
Isaiah1:20 ĩndĩ mwalea na kũng’enda
Isaiah1:21 Kaĩ ndũa yĩ kĩthito nĩtw’ĩkĩte ĩlwaya! O ĩla yausũĩte ũsili wa katĩ! Ũlũngalu nĩwekalaa nthĩnĩ wayo
Isaiah1:22 Vetha waku nũtw’ĩkĩte makwaũ ma vetha
Isaiah1:23 Ala maku me mbee ũsumbĩnĩ nĩ ang’endu
Isaiah1:24 Kwondũ wa ũu Mwĩaĩi
Isaiah1:25 na ngathyũũa kw’oko kwakwa kwĩthĩwe ĩũlũ waku
Isaiah1:26 na ngatũnga asili maku methĩwe ta ĩvinda ya mbee
Isaiah1:27 Saioni ĩkoovow’a na sila wa katĩ
Isaiah1:28 Ĩndĩ kwanangwa kwa avĩtan’ya na andũ athe kũkethĩwa ĩvinda yĩmwe
Isaiah1:29 Nũndũ makasonoka ũndũ wa mĩtĩ ya myaloni ĩla mwendie
Isaiah1:30 Nũndũ mũkeethĩwa ta mwaloni ũla matũ maw’o mavovaa
Isaiah1:31 Na ũla wĩ vinya akeethĩwa ta ngũno
Isaiah2:1 Ndeto ĩla Isaia mwana wa Amosu wonie ũndũ wa Yuta na Yelusaleme.
Isaiah2:2 Na kũkeethĩwa mĩthenya ya mũminũkĩlyo
Isaiah2:3 Na ngo nyingĩ sya andũ ikaenda na kwasya
Isaiah2:4 Na akasilan’ya mbaĩ
Isaiah2:5 Inyw’ĩ nyũmba ya Yakovo
Isaiah2:6 Nũndũ nũtiĩte andũ maku nyũmba ya Yakovo
Isaiah2:7 Na nthĩ yoo nĩyusũĩte vetha na thaavu
Isaiah2:8 O na nthĩ yoo nĩyusũĩte mĩvw’anano; nĩmathaithaa wĩa wa moko moo ene
Isaiah2:9 Na mũndũ ũte nguma nũkwĩkunamya
Isaiah2:10 Lika ĩvianĩ
Isaiah2:11 Mũsyaĩlye wa ngathĩĩo wa mũndũ ũkanyivw’a
Isaiah2:12 Nũndũ kũkeethĩwa mũthenya wa Yeova wa nguthu ũla wĩũkĩa kyonthe kĩla kĩ na ngathĩĩo na wĩng’athĩlĩlyo
Isaiah2:13 na ĩũlũ wa mĩkũũ yonthe ya Levanoni
Isaiah2:14 na ĩũlũ wa iĩma syonthe ndũlu
Isaiah2:15 na ĩũlũ wa kĩla mwako mũtũlu wa mũnyoolo
Isaiah2:16 na ĩũlũ wa ngalawa syonthe sya Talisisi
Isaiah2:17 Na wĩnenevyo wa mũndũ ũkanyivw’a
Isaiah2:18 Na mĩvw’anano ĩkaaa vyũ.
Isaiah2:19 Na andũ makalika ngunganĩ sya mavia
Isaiah2:20 Mũthenya ũsu andũ makekĩsya mbuko na mbuvu mĩvw’anano yoo ya vetha
Isaiah2:21 malike ngunganĩ sya mavia
Isaiah2:22 Taanĩsyai na mũndũ
Isaiah3:1 Nũndũ
Isaiah3:2 mũndũ wĩ ũtonyi
Isaiah3:3 kavuteni wa andũ mĩongo ĩtano
Isaiah3:4 Na ngatw’a syana syĩthĩwe anene moo me mbee ũsumbĩnĩ
Isaiah3:5 Na andũ makathĩnw’a
Isaiah3:6 Yĩla mũndũ ũkakwata mwana‐a‐inyia nyũmbanĩ ya ĩthe wake
Isaiah3:7 mũthenya ũsu akookĩlya wasya wake
Isaiah3:8 Nũndũ Yelusaleme nĩ mbanangĩku
Isaiah3:9 Kwoneka kwa mothyũ moo nĩkũũmakũsĩĩa; na nĩmekwonan’ya naĩ yoo ta Sotomo
Isaiah3:10 Neenai ũndũ wa ũla mũlũngalu
Isaiah3:11 Woo nĩ wa ũla mũthũku! Kũkeethĩwa ũthũku kwake; nĩkwĩthĩwa o ũndũ moko make mekĩte now’o ũkekwa.
Isaiah3:12 Ũndũ wa andũ makwa
Isaiah3:13 Yeova nĩwũkĩlĩte atetee
Isaiah3:14 Yeova akalika silanĩ na atumĩa ma andũ make
Isaiah3:15 nĩkĩ mũũvinyĩĩa andũ makwa
Isaiah3:16 Na ĩngĩ Yeova asya
Isaiah3:17 kwondũ wa ũu Mwĩaĩi akaete ũwau wa ivala malolotyanĩ ma mĩtwe ya eĩtu ma Saioni
Isaiah3:18 Mũthenya ũsu Mwĩaĩi akaveta ũseo wa nzili syoo
Isaiah3:19 na mĩnai
Isaiah3:20 tũkovila twĩ wanake
Isaiah3:21 ngome
Isaiah3:22 ngũa sya kwĩkĩa yĩla kwĩ mboka
Isaiah3:23 tũsisyo
Isaiah3:24 Na kũkeethĩwa
Isaiah3:25 Andũ maku makavalũkw’a na ũvyũ
Isaiah3:26 Na mbingĩlo syake ikaĩa na kũmeta; nake akeethĩwa aeketwe na kwĩkala nthĩ.
Isaiah4:1 Na aka mũonza makakwata mũndũ mũũme ũmwe mũthenya ũsu
Isaiah4:2 Mũthenya ũsu ũvonge wa Yeova ũkethĩwa mwanakavu na wĩ na ndaĩa
Isaiah4:3 Na kũkeethĩwa
Isaiah4:4 yĩla Mwĩaĩi ũkethĩwa athambĩtye ũvuku wa eĩtu ma Saioni
Isaiah4:5 Yeova akatambũũkya ĩũlũ wa wĩkalo w’onthe wa kĩĩma kya Saioni
Isaiah4:6 Na vakeethĩwa ĩeema ũndũ wa muunyĩ mũthenya kwondũ wa muutĩa
Isaiah5:1 Nĩnĩmwinĩe mwendwa wakwa wathi wa mwendwa wakwa ũndũ wa mũũnda wake wa mĩsavivũ. Mwendwa wakwa aĩ na mũũnda wa mĩsavivũ kĩĩmanĩ kĩnou mũno:
Isaiah5:2 na awĩnza
Isaiah5:3 Na yu
Isaiah5:4 Nĩ ũndũ ũngĩ wĩva waĩ ũtonya kwĩkwa mũũndanĩ wakwa wa mĩsavivũ
Isaiah5:5 Na yu nĩngũmũtavya ũndũ nĩwĩka mũũnda wakwa wa mĩsavivũ: ngaveta wiio waw’o
Isaiah5:6 na ngootw’ĩkĩthya ĩei; ndũkasewa kana kũĩmwa; ĩndĩ ũkamesya mĩtae na mĩw’a: o na ngeeaĩa mathweo matikausye mbua ĩũlũ waw’o.
Isaiah5:7 Nũndũ mũũnda wa mĩsavivũ wa Yeova wa nguthu nĩw’o nyũmba ya Isilaeli
Isaiah5:8 Woo nĩ wa ala mathengeanĩasya nyũmba na nyũmba
Isaiah5:9 Matũnĩ makwa Yeova wa nguthu easya atĩĩ
Isaiah5:10 Nũndũ matambya maana ana ma mũũnda wa mĩsavivũ makasyaa vathi ĩmwe
Isaiah5:11 Woo nĩ wa ala mokĩlaa kĩoko tene
Isaiah5:12 Na mbeve na kananda
Isaiah5:13 Kwondũ wa ũu andũ makwa nĩ aendu me atave kwondũ wa kũnyivĩwa nĩ ũmanyi; na andũ moo me ndaĩa me na nzaa
Isaiah5:14 Kwondũ wa ũu Seoli nĩvanenevetye kwenda kwavo
Isaiah5:15 Na mũndũ ũte nguma nũnũũkunamw’a
Isaiah5:16 ĩndĩ Yeova wa nguthu nũnũũtaĩwa kwondũ wa ũtw’ĩo wa sila wa katĩ
Isaiah5:17 Na ĩndĩ tũtena twa malondu tũkaĩthw’a o ta twĩ kĩsesinĩ kyatw’o
Isaiah5:18 Woo nĩ wa ala makusasya ũthũku na ndii sya ũvũngũ
Isaiah5:19 ala maasya
Isaiah5:20 Woo nĩ wa ala metaa ũthũku ũseo
Isaiah5:21 Woo nĩ wa ala meyonaa me kĩlĩko
Isaiah5:22 Woo nĩ wa ala ai ma kũnyw’a mbinyu
Isaiah5:23 ala kwondũ wa ĩvaki matalaa athũku atĩ nĩ alũngalu
Isaiah5:24 Kwondũ wa ũu o tondũ ũmũĩ wa mwaki ũvĩvasya mavuthĩ
Isaiah5:25 Kwondũ wa ũu ũthatu wa Yeova nũmakanĩe andũ make
Isaiah5:26 Nake akookĩlĩlya i mbaĩ kĩvevelo syĩ kũasa
Isaiah5:27 Vai ũmwe katĩ woo ũkethĩwa na mĩnoo kana kũlulutĩka; vai ũmwe ũkombosya kana kũkoma; o na mĩsivi ya inyunyu syoo ndĩkaleela

Isaiah6:3 Na kĩla ũmwe aneenanasya na ũla ũngĩ akyasya

Isaiah9:2 Andũ ala maendaa me kĩvindunĩ nĩmonete kyeni kĩnene: ala matwĩe nthĩ yĩ kyuu kya kĩkw’ũ

Isaiah11:2 Na Veva wa Yeova nũkekalaa ĩũlũ wake

Isaiah11:5 Na ũlũngalu ũkethĩawa mũsivi wa kwĩvotoa kwake
Isaiah11:6 Na nzũi nĩkekalanasya na katena ka ĩlondu
Isaiah11:7 Na ng’ombe na nduva nikaĩsanĩaa vamwe; tũsaũ twasyo tũkatindiaa vamwe; mũnyambũ nũkaĩsaa nyeki ta ng’ombe.

Isaiah15:1 Ndeto ngito ũndũ wa Moavi. Nũndũ ũtukũ o ũmwe ndũa ya Ali nthĩ ya Moavi nĩtw’ĩkĩthĩtw’e ĩanzo
Isaiah15:2 Nĩmambatĩte Mbayithi
Isaiah15:3 Nzĩanĩ syoo nene nĩmevotoaa makunia; nyũmbanĩ syoo ĩũlũ
Isaiah15:4 Na Esivoni na Eleale nikũĩa; wasya wasyo nũkwĩw’ĩka o kũvika Yaasa: kwondũ wa ũu andũ ma Moavi ala mekĩĩte mĩio ya kaũ nĩmaĩaa na wasya mũnene; ngoo yake nĩnĩũtetemea nthĩnĩ wake.
Isaiah15:5 Ngoo yakwa nĩnĩkũĩa kwondũ wa Moavi; anene mayo me ndaĩa masemba Nzoali
Isaiah15:6 Nũndũ manzĩ ma Nimilimu makeethĩwa mang’alĩte; nũndũ nyeki nĩyũmĩte
Isaiah15:7 Kwondũ wa ũu wingĩ ũla mombanĩtye

Isaiah16:3 Taa
Isaiah16:4 Alũngw’a makwa matũe kwaku; ũvoo wa Moavi
Isaiah16:5 Na kĩvĩla kya ũsumbĩ kĩkalũlũmĩlw’a ũseonĩ wĩ wendo; na ũmwe akakĩkalĩla na w’o

Isaiah16:8 Nũndũ mĩũnda ya Esivoni nĩnĩkũma
Isaiah16:9 Kwondũ wa ũu ngaĩa vamwe na andũ ma ku Yaseli ũndũ wa mũsavivũ wa Sivima; ngakũnyithya na methoi makwa

Isaiah17:1 Ndeto ngito ũndũ wa Ndamasiku. Sisya
Isaiah17:2 Ndũa sya Aloeli nĩtiĩtwe; itw’ĩkĩte sya ndĩthya sya mbũi na malondu
Isaiah17:3 Na ngome ĩkathela kwa Evalaimu
Isaiah17:4 Na kũkeethĩwa mũthenya ũsu
Isaiah17:5 Na kũkeethĩwa o ta yĩla mũkethi ũkethaa lĩu ũtũĩtye
Isaiah17:6 Ĩndĩ kũkatiala mothean’yo
Isaiah17:7 Mũthenya ũsu andũ makasisya Mũmbi woo
Isaiah17:8 Na matikasiasya ithembeo
Isaiah17:9 Mũthenya ũsu ndũa syoo syĩ vinya ikeethĩwa ta kũndũ kũtie mũtitũnĩ na kĩĩmanĩ ĩũlũ

Isaiah19:1 Ndeto ngito ũndũ wa Misili. Sisya
Isaiah19:2 Na ngookĩlya Amisili mokite na Amisili: na makokita kĩla ũmwe na mwana‐a‐inyia
Isaiah19:3 Na veva wa Misili ũkathelekela nthĩnĩ wayo; na ngaananga ũtao wayo; na makamantha ũtethyo kwa mĩvw’anano
Isaiah19:4 Na nganengane Amisili kw’okonĩ kwa mwĩaĩi mũthũku; na mũsumbĩ mwai akamasumbĩka
Isaiah19:5 Na manzĩ makanyiva ũkanganĩ
Isaiah19:6 Na mbũsi ikanyunga naĩ; na mĩtaũnĩ mĩnene manzĩ makanyiva na kũng’ala; mĩangi na makangaa makavova.
Isaiah19:7 Nyeki yĩ vakuvĩ na ũsĩ wa Naelo
Isaiah19:8 Na atei ma makũyũ makaĩa
Isaiah19:9 Na ĩngĩ ala matethasya wĩa na ndii nzanũe sya katane
Isaiah19:10 Na ituĩ sya Misili ikatũlangwa ilungu; onthe ala matethasya wĩa wa ũtuvwa makeew’a woo ngoonĩ syoo.
Isaiah19:11 Anene me mbee ũsumbĩnĩ ma Nzoani nĩ atumanu vyũ; ũtao wa atai ala oĩ mbee ma Valao nũtw’ĩkĩte ta wa nyamũ: mwĩmwĩa Valao ata
Isaiah19:12 Andũ maku oĩ maĩva ĩndĩ? Makũtavye yu; nĩmamanye ũndũ Yeova wa nguthu ũsũanĩĩte wa Misili.
Isaiah19:13 Anene me mbee ũsumbĩnĩ ma Nzoani nĩmatw’ĩkĩte ndia
Isaiah19:14 Yeova nũvulanĩtye veva wa ũng’endu nthĩnĩ wayo; na nĩmatumĩte Misili yaa kĩla wĩanĩ wayo
Isaiah19:15 O na kũikethĩwa wĩa o na wĩva wa Misili
Isaiah19:16 Mũthenya ũsu Amisili makethĩwa mailyĩ ta aka; na makatetema na kũkĩa nũndũ wa kũtukangĩwa kw’oko nĩ Yeova wa nguthu
Isaiah19:17 Na nthĩ ya Yuta ĩkatw’ĩka ũtĩsyo kwa Misili; kĩla ũmwe ũla wĩĩw’a ĩkĩwetwa akakwatwa nĩ w’ĩa
Isaiah19:18 Mũthenya ũsu kũkethĩwa ndũa itano nthĩ ya Misili ila ineenaa kĩthyomo kya Kanaani
Isaiah19:19 Mũthenya ũsu kũkethĩwa kĩthembeo kwondũ wa Yeova katĩ wa nthĩ ya Misili
Isaiah19:20 Na ũu ũkethĩwa wonan’yo na ũkũsĩ kwa Yeova wa nguthu nthĩ ya Misili; nũndũ makamwĩkaĩla Yeova nũndũ wa athĩn’ya
