Matthew5:47 Na ethĩwa mwĩmakethya ana‐a‐ĩthe menyu oka
Matthew5:48 Inyw’ĩ ĩndĩ ĩthĩwai eanĩu
Matthew6:1 Ĩsũvĩei mũikekae ũlũngalu wenyu mbee wa andũ
Matthew6:2 Yĩla ĩndĩ ũkũnengane motethyo
Matthew6:3 Ĩndĩ yĩla ũũnengane motethyo
Matthew6:4 nĩ kana motethyo maku methĩwe ma kĩmbithĩ: na Ĩthe waku ũla wonaa kĩmbithĩnĩ akakũĩva.
Matthew6:5 Na yĩla mũũvoya
Matthew6:6 Ĩndĩ we
Matthew6:7 Na mũkĩvoya mũikatindĩe ndeto
Matthew6:8 Mũikethĩwe ĩndĩ mũilyĩ ta asu: nũndũ Ĩthe wenyu nĩwĩsĩ ila mwĩ na vata nasyo
Matthew6:9 Inyw’ĩ ĩndĩ voyaai atĩĩ: Asa waitũ ũla wĩ ĩtunĩ
Matthew6:10 Ũsumbĩ waku wũke. Kwenda kwaku kwĩke kũũ nthĩ o ta kũya ĩtunĩ
Matthew6:11 Tũnenge ũmũnthĩ lĩu witũ ũtwĩanĩe
Matthew6:12 Naku ũtũekee mathiĩ maitũ
Matthew6:13 Na ndũkatũtwaae ũtatwanĩ ĩndĩ ũtũtangĩĩe kwa ũla mũthũku. (Nũndũ ũsumbĩ na vinya na ndaĩa nĩ syaku tene na tene
Matthew6:14 Nũndũ ethĩwa inyw’ĩ mũkamaekea andũ mavĩtyo moo
Matthew6:15 Ĩndĩ mwalea kũmaekea andũ mavĩtyo moo
Matthew6:16 O na ĩngĩ mwatĩĩa ũya
Matthew6:17 Ĩndĩ we watĩĩa ũya
Matthew6:18 nĩ kana ndũkoneke nĩ andũ kana nũtĩĩĩte ũya
Matthew6:19 Mũikeyiĩe ũthwii kũũ nthĩ vala lungulu na nganga syanangaa
Matthew6:20 ĩndĩ ĩyiĩei ũthwii ĩtunĩ
Matthew6:21 nũndũ vala ve ũthwii waku
Matthew6:22 Taa wa mwĩĩ nĩ itho: ethĩwa ĩndĩ itho yaku nĩ ĩseo
Matthew6:23 Ĩndĩ ethĩwa itho yaku nĩ ĩthũku
Matthew6:24 Kũi mũndũ ũtonya kũthũkũma mavwana elĩ: nũndũ akamũmena ũmwe
Matthew6:25 Kwondũ wa ũu nĩmwĩa
Matthew6:26 Sisyai nyũnyi sya yayaya
Matthew6:27 Na nũũ kwenyu ũla ũtonya kwondũ wa kwĩmakĩa kwake kwĩyongeleela ũasa wake mũkono ũmwe?
Matthew6:28 Na nĩkĩ mũkwĩmakĩa ũndũ wa ngũa? Sũanĩai ũndũ wa malaa ma lili ma kĩthekanĩ
Matthew6:29 ĩndĩ nĩngũmwĩa
Matthew6:30 Ethĩwa ĩndĩ Ngai nũvw’ĩkaa nyeki ya kĩthekanĩ ta ũu
Matthew6:31 Mũikemakĩe ĩndĩ
Matthew6:32 Nũndũ syĩndũ isu syonthe nimanthawa nĩ Andũ‐ma‐mbaĩ‐ingĩ; nĩkwĩthĩwa Ĩthe wenyu wa ĩtunĩ nĩwĩsĩ mwĩ na vata wa syĩndũ isu syonthe.
Matthew6:33 Ĩndĩ ambai ũmantha ũsumbĩ wake
Matthew6:34 Mũikemakĩe ĩndĩ ũndũ wa ũnĩ; nũndũ ũnĩ ũkeemakĩa e w’o. Mũthenya nĩwĩanĩwe nĩ ũthũku waw’o.
Matthew7:1 Mũikasilĩle
Matthew7:2 Nũndũ ũsilĩlo ũla mũsilĩlaa
Matthew7:3 Naku nĩkĩ ũũsisya kaũvavathĩ ke ithoni ya mwana‐a‐au
Matthew7:4 Kana ũkamwĩa mwana‐a‐au ata
Matthew7:5 Mwangangan’ya we
Matthew7:6 Mũikanenge ngitĩ kĩla kĩtheu
Matthew7:7 Voyai
Matthew7:8 nũndũ ũla ũnũkũvoya nũnũũnengwa; na ũla ũnũũmantha nũnũkwona; na ũla ũnũũvingũsya nũnũũvingũĩwa.
Matthew7:9 Kana nũũ mũndũ wenyu
Matthew7:10 Kana eetya ĩkũyũ
Matthew7:11 Ethĩwa inyw’ĩ ĩndĩ
Matthew7:12 Maũndũ onthe ĩndĩno o na meva ala mũkwenda andũ mamwĩke inyw’ĩ
Matthew7:13 Votai inyw’ĩ nthĩnĩ na mbingĩlo ĩla ntheke: nũndũ mbingĩlo nĩ nthanthau
Matthew7:14 Nũndũ mbingĩlo nĩ ntheke
Matthew7:15 Ĩsũvĩei athani ma ũvũngũ
Matthew7:16 Mũkamamanya nĩ mosyao moo. Andũ nĩmatusaa nzavivũ mĩw’anĩ
Matthew7:17 No ta ũu kĩla mũtĩ mũseo nũsyaaa ũsyao mũseo; ĩndĩ mũtĩ mũthũku nũsyaaa ũsyao mũthũku.
Matthew7:18 Mũtĩ mũseo ndũtonya ũsyaa ũsyao mũthũku
Matthew7:19 Kĩla mũtĩ ũtasyaaa ũsyao mũseo nũtemawa
Matthew7:20 Kwondũ wa ũu nĩmũkamamanya nĩ mosyao moo.
Matthew7:21 Ti kĩla mũndũ ũmbĩtaa
Matthew7:22 Mũthenya ũsu nĩ aingĩ makambĩa
Matthew7:23 Nĩvo ĩndĩ ngamatavya vyũ
Matthew7:24 Kĩla mũndũ ĩndĩ wĩw’aa ndeto ii syakwa
Matthew7:25 na mbua yaua
Matthew7:26 Na kĩla mũndũ ũla wĩw’aa ndeto ii syakwa
Matthew7:27 na mbua yaua
Matthew7:28 Na kweethĩwa Yesũ amina ũneena ndeto isu
Matthew7:29 nĩkwĩthĩwa amamanyĩasya ta ũla wĩ na ũkũmũ
Matthew8:1 Na atheea kuma kĩĩmanĩ
Matthew8:2 Na sisya
Matthew8:3 Nake atambũũkya kw’oko kwake
Matthew8:4 Na Yesũ amwĩa
Matthew8:5 Na avota Kavelinaumi
Matthew8:6 akyasya
Matthew8:7 Na amwĩa
Matthew8:8 Na ũla mũnene wa asikalĩ ĩana amũsũngĩa
Matthew8:9 Nũndũ nyie nakwa nĩ mũndũ ũla wĩaĩawa
Matthew8:10 Na Yesũ eew’a ũu
Matthew8:11 Nakwa nĩngũmwĩa
Matthew8:12 ĩndĩ ana ma ũsumbĩ makekw’a kĩvindũnĩ kĩla kĩ nza: vo vakethĩwa kĩĩo na kũvevetan’ya maeo.
Matthew8:13 Na Yesũ amwĩa ũla mũnene wa asikalĩ ĩana Ĩendee; kwĩthĩwe kwaku o tondũ ũĩkĩĩe. Na ũla mũthũkũmi avow’a kavinda o kau.
Matthew8:14 Na Yesũ athi nyũmbanĩ ya Vetelo
Matthew8:15 Nake amũkiita kw’oko
Matthew8:16 Na kwavika wĩoo
Matthew8:17 nĩ kana kwĩanĩw’e ũla waneeniwe nĩ mwathani Isaia
Matthew8:18 Na Yesũ oona makomano manene mamũthyũlũlũkĩte
Matthew8:19 Na kwooka mũandĩki ũmwe
Matthew8:20 Na Yesũ amwĩa
Matthew8:21 Na ũngĩ wa amanyĩw’a amwĩa
Matthew8:22 Ĩndĩ Yesũ amwia
Matthew8:23 Na alika ngalawanĩ
Matthew8:24 Na sisya
Matthew8:25 Na mathi vala ũĩ mamũamũkya
Matthew8:26 Na amea
Matthew8:27 Na ala andũ maseng’a
Matthew8:28 Na avika mũingo ũla ũngĩ nthĩ ya Akatalene
Matthew8:29 Na sisya makaya
Matthew8:30 Na ĩndĩ kwaĩ ĩĩthya ya ngũlũe nyingĩ vaasa nao yĩkĩya.
Matthew8:31 Na ila ndaimoni syamwĩsũva
Matthew8:32 Na asyĩa
Matthew8:33 Na ala maĩthasya
Matthew8:34 Na sisya
Matthew9:1 Na alika ngalawanĩ
Matthew9:2 Na sisya
Matthew9:3 Na sisya
Matthew9:4 Na Yesũ amanya malilikano moo
Matthew9:5 Nũndũ ũla ũvũthũ nĩ wĩva
Matthew9:6 Ĩndĩ nĩ kana mũmanye atĩ Mwana wa mũndũ e na ũkũmũ kũũ nthĩ wa kũekea naĩ (nĩvo wamwĩie ũla waĩ na ũwau wa kwaa mamutha)
Matthew9:7 Nake ookĩla
Matthew9:8 Ĩndĩ makomano moona ũu
Matthew9:9 Na Yesũ akĩvĩta kuma vau
Matthew9:10 Na kweethĩwa ekalĩte nyũmba akĩya lĩu
Matthew9:11 Na Avalisi moona ũu
Matthew9:12 Nake eew’a ũu
Matthew9:13 Ĩndĩ endai mũkemanyĩsye ũndũ ũtilyĩ ũndũ ũũ
Matthew9:14 Nĩvo ĩndĩ amanyĩw’a ma Yoana mookie
Matthew9:15 Na Yesũ amakũlya
Matthew9:16 Na vai mũndũ ũliaa kĩlio kya ngũa nzaũ ngũanĩ ngũũ; nũndũ kĩla kĩkĩawa vo nĩkyumasya kĩlungu kya ngũa ĩla ngũũ
Matthew9:17 O na andũ maiĩ-kĩaa mbinyu mbĩthĩ mathatwanĩ makũũ: nĩkwĩthĩwa mekĩa
Matthew9:18 Akĩneena maũndũ asu nao
Matthew9:19 Na Yesũ ookĩla
Matthew9:20 Na sisya
Matthew9:21 nũndũ aisye ngooni yake
Matthew9:22 Ĩndĩ Yesũ eethyũũa na amwona amwĩa
Matthew9:23 Na Yesũ alika nyũmbanĩ ya ũla mũnene
Matthew9:24 asya
Matthew9:25 Ĩndĩ ĩla nguthu yaumaalw’a nza
Matthew9:26 Na nguma ya ũndũ ũsu yanyaĩĩka nthĩ ĩsu yonthe.
Matthew9:27 Na Yesũ akĩvĩta kuma vo
Matthew9:28 Na avota nyũmba
Matthew9:29 Nĩvo ĩndĩ wakiitie metho masyo
Matthew9:30 Na metho masyo masalukw’a. Na Yesũ amakindĩlĩla na vinya
Matthew9:31 Ĩndĩ mo mauma vo
Matthew9:32 Na makyumaala
Matthew9:33 Na ndaimoni yaumwa
Matthew9:34 Ĩndĩ Avalisi masya
Matthew9:35 Na Yesũ anganga ndũa syonthe na mĩsyĩ
Matthew9:36 Na amona makomano
Matthew9:37 Na ĩndĩ amea amanyĩw’a make
Matthew9:38 Voyai ĩndĩ Mwĩaĩi wa ngetha
Matthew10:1 Na ameta amanyĩw’a make ĩkũmi na elĩ moke vala ũĩ
Matthew10:2 Na masyĩtwa ma ala atũmwa ĩkũmi na elĩ nĩ aa: Wa mbee nĩ Simoni ũla wĩtawa Vetelo
Matthew10:3 Vilivu
Matthew10:4 Simoni ũla Mũkanaani
Matthew10:5 Yesũ amatũma asu ĩkũmi na elĩ aimeaĩa
Matthew10:6 ĩndĩ kavaa mũthi kwa malondu mau ma nyũmba ya Isilaeli.
Matthew10:7 Na mũendete
Matthew10:8 Vosyai ala awau
Matthew10:9 Mũikakue thaavu
Matthew10:10 kana mũvuko wa nzĩanĩ
Matthew10:11 Na ndũa kana mũsyĩ o ũla mwĩvota
Matthew10:12 Na mũkĩlĩka nyũmba
Matthew10:13 Na ethĩwa nyũmba nĩyaĩle
Matthew10:14 Na o ũla ũteũmũthokya
Matthew10:15 Nĩ w’o nĩngũmwĩa
Matthew10:16 Sisyai
Matthew10:17 Ĩndĩ ĩsũvĩei na andũ: nũndũ makamũtwaa mbee wa nzama
Matthew10:18 ĩĩ
Matthew10:19 Ĩndĩ yila makamũtwaa kw’o
Matthew10:20 Nĩkwĩthĩwa ti inyw’ĩ mwĩneena
Matthew10:21 Na mũndũ akanengane mwana‐a‐inyia oawe
Matthew10:22 Na mũkamenwa nĩ andũ onthe kwondũ wa syĩtwa yakwa: ĩndĩ ũla wĩĩyũmĩĩsya kũvika mũminũkĩlyo
Matthew10:23 Ĩndĩ mamũthĩn’ya ndũanĩ ĩno
Matthew10:24 Mũmanyĩw’a ndethĩwa e ĩulũ wa mũmanyĩsya wake kana ngombo ĩũlũ wa vwana wayo.
Matthew10:25 Mũmanyĩw’a nĩwĩanĩwe nĩ kwĩthĩwa ta mũmanyĩsya wake
Matthew10:26 Mũikamakĩe ĩndĩ: nũndũ kũti ũndũ ũvw’ike
Matthew10:27 Ũla ngũmũtavĩsya kĩvindunĩ
Matthew10:28 Mũikamakĩe ala moaa mwĩĩ matatonya kũaa thayũ: ĩndĩ kavaa mũmũkĩe we ũla ũtonya kwanangĩa thayũ na mwĩĩ naw’o Ngienanĩ.
Matthew10:29 Tũsũni twĩlĩ tũitewa ĩsendi yĩmwe? Na vai kamwe katw’o kakavalũka nthĩ Ĩthe wenyu atekwenda:
Matthew10:30 ĩndĩ o na nzw’ĩĩ syonthe sya mĩtwe yenyu nĩ ndale.
Matthew10:31 Mũikakĩe ĩndĩ; inyw’ĩ mwĩ vata kwĩ tũsũni twingĩ.
Matthew10:32 Kĩla mũndũ ĩndĩ ũla wĩmbumbũlaa mbee wa andũ
Matthew10:33 Ĩndĩ o ũla wĩngaĩaa mbee wa andũ nakwa ngamũkaĩaa mbee wa Asa wakwa ũla wĩ ĩtunĩ.
Matthew10:34 Mũikatalĩlye kana nokie kũete mũuo kũũ nthĩ: ndyaaũka kũete mũuo
Matthew10:35 Nũndũ nokie kũthũan’ya mũndũ na ĩthe
Matthew10:36 na amaitha ma mũndũ makethĩwa ala ma nyũmba yake.
Matthew10:37 Ũla ũmwendaa ĩthe kana nyinyia kwĩ nyie
Matthew10:38 Na ũla ũtosaa ngelan’yo yake na kũngatĩĩa
Matthew10:39 Ũla wonaa thayũ wake akawasya; na ũla waasya thayũ wake kwondũ wakwa akawona.
Matthew10:40 Ũla ũmwosaa inyw’ĩ ambosaa nyie
Matthew10:41 Ũla ũmwosaa mwathani syĩtwanĩ ya mwathani akoosa ĩtuvi ya mwathani; na ũla ũmwosaa mũndũ mũlũngalu syĩtwanĩ ya mũndũ mũlũngalu akoosa ĩtuvi ya mũndũ mũlũngalu.
Matthew10:42 Na o ũla ũkanenga ũmwe wa aa anini kĩkombe kya manzĩ mathithu kyoka
Matthew11:1 Na kweethĩwa Yesũ amina kwĩaĩa amanyĩw’a make ĩkũmi na elĩ
Matthew11:2 Na Yoana
Matthew11:3 We nue ũla wĩũka
Matthew11:4 Na Yesũ asũngĩa
Matthew11:5 ililinda nikwona
Matthew11:6 Na nĩ mũathime o ũla ũtakona ũndũ wa ũlulutĩkw’a nthĩnĩ wakwa.
Matthew11:7 Na asu mathi
Matthew11:8 Ĩndĩ nĩ kyaũ kĩla mwaendaa kwona? Nĩ mũndũ wĩkĩe ngũa nduũku? Sisyai
Matthew11:9 Ĩndĩ mwaendaa kĩ? Kwona mwathani? Ĩĩ
Matthew11:10 Ũsu nĩwe ũla waandĩkĩwe atĩĩ
Matthew11:11 Nĩ w’o nĩngũmwĩa
Matthew11:12 Na kuma matukũ ma Yoana ũla Mũvatisi kũvika yu ũsumbĩ wa ĩtu nũlikawa na vinya
Matthew11:13 Nĩkwĩthĩwa athani onthe na ĩla mĩao nĩmathanie kũvika ĩvinda ya Yoana.
Matthew11:14 Na ethĩwa nĩmũkwenda kwĩtĩkĩla
Matthew11:15 Ũla wĩ matũ ma kwĩw’a
Matthew11:16 Ĩndĩ nĩũelekan’ya na kyaũ ũsyao ũũ? Ũtilyĩ ta syana syĩkalĩte ing’ang’anĩ
Matthew11:17 ikyasya
Matthew11:18 Nũndũ Yoana nĩwokie ateũya na ateũnyw’a
Matthew11:19 Mwana wa mũndũ nĩwokie akĩya na akĩnyw’a
Matthew11:20 Nĩvo wambĩlĩlye kũkan’ya mũno ndũa ila mavinya make maingĩ meekiwe nthĩnĩ wasyo
Matthew11:21 Woo nĩ waku
Matthew11:22 Ĩndĩ nyie nĩngũmwĩa
Matthew11:23 Naku Kavelinaumi
Matthew11:24 Ĩndĩ nĩngũmwĩa
Matthew11:25 Ĩvinda yĩu Yesũ asũngĩa
Matthew11:26 ĩĩ
Matthew11:27 Nĩnĩnengetwe maũndũ onthe nĩ Asa wakwa: na vai mũndũ wĩsĩ Mwana
Matthew11:28 Ũkai kwakwa
Matthew11:29 Ĩyĩkĩei ĩsoki yakwa
Matthew11:30 Nũndũ ĩsoki yakwa yĩti vinya
Matthew12:1 Ĩvinda yĩu Yesũ nĩwaendie mũthenya wa savato
Matthew12:2 Ĩndĩ Avalisi moona ũu
Matthew12:3 Ĩndĩ amea
Matthew12:4 ũndũ wavotie nyũmbanĩ ya Ngai
Matthew12:5 O na mũtyaasoma mĩaonĩ
Matthew12:6 Ĩndĩ nĩngũmwĩa
Matthew12:7 Ĩndĩ kethĩwa nĩmwamanyie ũndũ ũtilyĩ ũndũ ũũ
Matthew12:8 Nĩkwĩthĩwa Mwana wa mũndũ nĩ mwĩaĩi wa savato.
Matthew12:9 Na auma vau athi
Matthew12:10 na sisya
Matthew12:11 Na mea
Matthew12:12 Mũndũ ĩndĩ nde vata mũno kwĩ ĩlondu? Kwondũ wa ũu nĩkwosana na ĩla mĩao kwĩka nesa mũthenya wa savato.
Matthew12:13 Nĩvo ĩndĩ wamwĩie ũla mũndũ
Matthew12:14 Ĩndĩ Avalisi maumaala
Matthew12:15 Na Yesũ amanya ũu auma vau: na aingĩ mamũatĩĩa; na amavosya onthe
Matthew12:16 na ameaĩa maikamũtavan’ye:
Matthew12:17 nĩ kana kwĩanĩw’e ũla waneeniwe nĩ mwathani Isaia
Matthew12:18 Sisya
Matthew12:19 Ndakakananĩa
Matthew12:20 Mũangi mũkanyange ndakatũla
Matthew12:21 Na Andũ‐ma‐mbaĩ‐ingĩ makeekwatya syĩtwa yake.
Matthew12:22 Nĩvo ĩndĩ waetewe mũndũ ũkwatĩtwe nĩ ndaimoni
Matthew12:23 Na makomano onthe maseng’a
Matthew12:24 Ĩndi Avalisi meew’a ũu
Matthew12:25 Na amanya mosũanĩo moo
Matthew12:26 na ethĩwa Satani eumya Satani nĩwĩvathanĩtye; ũsumbĩ wake ĩndĩ ũkaũngama ata?
Matthew12:27 Nakwa ethĩwa numasya ndaimoni na vinya wa Veelisevuli
Matthew12:28 Ĩndĩ nyie ethĩwa numasya ndaimoni na Veva wa Ngai
Matthew12:29 Kana mũndũ atonya ata kũlika nyũmbanĩ ya mũndũ wĩ vinya
Matthew12:30 Ũla ũte ngalĩ yakwa ũsu e ũndũ nakwa; na ũla ũtombanasya nakwa nũnyaĩĩkasya.
Matthew12:31 Kwondũ wa ũu nĩngũmwĩa
Matthew12:32 Na o ũla ũkamũneenea Mwana wa mũndũ ndeto
Matthew12:33 Seũvyai mũtĩ wĩthĩwe mũseo na ũsyao waw’o wĩthĩwe mũseo; kana seũvyai mũtĩ wĩthĩwe mũthũku na ũsyao waw’o wĩthĩwe mũthũku: nũndũ mũtĩ nũmanyĩkaa nĩ ũsyao waw’o.
Matthew12:34 Inyw’ĩ ũsyao wa nzoka mbai
Matthew12:35 Mũndũ mũseo nĩwumasya maũndũ maseo kyũmbanĩsyonĩ kyake kĩseo; na mũndũ mũthũku nĩwumasya maũndũ mathũku kyũmbanĩsyonĩ kyake kĩthũku.
Matthew12:36 Nakwa nĩngũmwĩa
Matthew12:37 Nũndũ kwa ndeto syaku ũkatalĩlwa ũlũngalu
Matthew12:38 Nĩvo amwe ma aandĩki na Avalisi mamũsũngĩie
Matthew12:39 Ĩndĩ amasũngĩa
Matthew12:40 nũndũ o tondũ Yona waĩ nthĩnĩ wa ĩvu ya ĩkũyũ ĩnene mĩthenya ĩtatũ na matukũ atatũ; no ta ũu Mwana wa mũndũ akeethĩwa nthĩnĩ wa ngoo ya nthĩ mĩthenya ĩtatũ na matukũ atatũ.
Matthew12:41 Andũ ma Nineva makaũngama ũsilĩlonĩ vamwe na ũsyao ũũ
Matthew12:42 Mũsumbĩ
Matthew12:43 Ĩndĩ veva mũvuku wauma mũndũnĩ
Matthew12:44 Na ĩndĩ ũkyasya
Matthew12:45 Nĩvo ĩndĩ ũkĩthi
Matthew12:46 Akĩneena na ala makomano
Matthew12:47 Na mũndũ ũmwe amwĩa
Matthew12:48 Asũngĩa
Matthew12:49 Na amatambũũkĩsya amanyĩw’a make kw’oko
Matthew12:50 Nũndũ ũla wĩkaa kwenda kwa Asa wakwa ũla wĩ ĩtunĩ
Matthew13:1 Mũthenya ũsu Yesũ auma nyũmbanĩ
Matthew13:2 Na makomano manene mamũmbanĩa
Matthew13:3 Nake aneena nao maũndũ maingĩ na ngelekan’yo
Matthew13:4 na akĩvuĩa
Matthew13:5 na ĩngĩ syavalũka mavianĩ
Matthew13:6 na syũa yaaa
Matthew13:7 Na ingi syavalũka mĩw’anĩ; na mĩw’a yeana na yainyita;
Matthew13:8 na ingĩ syavalũka mũthanganĩ mũseo
Matthew13:9 Ũla wĩ matũ
Matthew13:10 Na amanyĩw’a mooka
Matthew13:11 Nake asũngĩa
Matthew13:12 Nũndũ o ũla wĩ na kĩndũ
Matthew13:13 Kwondũ wa ũu nĩneenaa nao na ngelekan’yo; nĩkwĩthĩwa makĩsisya matikwona
Matthew13:14 Na wathani wa Isaia nĩweanĩiw’e kwoo
Matthew13:15 Nũndũ ngoo sya andũ aa nĩ nenevu
Matthew13:16 Ĩndĩ nĩ maathime metho menyu
Matthew13:17 Nũndũ nĩ w’o nĩngũmwĩa
Matthew13:18 Ĩthukĩĩsyei inyw’ĩ ĩndĩ ĩla ngelekan’yo ya mũvuĩi.
Matthew13:19 Mũndũ o na wĩva eew’a ndeto ya ũsumbĩ
Matthew13:20 Na ũsu ũvuĩĩtwe mavianĩ
Matthew13:21 ĩndĩ nde na mĩi nthĩnĩ wake
Matthew13:22 Na ũla ũvuĩĩtwe miw’anĩ
Matthew13:23 Na ũla ũvuĩĩtwe mũthanganĩ mũseo
Matthew13:24 Amatavya ngelekan’yo ĩngĩ
Matthew13:25 ĩndĩ andũ makomete
Matthew13:26 Ĩndĩ syamea na syamesya mathangũ na syasyaa iia
Matthew13:27 Na ngombo sya mwene nyũmba syathi na syamwĩa
Matthew13:28 Na asyĩa
Matthew13:29 Ĩndĩ asya
Matthew13:30 Iekei syelĩ syĩane kũvika ngethanĩ: na ĩvinda ya ngetha ngatavya akethi
Matthew13:31 Amatavya ngelekan’yo ĩngĩ
Matthew13:32 nayo nĩ nini kwĩ mbeũ syonthe; ĩndĩ yeana
Matthew13:33 Amatavya ngelekan’yo ĩngĩ; Ũsumbĩ wa ĩtu ũilyĩ ta ĩlawa
Matthew13:34 Maũndũ asu onthe Yesu amatavisye makomano na ngelekan’yo; na vate ngelekan’yo ndaaneena nao:
Matthew13:35 nĩ kana kwĩanĩw’e ũla waneeniwe nĩ mwathani
Matthew13:36 Na ĩndĩ atia makomano
Matthew13:37 Na asũngĩa
Matthew13:38 na ũla mũũnda nĩ nthĩ; na mbeũ ĩla nzeo nĩ ana ma ũsumbĩ; na ĩthaaa nĩyo ana ma ũla mũthũku;
Matthew13:39 na mũmaitha ũla waivuĩie nĩ ndevili: na ngetha nĩ wĩanĩu wa ĩvinda yĩĩ; na akethi nĩ alaĩka.
Matthew13:40 Na ĩndĩ o ũndũ ĩthaaa yũmbanaw’a na kũvĩvw’a na mwaki; nĩw’o kũkethĩwa wĩanĩu wa ĩvinda yĩĩ.
Matthew13:41 Mwana wa mũndũ akatũma alaĩka make
Matthew13:42 na makamekya ikonĩ ĩnene yĩ mwaki: vo vakethĩwa kĩĩo na kũvevetan’ya maeo.
Matthew13:43 Nĩvo ĩndĩ ala alũngalu makatisa ta syũa ũsumbĩnĩ wa Ĩthe woo. Ũla wĩ matũ
Matthew13:44 Ũsumbĩ wa ĩtu ũilyĩ ta ũthwii mwie ũvithĩtwe mũũndanĩ; ũla mũndũ wonie
Matthew13:45 Ĩngĩ
Matthew13:46 na oona lũlũ ũmwe wa thooa mũnene
Matthew13:47 Ĩngĩ
Matthew13:48 nakyo kyausũa
Matthew13:49 Kũkeethĩwa ta ũu wĩanĩunĩ wa ĩvinda yĩĩ: alaĩka makooka
Matthew13:50 na makamekya ikonĩ ĩnene yĩ mwaki: vo vakethĩwa kĩĩo na kũvevetan’ya maeo.
Matthew13:51 Nĩmwamanya maũndũ asu onthe? Mamwĩa
Matthew13:52 Nake amea

Matthew13:56 Na eĩtu‐a‐inyia
Matthew13:57 Na malulutĩkw’a nĩwe. Ĩndĩ Yesũ amea
Matthew13:58 Na ndaaĩka mavinya maingĩ vo nũndũ wa kũlea kwĩtĩkĩla kwoo.
Matthew14:1 Ĩvĩnda yĩu mũsumbĩ Elote eew’a ũvoo wa Yesũ
Matthew14:2 na amea athũkũmi make

Matthew14:4 Nĩkwĩthĩwa Yoana amũtavisye

Matthew15:1 Nĩvo Avalisi na aandĩki maumie Yelusaleme mathi vala ve Yesũ
Matthew15:2 Nĩ ũndũ wa kĩ amanyĩw’a maku mavĩtasya mokũũ ma atumĩa? Nũndũ makĩya matithambaa nzaa.
Matthew15:3 Nake asũngĩa
Matthew15:4 Nĩkwĩthĩwa Ngai nĩwaisye
Matthew15:5 Ĩndĩ inyw’ĩ mwĩasya
Matthew15:6 ũsu ndeũtaĩa ĩthe. Na inyw’ĩ nĩmũmyanangĩte ndeto ya Ngai kwondũ wa mokũũ menyu.
Matthew15:7 Inyw’ĩ angangan’ya
Matthew15:8 Andũ aa nĩmandaĩaa na ilomo syoo; Ĩndĩ ngoo syoo syĩ kũasa nakwa.
Matthew15:9 Nao manthaithaa ũthaithi wa mana
Matthew15:10 Na ayĩta ĩkomano yũke kwake

Matthew15:13 Ĩndĩ asũngĩa

Matthew15:16 Nake asya

Matthew15:19 Nũndũ ngoonĩ nĩvo vaumaa malilikano mathũku
Matthew15:20 asu nĩo maũndũ ala mathũkasya mũndũ; ĩndĩ kũya na nzaa itathambĩtwe kũithũkasya mũndũ.

Matthew16:26 Nũndũ mũndũ aunwa nĩ kyaũ

Matthew18:3 na asya

Matthew18:6 ĩndĩ ũla ũkalulutĩkya kamwe ka tũũ tũnini tũla tũmbĩtĩkĩlaa
Matthew18:7 Woo nĩ wa nthĩ kwondũ wa molulutĩkyo! Nũndũ molulutĩkyo maitĩa kũka; ĩndĩ woo nĩ wa mũndũ ũla ũtumaa ũlulutĩkyo wũka!

Matthew22:1 Na Yesũ asũngĩa na aneena nao ĩngĩ na ngelekan’yo
Matthew22:2 Ũsumbĩ wa ĩtu ũilyĩ ta mũsumbĩ ũmwe
Matthew22:3 na atũma ngombo syake kũmeta ala metĩtwe mbokanĩ ya mũtwaano moke: nao malea kũka.
Matthew22:4 Atũma ĩngĩ ngombo ingĩ
Matthew22:5 Ĩndĩ malea kwona ta ũndũ
Matthew22:6 na ala matialile makwata ngombo syake
Matthew22:7 Ĩndĩ ũla mũsumbĩ athata; atũma ita syake
Matthew22:8 Na ĩndĩ aitavya ngombo syake
Matthew22:9 Endai ĩndĩ mataanĩsyonĩ ma malelũ
Matthew22:10 Na ngombo isu syaumaala syathi malelũnĩ
Matthew22:11 Ĩndĩ ũla mũsumbĩ avota nthĩnĩ kũsisya aeni
Matthew22:12 na amũkũlya
Matthew22:13 Nĩvo ĩndĩ mũsumbĩ wameie athũkũmi
Matthew22:14 Nĩkwĩthĩwa nĩ aingĩ ala metawa
Matthew22:15 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Avalisi maendie masũanĩa ũndũ matonya kũmũtea ndetonĩ syake.
Matthew22:16 Na matũma amanyĩw’a moo kwake
Matthew22:17 Tũtavye ĩndĩ
Matthew22:18 Ĩndĩ Yesũ amanya ũthũku woo
Matthew22:19 Mbon’yai mbesa ya koti. Na mamũetee silingi.
Matthew22:20 Na amea
Matthew22:21 Mamwĩa
Matthew22:22 Na meew’a ũu
Matthew22:23 Mũthenya ũsu Asatukai mooka vala ũĩ
Matthew22:24 makyasya
Matthew22:25 Yu ĩndĩ kwitũ kwaĩ aũme mũonza ma inyia ũmwe: na ũla wa mbee atwaa mũka na akw’a
Matthew22:26 no ta ũu ũla wa kelĩ nake
Matthew22:27 Na ĩtina wa onthe ũla mũndũ mũka akw’a.
Matthew22:28 Ũthayũũkyonĩ ĩndĩ akethĩwa e mũka wa wiva wa asu mũonza? Nũndũ onthe maĩ nake.
Matthew22:29 Ĩndĩ Yesũ asũngĩa na amea
Matthew22:30 Nũndũ ũthayũũkyonĩ maitwaanaa
Matthew22:31 Ĩndĩ ũndũ wa ũthayũũkyo wa akw’ũ
Matthew22:32 Nyie nĩ Ngai wa Avalaamu
Matthew22:33 Na makomano meew’a ũu
Matthew22:34 Ĩndĩ Avalisi meew’a kana nĩwakilĩthya Asatukai
Matthew22:35 Na ũmwe woo
Matthew22:36 Mũmanyĩsya
Matthew22:37 Na amwĩa Mwende Mwĩaĩi Ngai waku na ngoo yaku yonthe
Matthew22:38 Ũu nĩw’o mwĩao ũla mũnene na wa mbee.
Matthew22:39 Na wa kelĩ ũvw’anene naw’o
Matthew22:40 Mĩao ĩsu ĩlĩ nĩyũmbanĩtye ĩla mĩao yonthe na athani.
Matthew22:41 Na Avalisi mombene
Matthew22:42 asya
Matthew22:43 Amea
Matthew22:44 Mwĩaĩi amwĩie Mwĩaĩi wakwa
Matthew22:45 Ethĩwa ĩndĩ Ndaviti emwĩta Mwĩaĩi
Matthew22:46 Na vai ũmwe waatonya kũmũsũngĩa ndeto
Matthew23:1 Na ĩndĩ Yesũ aneena na ala makomano na amanyĩw’a make
Matthew23:2 akyasya
Matthew23:3 maũndũ onthe ĩndĩ o na meva ala mamwĩaĩaa
Matthew23:4 Ĩĩ
Matthew23:5 Ĩndĩ mawĩa moo onthe mekaa nĩ kana moneke nĩ andũ: nũndũ mathanthaasya iawa syoo
Matthew23:6 na nĩmendaa vandũ va mbee mbokanĩ
Matthew23:7 na kũkethw’a ing’ang’anĩ
Matthew23:8 Ĩndĩ inyw’ĩ mũiketwe Lavai: nũndũ mũmanyĩsya wenyu nĩ ũmwe
Matthew23:9 Na mũikamwĩte mũndũ o na wĩva ĩthe wenyu kũũ nthĩ: nũndũ Ĩthe wenyu nĩ ũmwe
Matthew23:10 O na mũiketwe eaĩi: nũndũ mwĩaĩi wenyu nĩ ũmwe
Matthew23:11 Ĩndĩ ũla mũnene mbee katĩ wenyu akeethĩwa e mũthũkũmi wenyu.
Matthew23:12 Na o ũla ũkenenevya akanyiaw’a; na o ũla ũkenyivya akanenevw’a.
Matthew23:13 Ĩndĩ woo nĩ wenyu
Matthew23:14 Woo nĩ wenyu
Matthew23:15 Woo nĩ wenyu
Matthew23:16 Woo nĩ wenyu
Matthew23:17 Inyw’ĩ ndia na ililinda: nũndũ kĩla kĩnene nĩ kĩva
Matthew23:18 Na
Matthew23:19 Inyw’ĩ ililinda: nũndũ kĩla kĩnene nĩ kĩva
Matthew23:20 We ĩndĩ ũla wĩvĩtaa na kĩthembeo
Matthew23:21 Na ũla wĩvĩtaa na ĩkalũ
Matthew23:22 Na ũla wĩvĩtaa na ĩtu nĩwĩvĩtaa na kĩvĩla kya ũsumbĩ kya Ngai na kwa ũla ũkĩkalĩlaa.
Matthew23:23 Woo nĩ wenyu
Matthew23:24 Inyw’ĩ atongoi mũte metho
Matthew23:25 Woo nĩ wenyu
Matthew23:26 We Mũvalisi ũte metho
Matthew23:27 Woo nĩ wenyu
Matthew23:28 No ta ũu inyw’ĩ nenyu kũũ ĩũlũ mwonekaa nĩ andũ mwĩ alũngalu
Matthew23:29 Woo nĩ wenyu
Matthew23:30 na mũkyasya
Matthew23:31 Kwondũ wa ũu nĩmwĩkũsĩĩĩte
Matthew23:32 Usũsyai ĩndĩ kĩthimi kya aaĩthe menyu.
Matthew23:33 Inyw’ĩ nzoka
Matthew23:34 Kwondũ wa ũu
Matthew23:35 nĩ kana yũke ĩũlũ wenyu nthakame yonthe ya alũngalu ĩla yetĩkie kũũ nthĩ
Matthew23:36 Nĩ w’o nĩngũmwĩa
Matthew23:37 We Yelusaleme
Matthew23:38 Sisyai
Matthew23:39 Nũndũ nĩngũmwĩa
Matthew24:1 Na Yesũ auma ĩkalũnĩ
Matthew24:2 Ĩndĩ asũngĩa
Matthew24:3 Na ekalĩte kĩĩmanĩ kya Mĩthata
Matthew24:4 Na Yesũ asũngĩa
Matthew24:5 Nũndũ aingĩ makooka na syĩtwa yakwa
Matthew24:6 Na mũkeew’a ũvoo wa makaũ na mawetango ma makaũ; sisyai mũikaũũye: nũndũ maũndũ asu mati ndĩi ya ũlea kwĩkĩka; ĩndĩ mũminũkĩlyo ndũnamba ũvika.
Matthew24:7 Nũndũ mbaĩ ĩkookĩlĩla mbaĩ
Matthew24:8 Ĩndĩ maũndũ asu onthe nĩ wambĩlĩlyo wa woo.
Matthew24:9 Nĩvo makamũnengane thĩnanĩ
Matthew24:10 Nĩvo aingĩ makalulutĩka
Matthew24:11 Na athani aingĩ ma ũvũngũ makookĩla
Matthew24:12 Na kwondũ wa ũthũku kwingĩva
Matthew24:13 Ĩndĩ ũla ũkomĩĩsya kũvika mũminũkĩlyo
Matthew24:14 Na ũvoo ũũ mũseo wa ũsumbĩ ũkatavanw’a nthĩ yonthe wĩthĩwe ũkũsĩ kwa mbaĩ syonthe; na ĩndĩ mũminũkĩlyo ũkyũka.
Matthew24:15 Yĩla ĩndĩ mwĩona ũthatyo ũla wanangaa
Matthew24:16 nĩvo ala me Yutia makĩe mathi iĩmanĩ:
Matthew24:17 na ũla wĩ ĩũlũ wa nyũmba ndakatheee aumye syĩndũ ila syĩ nyũmbanĩ kwake:
Matthew24:18 na ũla wĩ mũũndanĩ ndakasyoke ose ngũa yake ya ĩũlũ.
Matthew24:19 Ĩndĩ woo nĩ wa ala aito na ala mekwongya mĩthenya ĩsu!
Matthew24:20 Na voyai kũkĩa kwenyu kũikethĩwe ĩvinda ya mbevo
Matthew24:21 nũndũ ĩvinda yĩu kũkethĩwa thĩna mũnene
Matthew24:22 Na kethĩwa matukũ asu matyaakuvĩvw’a
Matthew24:23 Na ĩvinda yĩu ethĩwa mũndũ o na wĩva akakwĩa
Matthew24:24 Nũndũ makookĩla Maklĩsto ma ũvũngũ
Matthew24:25 Sisyai
Matthew24:26 Ethĩwa ĩndĩ makamwĩa
Matthew24:27 Nũndũ o ũndũ ũtisi ũtisaa wumĩlonĩ wa syũa
Matthew24:28 O vala vethĩawa kimba
Matthew24:29 Ĩndĩ ĩtina wa thĩna wa matukũ asu
Matthew24:30 na ĩndĩ kũkyoneka wonan’yo wa Mwana wa mũndũ ĩtunĩ: na ĩndĩ mbaĩ syonthe sya nthĩ ikameta
Matthew24:31 Nake akatũma alaĩka make na wasya mũnene wa soo
Matthew24:32 Na ĩndĩ ĩmanyĩsyei ngelekan’yo ya mũkũyũ: mbonge syololoa
Matthew24:33 no ta ũu nenyu
Matthew24:34 Nĩ w’o nĩngũmwĩa
Matthew24:35 Ĩtu na nthĩ nikavĩta
Matthew24:36 Ĩndĩ mũthenya ũsu na saa ũsu vai ũmwe wĩsĩ
Matthew24:37 Ĩndĩ o ũndũ kwailyĩ matukũ ma Noa
Matthew24:38 Nũndũ o tondũ matukũnĩ asu ala maĩ mbee wa kĩla kĩw’ũ kingĩ
Matthew24:39 na matyeesĩ mũvaka kĩla kĩw’ũ kingĩ kyooka
Matthew24:40 Ĩvinda yĩu aũme elĩ makeethĩwa mũũndanĩ; ũmwe nũkwoswa
Matthew24:41 aka elĩ makethĩwa maithianĩa ĩvianĩ yĩmwe; ũmwe nũkoswa
Matthew24:42 Syaĩĩsyai ĩndĩ; nũndũ mũtyĩsĩ mũthenya ũla Mwĩaĩi wenyu wĩũka.
Matthew24:43 Ĩndĩ manyai ũndũ ũũ
Matthew24:44 Kwondũ wa ũu nenyu ĩkalai mwĩyũmbanĩtye; nũndũ saa ũla mũtataĩĩe nĩw’o wĩũka ũla Mwana wa mũndũ.
Matthew24:45 Nũũ ĩndĩ ngombo yĩ na kĩthito na mbũĩ
Matthew24:46 Nĩ ngathime ngombo ĩsu
Matthew24:47 Nĩ w’o nĩngũmwĩa
Matthew24:48 Ĩndĩ ethĩwa ngombo ĩla nthũku ĩkasya ngoonĩ yayo
Matthew24:49 na ĩkyambĩlĩlya kũmakũna athũkũmi ala angĩ
Matthew24:50 vwana wa ngombo ĩsu akooka mũthenya ũla ĩtatalĩthye
Matthew24:51 na akamĩvũa mũno
Matthew25:1 Na ĩndĩ ũsumbĩ wa ĩtu ũkethĩwa ũilyĩ ta eĩtu ĩkũmi
Matthew25:2 Na atano moo maĩ atumanu
Matthew25:3 Nũndũ ala atumanu
Matthew25:4 ĩndĩ ala oĩ nĩmakuie mauta mĩionĩ yoo vamwe na mataa moo.
Matthew25:5 Ĩndĩ mũtwaani ekalanga
Matthew25:6 Ĩndĩ ũtukũ katĩ kwaĩ wasya mũnene
Matthew25:7 Na ĩndĩ eĩtu asu onthe mookĩla
Matthew25:8 Na ala atumanu mamea ala oĩ
Matthew25:9 Ĩndĩ ala oĩ masũngĩa
Matthew25:10 Nao maendete kũthooa
Matthew25:11 Ĩtina eĩtu ala angĩ mooka
Matthew25:12 Ĩndĩ asũngĩa
Matthew25:13 Syaĩĩsyai ĩndĩ
Matthew25:14 Nũndũ nĩ ta mũndũ akĩthi kyalo nthĩ ĩngĩ
Matthew25:15 Anenga ĩmwe mbesa sya talendi itano
Matthew25:16 Oyu ĩla yosie talendi itano yathi yatethya wĩa nasyo
Matthew25:17 No ta ũu ĩla yosie ilĩ nayo yatandĩthya ingĩ ilĩ.
Matthew25:18 Ĩndĩ ĩla yosie ĩmwe yathi yenza nthĩ
Matthew25:19 Na ĩndĩ ĩtina wa ĩvinda ĩasa vwana wa ngombo isu ooka
Matthew25:20 Na ĩla yosie talendi itano yooka na yaetanĩsye na talendi ingĩ itano
Matthew25:21 Vwana wayo amĩtavya
Matthew25:22 Na ĩla yosie talendi ilĩ yooka na yasya
Matthew25:23 Vwana wayo amĩtavya
Matthew25:24 Na ĩla yosie talendi ĩmwe yooka na yasya
Matthew25:25 nakwa nakĩa
Matthew25:26 Ĩndĩ vwana wayo asũngĩa na amĩtavya
Matthew25:27 nĩwaĩlwe ĩndĩ nĩ kũmatwaĩa ala ma vengi mbesa syakwa
Matthew25:28 Osai ĩndĩ talendi yayo
Matthew25:29 Nũndũ o ũla wĩ na kĩndũ akanengwa
Matthew25:30 Na ngombo ĩno ĩtaĩle mĩkyei kĩvindunĩ nza: vo vakethĩwa kĩĩo na kũvevetan’ya maeo.
Matthew25:31 Ĩndĩ yĩla Mwana wa mũndũ ũkoka ũtheunĩ wake mũtisu
Matthew25:32 na mbee wake nikomban’wa mbaĩ syonthe: nake nũkamavathan’ya aa na aya
Matthew25:33 na nũkaia malondu ngalĩ ya kw’oko kwake kwa aũme
Matthew25:34 Na ĩndĩ Mũsumbĩ nũkamea ala me ngalĩ ya kw’oko kwake kwa aũme
Matthew25:35 nũndũ naĩ na nzaa
Matthew25:36 naĩ mũthei
Matthew25:37 Nĩvo ala alũngalu makamũsũngĩa
Matthew25:38 Na nĩ ĩndĩĩ twakwonie wĩ mũeni
Matthew25:39 Na nĩ ĩndĩĩ twakwonie wĩ mũwau
Matthew25:40 Na Mũsumbĩ akasũngĩa na kũmea
Matthew25:41 Nĩvo ũkamea asu nao ala me ngalĩ ya kw’oko kwake kwa aka
Matthew25:42 nũndũ naĩ na nzaa
Matthew25:43 naĩ mũeni
Matthew25:44 Na ĩndĩ asu nao makasũngĩa
Matthew25:45 Nĩvo ũkamasũngĩa
Matthew25:46 Na asu makathi makalika thĩnanĩ wa tene wa tene; ĩndĩ ala alũngalu makalika thayũnĩ ũtathela.
Matthew26:1 Na kweethĩwa
Matthew26:2 Nĩmwĩsĩ kana ĩtina wa mĩthenya ĩlĩ kũkeethĩwa vasaka
Matthew26:3 Nĩvo athembi anene
Matthew26:4 nao masaman’ya nĩ kana mamũkwate Yesũ na ũseleke
Matthew26:5 Ĩndĩ masya
Matthew26:6 Na yĩla Yesũ waĩ Vethania
Matthew26:7 mũndũ mũka athi vala ũĩ e na sũva wa mauta
Matthew26:8 Ĩndĩ amanyĩw’a moona ũu
Matthew26:9 Nũndũ mauta aa meĩ matonya kũtewa mbesa mbingĩ
Matthew26:10 Ĩndĩ Yesũ eew’a ũu amea
Matthew26:11 Nĩkwĩthĩwa ngya mwĩ nasyo mavinda onthe; ĩndĩ nyie mũi nakwa mavinda onthe.
Matthew26:12 Nũndũ akĩmbĩtĩkĩsya mauta aa mwĩĩnĩ wakwa
Matthew26:13 Nĩ w’o nĩngũmwĩa
Matthew26:14 Na ĩvinda yĩu ũmwe wa ala ĩkũmi na elĩ
Matthew26:15 na amakũlya
Matthew26:16 Na kuma ĩvinda yĩu amantha mwanya wa kũmũnengane kwoo.
Matthew26:17 Na mũthenya wa mbee wa kĩmũtũ kĩte ĩlawa
Matthew26:18 Na asya
Matthew26:19 Na amanyĩw’a meeka ũndũ Yesũ wameaĩe; na maseũvya vasaka.
Matthew26:20 Na ĩndĩ kwavika wĩoo
Matthew26:21 na makĩya
Matthew26:22 Nao meew’a woo mũno
Matthew26:23 Na asũngĩa
Matthew26:24 Mwana wa mũndũ ethi o ũndũ waandĩkĩwe: ĩndĩ woo nĩ wa mũndũ ũsu ũla wĩmũvũnyanĩa Mwana wa mũndũ! Wĩthĩwa wĩ ũseo kwa mũndũ ũsu kethĩwa ndaasyawa.
Matthew26:25 Na Yutasi
Matthew26:26 Na makĩya
Matthew26:27 Na oosa kĩkombe
Matthew26:28 nũndũ ĩno nĩyo nthakame yakwa ya ũtianĩo
Matthew26:29 Ĩndĩ nĩngũmwĩa
Matthew26:30 Na mamina kwina
Matthew26:31 Nĩvo Yesũ wameie
Matthew26:32 Ĩndĩ ĩtina wa kũthayũũkw’a kwakwa
Matthew26:33 Ĩndĩ Vetelo asũngĩa
Matthew26:34 Yesũ amwĩa
Matthew26:35 Vetelo amwĩa
Matthew26:36 Na ĩndĩ Yesũ athi nao kũvika vandũ vetawa Ngesemanii
Matthew26:37 Na athi e na Vetelo na ana elĩ ma Sevetii
Matthew26:38 Nĩvo ĩndĩ wameie
Matthew26:39 Nake aendanga mbee vanini
Matthew26:40 Na athi vala ve amanyĩw’a make
Matthew26:41 Syaĩĩsyai na voyai
Matthew26:42 Na ĩngĩ athi ĩvinda ya kelĩ
Matthew26:43 Na athi ĩngĩ na amethĩa makomete
Matthew26:44 Na amatia ĩngĩ
Matthew26:45 Na ĩndĩ athi vala ve ala amanyĩw’a
Matthew26:46 Ũkĩlai
Matthew26:47 Na akĩneena
Matthew26:48 Na ũla ũmũvũnyanĩe amanengete wonan’yo
Matthew26:49 Na oyu ooka vala ve Yesũ
Matthew26:50 Na Yesũ amwĩa
Matthew26:51 Na sisya
Matthew26:52 Na ĩndĩ Yesũ amwĩa
Matthew26:53 Kana wĩasya nditonya kũmwĩsũva Asa wakwa
Matthew26:54 Ĩndĩ maandĩko ma atĩ nĩ mũvaka ũũ wĩthĩwe
Matthew26:55 Saa ũsu Yesũ amĩtavya nguthu
Matthew26:56 Ĩndĩ ũũ w’onthe ũtw’ikĩte
Matthew26:57 Na ala mamũkwatie Yesũ mamũtwaa kwa Kaiava mũthembi mũnene
Matthew26:58 Ĩndĩ Vetelo amũatĩĩa e kũasa
Matthew26:59 Na ĩndĩ athembi anene na nzama yonthe mamũmanthĩa Yesũ ũkũsĩ wa ũvũngũ
Matthew26:60 na maiaawona
Matthew26:61 na syasya
Matthew26:62 Na mũthembi mũnene aũngama
Matthew26:63 Ĩndĩ Yesũ avindya. Na ũla mũthembi mũnene amwĩa
Matthew26:64 Yesũ amwĩa
Matthew26:65 Na yu mũthembi mũnene atembũa ngũa syake
Matthew26:66 mwĩona ata? Masũngĩa
Matthew26:67 Na ĩndĩ mamũtw’ĩla mata ũthyũ
Matthew26:68 makyasya
Matthew26:69 Na Vetelo ailyĩ nza ku ũtee: na mwĩĩtu mũthũkũmi ooka vala ũĩ
Matthew26:70 Ĩndĩ akaĩa mbee wa onthe
Matthew26:71 Nake aumaala valasyanĩ
Matthew26:72 Na akaĩa ĩngĩ na wĩvĩto
Matthew26:73 Na ĩtina vandũ vanini
Matthew26:74 Na ĩndĩ ambĩlĩlya kũumana na kwĩvĩta
Matthew26:75 Na Vetelo alilikana ndeto ĩla ĩnaneeniwe nĩ Yesũ
Matthew27:1 Na kwakya
Matthew27:2 na mamwova
Matthew27:3 Na ĩndĩ Yutasi
Matthew27:4 akyasya
Matthew27:5 Nake ekya ila ilungu sya vetha nthĩnĩ wa vala vandũ vatheu
Matthew27:6 Na athembi anene moosa ilungu sya vetha na masya
Matthew27:7 Na masũanĩa na mathooa kĩsesi kya mũmbi nasyo
Matthew27:8 Kwondũ wa ũu kĩsesi kyu kyeetwa
Matthew27:9 Nĩvo weanĩw’e ũla waneeniwe nĩ Yelemia
Matthew27:10 na mainengane kwondũ wa kĩsesi kya mũmbi o ũndũ Mwĩaĩi wambĩaĩe.
Matthew27:11 Na Yesũ aũngama mbee wa ngavana: na ngavana amũkũlya
Matthew27:12 Na avinganĩw’a nĩ athembi anene na atumĩa
Matthew27:13 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Vilato wamwĩie
Matthew27:14 Nake ndaamũsũngĩa ndeto o na ĩmwe: mũvaka ngavana aseng’a mũno.
Matthew27:15 Na ĩndĩ ĩvinda ya mboka ngavana akothaa kũyĩthaĩsya ĩkomano mwovwa ũmwe
Matthew27:16 Na ĩvinda yĩu maĩ na mwovwa ũmwe wesĩkĩwe
Matthew27:17 Na ĩndĩno mombanĩte vamwe
Matthew27:18 Nũndũ nĩwesĩ kana mamũnenganie nũndũ wa kĩwĩu.
Matthew27:19 Na akĩkalĩla kĩvĩla kya sila
Matthew27:20 Na ala athembi anene na atumĩa mamathinga’ĩĩsya makomano nĩ kana mamwĩtye Valava
Matthew27:21 Ĩndĩ ngavana asũngĩa na amea
Matthew27:22 Vilato amea
Matthew27:23 Nake asya
Matthew27:24 Na ĩndĩ Vilato oona kana ndatonya ũndũ
Matthew27:25 Na andũ onthe masũngĩa
Matthew27:26 Nĩvo ĩndĩ wamathaĩsye Valava; ĩndĩ amũkũna Yesũ na kĩvoko kyatũange
Matthew27:27 Nĩvo asikalĩ ma ngavana mamũtwaie Yesũ kĩsilĩlonĩ
Matthew27:28 Na mamumya ngũa mamwĩkĩa ngũa ndune mũno.
Matthew27:29 Na mavĩlangan’ya ngovia ya mĩw’a na mamwĩkĩa mũtwe wake
Matthew27:30 Na mamũtw’ĩla mata
Matthew27:31 Na mamina ũmũthekeea
Matthew27:32 Na makyumaala
Matthew27:33 Na mavika vandũ vetawa Kolokotha
Matthew27:34 mamũnenga mbinyu ĩvulanĩtw’e na nyongo: nake amĩsama
Matthew27:35 Na mamwamba
Matthew27:36 Na mekala nthĩ vo mamũsyaĩĩsye.
Matthew27:37 Na meekĩa ũvingan’yo ĩũlũ wa mũtwe wake
Matthew27:38 Nĩvo avutani elĩ mambiwe vamwe nake
Matthew27:39 Na ala mavĩtaa nzĩanĩ mamũuma
Matthew27:40 makyasya
Matthew27:41 No ta ũu ala athembi anene makĩmũthekeea
Matthew27:42 Nĩwatangĩĩe angĩ; ndatonya kwĩtangĩĩa mwene. Nĩ mũsumbĩ wa Isilaeli; natheee yu aume ngelan’yonĩ
Matthew27:43 Nũmũĩkĩĩaa Ngai; namũvonokye yu
Matthew27:44 Na avutani nao ala mambĩtwe vamwe nake mamũneenea ndeto ta isu.
Matthew27:45 Na kuma syũa yaũngama kwatulya kĩvindu nthĩ yonthe kũvika saa kenda.
Matthew27:46 Na ta saa kenda Yesũ aneena na wasya mũnene
Matthew27:47 Na amwe ma ala maũngeme vo
Matthew27:48 Na oyu ũmwe woo asemba
Matthew27:49 Na ala angĩ masya
Matthew27:50 Na Yesũ aneena ĩngĩ na wasya mũnene
Matthew27:51 Na sisya
Matthew27:52 na mbũa syavingũka; na mĩĩ mingĩ ya atheu ala maĩ manakoma yathayũũkw’a;
Matthew27:53 na makyuma mbũanĩ ĩtina wa kũthayũũka kwake
Matthew27:54 Na ĩndĩ ũla mũnene wa asikalĩ ĩana
Matthew27:55 Na aka aingĩ maĩ vo makĩsisya me kũasa
Matthew27:56 na amwe moo maĩ Meli Makatalene
Matthew27:57 Na kwavika wĩoo
Matthew27:58 mũndũ ũsu athi kwa Vilato
Matthew27:59 Na Yosevu oosa mwĩĩ
Matthew27:60 na awia mbũanĩ yake nzaũ
Matthew27:61 Na Meli Makatalene aĩ vo
Matthew27:62 Na ũnĩ ũsu
Matthew27:63 makyasya
Matthew27:64 Ĩae ĩndĩ kana mbũa isũvĩwe mũno kũvika mũthenya wa katatũ
Matthew27:65 Vilato amea
Matthew27:66 Nao mathi
Matthew28:1 Na mũthenya wa savato wathela
Matthew28:2 Na sisya
Matthew28:3 Na mũvw’ano wake wailyĩ ta ũtisi
Matthew28:4 na kwondũ wa ũmũkĩa asũvĩi matetema
Matthew28:5 Na mũlaĩka asũngĩa
Matthew28:6 Nde vaa; nũndũ nũthayũũkie o tondũ waisye. Ũkai
Matthew28:7 Na endai na mĩtũkĩ
Matthew28:8 Nao mauma mbũanĩ mĩtũkĩ me na w’ĩa na ũtanu mũnene
Matthew28:9 Na sisya
Matthew28:10 Na ĩndĩ Yesũ amea
Matthew28:11 Na maendete
Matthew28:12 Na moombana na atumĩa na masũanĩa
Matthew28:13 makyasya
Matthew28:14 Na ũndũ ũsu weew’ĩka kwa ngavana
Matthew28:15 Na ĩndĩ moosa ila mbesa
Matthew28:16 Ĩndĩ ala amanyĩw’a ĩkũmi na ũmwe mathi Kalilii
Matthew28:17 Nao mamwona mamũthaitha: ĩndĩ amwe maĩ na nzika.
Matthew28:18 Na Yesũ ooka vala maĩ
Matthew28:19 Endai ĩndĩ mũkatw’ĩkĩthye mbaĩ syonthe amanyĩw’a
Matthew28:20 mũkĩmamanyĩsya kũkwata maũndũ onthe o na meva ala namwĩaĩe: na sisyai
Mark1:1 Wambĩlĩlyo wa ũvoo mũseo wa Yesũ Klĩsto
Mark1:2 O tondũ kũandĩkĩte ĩvukunĩ ya mwathani Isaia
Mark1:3 Wasya wa mũndũ akĩneena mũno weũnĩ
Mark1:4 Yoana nĩwokie
Mark1:5 Na nthĩ yonthe ya Yutia
Mark1:6 Na Yoana eekĩĩte ngũa ya w’ĩa wa ngamĩle
Mark1:7 Na atavan’ya
Mark1:8 Nyie nĩnĩnamũvatĩsaa na manzĩ; ĩndĩ ũsu akamũvatisaa na Veva Mũtheu.
Mark1:9 Na kweethĩwa matukũ asu
Mark1:10 Na oyu akyuma manzĩnĩ
Mark1:11 na wasya wauma ĩtunĩ
Mark1:12 Na oyu Veva amũtwaa na vinya weũnĩ.
Mark1:13 Na aĩ ku weũnĩ matukũ mĩongo ĩna akĩtatwa nĩ Satani; na aĩ vamwe na nyamũ sya kĩthekanĩ; na alaĩka nĩmamũthũkũmaa.
Mark1:14 Na ĩtina wa Yoana kwĩkĩwa kolokolonĩ
Mark1:15 akyasya
Mark1:16 Na akĩvĩtĩla ũtee wa ũkanga wa Kalilii
Mark1:17 Na Yesũ amea
Mark1:18 Na oyu matia itei
Mark1:19 Na aendanga mbee vanini na oona Yakovo mwana wa Sevetii
Mark1:20 Na oyu ameta: na matia ĩthe woo Sevetii ngalawanĩ vamwe na athũkũmi
Mark1:21 Na mathi Kavelinaumi; na oyu mũthenya wa savato avota ĩsinakokenĩ na amanyĩsya.
Mark1:22 Na maseng’w’a nĩ ũmanyĩsyo wake: nĩkwĩthĩwa amamanyĩsya ta ũla wĩ na ũkũmũ
Mark1:23 Na oyu ĩsinakokenĩ yoo kwaĩ mũndũ ũla wakwetwe nĩ veva mũvũku; na aneena na wasya mũnene
Mark1:24 akyasya
Mark1:25 Na Yesũ ookan’ya
Mark1:26 Na ũla veva mũvuku
Mark1:27 Na onthe maseng’a
Mark1:28 Na oyu nguma yake yanyaĩĩka nthĩ yonthe ya Kalĩlii na ndee syayo.
Mark1:29 Na oyu
Mark1:30 Na ĩndĩ inyia wa mũka wa Simoni akomete awaĩte ndetema; na oyu mamũtavya ũvoo wake:
Mark1:31 nake ooka na amũkwata kw’oko
Mark1:32 Na wĩoo
Mark1:33 Na andũ ma ndũa yonthe moombana vamwe mũomonĩ.
Mark1:34 Na avosya aingĩ ala mawaĩte mowau ma mĩthemba mingĩ
Mark1:35 Na kĩoko tene
Mark1:36 Na Simoni na ala maĩ nake mamũvikĩla;
Mark1:37 na mamwona mamwĩa
Mark1:38 Nake amea
Mark1:39 Na atavan’ya masinakokenĩ moo Kalilii kw’onthe
Mark1:40 Na mũndũ ũwaĩte mangũ athi vala ũĩ
Mark1:41 Na Yesũ ũndũ wa kũmwĩw’ia ĩnee
Mark1:42 Na oyu mangũ mavoa
Mark1:43 Na amwĩaĩa na vinya
Mark1:44 Sisya ndũkatavye mũndũ o na wĩva; ĩndĩ thi ũkeyonan’ye kwa mũthembi
Mark1:45 Ĩndĩ aumaala
Mark2:1 Na matukũ amwe mathela
Mark2:2 Na aingĩ moombana vamwe
Mark2:3 Na mooka mamũtee mũndũ ũla waĩ na ũwau wa kwaa mamutha
Mark2:4 Na meethĩa matitonya kũmũthengeea nũndũ wa mũvivinyano wa andũ
Mark2:5 Na Yesũ oona mũĩkĩĩo woo
Mark2:6 Ĩndĩ vaĩ amwe ma aandĩki mekalĩte vo
Mark2:7 Nĩkĩ mũndũ ũũ ũnũũneeka ũu? Nũkũumana: nũũ ũtonya kũekea naĩ ate o ũmwe
Mark2:8 Na oyu Yesũ amanya vevanĩ wake kana nĩmeũsũanĩa ũu nthĩnĩ woo
Mark2:9 Ũla ũvũthũ nĩ wĩva
Mark2:10 Ĩndĩ nĩ kana mũmanye atĩ Mwana wa mũndũ e na ũkũmũ kũũ nthĩ wa kũekea naĩ (amwĩa ũla waĩ na ũwau wa kwaa mamutha)
Mark2:11 Nĩngũkwĩa
Mark2:12 Nake ookĩla
Mark2:13 Na aumaala ĩngĩ athi ũtee wa ũkanga; na ĩkomano yonthe yamũmbanĩa
Mark2:14 Na avĩtĩte
Mark2:15 Na kweethĩwa ekalĩte nyũmba ya mũndũ ũsu akĩya lĩu
Mark2:16 Na aandĩki ma Avalisi
Mark2:17 Na Yesũ eew’a ũũ amea
Mark2:18 Na amanyĩw’a ma Yoana na ma Avalisi nĩmatĩĩaa ũya: nao mooka mamwĩa Yesũ
Mark2:19 Na Yesũ amakũlya
Mark2:20 Ĩndĩ mĩthenya nĩyũkĩte
Mark2:21 Na vai mũndũ ũliaa kĩlio kya ngũa nzaũ ngũanĩ ngũũ: nũndũ alia
Mark2:22 O na vai mũndũ wĩkĩaa mbinyu mbĩthĩ mathatwanĩ makũũ; nũndũ eekĩa
Mark2:23 Na kweethĩwa
Mark2:24 Na Avalisi mamwĩa
Mark2:25 Na amea
Mark2:26 Ũndũ wavotĩe nyũmbanĩ ya Ngai
Mark2:27 Na amea
Mark2:28 kwondũ wa ũu Mwana wa mũndũ nĩ Mwĩaĩi o na wa savato.
Mark3:1 Na alika ĩngĩ ĩsinakokenĩ; na kwaĩ mũndũ vo waĩ na kw’oko kwau.
Mark3:2 Na mamũsyaĩĩsya
Mark3:3 Na amwĩa ũla mũndũ waĩ na kw’oko kwau
Mark3:4 Na amakũlya
Mark3:5 Na amasiangya na ũthatu
Mark3:6 Na Avalisi maumaala
Mark3:7 Na Yesũ eesomola vau
Mark3:8 na kuma Yelusaleme
Mark3:9 Na atavya amanyĩw’a make kana kakalawa kekale vakuvĩ nake nũndũ wa ĩkomano
Mark3:10 nũndũ nũvoetye aingĩ; na onthe ala maĩ na mothĩn’yo mamũvivinyanĩa nĩ kana mamũkiite.
Mark3:11 Na maveva mavuku
Mark3:12 Na amakindĩlĩla mũno maikamumbũle.
Mark3:13 Na ambata kĩĩmanĩ
Mark3:14 Na anyuva ĩkũmi na elĩ kana methĩwae vamwe nake
Mark3:15 na kwĩthĩwa na ũkũmũ wa kũvosya mowau na kumya ndaimoni;
Mark3:16 na amũtw’ĩĩa Simoni syĩtwa yĩngĩ
Mark3:17 na Yakovo mwana was Sevetii
Mark3:18 na Andalea
Mark3:19 na Yutasi Isikalioti
Mark3:20 Na yĩla ĩkomano yoombana ĩngĩ
Mark3:21 Na andũ ma kwoo meew’a ũu
Mark3:22 Na aandĩki ala matheeie kuma Yelusaleme masya
Mark3:23 Na ameta moke vala ũĩ
Mark3:24 Na ethĩwa ũsumbĩ nĩwĩvathanĩtye
Mark3:25 Na ethĩwa nyũmba nĩyĩvathanĩtye
Mark3:26 Na ethĩwa Satanĩ nũkwĩyũkita mwene
Mark3:27 Ĩndĩ vai mũndũ ũtonya kũvota nyũmbanĩ ya ũla wĩ vinya
Mark3:28 Nĩ w’o nĩngũmwĩa
Mark3:29 ĩndĩ o ũla wĩmũuma Veva Mũtheu nde ĩndĩ ũkaekewa
Mark3:30 nũndũ masya
Mark3:31 Na inyia wake na ana‐a‐inyia make mooka; na maũngama nza
Mark3:32 Na ikomano yekala nthĩ yĩmũthyũlũlũkĩte; na mamwĩa
Mark3:33 Na amasũngĩa
Mark3:34 Na amasiangya ala mekalĩte nthĩ mamũthyũlũlũkite
Mark3:35 Nĩkwĩthĩwa o ũla wĩkaa kwenda kwa Ngai
Mark4:1 Na ambĩlĩlya ĩngĩ kũmanyĩsya e ũtee wa ũkanga. Na ĩkomano ĩnene mũno yamũmbanĩa
Mark4:2 Na amamanyĩsya maũndũ maingi na ngelekan’yo
Mark4:3 Ĩthukĩĩsyei: mũvuĩi nĩwaendie kũvuĩa:
Mark4:4 na kweethĩwa akĩvuĩa
Mark4:5 Na ingĩ syavalũka mavianĩ
Mark4:6 na syũa yaaa
Mark4:7 Na ingĩ syavalũka mĩw’anĩ
Mark4:8 Na ingĩ syavalũka mũthanganĩ mũseo
Mark4:9 Na asya
Mark4:10 Na yĩla waĩ weka
Mark4:11 Na amea
Mark4:12 kana kũsisya nĩmeũsisya
Mark4:13 Na amakũlya
Mark4:14 Ũla mũvũĩi avuĩaa ndeto.
Mark4:15 Aa nĩo ala me ũtee wa nzĩa
Mark4:16 Na ala mavuĩiwe mavianĩ no ta ũu
Mark4:17 na mati na mĩi nthĩnĩ woo
Mark4:18 Na angĩ ala mavuĩiwe mĩw’anĩ
Mark4:19 na mawĩmakĩo ma nthĩ
Mark4:20 Na asu ala mavuĩiwe mũthanganĩ mũseo nĩ ala mekwĩw’a ĩla ndeto
Mark4:21 Na amakũlya
Mark4:22 Nĩkwĩthĩwa kũti ũndũ ũvithe
Mark4:23 Ethĩwa ve mũndũ wĩ matũ ma kwĩw’a

Mark4:25 Nũndũ ũla wĩ na kĩndũ
Mark4:26 Na amea
Mark4:27 na akĩkoma na akĩamũka
Mark4:28 Nthĩ ĩsyaaa ũndũ wayo; mbee nĩ ĩtũ
Mark4:29 Ĩndĩ lĩu wooma
Mark4:30 Nake asya
Mark4:31 Ũilyĩ ta mbeke ya kalatali ĩla yavandwa nthĩ
Mark4:32 ĩndĩ yavandwa nĩyĩanaa
Mark4:33 Na amatavasya ĩla ndeto na ngelekan’yo nyingĩ ta isu
Mark4:34 na vate ngelekan’yo ndaaneena nao: ĩndĩ amamanyĩasya amanyĩw’a make maũndũ onthe me nzama.
Mark4:35 Na mũthenya ũsu

Mark4:37 Na kwookĩla kĩuutani kĩnene kya kĩseve

Mark4:39 Na aamũka
Mark4:40 Na amakũlya
Mark4:41 Na makwatwa nĩ w’ĩa mũnene
Mark5:1 Na mainga mũingo ũla ũngi wa ũkanga
Mark5:2 Na auma ngalawanĩ
Mark5:3 ũla waĩ na wĩkalo mbũanĩ: na vatyaĩ mũndũ waatonya kũmwova
Mark5:4 nĩkwĩthĩwa nĩwovawa mavinda maingĩ na mbĩngũ na mĩnyololo
Mark5:5 Na mavinda onthe
Mark5:6 Na amwona Yesũ e kũasa
Mark5:7 na aneena na wasya mũnene
Mark5:8 Nũndũ amwĩie
Mark5:9 Nake amũkũlya
Mark5:10 Na amwĩsũva mũno ndakamalũngye maume nthĩ ĩsu.
Mark5:11 Na vau nguumo wa kĩĩma kwaĩ ĩĩthya ya ngũlũe nyingĩ ikĩya.
Mark5:12 Nao mamwĩsũva
Mark5:13 Na amanenga ũthei. Na ala maveva mavuku mauma na malika ngũlũenĩ: na yĩla ĩĩthya ya ngũlũe yatheea kĩvaũũkonĩ yĩsembete
Mark5:14 Na ala maĩthasya makĩa
Mark5:15 Na mooka vala ve Yesũ
Mark5:16 Na ala moonie ũndũ ũsu
Mark5:17 Na mambĩlĩlya kũmwĩsũva Yesũ aume mĩvakanĩ yoo.
Mark5:18 Na ailika ngalawanĩ
Mark5:19 Na Yesũ amũvata
Mark5:20 Na akwata nzĩa athi
Mark5:21 Na Yesũ ainganĩsya ĩngĩ na ngalawa kũvika mũingo ũla ũngĩ
Mark5:22 Na kwooka ũmwe wa anene ma ĩsinakoke
Mark5:23 na amwĩsũva mũno
Mark5:24 Na aendan’ya nake: na ikomano ĩnene yamũatĩĩa na yamũvivinya.
Mark5:25 Na kwai mũndũ mũka ũla waumawa nĩ nthakame ĩvinda ya myaka ĩkũmi na ĩlĩ
Mark5:26 na anyamaaw’a mũno nĩ aiiti aingĩ
Mark5:27 na eew’a ũvoo wa Yesũ
Mark5:28 Nũndũ aisye
Mark5:29 Na oyu nthongo ya nthakame yake yang’ala; na eew’a mwĩĩnĩ wake kana nĩwavoa ũthĩn’yo ũsu wake.
Mark5:30 Na oyu Yesũ amanya nthĩnĩ wake kana vinya nĩwauma kwake
Mark5:31 Na amanyĩw’a make mamwĩa
Mark5:32 Na asisya ngalĩ syonthe nĩ kana one ũla weka ũndũ ũsu.
Mark5:33 Na ũla mũndũ mũka aĩkĩa na kũtetema
Mark5:34 Nake amwĩa
Mark5:35 Akĩneena
Mark5:36 Indĩ Yesũ eew’a ndeto ĩla yaneenwa
Mark5:37 Na ndaaĩtĩkĩla mũndũ aendan’ye nake
Mark5:38 Na mavika nyũmba ya ũla mũnene wa ĩsinakoke; na oona kĩtuu kĩnene
Mark5:39 Na avota nthĩnĩ
Mark5:40 Nao mamũthekeea mũno. Indĩ we
Mark5:41 Na akwata kana kw’oko
Mark5:42 Na oyu kala kelĩtu kaũngama
Mark5:43 Na amavata mũno mũndũ ndakamanye ũndũ ũsu: na eeaa kanengwe kya ũya.
Mark6:1 Na auma vo; na athi nthĩ ĩla ya kwoo; na amanyĩw’a make mamũvikĩla.
Mark6:2 Na mũthenya wa savato wavĩka
Mark6:3 Ũũ ti ũla mũseũvya wa mbwaũ
Mark6:4 Na Yesũ amea
Mark6:5 Na ndaatonya kwĩka wĩko wĩ vinya vo
Mark6:6 Na aseng’a nũndũ wa kũlea kwĩtĩkĩla kwoo. Na anganga mĩsyĩ akĩmanyĩsya.
Mark6:7 Na ameta kwake ala ĩkũmi na elĩ
Mark6:8 na ameaĩa maikakue kĩndũ kya nzĩanĩ
Mark6:9 ĩndĩ mekĩe iatũ: na asya
Mark6:10 Na amea
Mark6:11 Na o ũla ũteũmũthokya na kũmwĩw’a
Mark6:12 Na maumaala mathi
Mark6:13 Na maumya ndaimoni nyingĩ
Mark6:14 Na mũsumbĩ Elote eew’a ũvoo ũsu; nũndũ syĩtwa ya Yesũ nĩyeesĩkĩwe: na asya
Mark6:15 Ĩndĩ angĩ masya
Mark6:16 Ĩndĩ Elote eew’a asya
Mark6:17 Nũndũ Elote mwene aĩ anatũma andũ na akamũkwata Yoana
Mark6:18 Nũndũ Yoana amũtavisye Elote
Mark6:19 Na ĩndĩ Elotia aĩ na ũthũ nake
Mark6:20 nũndũ Elote nĩwamũkĩaa Yoana
Mark6:21 Na mũthenya waĩle wavika
Mark6:22 na mwĩĩtu wa Elotia ũsu alika na asũnga
Mark6:23 Nake eevĩta
Mark6:24 Na aumaala
Mark6:25 Na oyu alika na mĩtũkĩ vala ve mũsumbĩ
Mark6:26 Na mũsumbĩ eew’a woo mũno; ĩndĩ kwondũ wa mawĩvĩto make
Mark6:27 Na oyu mũsũmbĩ atũma mũsikalĩ ũmwe wa asũvĩi make
Mark6:28 na aete mũtwe wake wĩ ĩsaaninĩ
Mark6:29 Na amanyĩw’a ma Yoana meew’a ũvoo
Mark6:30 Na atũmwa mamũmbanĩa Yesũ; na mamũtavya maũndũ onthe
Mark6:31 Na amea
Mark6:32 Na mathi ngalawanĩ me oka vandũ vate andũ
Mark6:33 Na andũ mamona maendete
Mark6:34 Na Yesũ aũma ngalawanĩ oona ĩkomano ĩnene
Mark6:35 Na yĩla kwatwie kũtuka
Mark6:36 ũmbũũkya aa
Mark6:37 Indĩ asũngĩa
Mark6:38 Na amasũngĩa
Mark6:39 Na ameaĩa mekalye onthe nthĩ nyekinĩ nziũ
Mark6:40 Na mekala nthĩ mĩkw’ĩlĩ
Mark6:41 Na oosa ila imũtũ itano na ala makũyũ elĩ
Mark6:42 Na onthe maya mavũna.
Mark6:43 Na moosa ilungu ila ndile
Mark6:44 Na ala maĩe ila imũtũ maĩ aũme ngili itano.
Mark6:45 Na oyu amathing’ĩĩsya amanyĩw’a make malike ngalawanĩ
Mark6:46 Na amatiĩa ũvoo athi kĩĩmanĩ kũvoya.
Mark6:47 Na kwavika wĩoo ĩla ngalawa yaĩ ũkanganĩ katĩ
Mark6:48 Na amona makĩthĩna nĩ ũtwaa ngalawa
Mark6:49 ĩndĩ mo mamwona akinyĩle ũkanganĩ ĩũlũ
Mark6:50 nũndũ onthe nĩmamwonie
Mark6:51 Na ambata vala maĩ ngalawanĩ; na kĩseve kyakilya: na maseng’a mũno nthĩnĩ woo;
Mark6:52 nũndũ maiaamanya ũndũ wa ila imũtũ
Mark6:53 Na mainga mavika nthĩ ya Kenesaleti
Mark6:54 Na mauma ngalawanĩ
Mark6:55 na masemba makoman’ya nthĩ ĩsu yonthe
Mark6:56 Na kw’onthe kũla wavotie
Mark7:1 Na Avalisi na amwe ma aandĩki ala maumĩte Yelusaleme mamũmbanĩa
Mark7:2 na moona amwe ma amanyĩw’a make makĩya lĩu woo na nzaa mbuku
Mark7:3 (Nũndũ Avalisi na Ayuti onthe
Mark7:4 na mauma kĩng’ang’anĩ
Mark7:5 Na ĩndĩ ala Avalisi na aandĩki mamũkũlya
Mark7:6 Na amea
Mark7:7 Makĩmanyĩsya momanyĩsyo
Mark7:8 Nĩmũtiaa mĩao ya Ngai
Mark7:9 Na amea
Mark7:10 Nũndũ Mose aisye
Mark7:11 ĩndĩ inyw’ĩ mwĩasya
Mark7:12 inyw’ĩ mũtiĩtĩkĩla ĩngĩ akamũtethya ĩthe kana nyinyia na ũndũ;
Mark7:13 nĩmũkwananga ndeto ya Ngai kwondũ wa mokũũ menyu
Mark7:14 Na ayĩta ĩkomano yũke vala ũi ĩngĩ
Mark7:15 vai kĩndũ kĩ ũtee wa mũndũ kĩla kĩkĩlika nthĩni wake kĩtonya kũmũvukya; ĩndĩ maũndũ ala maumaa nthĩnĩ wake
Mark7:16 (Ethĩwa mũndũ e na matũ ma kwĩw’a

Mark7:26 Na ũla mũndũ mũka aĩ Mũkiliki ũko wa Silovonike. Na amwĩsũva amumĩsye mwĩĩtu wake ĩla ndaimoni.

Mark7:28 Ĩndĩ we asũngĩa
Mark7:29 Na amwĩa

Mark8:1 Na ĩngĩ matukũ asu
Mark8:2 Nĩngũyĩw’ĩa ĩkomano tei
Mark8:3 na ethĩwa nĩngũmombũũkya maende kwoo me na nzaa
Mark8:4 Na amanyĩw’a make mamũsũngĩa
Mark8:5 Na amakũlya
Mark8:6 Na ayĩaĩa ĩkomano yĩkale nthĩ: nake oosa ila imũtũ mũonza
Mark8:7 Na maĩ na tũmakũyũ tũvũthũ: na atũathima
Mark8:8 Na maya
Mark8:9 Na ala maĩe maĩ ta ngili inya: na amombũũkya.
Mark8:10 Na oyu alika ngalawanĩ vamwe na amanyĩw’a make
Mark8:11 Na Avalisi maumĩla
Mark8:12 Na avevũũka mũno vevanĩ wake na asya
Mark8:13 Na amatia
Mark8:14 Na nĩmoolĩtwe nĩ ũkua imũtũ; ate o kĩmũtũ kĩmwe maĩ nakyo ngalawani.
Mark8:15 Na ameaĩa
Mark8:16 Na masũanĩa ene kwa ene
Mark8:17 Na Yesũ amanya ũu amea
Mark8:18 Mwĩ na metho
Mark8:19 Yĩla namatilangĩle andũ ngili itano ila imũtũ itano
Mark8:20 Na ĩvinda yĩla nĩnamatilangĩle andũ ngili inya imũtũ mũonza
Mark8:21 Na amea
Mark8:22 Na mavika Vethisaita. Na mamũetee kĩlilinda
Mark8:23 Na akwata kĩla kĩlilinda kw’oko
Mark8:24 Na kyookĩlya metho
Mark8:25 Na akilĩĩla moko ĩngĩ methonĩ; na kyaketeea mũno
Mark8:26 Na amwĩa enũke kwoo
Mark8:27 Na Yesũ na amanyĩw’a make mauma vo
Mark8:28 Na mamũtavya
Mark8:29 Na amakũlya
Mark8:30 Na ameaĩa maikatavye mũndũ ũndũ wake.
Mark8:31 Na ambĩlĩlya kũmamanyĩsya kana Mwana wa mũndũ ndatĩa ũthĩnw’a na mathĩna maingĩ
Mark8:32 Na aneena ndeto isu ateũvitha. Na Vetelo amwosa
Mark8:33 Ĩndĩ we eethyũũa
Mark8:34 Na ayĩta ĩkomano na amanyĩw’a make nao
Mark8:35 Nũndũ o ũla ũnũkwenda kũvĩtya thayũ wake akawasya; na o ũla ũkawasya thayũ wake kwondũ wakwa na kwondũ wa ũvoo mũseo
Mark8:36 Nũndũ mũndũ aunwa nĩ kyaũ o na akosa nthĩ nima na akyasya thayũ wake?
Mark8:37 Nũndũ mũndũ akakũan’ya thayũ wake na kyaũ?
Mark8:38 Nũndũ o ũla ũkambĩw’ĩa nthoni nyie kana ndeto syakwa ũsyaonĩ ũũ wa ũlaalai na wa naĩ

Mark11:1 Na yĩla mathengeeie Yelusaleme

Mark11:10 Nĩ mũathime ũsumbĩ ũla wũkĩte

Mark12:1 Na ambĩlĩlya kũneena nao na ngelekan’yo. Mũndũ avandie mũũnda wa mĩsavivũ
Mark12:2 Na ĩvinda yavĩka atũma ngombo kwa ala aĩmi nĩ kana yose kwa aĩmi mosyao amwe ma mũũnda wa mĩsavivũ.
Mark12:3 Na mamĩkwata
Mark12:4 Na ĩngĩ atũma ngombo ĩngĩ kwoo; na ĩsũ mamĩuauĩkya mũtwe na mamĩsonokya.
Mark12:5 Na amĩtũma ĩngĩ; na ĩsu mamyũaa: na atũma ingĩ mbingĩ; na makĩkũna imwe
Mark12:6 Na eethĩwa atialĩte na ũmwe
Mark12:7 Indĩ aĩmi asu masya ene kwa ene
Mark12:8 Na mamũkwata
Mark12:9 Na yu ĩndĩ ũla mwene wa mũũnda ũsu wa mĩsavivũ akeeka ata? Akooka na akaananga ala aĩmi
Mark12:10 O na mũtyaamba ũsoma ũandĩko ũũ: Ĩvia yĩla yaleilwe nĩ aki
Mark12:11 Ũu nĩwaumie kwa Mwĩaĩi
Mark12:12 Na mamantha kũmũkwata; na makĩa ĩkomano; nũndũ nĩmamanyie kana ngelekan’yo ĩsu aneena ũndũ woo: na mamũeka
Mark12:13 Na matũma amwe ma Avalisi na ma Elote vala ũĩ
Mark12:14 Na mooka
Mark12:15 Tũmũnenge
Mark12:16 Na mamũetee. Na amakũlya
Mark12:17 Na Yesũ amea
Mark12:18 Na Asatukai mooka vala ũĩ
Mark12:19 Mũmanyĩsya
Mark12:20 Kwaĩ aũme mũonza ma inyia ũmwe: na ũla wa mbee atwaa mũka
Mark12:21 na wa kelĩ nake amwosa
Mark12:22 na asu mũonza maiaatia mbeũ. Ĩtina wa onthe ũla mũndũ mũka nake akw’a.
Mark12:23 Ũthayũũkyonĩ ĩndĩ akethĩwa e mũka wa wĩva wa asu? Nũndũ onthe mũonza nĩmamũtwaĩte.
Mark12:24 Yesũ amea
Mark12:25 Nũndũ yĩla makathayũũka kuma akw’ũnĩ
Mark12:26 Ĩndĩ ũndũ wa akw’ũ
Mark12:27 We ti Ngai wa ala akw’ũ
Mark12:28 Na ũmwe wa aandĩki ooka
Mark12:29 Yesũ amũsũngĩa
Mark12:30 mwende Mwĩaĩi Ngai waku na ngoo yaku yonthe
Mark12:31 Na wa kelĩ nĩw’o ũũ
Mark12:32 Na ũla mũandĩki amwĩa
Mark12:33 na kũmwenda na ngoo yonthe
Mark12:34 Na Yesũ oona kana asũngĩa na ũmanyi
Mark12:35 Na Yesũ akĩmanyĩsya ĩkalũnĩ asũngĩa
Mark12:36 Ndaviti mwene e nthĩnĩ wa Veva Mũtheu aisye
Mark12:37 Ndaviti mwene emwĩta Mwĩaĩi; na ĩndĩ nĩ mwana wake ata? Na yĩla ĩkomano ĩnene yamwĩthukĩĩsya na ũtanu.
Mark12:38 Na ũmanyĩsyonĩ wake asya
Mark12:39 na ivĩla sya mbee masinakokenĩ
Mark12:40 ala maĩsaa nyũmba sya aka ndiwa
Mark12:41 Na ekala nthĩ elekele vala valekelaw’a nthembo
Mark12:42 Na kwooka mũndũ mũka ndiwa ngya
Mark12:43 Na ameta amanyĩw’a make
Mark12:44 nũndũ aa onthe meekĩa nũndũ wa kwingĩvĩwa kwoo; ĩndĩ ũũ kuma ũkyanĩ wake eekĩa syonthe ila wĩ nasyo
Mark13:1 Na akyuma ĩkalũnĩ
Mark13:2 Na Yesũ amwĩa
Mark13:3 Na ekalĩte kĩĩmanĩ kya Mĩthata kwelekela ĩkalũ
Mark13:4 Tũtavye
Mark13:5 Na Yesũ ambĩlĩlya kũmatavya
Mark13:6 Aingĩ makooka na syĩtwa yakwa
Mark13:7 Na yĩla mũkew’a ũvoo wa makaũ na mawetango ma makaũ
Mark13:8 Nũndũ mbaĩ ĩkookĩlĩla mbaĩ
Mark13:9 Ĩndĩ inyw’ĩ ĩsũvĩei: nũndũ makamũnengane nzamanĩ; na mũkakũnĩwa masinakokenĩ; na mũkaũngama mbee wa makavana na asumbĩ kwondũ wakwa
Mark13:10 Na ĩngĩ mũvaka ũvoo mũseo wambe ũtavanw’a mbaĩnĩ syonthe.
Mark13:11 Na yĩla memũtwaa na kũmũnengane mokonĩ ma andũ
Mark13:12 Na mũndũ akanengane mwana‐a‐inyia oawe
Mark13:13 Na inyw’ĩ mũkamenwa nĩ andũ onthe kwondũ wa syĩtwa yakwa: ĩndĩ ũla wĩũmĩĩsya kũvika mũminũkĩlyo
Mark13:14 Ĩndĩ yĩla mwĩona ũthatyo ũla wanangaa ũũngeme vandũ ũtaĩle kũũngama (ũla ũsomaa namanye)
Mark13:15 na ũla wĩ ĩũlũ wa nyũmba ndakatheee
Mark13:16 na ũla wĩ mũũndanĩ ndakasyoke ose ngũa yake ya ĩũlũ.
Mark13:17 Ĩndĩ woo nĩ wa ala aito na ala mekwongya mĩthenya ĩsu!
Mark13:18 Na voyai ũndũ ũsu ndũkethĩwe ĩvinda ya mbevo.
Mark13:19 Nũndũ matukũ asu kũkethĩwa thĩna ũndũ ũtaaĩthĩwa kuma mwambĩlĩlyo wa kũmbwa kwa syĩndũ ila Ngai wombie kũvika na yu
Mark13:20 Na kethĩwa Ngai ndaakuvĩvya matukũ asu
Mark13:21 Na ĩvinda yĩu ethĩwa mũndũ o na wĩva akamwĩa
Mark13:22 nũndũ makookĩla Maklĩsto ma ũvũngũ na athani ma ũvũngũ
Mark13:23 Ĩndĩ inyw’ĩ ĩsũvĩei: sisyai
Mark13:24 Ĩndĩ matukũ asu
Mark13:25 na ndata ikethĩwa ikĩvalũkanga kuma ĩtunĩ
Mark13:26 Na nĩvo meona Mwana wa mũndũ okĩte mathweonĩ na vinya mũnene na ũtheu mũtisu.
Mark13:27 Na nĩvo wĩtũma alaĩka momban’ye anyuve make kuma ngalĩ inya sya ĩseve
Mark13:28 Na ĩndĩ ĩmanyĩsyei ngelekan’yo ya mũkũyũ: mbonge syaw’o syololoa
Mark13:29 no ta ũu nenyu
Mark13:30 Nĩ w’o nĩngũmwĩa
Mark13:31 Ĩtu na nthĩ nikavĩta: ĩndĩ ndeto syakwa itikavĩta.
Mark13:32 Ĩndĩ mũthenya ũsu na saa ũsu vai ũmwe wĩsĩ
Mark13:33 Ĩsũvĩei
Mark13:34 Nĩ ta mũndũ akĩthi kyalo nthĩ ĩngĩ
Mark13:35 Syaĩĩsyaĩ ĩndĩ; nũndũ mũtyĩsĩ yĩla mwene wa nyũmba wĩũka
Mark13:36 ndakese kũka na mĩtũkĩ mũtesĩ na aimwĩthĩa mũkomete.
Mark13:37 Na ũu ngũmũtavya inyw’ĩ
Mark14:1 Na ĩtina wa mĩthenya ĩlĩ kwaĩ mboka ya vasaka na kĩmũtũ kĩte ĩlawa: na athembi anene na aandĩki mamantha ũndũ matonya kũmũkwata na ũseleke na kũmũaa:
Mark14:2 nũndũ maasya
Mark14:3 Na yĩla waĩ Vethania nyũmbanĩ ya Simoni ũla ũwaĩte mangũ
Mark14:4 Ĩndĩ kwaĩ amwe mathatie ngoonĩ syoo
Mark14:5 Nũndũ mauta aa meĩ matonya kũtewa mbee wa silingi maana atatũ

Mark14:8 Nĩweka ũla ũtonya; amba ũmbĩtĩkĩsya mwĩĩ wakwa mauta kwondũ wa kũthikwa kwakwa.

Mark14:10 Na Yutasi Isikalioti

Mark14:16 Na amanyĩw’a maũmaala

Mark14:49 Kĩla mũthenya naĩ nenyu ĩkalũnĩ ngĩmanyĩsya
Mark14:50 Na onthe mamũtia
Mark14:51 Na mwanake ũmwe amũatĩĩa
Mark14:52 ĩndĩ atia ngũa ya katane
Mark14:53 Na mamũtwaa Yesũ kwa mũthembi ũla mũnene: na mamũmbanĩa vo athembi onthe anene
Mark14:54 Na Vetelo amũatĩĩa e kũasa
Mark14:55 Na ĩndĩ athembĩ anene na nzama yonthe mamũmanthĩa Yesũ ũkũsĩ nĩ kana mamũae; na maiaawona.
Mark14:56 Nũndũ aingĩ mamũkũsĩĩa ũvũngũ
Mark14:57 Na amwe maũngama mamũkũsĩĩa ũvũngũ
Mark14:58 Ithyĩ nĩtũneewie akyasya
Mark14:59 O na ũu
Mark14:60 Na ũla mũthembi mũnene aũngama katĩ
Mark14:61 Ĩndĩ avindya
Mark14:62 Na Yesũ asya
Mark14:63 Na mũthembi mũnene atembũanga ngũa syake
Mark14:64 Nĩmweew’a kũumana kwake; mwĩona ata? Na onthe matw’a kana aĩlwe nĩ kĩkw’ũ.
Mark14:65 Na amwe mambĩlĩlya kũmũtw’ĩla mata

Mark15:1 Na oyu kĩoko athembi anene vamwe na atumĩa na aandĩki
Mark15:2 Na Vilato amũkũlya
Mark15:3 Na athembi anene mamũvinganĩsya na maũndũ maingĩ.
Mark15:4 Na Vilato amũkũlya ĩngĩ
Mark15:5 Ĩndĩ Yesũ ndaasũngĩa ũndũ ĩngĩ; na Vilato aseng’a.
Mark15:6 Na ĩndĩ ĩvinda ya mboka akothaa kũmathaĩsya mwovwa ũmwe
Mark15:7 Na vaĩ mũndũ ũmwe wetawa Valava wovetwe vamwe na ala mang’endie
Mark15:8 Na yĩla ĩkomano yambata yambĩlĩlya kũmũvoya eke o tondũ wakothaa kũyĩka.
Mark15:9 Na Vilato amasũngĩa
Mark15:10 Nũndũ amanyie kana athembi anene manamũnenganie nũndũ wa kĩwĩu.
Mark15:11 Ĩndĩ athembi anene mathing’ĩĩsya ĩkomano yĩneene atĩ nĩ kavaa amathaĩsye Valava.
Mark15:12 Na Vilato asũngĩa ĩngĩ amea
Mark15:13 Nao maneena ĩngĩ na mawasya manene
Mark15:14 Na Vilato amakũlya
Mark15:15 Na Vilato akyenda kũyendeesya ĩkomano
Mark15:16 Na asikalĩ mamũtwaa Yesũ nthĩnĩ wa nza
Mark15:17 Na mamwĩkĩa ngũa ĩilyĩ ta ndune
Mark15:18 na mambĩlĩlya kũmũkethya
Mark15:19 Na mamũkũna mũtwe na mũangi
Mark15:20 Na mamina ũmũthekeea na kĩvũthya
Mark15:21 Na mamũkwata mũndũ avĩtĩte
Mark15:22 Na mamũtwaa vandũ vetwa Kolokotha
Mark15:23 Na mamũnenga mbinyu ĩvũlanĩtw’e na manemane: ĩndĩ ndaaosa.
Mark15:24 Na mamwamba
Mark15:25 Na kwaĩ saa itatũ
Mark15:26 Na ũandĩko wa kũvinganĩw’a kwake nĩwaandĩkiwe ĩũlũ
Mark15:27 Na mamwamba vamwe na avutani elĩ; ũmwe ngalĩ ya kw’oko kwake kwa aũme
Mark15:28 Na ũandĩko weanĩw’a ũla waĩtye
Mark15:29 Na ala mavĩtaa nzĩanĩ mamũuma
Mark15:30 ĩtangĩĩe mwene
Mark15:31 No ta ũu ala athembi anene makĩmũthekeea na kĩvũthya ene kwa ene
Mark15:32 Klĩsto
Mark15:33 Na syũa yaũngama
Mark15:34 Na saa kenda Yesũ aneena na wasya mũnene
Mark15:35 Na amwe ma ala maũngeme vakuvĩ
Mark15:36 Na ũmwe asemba
Mark15:37 Na Yesũ aneena na wasya mũnene
Mark15:38 Na ngũa ya tũtũ ya ĩkalũ yatembũka ilungu ilĩ kuma ĩũlũ kũvika nthĩ.
Mark15:39 Na ũla mũnene wa asikalĩ ĩana
Mark15:40 Na vaĩ aka nao makĩsisya me kũasa: na amwe moo maĩ Meli Makatalene
Mark15:41 asu mamũatĩĩaa yĩla waĩ Kalilii na kũmũthũkũmaa; na aka angĩ aingĩ ala mambatie vamwe nake kũvika Yelusaleme.
Mark15:42 Na kwavika wĩoo
Mark15:43 kwathi Yosevu wa Alimathia
Mark15:44 Na Vilato aseng’a ethĩwa nũminie kũkw’a: na amwĩta ũla mũnene wa asikalĩ ĩana
Mark15:45 Na amanyĩthw’a nĩ ũla mũnene wa asikalĩ ĩana
Mark15:46 Na athooa ngũa ya katane
Mark15:47 Na Meli Makatalene na Meli inyia wa Yose moona vala waiiwe.

Mark16:8 Na maumaala mbũanĩ

Mark16:11 Nao meew’a kana e thayũ
Mark16:12 Na ĩtina wa maũndũ asu amaumĩlĩla andũ elĩ moo
Mark16:13 Nao mathi na matavya ala angĩ: o na asu mainametĩkĩla.

Mark16:20 Nao mathi
Luke1:1 Nĩkwĩthĩwa andũ aingĩ nĩmatatie kũandĩka ũvoo wa maũndũ ala meanĩiw’e katĩ waitũ
Luke1:2 na matũnengie ithyĩ
Luke1:3 na nĩkwĩthĩwa nĩneekuũĩte nesa vala maũndũ asu onthe maumie
Luke1:4 nĩ kana ũmanye w’o wa maũndũ ala wamanyĩiw’e.
Luke1:5 Tene
Luke1:6 Nao elĩ maĩ alũngalu mbee wa Ngai
Luke1:7 Nao matyaĩ na kana
Luke1:8 Na ĩndĩ kweethĩwa
Luke1:9 o ũndũ kwĩkawa wĩanĩ wa ũthembi
Luke1:10 Na ĩkomano yonthe yekalĩte nza yĩkĩvoya ĩvinda ya kũtoeesya ũvani.
Luke1:11 Na aumĩlĩlwa nĩ mũlaĩka wa Mwĩaĩi
Luke1:12 Na Nzakalia amwona aũũya
Luke1:13 Ĩndĩ ũla mũlaĩka amwĩa
Luke1:14 Naku ũkeethĩwa na ũtanu na mũyo; na aingĩ makeew’a mũyo nũndũ wa kũsyawa kwako.

Luke1:47 Na veva wakwa nũmũtanĩe Ngai

Luke1:52 Ala anene nũmaumĩtye ivĩlanĩ sya ũsumbĩ
Luke1:53 Ala me na nzaa nũmavũnĩtye na maũndũ maseo; Na ala athwii nũmalũngĩtye me athei.

Luke1:58 Na atũi make na andũ ma mbaĩ yake meew’a ũndũ Mwĩaĩi wamwingĩvĩsye tei; matana vamwe nake.

Luke3:4 o tondũ kũandĩkĩtwe ĩvukunĩ ya ndeto sya mwathani Isaia
Luke3:5 Syanda syonthe ikalindwa
Luke3:6 Na mĩĩ yonthe ĩkoona ũtangĩĩo wa Ngai.

Luke3:8 Syaai ĩndĩ ũsyao ũla waĩle ũalyũlo wa ngoo

Luke3:17 na kĩũlũkya kyake kĩ kw’okoni kwake
