Luke3:34 wa Yakovo
Luke3:35 wa Seluki
Luke3:36 wa Kenani
Luke3:37 wa Methusela
Luke3:38 wa Enosi
Luke4:1 Na Yesũ
Luke4:2 Akĩtatwa nĩ ndevili ĩvinda ya matukũ mĩongo ĩna. Na matukũ asu ndaĩsaa kĩndũ: na mathela
Luke4:3 Na ndevili amwĩa atĩĩ
Luke4:4 Na Yesũ amũsũngĩa
Luke4:5 Na amũtongoesya kĩĩmanĩ ĩũlũ
Luke4:6 Na ndevili amwĩa atĩĩ
Luke4:7 Ĩndĩ we ethĩwa nũũnthaitha
Luke4:8 Yesũ amũsũngĩa
Luke4:9 Na amũtwaa Yelusaleme
Luke4:10 nũndũ nĩkũandĩkĩtwe
Luke4:11 na ĩngĩ
Luke4:12 Na Yesũ amũsũngia
Luke4:13 Na ndevili amina matatwa onthe
Luke4:14 Na Yesũ asyoka Kalilii vinyanĩ wa Veva: na nguma yake yausũa ndee syonthe sya nthĩ ĩsu.
Luke4:15 Nake amanyĩsya masinakokenĩ moo
Luke4:16 Nake athi Nasaleti
Luke4:17 Anengwa ĩvuku ya mwathani Isaia. Na avuũa ĩvuku
Luke4:18 Veva wa Ngai e ĩũlũ wakwa
Luke4:19 Na kũtavan’ya mwaka wa Mwĩaĩi ũla wĩtĩkĩlawa.
Luke4:20 Na akũnza yĩla ĩvuku
Luke4:21 Na ambĩlĩlya kũmea atĩĩ
Luke4:22 Na onthe mamũkũsĩaa
Luke4:23 Nake amea atĩĩ
Luke4:24 Nake asya
Luke4:25 Ĩndĩ nĩngũmũtavya w’o
Luke4:26 na Eliya ndaatũmwa kwa ũmwe wamo
Luke4:27 Na nthĩ ya Aisilaeli kwaĩ andũ aingĩ ala maĩ na mangũ ĩvinda ya mwathani Elisa; na vai ũmwe wamo waathew’a ate o Naamani
Luke4:28 Na onthe ala maĩ ĩsinakokenĩ
Luke4:29 na mookĩla
Luke4:30 Ĩndĩ avĩtĩla katĩ wamo
Luke4:31 Na atheea athi Kavelinaumi
Luke4:32 nao maseng’a ũndũ wa ũmanyĩsyo wake; nĩkwĩthĩwa ndeto syake syaĩ na ũkũmũ.
Luke4:33 Na vau ĩsinakokenĩ vaĩ mũndũ ũla wakwetwe nĩ veva wa ndaimoni mbuku; nake aneena na wasya mũnene
Luke4:34 Iĩ! Twĩ ũndũ naku wa kyaũ
Luke4:35 Na Yesũ amĩkan’ya
Luke4:36 Na onthe maseng’a
Luke4:37 Na ũvoo wake wanyaĩĩka ndee syonthe
Luke4:38 Nake aumaala ĩsinakokenĩ
Luke4:39 Nake aũngama vakuvĩ nake
Luke4:40 Na syũa yĩkĩthũa
Luke4:41 Na andũ aingĩ maumiw’e ndaimoni
Luke4:42 Na kwakya
Luke4:43 Ĩndĩ amea atĩĩ
Luke4:44 Nake atavanasya masinakokenĩ ma Kalilii.
Luke5:1 Na kweethĩwa
Luke5:2 na oona ngalawa ilĩ ũtee wa ĩia; ĩndĩ atei ma makũyũ meethĩwa maumĩte
Luke5:3 Nake alika ngalawanĩ ĩmwe
Luke5:4 Na amina ũneena
Luke5:5 Na Simoni amũsũngia
Luke5:6 Na meeka ũu
Luke5:7 na mamavenesya ala maĩ ngwatanĩo nao ngalawanĩ ĩla ĩngĩ
Luke5:8 Ĩndĩ Simoni Vetelo
Luke5:9 Nũndũ nĩwaseng’ie
Luke5:10 na Yakovo na Yoana
Luke5:11 Na maete ngalawa syoo ngũkanĩ
Luke5:12 Na kweethĩwa
Luke5:13 Na atambũũkya kw’oko kwake
Luke5:14 Na amwĩaĩa ndakatavye mũndũ: ĩndĩ amwĩa
Luke5:15 Ĩndĩ ũvoo wake waingĩva mũno mbee: na andũ aingĩ makomana mamwĩw’e
Luke5:16 Ĩndĩ we eeyathũkya athi vandũ vate andũ
Luke5:17 Na kweethĩwa mũthenya ũmwe yĩla wamanyĩasya
Luke5:18 Na ĩndĩ aũme mooka makuĩte na ũkomo mũndũ waĩ na ũwau wa kwaa mamutha: na mamantha kũmũtwaa nthĩnĩ
Luke5:19 Nao malea kwona vandũ va ũmũtwaĩla nthĩnĩ nũndũ wa ĩkomano
Luke5:20 Nake oona mũĩkĩĩo woo
Luke5:21 Na aandĩki na Avalisi mambĩlĩlya kũsũanĩa
Luke5:22 Ĩndĩ Yesũ amanya mosũanĩo moo
Luke5:23 Ũla ũvũthũ nĩ wĩva
Luke5:24 Ĩndĩ nĩ kana mũmanye Mwana wa mũndũ e na ũkũmũ kũũ nthĩ wa kũekea naĩ (amwĩa ũla waĩ na ũwau wa kwaa mamutha)
Luke5:25 Na kavinda o kau ookĩla e mbee woo
Luke5:26 Na onthe maseng’a
Luke5:27 Ĩtina wa maũndũ asu aumaala
Luke5:28 Nake atia syĩndũ syonthe
Luke5:29 Na Livai amũvokea mboka nene nyũmbanĩ kwake: na vaĩ aingĩ ma aumya ma koti na andũ angĩ mailyĩ nao makĩya lĩu.
Luke5:30 Na Avalisi na aandĩki moo mamanyungunyĩĩsya amanyĩw’a make
Luke5:31 Na Yesũ amasũngĩa
Luke5:32 Ndyaaũka kwĩta ala alũngalu
Luke5:33 Nao mamwĩa
Luke5:34 Na Yesũ amakũlya
Luke5:35 Ĩndĩ mĩthenya nĩyũkĩte
Luke5:36 Ĩngĩ aneena na ngelekan’yo amatavya: Mũndũ ndatilaa kĩlio kya ngũa nzaũ alie ngũa ngũũ; nĩkwĩthĩwa eeka ũu nũkũtembũa ĩla nzaũ
Luke5:37 Na vai mũndũ wĩkĩaa mbinyu mbĩthĩ mathatwanĩ makũũ; nĩkwĩthĩwa eekĩa
Luke5:38 Ĩndĩ mbinyu mbĩthĩ yaĩlwe nĩ kwĩkĩwa mathatwanĩ meũ.
Luke5:39 Na vai mũndũ ũla waanyw’a mbinyu ngũũ ũnũkwenda ĩla mbĩthĩ; nũndũ easya
Luke6:1 Na kweethĩwa mũthenya ũmwe wa savato
Luke6:2 Na amwe ma Avalisi mamwĩa
Luke6:3 Yesũ amasũngĩa
Luke6:4 ũndũ wavotie nyũmbanĩ ya Ngai
Luke6:5 Nake amea
Luke6:6 Na kweethĩwa mũthenya ũngĩ wa savato
Luke6:7 Na ala aandĩki na Avalisi mamũsyaĩĩsya
Luke6:8 Nake nĩwesĩ mosũanĩo moo; na amwĩa ũla waĩ na kw’oko kwau
Luke6:9 Na Yesũ amea
Luke6:10 Nake amasiangya onthe
Luke6:11 Ĩndĩ onthe mausũwa nĩ ũthatu ta me na ndũũka; na maneenan’ya makĩmantha ũndũ matonya kũmwĩka Yesũ.
Luke6:12 Na kweethĩwa matukũ asu
Luke6:13 Na kwakya
Luke6:14 Simoni
Luke6:15 na Mathayo na Thoma
Luke6:16 na Yutasi wa Yakovo
Luke6:17 na atheea nao
Luke6:18 na ala manyamaĩtw’e nĩ maveva mavuku mavow’a.
Luke6:19 Na onthe ma ĩkomano mamantha kũmũkiita; nũndũ vinya waumie nthĩnĩ wake
Luke6:20 Nake ookĩlya metho make amasisya amanyĩw’a make
Luke6:21 Mwĩ aathime inyw’ĩ ala mwĩ na nzaa yu: nũndũ mũkavũnw’a. Mwĩ aathime inyw’ĩ ala mũkũĩa yu: nũndũ mũkatheka.
Luke6:22 Mwĩ aathime inyw’ĩ
Luke6:23 Tanai mũthenya ũsu
Luke6:24 Ĩndĩ mwĩthĩwe na woo inyw’i athwii! Nĩkwĩthĩwa nĩmwoosie ũkiakisyo wenyu.
Luke6:25 Mwĩthĩwe na woo
Luke6:26 Mwĩthĩwe na woo inyw’ĩ
Luke6:27 Ĩndĩ inyw’ĩ ala mũkwĩw’a nĩngũmũtavya atĩĩ
Luke6:28 maathimei ala mamwĩvĩkaa
Luke6:29 Ũla ũnũũkũkũna ũthĩa ũmwe mũthyũũĩe ũla ũngi; na ũla ũnũũkũvena ngũa yaku ya ĩũlũ manya ũmũvata kĩtonyeo kyaku.
Luke6:30 Mũnenge ũla ũnũkwĩtya; na ũla unũũkũvena syĩndũ syaku ndũkamũkũlye.
Luke6:31 Na ũndũ ũla mũkwenda kwĩkwa nĩ andũ
Luke6:32 Mũkĩmenda ala mamwendaa inyw’ĩ
Luke6:33 Na mũkĩmeka nesa ala mamwĩkaa inyw’ĩ nesa
Luke6:34 Na mũkĩmakovethya ala mũkwasya makamũĩva
Luke6:35 Ĩndĩ inyw’ĩ mendei amaitha menyu
Luke6:36 Ĩthĩwai na tei
Luke6:37 Manyai ũsilĩla
Luke6:38 nenganei
Luke6:39 Na Yesũ amatavya ngelekan’yo
Luke6:40 Mũmanĩw’a ndethĩwa e ĩũlũ wa mũmanyĩsya wake: ĩndĩ kĩla mũndũ ũminĩte kũmanyĩw’a akeethĩwa ta mũmanyĩsya wake.
Luke6:41 Naku nĩkĩ ũkũsisya kaũvavathĩ ke ithonĩ ya mwana‐a‐au
Luke6:42 Kana ũtonya ata kũmwĩa mwana‐a‐au
Luke6:43 Vai mũtĩ mũseo ũsyaa ũsyao mũthũku; kana mũtĩ mũthũku ũsyaa ũsyao mũseo.
Luke6:44 Nũndũ kĩla mũtĩ nũmanyĩkaa nĩ ũsyao waw’o. Nũndũ mĩw’anĩ andũ maitusaa makũyũ
Luke6:45 Mũndũ mũseo nĩwumasya ũndũ ũseo kyũmbanĩsyonĩ kĩseo kya ngoo yake; na mũndũ mũthũku nĩwumasya ũndũ ũthũku kyũmbanĩsyonĩ kĩthũku kya ngoo yake: nũndũ ũla wusũĩte ngoo nĩw’o kanyw’a ũneenaa.
Luke6:46 Mũmbĩtaa Mwĩaĩi
Luke6:47 Kĩla mũndũ wũkaa kwakwa
Luke6:48 ailyĩ ta mũndũ ũla wakie nyũmba
Luke6:49 Ĩndĩ ũla wewie
Luke7:1 Na Yesũ amina kũneena ndeto syake syonthe ĩkĩw’ika nĩ andũ
Luke7:2 Na mũnene ũmwe wa asikali ĩana aĩ na ngombo ndwau
Luke7:3 Na eew’a ũvoo wa Yesũ
Luke7:4 Nao
Luke7:5 nũndũ nĩwendete mbaitũ
Luke7:6 Na Yesũ athi nao. Na avika vakuvĩ na nyũmba
Luke7:7 na ta ũu nĩnasya ndyĩanĩwe nĩ kũka kwaku: ĩndĩ neena ndeto tũ
Luke7:8 Nĩkwĩthĩwa nyie nĩ mũndũ ũla wĩaĩawa
Luke7:9 Na Yesũ eew’a maũndũ asu
Luke7:10 Na ala matũmiwe
Luke7:11 Na kweethĩwa ĩvinda ĩnini yathela
Luke7:12 Na athengeea mbingĩlonĩ ya ndũa
Luke7:13 Na Mwĩaĩi amwona
Luke7:14 Na athengeea akiita mũsekeseke: na ala makuĩte maũngama. Nake asya
Luke7:15 Na ũla waĩ mũkw’ũ ekala nthĩ
Luke7:16 Na onthe makwatwa nĩ w’ĩa: na mamũkatha Ngai
Luke7:17 Na ũvoo ũsu wake wanyaĩĩka nthĩ yonthe ya Yutia
Luke7:18 Na amanyĩw’a ma Yoana mamũtavya maũndũ asu onthe.
Luke7:19 Na Yoana ameta elĩ ma amanyĩw’a make na amatũma kwa Mwĩaĩi
Luke7:20 Na yĩla aũme asu mavikie vala ũĩ
Luke7:21 Na saa ũsu avosya andũ aingĩ mowau na mothĩn’yo na maveva mathũku; na ililinda nyingĩ syasalukw’a metho.
Luke7:22 Na ĩndĩ asũngĩa amea
Luke7:23 Nĩ mũathime o ũla ũtakona ũndũ wa ũlulutĩkw’a nthĩnĩ wakwa.
Luke7:24 Na ala matũmiwe nĩ Yoana mamina ũthi
Luke7:25 Ĩndĩ mũnaendaa kwona kyaũ? Nĩ mũndũ wĩkĩe ngũa nduũku? Nĩmwenei
Luke7:26 Ĩndĩ mũnaendaa kũsisya kyaũ? Nĩ mwathani? Ĩĩ
Luke7:27 Ũsu nĩwe ũla waandĩkĩwe atĩĩ
Luke7:28 Nĩngũmũtavya atĩĩ
Luke7:29 Na andũ onthe
Luke7:30 Ĩndĩ Avalisi na amamyisya ma mĩao malea motw’io ma Ngai
Luke7:31 Na Mwĩaĩi asya
Luke7:32 Mavw’anene na syana ila syĩkalaa kĩng’ang’anĩ
Luke7:33 Nũndũ Yoana Mũvatisi nĩwũkĩte ateũya kĩmũtũ na ateũnyw’a mbinyu; na inyw’ĩ mwĩasya
Luke7:34 Mwana wa mũndũ nĩwũkĩte akĩya na akĩnyw’a; na inyw’ĩ mwĩasya
Luke7:35 Ũĩ nũtalĩlawa ũlũngalu nĩ syana syaw’o syonthe.
Luke7:36 Na ũmwe wa Avalisi enda aye lĩu nake. Na alika nyũmba ya Mũvalisi
Luke7:37 Na sisya
Luke7:38 na aũngama ĩtina vakuvĩ na maũũ make
Luke7:39 Na Mũvalisi ũla wamwĩtĩte oona ũu
Luke7:40 Na Yesu amũsũngĩa amwĩa
Luke7:41 Yesũ amwĩa Mũndũ ũmwe
Luke7:42 Nao meethĩwa mate na kĩndũ kya ũmũĩva
Luke7:43 Simoni amũsũngĩa
Luke7:44 Nake eethyũũĩa ũ mũndũ mũka
Luke7:45 Ndũnamumunya: ĩndĩ ũyũ yĩla nĩvotie
Luke7:46 Ndũnambaka mũtwe wakwa mauta: ĩndĩ ũyũ nĩwambaka maũũ makwa mauta.
Luke7:47 Kwondũ wa ũu nĩngũkũtavya
Luke7:48 Nake amwĩa ũla mũndũ mũka
Luke7:49 Na ala mailyĩ nthĩ nake makĩya lĩu mambĩlĩlya kũvindya ngoonĩ syoo
Luke7:50 Nake amwĩa mũndũ mũka
Luke8:1 Na kweethĩwa ĩvinda ĩnini yathela
Luke8:2 na aka amwe ala mavoiw’e maveva mathũkũ na mowau: ũmwe nĩ Meli ũla wetwa Makatalene
Luke8:3 na Yoena
Luke8:4 Na yĩla ĩkomano ĩnene yoombanie
Luke8:5 Mũvuĩi nĩwaendie kũvuĩa mbeũ syake: na akĩvuĩa
Luke8:6 Ingĩ syavalũka ĩvianĩ; na syamea na syooma
Luke8:7 Na ingĩ syavalũka mĩw’anĩ; na mĩw’a yameanĩsya vamwe nasyo
Luke8:8 Na ingĩ syavalũka mũthanganĩ mũseo
Luke8:9 Na amanyĩw’a make mamũkũlya
Luke8:10 Nake asya
Luke8:11 Na ngelekan’yo nĩyo ĩno: Mbeũ nĩ ndeto ya Ngai.
Luke8:12 Ala me ũtee wa nzĩa nĩmo ala mew’aa; na ĩndĩ ndevili akyũka
Luke8:13 Ala me ĩvianĩ nĩmo ala mew’aa
Luke8:14 Na ila syavalũkile mĩw’anĩ
Luke8:15 Ĩndĩ ila syĩ mũthanganĩ mũseo
Luke8:16 Vai mũndũ ũkwatasya taa na akokunĩkĩlya kĩndũ
Luke8:17 Nũndũ vai ũndũ ũvithe
Luke8:18 Ĩsũvĩei ĩndĩ ũndũ mũkwĩw’a; nũndũ ũla wĩ na kĩndũ
Luke8:19 Na ĩndĩ inyia na ana‐a‐inyia make mooka vala ũĩ
Luke8:20 Nake atavw’a
Luke8:21 Ĩndĩ asũngĩa na amea
Luke8:22 Na kweethĩwa mũthenya ũmwe wa matukũ asu
Luke8:23 Na makĩthi na ngalawa akoma: na kĩuutani kĩnene kyatheea ĩianĩ; na manzĩ mavota ngalawanĩ
Luke8:24 Na mathi vala ũĩ
Luke8:25 Nake amakũlya
Luke8:26 Na mavika nthĩ ya Akelasene
Luke8:27 Na yĩla waumie akinya nthĩ
Luke8:28 Nake amwona Yesũ
Luke8:29 Nũndũ nĩwawĩaĩe veva mũvuku wume mũndũnĩ ũsu. Nĩkwĩthĩwa mavinda maingĩ nĩwakwatawa nĩw’o: nake avingĩawa
Luke8:30 Na Yesũ amũkũlya
Luke8:31 Na ila ndaimoni syamwĩsũva mũno ndakasyĩe ithi ĩimanĩ yĩte kĩtulu.
Luke8:32 Na vo vaĩ ĩĩthya ya ngũlũe nyingĩ ikĩya kĩĩmanĩ: na ndaimoni syamwĩsũva inengwe ũthei wa kwilika syo. Nake ainenga ũthei.
Luke8:33 Na ndaimoni syauma mũndũnĩ
Luke8:34 Na ala maĩthasya ngũlũe moona ũndũ ũsu ũla weekĩka
Luke8:35 Na andũ maumaala mathi ũsisya ũndũ ũla wĩkĩkie; na mathi vala ve Yesũ
Luke8:36 Na ala moonie ũndũ ũsu mamatavya ũndũ ũnavoiw’e ũla waĩ na ndaimoni.
Luke8:37 Na andũ onthe ma nthĩ ya Akelasene ngalĩ syonthe mamwĩsũva aume kwoo; nũndũ makwatiwe nĩ w’ĩa mwingĩ; nake alika ngalawanĩ
Luke8:38 Ĩndĩ ũla mũndũ ũnaumiw’e ndaimoni amwĩsũva ekalan’ye nake: ĩndĩ amũeka athi
Luke8:39 Syoka nyũmba kwaku
Luke8:40 Na Yesũ asyoka
Luke8:41 Na sisya
Luke8:42 nũndũ aĩ na mwĩĩtu wake o ũmwe
Luke8:43 Na mũndũ mũka ũla waumawa nĩ nthakame myaka ĩkũmi na ĩlĩ
Luke8:44 athi ĩtina wake
Luke8:45 Na Yesũ akũlya
Luke8:46 Ĩndĩ Yesũ asya
Luke8:47 Na mũndũ mũka oona kana ndevithĩte
Luke8:48 Nake amwĩa
Luke8:49 Atanamba ũmina ũneena
Luke8:50 Ĩndĩ Yesũ eew’a ũu
Luke8:51 Avika nyũmba
Luke8:52 Na onthe meethĩwa makĩĩa na kũkũnanga ithũi: ĩndĩ nake amea
Luke8:53 Nao mamũthekeea mũno
Luke8:54 Nake
Luke8:55 Na veva wako wasyoka
Luke8:56 Na asyai mako maseng’a mũno: ĩndĩ amea matikatavye mũndũ ũla weekĩka.
Luke9:1 Nake ameta ala ĩkũmi na elĩ
Luke9:2 Na amatũma kũtavan’ya ũvoo wa ũsumbĩ wa Ngai
Luke9:3 Nake amea
Luke9:4 Na nyũmba o na yĩva ĩla mwĩvota
Luke9:5 Na ala mateũmũthokya
Luke9:6 Nao mathi
Luke9:7 Na mũsumbĩ Elote eew’a maũndũ asu onthe ala meekiwe: nake asũanĩwa mũno
Luke9:8 na angĩ
Luke9:9 Ĩndĩ Elote asya
Luke9:10 Na atũmwa yĩla masyokie mamũtavya maũndũ onthe ala meekie. Nake athi nao nzama
Luke9:11 Na andũ ma makomano mamanya
Luke9:12 Na syũa yambĩlĩlya ũthũa; na ala ĩkũmi na elĩ mooka
Luke9:13 Ĩndĩ amea
Luke9:14 Nũndũ maĩ andũ aũme ta ngili itano. Nake amea amanyĩw’a make
Luke9:15 Nao meeka ũu
Luke9:16 Nake oosa ila imũtũ itano na makũyũ elĩ
Luke9:17 Na maya
Luke9:18 Na kweethĩwa
Luke9:19 Mamũsũngĩa
Luke9:20 Nake amea
Luke9:21 Ĩndĩ amatavya
Luke9:22 akyasya
Luke9:23 Na ĩndĩ amea onthe
Luke9:24 Nĩkwĩthĩwa o ũla ũnũkwenda kũvĩtya thayũ wake akawasya; na o ũla ũkwasya thayũ wake kwondũ wakwa
Luke9:25 Nũndũ mũndũ aunwa nĩ kyaũ
Luke9:26 Nũndũ o ũla ũkambĩw’ĩa nthoni nyie na ndeto syakwa
Luke9:27 Ĩndĩ nĩngũmũtavya w’o
Luke9:28 Na kweethĩwa ĩtina wa ndeto isu o ta vandũ va mĩthenya nyanya
Luke9:29 Na akĩvoya
Luke9:30 Na sisya
Luke9:31 ala mamaumĩlĩle na ũtheu mũtisu
Luke9:32 Ĩndĩ Vetelo na ala maĩ nake makwatwa nĩ too mũnene: na mavindũka
Luke9:33 Na kweethĩwa yĩla mataanĩsye nake
Luke9:34 Na akĩneena ũu
Luke9:35 Na wasya wauma ĩthweonĩ
Luke9:36 Na wasya waneena ũu
Luke9:37 Na kweethĩwa ũnĩ ũsu
Luke9:38 Na ĩndĩ
Luke9:39 nake nũkwatawa nĩ veva
Luke9:40 Nakwa namesũva amanyĩw’a maku mawumye; na maemwa nĩw’o.
Luke9:41 Yesũ asũngĩa na asya
Luke9:42 Na kĩmwana kyũkĩte
Luke9:43 Na onthe maseng’a ũndũ wa ũnene wa Ngai. Na yĩla onthe maseng’ete nũndũ wa maũndũ onthe ala meekiwe nĩ Yesũ
Luke9:44 Ndeto ii ilike matũni menyu: nũndũ Mwana wa mũndũ nũkanenganwe mokonĩ ma andũ.
Luke9:45 Ĩndĩ maiaamanya ndeto isu
Luke9:46 Na ngananĩo yookĩla katĩ woo
Luke9:47 Ĩndĩ Yesũ amanya mosũanĩo ma ngoo syoo
Luke9:48 na amea
Luke9:49 Na Yoana asũngĩa na asya
Luke9:50 Ĩndĩ Yesũ amwĩa
Luke9:51 Na kweethĩwa
Luke9:52 na atũma andũ mathi mbee wake: nao mathi
Luke9:53 Nao matyaamũthokya
Luke9:54 Na amanyĩw’a make
Luke9:55 Ĩndĩ eethyũũa
Luke9:56 Na mathi mũsyĩ ũngĩ.
Luke9:57 Na makĩthi nzĩanĩ
Luke9:58 Na Yesũ amwĩa
Luke9:59 Na amwĩa ũngĩ
Luke9:60 Ĩndĩ amwĩa
Luke9:61 Na ũngĩ asya
Luke9:62 Ĩndĩ Yesũ amwĩa
Luke10:1 Ĩtina wa maũndũ asu Mwĩaĩi anyuva angĩ mĩongo mũonza
Luke10:2 Na amea atĩĩ
Luke10:3 Endai; na lĩlĩi
Luke10:4 Manyai ũkua ngusu ya mbesa
Luke10:5 Na o nyũmba ĩĩa mwĩlikaa
Luke10:6 Na ethĩwa vo ve mwana wa mũuo
Luke10:7 Na ĩkalai nyũmbanĩ ĩsu
Luke10:8 Na ndũa o na yĩva ĩla mwĩvotaa
Luke10:9 vosyai awau ala me vo
Luke10:10 Ĩndĩ ndũa o na yĩva ĩla mwĩvotaa
Luke10:11 O na kĩtoo kya ndũa yenyu
Luke10:12 Na ĩndĩ nĩngũmũtavya
Luke10:13 Woo nĩ waku
Luke10:14 Ĩndĩ Tile na Sitoni kũkethĩwa kwĩ kavaa ũsilĩlonĩ
Luke10:15 Naku Kavelinaumi
Luke10:16 Ũla ũmwĩw’aa inyw’ĩ
Luke10:17 Na ala mĩongo mũonza masyoka me atanu
Luke10:18 Nake amea
Luke10:19 Nĩmwenei
Luke10:20 Ĩndĩ manyai ũtana nũndũ ndaimoni niũmwĩnyivĩsya; ĩndĩ tanai nũndũ masyĩtwa menyu nĩmaandĩkĩtwe ĩtunĩ.
Luke10:21 Na saa ũsu Yesũ atana nthĩnĩ wa Veva Mũtheu
Luke10:22 Nĩnĩnengetwe maũndũ onthe nĩ Asa wakwa: na vai mũndũ wĩsĩ Mwana nũũ
Luke10:23 Na eethyũũĩa amanyĩw’a
Luke10:24 nũndũ nĩngũmũtavya
Luke10:25 Na ĩndĩ
Luke10:26 Nake amwĩa
Luke10:27 Asũngĩa
Luke10:28 Nake amwĩa
Luke10:29 Ĩndĩ we
Luke10:30 Yesũ amũsũngĩa na amwĩa
Luke10:31 Na kweethĩwa mũthembi ũmwe atheea na nzĩa ĩsu: na amwona
Luke10:32 Na Mũlivai ũmwe ta ũu
Luke10:33 Ĩndĩ Mũsamalia ũmwe
Luke10:34 na athi vala ũĩ
Luke10:35 Na ũnĩ ũsu aumya silingi ilĩ
Luke10:36 Wĩasya nĩ wĩva wa asu atatũ
Luke10:37 Nake asya
Luke10:38 Na yu makĩthi na nzĩa
Luke10:39 Nake aĩ na mwĩĩtu‐a‐inyia wetawa Meli
Luke10:40 Ĩndĩ Matha athĩniw’e nĩ wĩa; na athi vala ũĩ
Luke10:41 Ĩndĩ Mwĩaĩi amũsũngĩa
Luke10:42 ĩndĩ no ũndũ ũmwe wĩ vata: nũndũ Meli nũnyuvie kĩlungu kĩseo
Luke11:1 Na kweethĩwa
Luke11:2 Nake amea
Luke11:3 Tũnenge kĩla mũthenya lĩu witũ ũtwĩanĩe.
Luke11:4 Naku ũtũekee naĩ sitũ; nũndũ ithyĩ nĩtũũmũekea kĩla ũmwe ũla wĩ thiĩ naitũ. Na ndũkatũtwaae ũtatwanĩ.
Luke11:5 Nake amakũlya
Luke11:6 nũndũ mũnyanyawa nĩwoka auma kyalo
Luke11:7 Na ũla wĩ nthĩnĩ akamũsũngĩa
Luke11:8 Nĩngũmwĩa
Luke11:9 Nakwa nĩngũmũtavya
Luke11:10 Nũndũ ũla ũnũkũvoya nũnũũnengwa; na ũla unũũmantha nũnũkwona; na ũla ũnũũvingũsya nũnũũvingũĩwa.
Luke11:11 Nĩ wĩva wenyu
Luke11:12 Kana eetw’a ĩtumbĩ
Luke11:13 Ethĩwa inyw’ĩ ĩndĩ
Luke11:14 Nake aumya ndaimoni ĩla ĩtaneenaa. Na kweethĩwa
Luke11:15 Ĩndĩ amwe masya
Luke11:16 Na angĩ mamũtata
Luke11:17 Ĩndĩ nake
Luke11:18 Na ethĩwa Satani nĩwĩvathanĩtye ũu
Luke11:19 Nakwa ethĩwa numasya ndaimoni na vinya wa Veelisevuli
Luke11:20 Ĩndĩ ethĩwa nyie numasya ndaimoni na kyaa kya Ngai
Luke11:21 Mũndũ wĩ vinya ũla ũkuĩte mĩio ya kaũ asũvĩaa nyũmba yake
Luke11:22 ĩndĩ yĩla ũla wĩ vinya kwĩ we wĩũka
Luke11:23 Ũla ũte ngalĩ yakwa ũsu e ũndũ nakwa; na ũla ũtombanasya nakwa nũnyaĩĩkasya.
Luke11:24 Veva mũvuku wauma mũndũnĩ
Luke11:25 Naw’o wooka
Luke11:26 Nĩvo ĩndĩ ũithi
Luke11:27 Na kweethĩwa
Luke11:28 Nake asya
Luke11:29 Na yila andũ aingĩ mambĩlĩlye kũmũmbanĩa
Luke11:30 Nũndũ o tondũ Yona watw’ĩkie wonan’yo kwa Anineva
Luke11:31 Na ũla mũsumbĩ mũndũ mũka wa ngalĩ ya ĩtheo
Luke11:32 Andũ ma Nineva makaũngama ũsilĩlonĩ vamwe na ũsyao ũũ
Luke11:33 Vai mũndũ ũnũũkwatya taa na kũvitha ĩimanĩ
Luke11:34 Taa wa mwĩĩ waku nĩ itho yaku: yĩla itho yaku yĩ ĩseo
Luke11:35 Ĩsũvĩe ĩndĩ
Luke11:36 Kwondũ wa ũu ethĩwa mwĩĩ waku w’onthe nĩwusũĩtwe nĩ kyeni
Luke11:37 Akĩneena ũu
Luke11:38 Na Mũvalisi oona ũu
Luke11:39 Na Mwĩaĩi amwĩa
Luke11:40 Inyw’ĩ atumanu
Luke11:41 Ĩndĩ nenganei motethyo ma syĩndũ ila mwĩ nasyo
Luke11:42 Woo nĩ wenyu Avalisi! Nũndũ nĩmumasya kĩlungu kya ĩkũmi kya mindi na laũ na syĩndĩ ingĩ sya ũvanda
Luke11:43 Woo nĩ wenyu Avalisi! Nũndũ nĩmwendaa ivĩla sya mbee masinakokenĩ
Luke11:44 Woo nĩ wenyu! Nũndũ mũtilyĩ ta mbũa itonekaa
Luke11:45 Na ũmwe wa amanyĩsya ma mĩao amwĩa
Luke11:46 Nake asya
Luke11:47 Woo nĩ wenyu! Nũndũ inyw’ĩ nĩmwakaa mbũa sya athani
Luke11:48 Ũu nĩw’o mũkũsĩĩa meko ma aaĩthe menyu na kũmetĩkĩla: nũndũ nĩmo mamoaie
Luke11:49 Kwondũ wa ũũ ũĩ wa Ngai nĩwaneenie
Luke11:50 nĩ kana nthakame ya athani onthe
Luke11:51 kuma nthakame ya Aveli kũvika nthakame ya Nzakalia
Luke11:52 Woo nĩ wenyu
Luke11:53 Na auma kw’o
Luke11:54 makĩmantha ũndũ wumĩte kanyw’anĩ wake mamũvinganĩsye naw’o.
Luke12:1 Na ĩndĩ ĩvinda yĩu
Luke12:2 Ĩndĩ vai ũndũ ũvw’ĩke
Luke12:3 Kwondũ wa ũu o ũla mwaneenee kĩvindunĩ ũkeew’ĩka kyeninĩ; na ũla mwaneenee na kĩwe tũsũmbanĩ twa nthĩnĩ ũkatavanĩw’a nyũmbanĩ ĩũlũ.
Luke12:4 Nakwa nĩngũmũtavya anyanyawa makwa
Luke12:5 Ĩndĩ nĩngũmũtavya ũla mwaĩle kũmũkĩa: Mũkĩei ũla ĩtina wa kũaa wĩ na vinya wa kwĩkĩa Ngienanĩ; ĩĩ
Luke12:6 Tũsũni tũtano tũithoow’a masendi elĩ? Na Ngai ndolwa nĩ kamwe katw’o.
Luke12:7 O na nzw’ĩĩ syonthe sya mĩtwe yenyu nĩ ndale. Manyai ũkĩa ĩndĩ: inyw’ĩ mwĩ vata kwĩ tũsũni twingĩ.
Luke12:8 Nakwa nĩngũmwĩa
Luke12:9 ĩndĩ ũla wĩngaĩaa mbee wa andũ akakaĩawa mbee wa alaĩka ma Ngai.
Luke12:10 Na ũla wĩmũneenea Mwana wa mũndũ ndeto
Luke12:11 Na yĩla makamũtwaa mbee wa ala ma masinakoke
Luke12:12 nũndũ Veva Mũtheu akamũmanyĩsya saa o ũsu ũndũ ũla mwaĩlwe nĩ kũneena.
Luke12:13 Na ũmwe wa ĩkomano amwĩa
Luke12:14 Ĩndĩ amwĩa
Luke12:15 Nake amea
Luke12:16 Na amatavya ngelekan’yo
Luke12:17 na avindya ngoonĩ yake
Luke12:18 Na asya
Luke12:19 Na ĩndĩ ngatavya ngoo yakwa
Luke12:20 Ĩndĩ Ngai amwĩa
Luke12:21 Nĩw’o ũilyĩ mũndũ ũla wĩyũmbanĩasya isamũ
Luke12:22 Amea amanyĩw’a make
Luke12:23 Nũndũ thayũ ũvĩtũkĩte lĩu
Luke12:24 Sũanĩai ũvoo wa ngũngũũ
Luke12:25 Na kwenyu aĩva ũla ũtonya kwĩyongeleela ũasa wake mũkono ũmwe kwondũ wa kwĩmakĩa?
Luke12:26 Ĩndĩ ethĩwa mũtitonya kwĩka ũndũ ũla ũnini
Luke12:27 Sũanĩai ũvoo wa malaa ma lili
Luke12:28 Ĩndĩ ethĩwa Ngai nũvw’ĩkaa nyeki ya kĩthekanĩ ta ũu
Luke12:29 Nenyu manyai ũmantha kĩla mwĩya
Luke12:30 Nũndũ syĩndũ isu syonthe nimanthawa nĩ mbaĩ sya nthĩ: ĩndĩ Ĩthe wenyu nĩwĩsĩ mwĩ na vata wa syĩndũ isu.
Luke12:31 Ĩndĩ inyw’ĩ manthai ũsumbĩ wa Ngai
Luke12:32 Manyai ũkĩa
Luke12:33 Tai ila mwĩ nasyo mũnengane motethyo; tumai ngusu itakũaa
Luke12:34 Nũndũ vala ve ũthwii wenyu
Luke12:35 Mwĩthĩwe mwĩvotoete inyunyunĩ
Luke12:36 nenyu mwĩthĩwe ta andũ ala meteele vwana woo
Luke12:37 Nĩ ngathime ngombo ila ikethĩwa isyaĩĩsye vwana wasyo akyũka: nĩ w’o nĩngũmũtavya
Luke12:38 Na ethĩwa akooka ũsyaĩĩsyonĩ wa kelĩ
Luke12:39 Ĩndĩ manyai ũũ
Luke12:40 Nenyu ĩkalai mwĩyũmbanĩtye: nĩkwĩthĩwa Mwana wa mũndũ akooka saa ũla mũtataĩĩe.
Luke12:41 Na Vetelo akũlya
Luke12:42 Mwĩaĩi asya
Luke12:43 Nĩ ngathime ngombo ĩla ĩkethĩwa ĩkĩka ta ũu
Luke12:44 Nĩ w’o nĩngũmwĩa
Luke12:45 Ĩndĩ ethĩwa ngombo ĩsu ĩkasya ngoonĩ yayo
Luke12:46 vwana wa ngombo ĩsu akooka mũthenya ũla ĩtataĩĩe
Luke12:47 Na ngombo ĩla yesĩ ũndũ vwana wayo ũnũkwenda
Luke12:48 ĩndĩ ĩla ĩtesĩ
Luke12:49 Nĩnookie kwĩkya mwaki nthĩ; na ethĩwa nĩwakaniw’e nĩenda ata mbee?
Luke12:50 Nĩ na ũvatiso wa kũvatiswa naw’o; na nĩngũthingaatwa mũno kũvikĩa ũndũ ũsu wĩanĩw’e!
Luke12:51 Inywĩ’ mwĩasya nĩnookie kũete mũuo nthĩ? Nĩngũmũtavya
Luke12:52 nũndũ kuma yu vakeethĩwa andũ atano nyũmba ĩmwe makatanĩsya
Luke12:53 Makeethĩwa makĩtaanganĩsya
Luke12:54 Nake amea andũ ma ĩkomano
Luke12:55 Na yĩla mũkwona kĩseve kĩkyuma ngalĩ ya ĩtheo nĩmũkwasya
Luke12:56 Inyw’ĩ angangan’ya
Luke12:57 Na nĩkĩ inyw’ĩ ene mũtisilaa katĩ?
Luke12:58 Na yĩla ũendete na mũvinganĩsya waku kwa mũsili
Luke12:59 Nĩngũkwĩa
Luke13:1 Na ĩvinda yĩu kwaĩ amwe vo ala mamũtavisye ũvoo wa Akalilii
Luke13:2 Nake amasũngĩa amea
Luke13:3 Nĩngũmũtavya
Luke13:4 Kana mwĩasya ala ĩkũmi na nyanya ala matumbiwe nĩ nyũmba kũya Siloami
Luke13:5 Nĩngũmũtavya
Luke13:6 Nake aneena ngelekan’yo ĩno; Mũndũ ũmwe aĩ na mũkũyũ ũvandĩtwe mũũndanĩ wake wa mĩsavivũ; nake ooka akĩmantha makũyũ mũkũyũnĩ ũsu
Luke13:7 Na amwĩa mũĩmi wa mĩsavivũ
Luke13:8 Nake asũngĩa
Luke13:9 na ĩndĩ wasyaa
Luke13:10 Na mũthenya wa savato ekala ĩsinakokenĩ yĩmwe akĩmanyĩsya.
Luke13:11 Na sisya
Luke13:12 Yesũ amwona
Luke13:13 Na amwilĩĩla moko make: na kavinda kau aũngalala
Luke13:14 Na mũnene wa ĩsinakoke athata nũndũ Yesũ wavosya mũthenya wa savato
Luke13:15 Ĩndĩ Mwĩaĩi amũsũngĩa
Luke13:16 Na mũndũ mũka ũũ
Luke13:17 Na akĩneena maũndũ asu nthũ syake syonthe syasonoka; na ĩkomano yonthe yatana ũndũ wa maũndũ asu onthe maseo ala meekiwe nĩwe.
Luke13:18 Na ĩndĩ asya
Luke13:19 Ũtilyĩ ta mbeke ya kalatali
Luke13:20 Na ĩngĩ asya
Luke13:21 Ũilyĩ ta ĩlawa
Luke13:22 Nake aenda akyanganga ndũanĩ na mĩsyĩ
Luke13:23 Na mũndũ ũmwe amũkũlya
Luke13:24 Thetheesyai kũvotela mũomonĩ mũtheke: nũndũ nĩngũmũtavya
Luke13:25 Yĩla mwene wa nyũmba wĩũkĩla na kũvinga mũomo
Luke13:26 nĩvo mũkambĩlĩlya kwasya
Luke13:27 nake akasya
Luke13:28 Vo vakethĩwa kĩĩo na kũvevetan’ya maeo yĩla mũkona Avalaamu
Luke13:29 Na nĩmakoka kuma wumĩlonĩ wa syũa na ũthũĩlonĩ wayo
Luke13:30 Na sisyai
Luke13:31 Na saa o ũsu Avalisi amwe mathi vala ũĩ
Luke13:32 Nake amea
Luke13:33 Ĩndĩ nĩnaĩlwe nĩ kwĩthĩwa nzĩanĩ nĩendete ũmũnthĩ na ũnĩ na aũke: nũndũ ndũtonyeka mwathani kũaĩwa kũngĩ ate o Yelusaleme.
Luke13:34 Yelusaleme
Luke13:35 Nĩmwenei
Luke14:1 Na kweethĩwa mũthenya ũmwe wa savato yĩla wavotie nyũmbanĩ ya ũmwe wa anene ma Avalisi aye lĩu
Luke14:2 Na sisya
Luke14:3 Na Yesũ amasũngĩa amanyĩsya ma mĩao na Avalisi
Luke14:4 Ĩndĩ mekala makilĩtye. Nake amwosa ũ mũndũ
Luke14:5 Na amakũlya
Luke14:6 Nao maiaatonya kũmũsũngĩa maũndũ asu.
Luke14:7 Nake amatavya ngelekan’yo ala meetiwe
Luke14:8 Weetwa nĩ mũndũ mũtwaanonĩ
Luke14:9 na ũla wamwĩtĩe inyw’ĩ elĩ akooka na ũkwĩa
Luke14:10 Ĩndĩ weetwa
Luke14:11 Nũndũ ũla wĩnenevasya mwene nũkanyivw’a: na ũla wĩnyivasya mwene nũkanenevw’a.
Luke14:12 Na amwĩa ũla wamwĩtie
Luke14:13 Ĩndĩ wavoka mboka
Luke14:14 naku ũkeethĩwa mũathime; nũndũ mati na kĩndũ kya ũkũĩva: nũndũ ũkaĩvwa ũthayũũkyonĩ wa ala alũngalu.
Luke14:15 Na ũmwe ũla wekalĩte nake makĩya lĩu
Luke14:16 Ĩndĩ we amwĩa
Luke14:17 na saa wa kũya mboka wavika atũma ngombo yake ĩmatavye ala meetiwe
Luke14:18 Na onthe mambĩlĩlya kwĩmilanga na ngoo ĩmwe. Ũla wa mbee asya
Luke14:19 Na ũngĩ asya
Luke14:20 Na ũngĩ asya
Luke14:21 Na ngombo yooka
Luke14:22 Na ngombo yamwĩa
Luke14:23 Na vwana eea ĩ ngombo
Luke14:24 Nũndũ nĩngũmũtavya
Luke14:25 Na makomano manene maendan’ya nake: na eethyũũa
Luke14:26 Mũndũ akyũka kwakwa atamenete ĩthe wake
Luke14:27 O ũla ũtakuaa ngelan’yo yake
Luke14:28 Nũũ kwenyu
Luke14:29 Ndakese kwĩthĩa aaka wambĩlĩlyo
Luke14:30 makyasya
Luke14:31 Kana nĩ mũsumbĩ wĩva akĩthi kũkita na mũsumbĩ ũngĩ ũtambaa kwĩkala nthĩ na kũsũanĩa kana we
Luke14:32 Ethĩwa ti ũu
Luke14:33 Kwondũ wa ũu kĩla ũmwe wenyu ũla ũteũekana na syonthe ila wĩ nasyo
Luke14:34 Mũnyũ nĩ mũseo: ĩndĩ ethĩwa nũthelete mũsamo waw’o
Luke14:35 Ti mũseo wa kwĩkĩa mũũndanĩ kana vũũnĩ: ĩndĩ ũkekw’a ĩtheka. Ũla wĩ matũ ma kwĩw’a
Luke15:1 Na aumya ma koti onthe na ala athe mamũthengeea kũmwĩthukĩĩsya.
Luke15:2 Na Avalisi na aandĩki manyungunyĩsya
Luke15:3 Na amatavya ngelekan’yo ĩno
Luke15:4 Nĩ mũndũ wĩva kwenyu
Luke15:5 Na ayona
Luke15:6 Na avika kwake
Luke15:7 Nĩngũmũtavya
Luke15:8 Kana mũndũ mũka nĩ wĩva ũla wĩ na silingi ĩkũmi
Luke15:9 Na amyona
Luke15:10 O ta ũu
Luke15:11 Nake asya
Luke15:12 na ĩlumaita yamwĩa ĩthe
Luke15:13 Na matũkũ manini mavĩta
Luke15:14 Na yamina kwananga syonthe
Luke15:15 Na yathi kwĩkala kwa mũndũ ũmwe wa nthĩ ĩsu; nake ayĩnenga wĩa wa kũĩthya ngũlũe isesinĩ syake.
Luke15:16 Na kweethĩwa nĩyendaa kũvũnw’a nĩ mosyao ma mũtĩ wa mũkalavi ala ngũlũe syaĩsaa: ĩndĩ vaiaĩ mũndũ waayĩnenga.
Luke15:17 Na yĩla yavindũkie yasya
Luke15:18 Nĩngũkĩla nĩthi kwa asa wakwa
Luke15:19 na yu ndyaĩlĩtwe nĩ kwĩtwa mwana waku: mbĩkalya ta ũmwe wa athũkũmi maku.
Luke15:20 Na yookĩla yathi kwa ĩthe. Ĩndĩ yĩ kũasa
Luke15:21 Na ũla mwana amwĩa
Luke15:22 Ĩndĩ ĩthe asyĩa ngombo syake
Luke15:23 na etei kasalũ kala kanou
Luke15:24 nĩkwĩthĩwa mwana ũũ wakwa aĩ mũkw’ũ
Luke15:25 Ĩndĩ mwana wake ũla mũkũũ aĩ mũũndanĩ: nake athengeea nyũmba
Luke15:26 Na amwĩta ũmwe wa athũkũmi
Luke15:27 Nake amwĩa
Luke15:28 Ĩndĩ athata
Luke15:29 Ĩndĩ amũsũngĩa
Luke15:30 ĩndĩ yĩla mwana ũũ waku woka
Luke15:31 Nake amwĩa
Luke15:32 Ĩndĩ nĩtwaĩlĩtwe nĩ kũtana na kwĩw’a mũyo: nũndũ mũinau ũũ aĩ mũkw’ũ
Luke16:1 Na amea amanyĩw’a make
Luke16:2 Nake amwĩta
Luke16:3 Na ũla mũsyaĩĩsya aneena nthĩnĩ wake
Luke16:4 Nĩnĩsĩ ũndũ ngwĩka
Luke16:5 Na amwĩta kĩla mũndũ waĩ na thiĩ na vwana wake
Luke16:6 Nake asya
Luke16:7 Na amwĩa ũngĩ
Luke16:8 Na vwana wake akatha mũsyaĩĩsya ũla ũte mũlũngalu nũndũ nĩwĩkĩte na ũĩ: nũndũ ana ma nthĩ ĩno nĩ oĩ ũsyaonĩ woo kũte ana ma kyeni.
Luke16:9 Nakwa nĩngũmwĩa
Luke16:10 Ũla wĩ na kĩthito ũndũnĩ ũnini mũno
Luke16:11 Kwondũ wa ũu ethĩwa mũtyaaĩthĩwa na kĩthito na ũthwii ũla ũte wa ũlũngalu
Luke16:12 Na ethĩwa mũtyaĩ na kĩthito na syĩndũ sya mũndũ ũngĩ
Luke16:13 Vai mũthũkũmi ũtonya kũthũkũma mavwana elĩ; nũndũ akamena ũmwe
Luke16:14 Na Avalisi
Luke16:15 Nake amea
Luke16:16 Ĩla mĩao na athani maĩ kw’o kũvika Yoana: na kuma ĩvinda yĩu ũvoo mũseo wa ũsumbĩ wa Ngai nũtavanaw’a
Luke16:17 Ĩndĩ nĩ ũvũthũ ĩtu na nthĩ kũvĩta
Luke16:18 O ũla ũekaa mũka wake
Luke16:19 Kwaĩ mũndũ mũthwii ũmwe wekĩaa ngũa ĩilyĩ ta ndune na ya katane nzeo
Luke16:20 na kwaĩ mũndũ mũvoyi wa syĩndũ wetawa Lasalo
Luke16:21 nake endaa kũathĩw’a tũlungu tũla twavalũkangaa ũla mũthwii akĩya; o na ngitĩ nĩsyookaa kũmũnyenya itau syake.
Luke16:22 Na kweethĩwa
Luke16:23 Na e vala maveva ma akw’ũ mekalaa ookĩlya metho make
Luke16:24 Nake ookĩlya wasya
Luke16:25 Ĩndĩ Avalaamu asya
Luke16:26 Na vamwe na ũu w’onthe
Luke16:27 Nake asya
Luke16:28 nũndũ nĩna ana‐a‐ia makwa atano; nĩ kana amanenge ũkũsĩ
Luke16:29 Ĩndĩ Avalaamu asya
Luke16:30 Nake asya
Luke16:31 Nake amwia
Luke17:1 Nake amea amanyĩw’a make
Luke17:2 Nĩ ũseo kwake kwoveewa ngingo ĩvia ya ũthia
Luke17:3 Ĩsũvĩei ene: ethĩwa mwana‐a‐au eeka naĩ
Luke17:4 Na akũvĩtanĩsya mavinda mũonza mũthenya ũmwe
Luke17:5 Atũmwa mamwĩa Mwĩaĩi
Luke17:6 Na Mwĩaĩi asya
Luke17:7 Ĩndĩ kwenyu aĩva ũla wĩ na ngombo ĩla ĩnĩkwĩnza
Luke17:8 Kaĩ ndakamĩtavya
Luke17:9 Nake nũmĩtũngĩaa ngombo mũvea nũndũ nĩyĩkie maũndũ ala yĩaĩwe?
Luke17:10 Nenyu no ta ũu
Luke17:11 Na kweethĩwa yĩla maĩ nzĩanĩ makĩthi Yelusaleme
Luke17:12 Na aivota mũsyĩ ũmwe
Luke17:13 na mookĩlya mawasya moo
Luke17:14 Na amona
Luke17:15 Na ũmwe wamo
Luke17:16 na avalũka na ũthyũ maũũnĩ ma Yesũ
Luke17:17 Na Yesũ asũngĩa
Luke17:18 Kũtinoneka angĩ meũsyoka kũtaĩa Ngai
Luke17:19 Na amwĩa
Luke17:20 Na akũlw’a nĩ Avalisi yĩla ũsumbĩ wa Ngai wĩũka
Luke17:21 o na matikasya
Luke17:22 Nake amea amanyĩw’a
Luke17:23 Na makamwĩa
Luke17:24 nũndũ o tondũ ũtisi ũtisaa ngalĩ ĩmwe ya ĩtu
Luke17:25 Ĩndĩ mbee wa maũndũ asu ndatĩa kũthĩnw’a na mathĩna maingĩ na kũlewa nĩ ũsyao ũũ.
Luke17:26 Na o tondũ kweethĩiwe matukũ ma Noa
Luke17:27 Nĩmaĩsaa
Luke17:28 Now’o kweethĩiwe matukũ ma Loto: nĩmaĩsaa
Luke17:29 ĩndĩ mũthenya ũla Loto waumie Sotomo kwauie mwaki na mũvĩlĩtĩ kuma ĩtunĩ
Luke17:30 ũu now’o kũkethĩwa mũthenya ũla Mwana wa mũndũ ũkavuanw’a.
Luke17:31 Mũthenya ũsu ũla ũkethĩwa nyũmbanĩ ĩũlũ
Luke17:32 Lilikanai mũka wa Loto.
Luke17:33 O ũla ũkenda ũvĩtya thayũ wake akawasya: ĩndĩ o ũla ũkasya thayũ wake akoovĩtya.
Luke17:34 Nĩngũmwĩa
Luke17:35 Kũkethĩwa aka elĩ maithianĩa; ũmwe nũkoswa
Luke17:36 Andũ elĩ makethĩwa mũũndanĩ; ũmwe nũkoswa
Luke17:37 Na masũngĩa
Luke18:1 Amatavya ngelekan’yo mamanye nĩmaĩlwe nĩ kũvoya mĩthenya yonthe
Luke18:2 akyasya
Luke18:3 Na ndũanĩ ĩsu kwaĩ mũndũ mũka ũmwe ndiwa; nĩwaendangaa kaingĩ vala ũĩ aimwĩa
Luke18:4 Nake alea ĩvinda: na ĩtina wa ũu asya ngoonĩ yake atĩĩ
Luke18:5 ĩndĩ nũndũ mũndũ mũka ũũ ndiwa nũnũũnyamasya
Luke18:6 Na Mwĩaĩi asya
Luke18:7 Na Ngai ndakamaĩvanĩsya anyuve make
Luke18:8 Nĩngũmũtavya
Luke18:9 Amatavya ngelekan’yo ĩno nao ala metusaa ene alũngalu
Luke18:10 Andũ elĩ nĩmambatie ĩkalũnĩ kũvoya; ũmwe nĩ Mũvalisi
Luke18:11 Ũla Mũvalisi aũngama avoya ngooni yake
Luke18:12 Kyumwa kĩmwe nĩndĩĩaa ũya kelĩ; na nĩnumasya kĩlungu kya ĩkũmi kya kĩla kĩndũ nĩ nakyo.
Luke18:13 Ĩndĩ mumya wa koti aũngamĩte kũasa
Luke18:14 Nĩngũmũtavya
Luke18:15 Na mamũetee twana twoo tũnini
Luke18:16 Ĩndĩ Yesũ atwĩta tũke
Luke18:17 Nĩ w’o nĩngũmwĩa
Luke18:18 Na mũnene ũmwe amũkũlya
Luke18:19 Na Yesũ amwia
Luke18:20 Nũmĩsĩ ĩla mĩao
Luke18:21 Nake asya
Luke18:22 Yesũ eew’a ũu
Luke18:23 Na eew’a ndeto isu
Luke18:24 Na Yesũ amũketeea na asya
Luke18:25 Nũndũ nĩ ũvũthũ ngamĩle kũvotela kalimanĩ ka singano
Luke18:26 Na ala meewie masya
Luke18:27 Nake asya
Luke18:28 Nĩvo Vetelo waisye
Luke18:29 Nake amea
Luke18:30 ũtakosa vandũ va kĩmwe nyingĩ ĩvindanĩ yĩĩ twĩ nayo
Luke18:31 Na amomban’ya vala ũĩ ala ĩkũmi na elĩ
Luke18:32 Nĩkwĩthĩwa akanenganwe mokonĩ ma Andũ‐ma‐mbaĩ‐ingĩ
Luke18:33 na makamũvũa na kũmũaa: na mũthenya wa katatũ akathayũũka.
Luke18:34 Na maiaamanya
Luke18:35 Na kweethĩwa
Luke18:36 nakyo kyeew’a ĩkomano yĩvĩtĩte
Luke18:37 Nao makĩtavya nĩ Yesũ wa Nasaleti ũvĩtĩte.
Luke18:38 Nakyo kyookĩlya wasya
Luke18:39 Na ala matongoetye makĩkan’ya
Luke18:40 Na Yesũ aũngama
Luke18:41 Wĩenda ngwĩke ata? Na kyasya
Luke18:42 Na Yesũ akĩtavya
Luke18:43 Na kavinda o kau kyanengwa kwona
Luke19:1 Nake avota Yeliko avĩtĩla vo.
Luke19:2 Na sisya
Luke19:3 Nake nĩwendaa kũmwona Yesũ amanye nũũ; na aaĩwa nũndũ wa ĩkomano
Luke19:4 Nake asemba mbee
Luke19:5 Yesu avika vala vandũ
Luke19:6 Nake atheea nthĩ mĩtũkĩ
Luke19:7 Na moona ũu
Luke19:8 Na Sakayo aũngama
Luke19:9 Yesũ amwĩa
Luke19:10 Nũndũ Mwana mũndũ nĩwokie kũmantha na kũtangĩĩa kĩla kyaaie.
Luke19:11 Nao meew’a maũndũ asu
Luke19:12 Kwondũ wa ũu asya
Luke19:13 Asyĩta ngombo syake ĩkũmi
Luke19:14 Ĩndĩ andũ make mamũmena
Luke19:15 Na kweethĩwa
Luke19:16 Na ĩla ya mbee yooka
Luke19:17 Na amĩtavya
Luke19:18 Na ĩla ya kelĩ yooka
Luke19:19 Nake amĩtavya o ta ĩla ĩngĩ
Luke19:20 Na ĩngĩ yooka
Luke19:21 nũndũ nĩnakũkĩie
Luke19:22 Amĩtavya
Luke19:23 nũndũ wa kĩ ĩndĩ waleile kwia mbesa syakwa venginĩ
Luke19:24 Na ĩndĩ amea ala maũngamĩte vo
Luke19:25 Nao mamwĩa
Luke19:26 Nĩngũmũtavya kana kĩla mũndũ ũkwete kĩndũ akanengwa; ĩndĩ ũla ũte na kĩndũ
Luke19:27 Ĩndĩ amaitha aa makwa ala matendaa nĩmasumbĩke
Luke19:28 Na amina kũneena maũndũ asu
Luke19:29 Na kweethĩwa
Luke19:30 akyasya
Luke19:31 Na mwakũlw’a nĩ mũndũ
Luke19:32 Na ala matũmiwe mathi
Luke19:33 Na makĩthasya ĩla ndena
Luke19:34 Na masya
Luke19:35 Nao mamĩtwaa kwa Yesũ: na mailĩĩla ngũa syoo ĩũlũ wa ndena
Luke19:36 Na akĩthi
Luke19:37 Na athengeea
Luke19:38 makyasya
Luke19:39 Na Avalisi amwe ala maĩ ĩkomanonĩ mamwĩa
Luke19:40 Nake asũngĩa
Luke19:41 Na avika vakuvĩ
Luke19:42 akyasya
Luke19:43 Ĩndĩ mĩthenya nĩyũkĩte kwaku
Luke19:44 na makakũvalũkya nthĩ
Luke19:45 Nake avota ĩkalũnĩ
Luke19:46 akĩmea
Luke19:47 Na amanyĩasya ĩkalũnĩ kĩla mũthenya. Ĩndĩ athembi anene na aandĩki na ala anene andũnĩ mamantha kũmũaa:
Luke19:48 na maaĩw’a nĩ ũndũ wa kwĩka; nũndũ andũ onthe nĩmateete matũ
Luke20:1 Na kweethĩwa mũthenya ũmwe
Luke20:2 na maneena nake
Luke20:3 Nake asũngĩa na amea
Luke20:4 Ũvatisi wa Yoana waumie ĩtunĩ kana waumie andũnĩ?
Luke20:5 Na masũanĩa ene kwa ene
Luke20:6 Ĩndĩ ethĩwa nĩtũkwasya
Luke20:7 Na masũngĩa kana matyĩsĩ kũla waumie.
Luke20:8 Na Yesũ amea
Luke20:9 Na ambĩlĩlya kũmatavya andũ ngelekan’yo ĩno: Mũndũ nĩwavandie mũũnda wa mĩsavivũ
Luke20:10 Na ĩvinda yavika atũma ngombo kwa ala aĩmi
Luke20:11 Na atũma ngombo ĩngĩ: nayo mamĩkũna
Luke20:12 Na atũma ĩngĩ ya katatũ: na mamĩuauĩkya
Luke20:13 Na ĩndĩ mwene wa mũũnda asya
Luke20:14 Ĩndĩ aĩmi mamwona
Luke20:15 Na mamwĩkya ũtee wa mũũnda wa mĩsavivũ
Luke20:16 Akooka na akaananga aĩmĩ asu
Luke20:17 Ĩndĩ amaketeea
Luke20:18 Mũndũ ũla wĩvalũka ĩũlũ wa ĩvia yĩu akavevenzeka; ĩndĩ o ũla yĩmũvalũkĩla
Luke20:19 Na aandĩki na athembi anene mamantha kũmũkwata o saa ũsu; na makĩa andũ: nĩkwĩthĩwa nĩmamanyie kana ĩla ngelekan’yo aneena nũndũ woo.
Luke20:20 Na mamwoveesya
Luke20:21 Na mamũkũlya
Luke20:22 Nĩkwosana na ĩla mĩao kũnenga Kaisali koti
Luke20:23 Nake amanya ũseleke woo
Luke20:24 Kwa mbon’yai silingi. Ĩ na mũvw’ano na ũandĩko waũ? Mamũsũngĩa
Luke20:25 Nake amea
Luke20:26 Na maiaatonya kũmũkwata na ndeto ila waneenee mbee wa andũ: na maseng’a ũndũ wa ũsũngĩo wake
Luke20:27 Na ĩndĩ ookĩwa nĩ amwe ma Asatukai
Luke20:28 na mamũkũlya
Luke20:29 Kwaĩ aũme mũonza ma inyia ũmwe: na ũla wa mbee atwaa mũka
Luke20:30 nake ũla wa kelĩ amwosa ũ mũndũ mũka:
Luke20:31 na ũla wa katatũ nake amwosa; no ta ũu onthe mũonza maiaatia kana
Luke20:32 Na ĩtina ũla mũndũ mũka nake akw’a.
Luke20:33 Uthayũũkyonĩ ĩndĩ akethĩwa e mũka wa wĩva wa asu? Nĩkwĩthĩwa onthe mũonza nĩmamũtwaĩte.
Luke20:34 Na Yesũ amea
Luke20:35 ĩndĩ ala matalĩtwe nĩmaĩlĩtwe nĩ ũvika nthĩ ĩya
Luke20:36 nĩkwĩthĩwa maitonya kũkw’a ĩngĩ: nũndũ mailyĩ o ta alaĩka; na nĩ ana ma Ngai
Luke20:37 Ĩndĩ ũndũ wa akw’ũ kana makathayũũkw’a
Luke20:38 We ti Ngai wa ala akw’ũ
Luke20:39 Na amwe maaandĩki masũngĩa
Luke20:40 Nũndũ vai ũmwe wamo waatata kũmũkũlya mokũlyo angĩ.
Luke20:41 Nake amakũlya
Luke20:42 Nũndũ Ndaviti mwene easya ĩvukunĩ ya Savuli
Luke20:43 Mũvaka natw’a amaitha maku kavĩla ka nyaĩĩ syaku.
Luke20:44 Ndaviti emwĩta Mwĩaĩi
Luke20:45 Na andũ onthe makĩthukĩĩsya amea amanyĩw’a make
Luke20:46 Ĩsũvĩei aandĩki
Luke20:47 ala maĩsaa nyũmba sya aka ndiwa
Luke21:1 Nake ookĩlya metho
Luke21:2 Na oona mũndũ mũka ndiwa
Luke21:3 Na asya
Luke21:4 nũndũ aa onthe meekĩa nthembo syoo nũndũ wa kwingĩvĩwa kwoo; ĩndĩ ũũ kuma ũkyanĩ wake eekĩa wĩkwatyo w’onthe wa thayũ ũla eĩ naw’o.
Luke21:5 Na amwe makĩneena ũvoo wa ĩkalũ
Luke21:6 Ũndũ wa syĩndũ ii ila mũkwona
Luke21:7 Na mamũkũlya
Luke21:8 Na asya
Luke21:9 Na yĩla mũkew’a ũvoo wa makaũ na ithokoo
Luke21:10 Na ĩndĩ amea
Luke21:11 na kũkeethĩwa itetemo nene sya nthĩ
Luke21:12 Ĩndĩ mbee wa maũndũ asu onthe
Luke21:13 Na maũndũ aa makeethĩwa ũkũsĩ wenyu.
Luke21:14 Kwondũ wa ũu ĩtw’ĩĩei ngoonĩ syenyu mũikasũanĩe mbee ũla mũkasũngĩa:
Luke21:15 nũndũ nyie ngamũnenga kanyw’a na ũĩ
Luke21:16 Ĩndĩ mũkanenganwe nĩ asyai menyu
Luke21:17 Na nĩmũkamenwa nĩ andũ onthe kwondũ wa syĩtwa yakwa.
Luke21:18 Ĩndĩ ũswĩĩ ũmwe wa mĩtwe yenyu ndũkaa.
Luke21:19 Kwondũ wa wũmĩĩsyo wenyu mũkavonokya mathayũ menyu.
Luke21:20 Ĩndĩ yĩla mwĩona Yelusaleme yeelingĩlwa nĩ ita
Luke21:21 Ĩvinda yĩu ala me Yutia makie mathi iĩmanĩ; na ala me nthĩnĩ wayo maume vo; na ala me ndee matikavote vo.
Luke21:22 Nũndũ matukũ asu nĩ ma ũĩvanĩsyo
Luke21:23 Woo nĩ wa ala aito na wa ala mekwongya mĩthenya ĩsu! Nũndũ kũkethĩwa ũnyamao mũnene nthĩ
Luke21:24 Nao makavalũkw’a kwa kũtemangwa na ũvyũ
Luke21:25 Na kũkethĩwa mawonan’yo syũanĩ na mweinĩ na ndatanĩ; na kũũ nthĩ kũkethĩwa ũnyamao wa mbaĩ
Luke21:26 andũ nĩmakatw’ĩka nda nĩ w’ĩa
Luke21:27 Ĩvinda yĩu nĩmakamwona Mwana wa mũndũ okĩte ĩthweonĩ na vinya na ũtheu mũnene mũtisu.
Luke21:28 Ĩndĩ yĩla maũndũ asu makambĩlĩlya kwĩkĩka
Luke21:29 Na amatavya ngelekan’yo: Sisyai mũkũyũ
Luke21:30 yĩla yambĩlĩlya kũthongoosya wenze
Luke21:31 No ta ũu nenyu
Luke21:32 Nĩ w’o nĩngũmwĩa
Luke21:33 Ĩtu na nthĩ nikavĩta: ĩndĩ ndeto syakwa itikavĩta.
Luke21:34 Ĩndĩ ĩsũvĩei
Luke21:35 nũndũ o ta ũu
Luke21:36 Ĩndĩ ĩkalai mũsyaĩĩsye matukũ onthe
Luke21:37 Na kĩla mũthenya amanyĩasya ĩkalũnĩ; na kĩla ũtukũ nĩwaumaa
Luke21:38 Na andũ onthe mamũokeaa ĩkalũnĩ kĩoko tene
Luke22:1 Na mboka ya kĩmũtũ kĩte ĩlawa yathengeea
Luke22:2 Na athembi anene na aandĩki mamantha nzĩa ya kũmũaa; nũndũ nĩmakĩaa andũ.
Luke22:3 Na Satani alika nthĩnĩ wa Yutasi ũla wetawa Isikalioti
Luke22:4 Nake athi
Luke22:5 Nao matana
Luke22:6 Nake eetĩkĩla
Luke22:7 Na mũthenya wa kĩmũtũ kĩte ĩlawa wavika
Luke22:8 Na atũma Vetelo na Yoana
Luke22:9 Na mamwĩa
Luke22:10 Nake amea
Luke22:11 Na mũkamwie mwene nyũmba
Luke22:12 Nake akamwon’ya nyũmba nene ya iũlũ yĩ na mĩio; seũvĩsyai vo.
Luke22:13 Na mathi na moona o ũndũ ũmatavisye: na maseũvya vasaka.
Luke22:14 Na saa wavika
Luke22:15 Na amea
Luke22:16 nũndũ nĩngũmũtavya
Luke22:17 Nake oosa kĩkombe
Luke22:18 nũndũ nĩngũmwĩa
Luke22:19 Nake oosa kĩmũtũ
Luke22:20 Na mamina kũya
Luke22:21 Ĩndĩ sisyai
Luke22:22 Nũndũ nĩ w’o Mwana wa mũndũ ethi
Luke22:23 Nao mambĩlĩlya kũkũlan’ya ene kwa ene
Luke22:24 Na veethĩwa ngananĩo katĩ woo
Luke22:25 Nake amea
Luke22:26 Ĩndĩ inyw’ĩ mũtikethĩwe mũily ũu: ĩndĩ ũla mũnene katĩ wenyu
Luke22:27 Nũndũ mũnene nĩ wĩva
Luke22:28 Ĩndĩ inyw’ĩ mwĩ ala mwĩkalanĩtye nakwa matatwanĩ makwa;
Luke22:29 nakwa nĩngũmwiĩa ũsumbĩ
Luke22:30 nĩ kana mũkaĩsaa na kũnyusaa mesanĩ yakwa ũsumbĩnĩ wakwa; na nĩmũkekalĩla ivĩla sya ũsumbĩ mũkĩsilĩla mbaĩ ĩkũmi na ilĩ sya Isilaeli.
Luke22:31 Simoni
Luke22:32 ĩndĩ nĩnakũvoyea
Luke22:33 Na amwĩa
Luke22:34 Na asya
Luke22:35 Na amakũlya
Luke22:36 Nake amea
Luke22:37 Nũndũ nĩngũmwĩa
Luke22:38 Na masya
Luke22:39 Na aumaala
Luke22:40 Na avika vo
Luke22:41 Nake ataanĩsya nao o ta vandũ va kwĩkya ĩvia; na atulya ndu avoya
Luke22:42 akyasya
Luke22:43 Na aumĩlĩlwa nĩ mũlaĩka kuma ĩtunĩ
Luke22:44 Nake kwa kwĩthĩwa aĩ na thĩna mũnene
Luke22:45 Na yĩla wokĩlile kuma kũvoyanĩ kwake
Luke22:46 na amea
Luke22:47 Na aineena
Luke22:48 Ĩndĩ Yesũ amwĩa
Luke22:49 Na yĩla ala maĩ nake moonie ũndũ ũla ũkwĩkwa masya
Luke22:50 Na ũmwe woo amĩtema ngombo ya mũthembi mũnene
Luke22:51 Ĩndĩ Yesũ asũngĩa na asya
Luke22:52 Na Yesũ amea athembi anene
Luke22:53 Mũiaambũkĩlĩlya moko yĩla naĩ nenyu kĩla mũthenya ĩkalũnĩ: ĩndĩ ũũ nĩw’o saa wenyu

Luke22:55 Na mavuva mwaki nza

John4:38 Nĩnamũtũmie mũkakethe kũla mũtaatethya wĩa: ala matethisye nĩ angĩ
John4:39 Na Asamalia aingĩ ma ndũa ĩsu mamwĩtĩkĩla nũndũ wa ndeto sya mũndũ mũka kũmatavya
John4:40 Na Asamalia mathĩ vala ũĩ

John5:1 Na ĩtina wa maũndũ asu kwaĩ mboka ya Ayuti; na Yesũ ambata Yelusaleme.
John5:2 Na Yelusaleme
John5:3 Na nthĩnĩ wamo yekalaa nguthu nene ya andũ awau
John5:4 Nũndũ kyathĩ kyavika
John5:5 Na vaĩ mũndũ ũmwe vo
John5:6 Na Yesũ amwona amamĩte
John5:7 Na ũla mũwau amũsũngĩa
John5:8 Yesũ amwĩa
John5:9 Na kavinda o kau
John5:10 Na ĩndĩno Ayuti mamwĩa ũla ũvoiw’e
John5:11 Nake amea
John5:12 Na mamũkũlya
John5:13 Na ũla wavoiw’e ndeesĩ ũla ũmũvoisye; nũndũ Yesũ nĩwevetie vau
John5:14 Na ĩtina Yesũ amũwĩla ĩkalũnĩ
John5:15 Na ũla mũndũ athi
John5:16 Na kwondũ wa ũu Ayuti mamũthĩn’ya Yesũ
John5:17 Ĩndĩ Yesũ amasũngĩa
John5:18 Kwondũ wa ũu Ayuti mathĩng’ĩĩsya kũmantha ũmũaa
John5:19 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Yesũ wamasũngĩie
John5:20 Nũndũ Ĩthe nũmwendete ũ Mwana
John5:21 Nũndũ o ũndũ Ĩthe nũthayũũkasya akw’ũ akamanenga thayũ
John5:22 Nũndũ Ĩthe ndasilĩlaa mũndũ
John5:23 nĩ kana onthe mamũtaĩae Mwana
John5:24 Nĩ w’o
John5:25 Nĩ w’o
John5:26 O ũndũ Ĩthe wĩ na thayũ nthĩnĩ wake mwene
John5:27 na amũnengete ũkũmũ wa ũsilĩla
John5:28 Mũikaseng’e kwondũ wa ũu: nũndũ saa nĩwũkĩte
John5:29 namo makauma; ala meekie moseo
John5:30 Nyie nĩ nyioka nditonya kwĩka ũndũ: ũndũ ũla nĩw’aa
John5:31 Ethĩwa nĩngwĩkũsĩĩa mwene
John5:32 Nĩ ũngĩ ũla ũngũsĩĩaa; na nĩnĩsĩ kana ũkũsĩ ũla ũngũsĩĩaa nĩ wa w’o.
John5:33 Nĩmwatũmanie kwa Yoana
John5:34 Ĩndĩ ũkũsĩ ũla nosaa ti kuma kwa mũndũ: ĩndĩ nĩngũneena maũndũ aa
John5:35 Nĩwe waĩ taa mwakanu ũla wakenaa; na inyw’ĩ mweetĩkĩla kũtanĩa nthĩnĩ wa kyeni kyake kavinda kanini.
John5:36 Ĩndĩ ũkũsĩ ũla nĩ naw’o nĩ mũnene kũvĩta ũla wa Yoana; nũndũ mawĩa ala Asa ũnengete nimamine
John5:37 Na Asa ũla wandũmie
John5:38 Na mũi na ndeto yake ĩtwĩe nthĩnĩ wenyu: nũndũ ũla ũtũmĩtwe nĩwe
John5:39 Mwĩmantha maandĩkonĩ
John5:40 na mũtyĩtĩkĩla kũka vala nĩĩ
John5:41 Ndyosaa ndaĩa kwa andũ.
John5:42 Ĩndĩ nĩnĩmwĩsĩ inyw’ĩ kana mũi na wendo wa Ngai nthĩnĩ wenyu.
John5:43 Nũkĩte syĩtwanĩ ya Asa
John5:44 Mũtonya kwĩtĩkĩla ata
John5:45 Mũikasye atĩ ngamũvinganĩsya kwa Asa: ve ũla ũmũvinganĩasya inyw’ĩ
John5:46 Nũndũ kethĩwa nĩmwamwĩtĩkĩlile Mose
John5:47 Ĩndĩ ethĩwa mũtyĩtĩkĩla maandĩko make
John6:1 Ĩtina wa maũndũ asu Yesũ athi mũingo ũla ũngĩ wa ũkanga wa Kalilii
John6:2 Na avikĩlwa nĩ andũ nguthu nene
John6:3 Na Yesũ ambata kĩĩmanĩ
John6:4 Na vasaka
John6:5 Na ĩndĩ Yesũ ookĩlya metho make
John6:6 Aneenaa ũu aimũtata: nũndũ we mwene nĩwesĩ ũndũ ũkilĩlye kwĩka.
John6:7 Vilivu amũsũngĩa
John6:8 Ũmwe wa amanyĩw’a make
John6:9 Vaa ve kavĩsĩ
John6:10 Yesũ asya
John6:11 Na ĩndĩ Yesũ oosa ila imũtũ; na atũnga mũvea
John6:12 Na mavũna
John6:13 Na kwondũ wa ũu moomban’ya
John6:14 Na ĩndĩ andũ moona kyama kyu Yesũ weka
John6:15 Na ĩndĩ Yesũ amanya kana makilyĩ kũka mamũtwae na vinya
John6:16 Ĩndĩ kwavika wĩoo. Amanyĩw’a make matheea ũkanganĩ;
John6:17 na malika ngalawanĩ
John6:18 Na ũkanga waĩ ũkyũkilangw’a nũndũ wa kĩseve kĩnene kĩiuutana.
John6:19 Na maĩ manatwaa ngalawa maĩli atatũ kana ana
John6:20 Nake amea
John6:21 Na kwa ũu meetĩkĩla alike ngalawanĩ: na ĩvinda yĩu ngalawa yavika nthĩ ĩla maendaa.
John6:22 Na ũnĩ ũsu ĩkomano yĩũngamĩte mũingo ũla ũngĩ wa ũkanga yoonie kana kũi kakalawa kangĩ
John6:23 (ĩndĩ kwookie tũkalawa tũngĩ tũmĩte Tivelia vakuvĩ na vala manaĩĩe imũtũ ĩtina wa Mwĩaĩi atũnga mũvea):
John6:24 na ĩndĩ andũ ma ĩkomano moona kana Yesũ nde vo
John6:25 Na mamwona e mũingo ũngĩ wa ũkanga
John6:26 Yesũ amasũngĩa
John6:27 Mũikathũkũmĩae lĩu ũla wanangĩkaa
John6:28 Na kwondũ wa ũu mamwĩa
John6:29 Yesũ amasũngĩa
John6:30 Na ĩndĩ mamwĩa
John6:31 Aasa maitũ nĩmaĩe lĩu wĩtawa mana weũnĩ; o ũndũ kũandĩkĩtwe
John6:32 Yesũ amea
John6:33 Nũndũ kĩmũtũ kya Ngai nĩ kĩla kĩtheeaa kuma ĩtunĩ
John6:34 Na ĩndĩ mamwĩa
John6:35 Yesũ amea
John6:36 Ĩndĩ namwĩa
John6:37 Kyonthe kĩla Asa ũnengae nĩkyũkaa kwakwa; na ũla wũkaa kwakwa ndikamwĩkya nza nongi.
John6:38 Nũndũ ndyaatheea kuma ĩtunĩ nĩke kwenda kwakwa
John6:39 Na kũũ nĩkw’o kwenda kwa ũla wandũmie
John6:40 Nũndũ kũũ nĩkw’o kwenda kwa Asa wakwa
John6:41 Kwondũ wa ũu Ayuti mamũnyungunyĩĩsya
John6:42 Namo masya
John6:43 Yesũ amasũngĩa
John6:44 Vai mũndũ ũtonya kũka kwakwa
John6:45 Nĩkũandĩkĩtwe maandĩkonĩ ma athani
John6:46 Ti atĩ ve mũndũ waamwona Asa
John6:47 Nĩ w’o
John6:48 Nyie
John6:49 Aaĩthe menyu mĩmaĩe lĩu ũla wĩtawa mana me weũnĩ
John6:50 Kĩĩ nĩkyo kĩmũtũ kĩla kĩtheeete kuma ĩtunĩ
John6:51 Nyie
John6:52 Na ĩndĩ Ayuti makananĩa ene kwa ene
John6:53 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Yesũ wameie
John6:54 Ũla ũnũũya nyama yakwa na kũnyw’a nthakame yakwa e na thayũ ũtathela; nakwa ngamũthayũũkya mũthenya wa mũminũkĩlyo.
John6:55 Nũndũ nyama ya mwĩĩ wakwa nĩ lĩu wa w’o
John6:56 Ũla ũnũũya nyama ya mwĩĩ wakwa na kũnyw’a nthakame yakwa
John6:57 O tondũ Asa ũla wĩ thayũ wandũmie
John6:58 Kĩĩ nĩkyo kĩmũtũ kĩla kyatheeie kuma ĩtunĩ: ti tondũ aaĩthe menyu maĩe
John6:59 Ndeto ii aneenee ĩsinakokenĩ
John6:60 Na ĩndĩ aingĩ ma amanyĩw’a make meew’a ũu
John6:61 Ĩndĩ Yesũ amanya nthĩnĩ wake kana amanyĩw’a make nĩmeũnyungunyĩsya kwondũ wayo
John6:62 Nata ĩndĩ ethĩwa mũkoona Mwana wa mũndũ akyambata kũla waĩ mbee?
John6:63 Na veva ũla ũnengae thayũ; mwĩĩ ndũtandĩthya kĩndũ: ndeto ila nĩneenete nenyu nĩsyo veva
John6:64 Ĩndĩ katĩ wenyu kwĩ amwe matekwĩtĩkĩla
John6:65 Na amea
John6:66 Kwondũ wa ũu amanyĩw’a make aingĩ masyoka na ĩtina
John6:67 Na ĩndĩ Yesũ amakũlya aia ikũmi na elĩ
John6:68 Simoni Vetelo amũsũngĩa
John6:69 Naitũ nĩtwĩtĩkĩlĩte na nĩtwisĩ kana wĩ Ũla Mũtheu wa Ngai.
John6:70 Yesũ amasũngia
John6:71 Amũwetaa Yutasi
John7:1 Na ĩtina wa maũndũ asu Yesũ angangaa Kalilii: nũndũ ndendaa kwanganga Yutia
John7:2 Na mboka ya Ayuti
John7:3 Na ana‐a‐inyia mamwĩa
John7:4 Nũndũ kũi mũndũ wĩkaa ũndũ avithĩte
John7:5 Nũndũ o na ana‐a‐inyia make maiamwĩtĩkĩlĩte.
John7:6 Kwondũ wa ũu Yesũ amea
John7:7 Nthĩ nditonya ũmũmena inyw’i; ĩndĩ nyie ninĩũmena
John7:8 Ambataiinyw’i mũthi mbokanĩ: ndikwambata oyu mbokanĩ ĩno; nũndũ ĩvinda yakwa yĩinamba kwĩanĩa.
John7:9 Na amatavya maũndũ asu
John7:10 Ĩndĩ yĩla ana‐a‐inyia maĩ manambata mbokanĩ
John7:11 Na Ayuti meethĩwa makĩmũmantha mbokanĩ
John7:12 Na kwaĩ mũnyungunyĩsyo mũnene katĩ wa makomano nũndũ wake: amwe masya
John7:13 Ĩndĩ vai mũndũ waneenaa ũvoo wake aumĩlĩtye vyũ nĩ kũmakia Ayuti.
John7:14 Na ĩvinda ya mboka yavika katĩ
John7:15 Na Ayuti maseng’a
John7:16 Kwa ũu Yesũ amasũngĩa
John7:17 Ethĩwa mũndũ o na wĩva nĩwendaa kwĩka kwenda kwake
John7:18 Ũla ũneenaa ũndũ wake mwene emanthĩaa ndaĩa: ĩndĩ ũla ũmanthaa ndaĩa ya ũla wamũtũmie
John7:19 Ũla wamũnengie ĩla mĩao ti Mose? O na vai ũmwe wenyu ũla ũmĩkwataa ĩla mĩao. Nĩkĩ mũũmantha ũmbũaa?
John7:20 Na yĩla ĩkomano yamũsũngĩa
John7:21 Yesũ asũngĩa
John7:22 Mose amũnengie nzaĩko (tĩ atĩ yaumie kwa Mose
John7:23 Ethĩwa mũndũ nũkwaĩkwa mũthenya wa savato
John7:24 Mũikasile mũkĩtalĩlya
John7:25 Na ĩndĩ amwe ma Yelusaleme masya
John7:26 Indi sisyai
John7:27 Ĩndĩ nĩtwĩsĩ kũla mũndũ ũũ wumĩte: ĩndĩ yila Klĩsto ũkoka
John7:28 Ĩndĩ Yesũ ookĩlya wasya e ĩkalũnĩ
John7:29 Nyie nĩnĩmwĩsĩ; nĩkwĩthĩwa naumie kwake
John7:30 Na ĩndĩ mamantha ũmũkwata: ĩndĩ vai mũndũ waamũtambũũkĩsya kw’oko
John7:31 Ĩndĩ andũ aingĩ ma ĩkomano mamwĩtĩkĩla; na masya
John7:32 Na Avalisi meew’a andũ ma ĩkomano mainyungunyĩĩsya maũndũ asu nũndũ wake; na ala athembi anene na Avalisi matũma makanga nĩ kana mamũkwate.
John7:33 Kwondũ wa ũu Yesũ asya
John7:34 Mũkamantha
John7:35 Na kwondũ wa ũu Ayuti maneena ene kwa ene
John7:36 Ũu nata ũkwasya
John7:37 Na ĩndĩ mũthenya wa kũmina
John7:38 Ũla ũnũũmbĩtĩkĩla
John7:39 Na aneenaa ũu kwondũ wa ũla Veva
John7:40 Na amwe ma ĩkomano meew’a ndeto isu
John7:41 Na angĩ masya
John7:42 Maandĩko maiaasya Klĩsto akauma ũsyaonĩ wa Ndaviti
John7:43 Na kwa ũu kwaya ũtilĩkangano ĩkomanonĩ nũndũ wake.
John7:44 Na amwe menda kũmũkwata; ĩndĩ vai mũndũ waamũtambũũkĩsya moko.
John7:45 Nĩvo ala makanga mamaalũkĩla athembi anene na ala Avalisi; namo mamakũlya
John7:46 Na ala makanga mamasũngĩa
John7:47 Na ĩndĩ Avalisi mamasũngĩa
John7:48 Ve ũmwe wa ala anene
John7:49 Ĩndĩ ĩkomano yĩĩ yĩtesĩ ĩla mĩao nĩumanĩe.
John7:50 Nikotemo (nĩ ũla waendie kwake ĩngĩ
John7:51 Mĩao yaitũ nĩsĩlĩlaa mũndũ
John7:52 Na mamũsũngĩa
John7:53 (Na menũka kĩla mũndũ nyũmbanĩ kwake:
John8:1 ĩndi Yesũ athi kĩĩmanĩ kya Mĩthata.
John8:2 Na kĩoko tene avota ĩngĩ ĩkalũnĩ
John8:3 Na aandĩki na Avalisi mamũetee mũndũ mũka wakwatiwe ũlaalaini; na mamũũngamya katĩ woo
John8:4 mamwĩa
John8:5 Na mĩaonĩ Mose atwĩaĩe kũaa ta ũyũ na mavia: wĩasya ata ĩndĩ
John8:6 Na waasya ũu
John8:7 Na mathing’ĩĩsya kũmũkũlya
John8:8 Na akunama ĩngĩ
John8:9 Namo
John8:10 Na Yesũ aũngalala
John8:11 Na amwĩa
John8:12 Na ĩndĩ Yesũ aneena namo ĩngĩ
John8:13 Na ĩndĩ Avalisi mamwĩa
John8:14 Yesũ amaswũngĩa na amea
John8:15 Inyw’ĩ mũsila kĩmwĩi; nyie ndisilĩlaa mũndũ.
John8:16 Na ethĩwa nĩngũsila
John8:17 Na mĩaonĩ yenyu nĩkũandĩkĩtwe kana ũmũsĩ wa andũ elĩ nĩ wa w’o.
John8:18 Nyie nĩngwĩkũsĩĩa mwene
John8:19 Na kwondũ wa ũu mamũkũlya
John8:20 Ndeto ii aneenie e vala valekelaw’a mbesa
John8:21 Na ĩndĩ amatavya ĩngĩ Nyie nĩngũthi
John8:22 Na ĩndĩ Ayuti masya
John8:23 Na amea
John8:24 Nũndũ wa ũu namwĩa
John8:25 Na ĩndĩ mamũkulya
John8:26 Nĩ na maũndũ maingĩ ma ũneena na ma ũsila ũndũ wenyu: ĩndĩ ũla wandũmie nĩ wa w’o; na maũndu ala neewie kwake
John8:27 Natyaamanya kana emawetea Asa.
John8:28 Na ĩndĩ Yesũ asya
John8:29 Na ũla wandũmie e wamwe nakwa; ndaandia nĩ nyioka; nũndũ mavinda onthe nĩkaa maũndũ ala mamwendeeasya.
John8:30 Akĩneena ndeto isu
John8:31 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Yesũ wameie Ayuti ala Ethĩwa inyw’ĩ mũkekalaa w’o;
John8:32 na mũkamanya ũla w’o
John8:33 Namo mamũsũngĩa
John8:34 Yesũ amasũngĩa
John8:35 Na ngombo ndĩkalaa nyũmbanĩ mavinda onthe: mwana ekalaa mavind onthe.
John8:36 Ethĩwa ũla Mwana akamũthasya
John8:37 Nĩnĩsĩ kana mwĩ ũsyao wa Avalaamu; ĩndĩ mwĩmantha ũmbũaa
John8:38 Nĩneenaa maũndũ ala noonie kwa Asa: o nenyu nĩmwĩkaa maũndũ ala mweewie kwa ĩthe wenyu.
John8:39 Mamũsũngĩa na mamwĩa
John8:40 Ĩndĩ yu nĩmũũmantha kũmbũaa
John8:41 Nĩmwĩkaa mawĩa ma ĩthe wenyu. Na mamwĩa
John8:42 Yesũ amea
John8:43 Nĩ ũndũ wa kĩ mũteũmanya ũndũ ngũneena? Nũndũ mũtitonya kwĩw’a ndeto yakwa.
John8:44 Ĩnyw’ĩ
John8:45 Ĩndĩ nũndũ nĩneenaa w’o
John8:46 Nũũ wenyu ũla ũkũsĩĩa ki kana nyie nĩ mwĩki wa naĩ? Ethĩwa nĩneenaa w’o
John8:47 Ũla wa Ngai nĩwĩw’aa ndeto sya Ngai: na kwondũ wa ũu mũtyĩw’aa
John8:48 Ayuti mamũsũngĩa
John8:49 Yesũ amasũngĩa
John8:50 Nakwa ndĩĩmantha ndaĩa yakwa mwene: kwĩ ũmwe ũla ũkumantha na nowe ũtusaa.
John8:51 Nĩ w’o
John8:52 Ayuti mamwĩa
John8:53 We
John8:54 Yesũ asũngĩa
John8:55 na inyw’ĩ mũiaamũmanya: ĩndĩ nĩnĩmwĩsĩ; na ethĩwa ngasya
John8:56 Ĩthe wenyu
John8:57 Ĩndĩ Ayuti mamwĩa
John8:58 Yesũ amatavya
John8:59 Nĩvo ĩndĩ moosie mavia mamũkime: ĩndĩ Yesũ eevitha
John9:1 Na avĩtĩte
John9:2 Na amanyĩw’a make mamũkũlya
John9:3 Yesũ amasũngĩa
John9:4 Mũvaka tũtethye mawĩa ma ũla wandũmie
John9:5 Ĩvinda yĩla nĩ kũũ nthĩ
John9:6 Na aneena ũu
John9:7 na amwĩa
John9:8 Na kwondũ wa ũu atũi
John9:9 Angĩ masya
John9:10 Na ĩndĩ mamũkũlya
John9:11 Amasũngĩa
John9:12 Na mamũkũlya
John9:13 Na mamũtwaa kwa Avalisi ũsu waĩ kĩlilinda tene.
John9:14 Na mũthenya ũsu waĩ wa savato yĩla Yesũ wauluile kataka
John9:15 Na kwondũ wa ũu Avalisi mamũkũlya ĩngĩ ũndũ wanengwa kwona. Na amea
John9:16 Na ĩndĩ amwe ma Avalisi masya
John9:17 Na ĩndĩ mamwĩa ĩngĩ ũla waĩ kĩlilinda
John9:18 Ĩndĩ Ayuti maiaaĩtĩkĩla ũvoo wake
John9:19 na mamakũlya
John9:20 Asyai make masũngĩa
John9:21 ĩndĩ kĩla kĩtumaa ona yu
John9:22 Asyai make maisye ũu
John9:23 Kwondũ wa ũu asyai make masya
John9:24 Na ĩndĩ mamwĩta ũla mũndũ wai kĩlilinda
John9:25 Ĩndĩ nake asũngĩa
John9:26 Na ĩndĩ mamũkũlya
John9:27 Amasũngĩa
John9:28 Na ĩndĩ mamũuma
John9:29 Nĩtwĩsĩ kana Ngai nĩwaneenie na Mose: ĩndĩ tũtyisi vala mũndũ ũũ wumite.
John9:30 Ũla mũndũ amasũngĩa
John9:31 Nĩtwĩsĩ kana Ngai ndamew’aa andũ athe: ethĩwa mũndũ o na wĩva ni mũthaithi wa Ngai
John9:32 Kuma mwambĩlĩlyonĩ kũiaaĩw’ĩka kana ve mũndũ waasalukya ũngĩ metho
John9:33 Kethĩwa ũsu ndaumĩte kwa Ngai
John9:34 Na mamũsũngĩa
John9:35 Na Yesũ eew’a kana nĩmamwĩkisye nza; na amwona
John9:36 Amũsũngĩa
John9:37 Yesũ amwĩa
John9:38 Na asya
John9:39 Na Yesũ asya
John9:40 Na amwe ma Avalisi ala maĩ nake meew’a ndeto isu
John9:41 Yesũ amea
John10:1 Nĩ w’o
John10:2 Ĩndĩ ũla ũvotelaa mũomonĩ nĩwe mũĩthi wa malondu.
John10:3 Mũsũvĩi wa mũomonĩ nũmũvĩngũĩaa ũsu; na malondunĩmew’aa wasya wake: kĩla ilondu na syĩtwa yayo
John10:4 Na amaumaalya onthe ala make
John10:5 Na maivikĩlaa mũeni
John10:6 Yesũ amaelekanĩlya na ngelekan’yo ĩno: ĩndĩ maiaamanya maũndũ ala wamatavya.
John10:7 Na ĩndĩ Yesũ amea ĩngĩ
John10:8 Onhe ala mambie kũka mbee wakwa nĩ ing’ei na nĩ avutani: ĩndĩ malondu maiaamew’a.
John10:9 Nyie
John10:10 Kĩng’ei kĩtyũkaa
John10:11 Nyie
John10:12 Mũndũ wa ũtuvwa

John10:14 Nyie
John10:15 o ũndũ Asa ũmbĩsĩ
John10:16 Nakwa nĩ na malondu angĩ mate ma ĩĩthya yĩĩ: asu namo nditĩa ũmaete
John10:17 Kwondũ wa ũu Asa nũmbendete
John10:18 Vai mũndũ ũnũũmbena thayũ
John10:19 Na kwookĩla ĩngĩ ũtilĩkangano katĩ wa Ayuti nũndũ wa ndeto isu.
John10:20 Na aingĩ moo masya
John10:21 Angĩ masya
John10:22 Na kwaĩ mboka ya kũlilikana ũthesyo wa ĩkalu
John10:23 na Yesũ angangaa ĩkalũnĩ valasyanĩ wa Solomoni.
John10:24 Na ĩndĩ Ayuti mamũthyũlũlũka
John10:25 Yesũ amasũngĩa
John10:26 Ĩndĩ mũtikwĩtĩkĩla
John10:27 Malondu makwa nĩmew’aa wasya wakwa
John10:28 nakwa nĩngũmanenga thayũ ũthathela; na maĩkaa o na ĩndĩĩ
John10:29 Asa wakwa
John10:30 Nyie na Asa twĩ ũmwe.
John10:31 Na Ayuti moosa mavia ĩngĩ mamũkime.
John10:32 Yesũ amasũngĩa
John10:33 Ayuti mamũsũngĩa
John10:34 Yesũ amasũngĩa
John10:35 Ethĩwa nĩwametie ngai
John10:36 mwĩneenea ũla wavathaniw’e na watũmiwe kũũ nthĩ nĩ Ĩthe
John10:37 Ethĩwa ndyĩkaa mawĩa ma Asa wakwa
John10:38 Ĩndĩ ethĩwa nĩngũmeka
John10:39 Na meethĩwa makĩmantha ĩngĩ kũmũkwata: na auma mokonĩ moo.
John10:40 Na athi ĩngĩ mũingo wa ũsĩ wa Yolotani vala Yoana wavatisĩaa ĩvinda ya mbee; na ekala vo.
John10:41 Na aingĩ mathi vala ũĩ
John10:42 Na aingĩ mamwĩtĩkĩlĩla kũu.
John11:1 Kwaĩ mũndũ ũmwe mũwau
John11:2 Nĩ Meli ũsu ũla wamũvakie Mwĩaĩi mauta me mũuke mũseo
John11:3 Nũndũ wa ũu eĩtũ‐a‐inyia mamũtũmana
John11:4 Na Yesũ eew’a ũu
John11:5 Na Yesũ nĩwamwendete Matha
John11:6 Na eew’a kana nĩ mũwau
John11:7 Nĩvo ĩndĩ ĩtina wa ũu wameie amanyĩw’a
John11:8 Amanyĩw’a manwĩa
John11:9 Yesũ asũngĩa
John11:10 Ĩndĩ ethĩwa mũndũ ethi na ũtukũ
John11:11 Aneena maũndũ asu: na ĩtina amea
John11:12 Na ĩndĩ amanyĩw’a make mamwĩa
John11:13 Ĩndĩ Yesũ aneenaa ũndũ wa kikw’ũ kyake: ĩndĩ nĩmaisye eneena ũndũ wa kũkoma too.
John11:14 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Yesũ wamatavya vyũ

John11:41 Na ĩndĩ maveta yĩla ĩvia. Na Yesũ aũngalalya metho

John11:44 Ũla eĩ mũkw’ũ aumaala

John12:1 Na vatiele mĩthenya thanthatũ vasaka ũvike
John12:2 Na mamũseũvĩsya lĩu kw’o: na Matha nĩwe wanenganae lĩu; ĩndĩ Lasalo aĩ ũmwe wa ala mailyĩ nthĩ makĩya nake.
John12:3 Na ĩndĩ Meli oosa latili ũmwe wa mauta matheu
John12:4 Ĩndĩ mũmanyĩw’a ũmwe wake
John12:5 Nĩkĩ mauta mateĩ matewa silingi maana atatũ
John12:6 Ndaasya ũũ
John12:7 Na ĩndĩ Yesũ asya
John12:8 Nũndũ ngya mwĩ nasyo mavinda onthe; ĩndĩ nyie mũi nakwa mavinda onthe.
John12:9 Na ĩndĩ nguthu ya Ayuti yamanya kana e kw’o
John12:10 Ĩndĩ athembi anene masaman’ya mamũae Lasalo nake;
John12:11 nũndũ andũ aingĩ maumie kwa Ayuti kwondũ wake
John12:12 Na ũnĩ ũsu nguthu nene ĩla yaĩ ĩnavika mbokanĩ
John12:13 yoosa matũ ma makĩndũ
John12:14 Na Yesũ oona ndena ya ĩng’oi
John12:15 Ndũkakĩe
John12:16 Maũndũ asu amanyĩw’a make maiaamanya mbee: ĩndĩ yĩla Yesũ wesie kũtaĩwa
John12:17 Na indĩ nguthu ĩla yaĩ nake yĩla wamwĩtie Lasalo aume mbũanĩ na amũthayũũkya kwa akw’ũ
John12:18 Na kwondũ wa ũu nguthu yaendie kũmũthaũa
John12:19 Na ĩndĩ Avalisi masya ene kwa ene
John12:20 Na kwaĩ Akiliki amwe katĩ wa ala mambatie kũthaitha mbokanĩ:
John12:21 namo mathi vala ve Vilivu
John12:22 Na Vilivu athi amũtavya Andalea: na Andalea athi. E na Vilivu
John12:23 Na Yesũ amasũngĩa
John12:24 Nĩ w’o
John12:25 Ũla wendaa thayũ wake nũnũkũwasya; na ũla ũmenaa thayũ wake e kũũ nthĩ akoosũvia kũvika thayũ ũtathela.
John12:26 Ethiwa mũndũ o na wiva nũnũũnthũkũma
John12:27 Na yu ngoo yakwa nĩnĩkũũũya; na nĩasya ata? Asa
John12:28 Asa
John12:29 Na ĩndĩ nguthu ĩla yaũngeme vo
John12:30 Yesũ asũngĩa na asya. Wasya ũsu ndũnoka kwondũ wakwa
John12:31 Oyu ũsililo wa nthĩ ĩno wĩ kw’o: oyu mũnene wa nthĩ ĩno akekw’a nza.
John12:32 Nakwa
John12:33 Aasya ũu
John12:34 Ĩkomano yamũsũngĩa
John12:35 Na ĩndĩ Yesũ amea
John12:36 Yĩla mwĩ na kyeni
John12:37 O na kau nĩwekie syama mbingĩ mbee wamo
John12:38 nĩ kana ndeto yĩanĩw’e
John12:39 Na nũndu wa ũu maiaatonya kwĩtĩkĩla
John12:40 Nĩwamatw’ĩkĩthisye ililinda
John12:41 Isaia aneenie maũndũ asu
John12:42 Ĩndĩ o na aingĩ ma anene nĩmamwĩtĩkĩlile; ĩndĩ kwondũ wa Avalisi maiaamumbũla
John12:43 nũndũ nĩmendaa ndaĩa ya andũ mbee wa ndaĩa ya Ngai
John12:44 Yesũ ookĩlya wasya mũnene na asya
John12:45 Na ũla ũnzyaasya nyie amũsyasya ũla wandũmie.
John12:46 Nĩnũkĩte kũũ nthĩ ni kyeni
John12:47 Na ethĩwa mũndũ o na wĩva nũkwĩw’a ndeto syakwa
John12:48 Ũla ũnũũndea
John12:49 Nũndũ ndyaaneena ũndũ wumĩte kwakwa mwene; ĩndĩ Asa ũla wandũmie
John12:50 Nakwa nĩnĩsĩ kana mwĩao wake nĩ thayũ ũtathela; na kwondũ wa ũu maũndũ ala ngũneena

John16:23 Na mũthenya ũsu mũtikangũlya ũndũ. Nĩ w’o

John17:1 Maũndũ asu Yesũ aneena; na ang’elelya metho make ĩtunĩ
John17:2 o ũndũ wamũnengie ũkũmũ wa kwĩaĩa andũ onthe
John17:3 Na thayũ ũtathela nĩw’o ũũ
John17:4 Ninĩkũtaĩĩte kũũ nthĩ
John17:5 Na yu
John17:6 Nĩnamaumĩlĩlye syĩtwa yaku andũ ala wanengie kuma kwa ala ma nthĩ: maĩ maku
John17:7 Na yu nĩmesĩ kana maũndũ onthe ala wanengie maumaa kwaku:
John17:8 nũndũ ndeto ila wanengie nĩnĩmanengete; na nĩmasyosie
John17:9 Nĩngũmavoyea: ndiũmĩvoyea nthĩ
John17:10 na syĩndũ syonthe ila syakwa nĩ syaku
John17:11 Na ndi kũũ nthĩ ĩngĩ
John17:12 Ĩvinda yĩla naĩ vamwe nao
John17:13 Na yu nĩngũka kwaku; na maũndũ aa nĩneena kũu nthĩ
John17:14 Nĩnĩmanengete ndeto yaku; na nthĩ nĩyamamenie
John17:15 Ndiũvoya nĩ kana ũmaumye kũũ nthĩ
John17:16 Namo ti ma nthĩ
John17:17 Mavahe methĩwe atheu nthĩnĩ wa ũla w’o: ndeto yaku nĩyo w’o.
John17:18 Tondũ wandũmie kũũ nthĩ
John17:19 Na kwondũ wamo nĩngwĩvatha

John18:26 Na imwe ya ngombo sya mũthembi mũnene

Acts4:31 Na mavoya
Acts4:32 Na nguthu ya ala meetĩkĩlĩte maĩ na ngoo ĩmwe na veva ũmwe: na vai ũmwe waasya kĩndũ o na kĩmwe kya ila waĩ nasyo nĩ kyake mwene; ĩndĩ maĩ na mũamba wa syĩndũ syonthe.
Acts4:33 Na atũmwa maumya ũkũsĩ woo wa kũthayũũka kwa Mwĩaĩi Yesũ na vinya mũnene: na mumo mũnene waĩ ĩũlũ wa onthe.
Acts4:34 Nũndũ vaiaaĩthĩwa ũmwe wamo waanyivĩwa nĩ kĩndũ: nĩkwĩthĩwa ala maĩ na nthĩ kana nyũmba syoo nĩmathooisye
Acts4:35 mawia maũũnĩ ma atũmwa: na maana kĩla mũndũ
Acts4:36 Na Yosevu
Acts4:37 aĩ na mũũnda

Acts5:4 Yĩla waĩ nayo ndĩaĩ yaku mwene? Na yathoow’a

Acts5:9 Ĩndĩ Vetelo amwĩa
Acts5:10 Nake avalũka oyu maũũnĩ ma Vetelo
Acts5:11 Na w’ĩa mũnene wooka ĩũlũ wa ĩkanisa yonthe
Acts5:12 Na syama nyingĩ na momakyo meekiwe andũnĩ na moko ma atũmwa: na onthe maĩ na ngoo imwe valasyanĩ wa Solomoni.
Acts5:13 Ĩndĩ ma ala angĩ vai mũndũ waatata kwĩkwatan’ya nao: ĩndĩ andũ mamataĩaa mũno;
Acts5:14 na etĩkĩli aingĩ mongeleka ngalĩ ya Mwĩaĩi
Acts5:15 o na kweethĩwa maimaumaalya awau moo kũmatwaa nzĩanĩ nene
Acts5:16 Na ĩngĩ kwoombana nguthu nene ya andũ ma ndũa ila ithyũlũlũkĩte Yelusaleme
Acts5:17 Ĩ ndĩ mũthembi mũnene ookĩla
Acts5:18 na mamakwata atũmwa
Acts5:19 Ĩndĩ mũlaĩka wa Mwĩaĩi avingũa mĩomo ya kolokolo na ũtukũ
Acts5:20 Endai
Acts5:21 Na meew’a ũu mavota ĩkalũnĩ kwĩ masangya
Acts5:22 Ĩndĩ makanga ala maendie matyaamethĩa kolokolonĩ; na maalũka
Acts5:23 maiasya
Acts5:24 Na mũnene wa ĩkalũ na athembi anene meew’a ndeto isu
Acts5:25 Na kwooka mũndũ ũmwe amatavya
Acts5:26 Na ĩndĩ ũla mũnene athi vamwe na makanga na mamaete
Acts5:27 Na mamaete
Acts5:28 aiasya
Acts5:29 Ĩndĩ Vetelo na atũmwa ala angĩ masũngĩa
Acts5:30 Ngai wa asaa maitũ nĩwamũthayũũkisye Yesũ
Acts5:31 Ĩndĩ we Ngai nũmũnenevetye kw’okonĩ kwake kwa aũme
Acts5:32 Na ithyĩ twĩ ngũsĩ sya maũndũ asu; na Veva Mũtheu nake no ta ũu
Acts5:33 Namo meew’a ũu matemwa ngoonĩ
Acts5:34 Ĩndĩ mũndũ ũmwe Mũvalisi
Acts5:35 Nake amea
Acts5:36 Nikwĩthĩwa mbee wa mĩthenya ĩno Theutasi nũnookĩlile
Acts5:37 Ĩtina wa mũndũ ũsu
Acts5:38 Yu nĩmwĩa inyw’ĩ
Acts5:39 ĩndĩ ethĩwa nĩ wa Ngai
Acts5:40 Na meew’a ndeto syake; na mameta atũmwa mbee woo
Acts5:41 Namo ĩndĩno mauma mbee wa nzama
Acts5:42 Na mĩthenya yonthe
Acts6:1 Na mĩthenya ĩsu
Acts6:2 Na ala ĩkũmi na elĩ mameta nguthu ya amanyĩw’a moke kwamo
Acts6:3 Kwondũ wa ũu
Acts6:4 Ĩndĩ ithyĩ tũkekalaa tũlũlũmĩle mboyanĩ na ũthũkũminĩ wa ĩla ndeto.
Acts6:5 Na ndeto ĩsu yendeesya ĩla nguthu yonthe: na mamũnyuva Sitivini
Acts6:6 na asu mamaia mbee wa atũmwa: na mavoya
Acts6:7 Na ndeto ya Ngai yeana; na ũtalo wa amanyĩw’a waingĩvw’a mũno Yelusaleme; na nguthu nene ya athembi yalika ũla mũĩkĩĩonĩ.
Acts6:8 Na Sitivini

Acts7:20 Na ivĩnda yĩu Mose asyawa
Acts7:21 na kekw’a ĩtheka
Acts7:22 Na Mose amanyĩiw’e ũĩ w’onthe wa Amisili; nake aĩ mwai ndetonĩ syake na mekonĩ make.

Acts7:24 Na akyona ũmwe wamo akĩnyamaw’a

Acts7:28 Wĩenda ũmbũaa

Acts8:1 Na Saulo oona nĩ ũseo kũawa kwake. Na mũthenya ũsu kwambĩlĩlya ũnyamao mũnene ĩũlũ wa ĩkanisa yĩla yaĩ Yelusaleme; na manyaĩĩkw’a onthe ivalonĩ sya Yutia na Samalia
Acts8:2 Na andũ ala mamũkĩaa Ngai mamwĩnzĩa Sitivini nthĩ
Acts8:3 Ĩndĩ Saulo aananga ĩkanisa mũno
Acts8:4 Kwondũ wa ũu asu ala manyaĩĩkĩtw’e maendaa maitavan’ya ũla ũvoo mũseo.
Acts8:5 Na Vilivu atheea alika ndũanĩ ya Samalia
Acts8:6 Na makomano meethukĩĩsye na ngoo ĩmwe maũndũ ala maneeniwe nĩ Vilivu
Acts8:7 Nĩkwĩthĩwa maveva mavuku nĩmamaumie aingi ala maĩ namo
Acts8:8 Na kweethĩwa ũtanu mũnene ndũanĩ ĩsu.
Acts8:9 Ĩndĩ kwaĩ mũndũ ũmwe
Acts8:10 na onthe mamwĩthukĩĩasya kuma ũla mũnini kũvika ũla mũnene mbee
Acts8:11 Na mamwĩthukĩĩasya
Acts8:12 Ĩndĩ meetĩkĩla Vilivu aitavan’ya ũla ũvoo mũseo wa ũsumbĩ wa Ngai na syĩtwa ya Yesũ Klĩsto
Acts8:13 Na Simoni nake mwene nĩwetĩkĩlile: na avatiswa ekalaa vamwe na Vilivu; na akyona syama na mavinya manene ala meekiwe aseng’a.
Acts8:14 Na atũmwa ala maĩ Yelusaleme meew’a kana Samalia nĩmosete ndeto ya Ngai
Acts8:15 nao

Acts11:1 Na atũmwa na ana‐a‐ĩthe ala maĩ Yutia meew’a kana Andũ‐ma‐mbaĩ‐ĩngĩ nao nĩmosete ndeto ya Ngai.
Acts11:2 Na Vetelo ambata Yelusaleme
Acts11:3 makĩmwĩa
Acts11:4 Ĩndĩ Vetelo ambĩlĩlya kũmon’ya nesa ũndũ ũsu
Acts11:5 Naĩ ndũanĩ ya Yova ngĩvoya: na nĩ toonĩ ũilyĩ ta kĩkw’ũ noona woni
Acts11:6 na ngĩketeea mũno
Acts11:7 Na neew’a naw’o wasya ũkĩmbĩa
Acts11:8 Ĩndĩ nyie nasya
Acts11:9 Ĩndĩ wasya wanzũngĩa ya kelĩ kuma ĩtunĩ
Acts11:10 Na ũndũ ũsu weekwa katatũ: na kyonthe kyakusw’a kyambatw’a ĩtunĩ.
Acts11:11 Na sisya
Acts11:12 Na Veva ambĩa nĩthi nao
Acts11:13 nake atũtavya ũndũ ũnoonie mũlaĩka aũngeme nthĩnĩ wa nyũmba yake
Acts11:14 ũla wĩkũtavya ndeto ila syĩkũtangĩĩa
Acts11:15 Na kweethĩwa ngyambĩlĩlya ũneena nao
Acts11:16 Na indĩ nalilikana ndeto ya Mwĩaĩi
Acts11:17 Ethĩwa ĩndĩ Ngai nũmanengete mũthĩnzĩo o ũla watũnengie ithyĩ
Acts11:18 Namo meew’a maũndũ asu
Acts11:19 Na ĩndĩ ala manyaĩĩkĩtw’e nũndũ wa ũnyamao ũla wookĩlile kwondũ wa Sitivini
Acts11:20 Ĩndĩ kwaĩ amwe moo
Acts11:21 Na kw’oko kwa Mwĩaĩi kwaĩ vamwe nao: na andũ aingĩ meetĩkĩla na mamwĩthyũũĩa Mwĩaĩi.
Acts11:22 Na ũvoo woo wavika matũnĩ ma ĩkanisa yĩla yaĩ Yelusaleme: nao mamũtũma Valanava avike Andiokia:
Acts11:23 nake yĩla wavikie
Acts11:24 nĩkwĩthĩwa we aĩ mũndũ mũseo

Acts19:23 Na ta ĩvinda yĩu kwookĩla kĩthokoan’yo kĩte kĩnini ũndũ wa ĩla Nzia.

Acts27:1 Na kwatw’ĩtwe kana tũende na ngalawa Italia
Acts27:2 Na twavota ngalawanĩ ya ku Atilamitio
Acts27:3 Na mũthenya wa kelĩ twavika Sitoni: na Yuliusi amwĩka Vaulo nesa
Acts27:4 Na twathi ĩngĩ na ũkanga kuma kw’o
Acts27:5 Na twakĩla ũkanga ũla wĩ ngalĩ ya Silisia na Vambilia
Acts27:6 Na ku ũla mũnene wa asikalĩ ĩana oona nga awa ya Ũalesandalia ĩendete Italia; na atũlikya vo.
Acts27:7 Na twathi kavola kavola mĩthenya mingĩ
Acts27:8 na twathi na vinya ũtee wakyo twavika vandũ vetawa Ũthũmũo Mũseo; na vakuvĩ na vo vaĩ ndũa yĩtawa Lasea.
Acts27:9 Na ĩvinda ĩasa yavĩta
Acts27:10 aimea
Acts27:11 Ĩndĩ ũla mũnene wa asikalĩ ĩana nĩwamethũkĩĩsye mũtwai na mwene wa ngalawa
Acts27:12 Na nĩkwĩthĩwa kĩthũmũo kĩtiaĩ kĩnene kya kwĩkala myei ya mbevo
Acts27:13 Na kĩseve kya ngalĩ ya ĩtheo kyauutana kavola
Acts27:14 Ĩndĩ ĩtina wa ĩvinda yĩte ĩasa
Acts27:15 na ngalawa yakwatwa nĩ kĩseve
Acts27:16 Na tũitwawa twavika ũtee ũla ũkilĩtye wa kĩthama kĩnini kĩtawa Kauta
Acts27:17 na makatũlya ĩũlũ
Acts27:18 Naitũ tũkĩnyamaw’a mũno nĩ kĩuutani mũthenya wa kelĩ mambĩlĩlya kwĩkya mĩio ĩla makuĩte ũkanganĩ;
Acts27:19 na mũthenya wa katatũ mekya syĩndũ sya ngalawa na moko moo ene.
Acts27:20 Na syũa na ndata ityaatũkenea mĩthenya mingĩ
Acts27:21 Na mekalĩte ĩvinda ĩasa mateũya lĩu
Acts27:22 Na yu nĩmũtaa mwĩthĩwe mwĩ kwa ũmwe anyiau; nũndũ kũikethĩwa kwaa thayũ kwa ũmwe katĩ wenyu
Acts27:23 Nũndũ ũtukũ ũũ wa ũmũnthĩ mũlaĩka wa Ngai ũla nĩ wake
Acts27:24 aiasya
Acts27:25 Kwondũ wa ũu
Acts27:26 Ĩndĩ tũitĩa kwĩkw’a kĩthamanĩ kĩmwe.
Acts27:27 Ĩndĩ ũtukũ wa ĩkũmi na kana wavika
Acts27:28 na mathima ũliku wa manzĩ
Acts27:29 Na tũikĩa tũikekw’e ngoongonĩ sya mavia
Acts27:30 Na atwai ma ngalawa makyenda kũkĩa kuma ngalawanĩ
Acts27:31 Vaulo amwĩa ũla mũnene wa asikalĩ ĩana na asikalĩ
Acts27:32 Na ĩndĩ asikalĩ matila makanda ma kakalawa
Acts27:33 Na kũikya
Acts27:34 Na kwa ũu nĩngũmwĩsũva mũye: nũndũ ũu nĩ kwondũ wa ũtangĩĩo wa mĩĩ yenyu: nũndũ vai ũsw’ĩĩ ũmwe wa mũtwe wa ũmwe wenyu o na wĩva wĩaa.
Acts27:35 Na aneena ũu
Acts27:36 Na ĩndĩ onthe matana
Acts27:37 Naitũ ithyonthe ala twaĩ ngalawanĩ ũtalo witũ wavikĩte andũ maana elĩ na mĩongo mũonza na thanthatũ.
Acts27:38 Nao maya mavũna
Acts27:39 Na kwakya
Acts27:40 Na matila ila nanga
Acts27:41 Ĩndĩ mavika vala vakomanĩe maũkanga elĩ
Acts27:42 Na kũsũanĩa kwa asikalĩ kwaĩ kũaa ovwa onthe
Acts27:43 Ĩndĩ ũla mũnene wa asikalĩ ĩana
Acts27:44 na ala angĩ
Acts28:1 Na twavonoka

Acts28:4 Na andũ ma kw’o moona ĩla nzoka ĩniinĩte kw’okonĩ kwake
Acts28:5 Ĩndĩ we amĩvuunzĩa ĩla nzoka mwakinĩ
Acts28:6 Ĩndĩ mo meeteela aimbe kana kũvalũka nthĩ mĩtũkĩ
Acts28:7 Na vakuvĩ na vandũ vau vaĩ mĩũnda ya mũndũ mũnene wa kĩthama wetawa Vuvilio; ũla watwosie
Acts28:8 Na kweethĩwa
Acts28:9 Na kweekwa ũu

Romans1:19 nĩkwĩthĩwa maũndũ ma Ngai ala mamanyĩkaa nĩ monan’ye nthĩnĩ woo; nũndũ Ngai nĩwamonisye.

Romans1:21 nĩkwĩthĩwa
Romans1:22 Kwĩyĩta amanyi

Romans2:1 Kwondũ wa ũu naku ndwĩ na wĩmilo
Romans2:2 Naitũ nĩtwĩsĩ kana ũsilĩlo wa Ngai nĩ kwĩanana na w’o ĩũlũ wa ala mekaa maũndũ ta asu.
Romans2:3 Naku mũndũ
Romans2:4 Kana we wĩvũthya wingĩ wa ũseo wake na wĩtũngi na wũmĩĩsyo
Romans2:5 Ĩndĩ kũatĩĩa wũmũ waku na ngoo yaku ĩte na wĩlilo wĩyiĩaa ũthatu wa mũthenya wa ũthatu na wa wonan’yo wa ũsilĩlo mũlũngalu wa Ngai:
Romans2:6 ũla ũkamũnenga kĩla mũndũ kwĩanana na meko make:
Romans2:7 kwa asu ala mekwĩyũmĩĩsya kwĩkaa nesa mamanthaa ndaĩa na nguma na maũndũ matanangĩkaa
Romans2:8 ĩndĩ kwa ala maetae ngananĩo
Romans2:9 thĩna na ũnyamao
Romans2:10 ĩndĩ ndaĩa na nguma na mũuo kwa kĩla mũndũ ũla wĩkaa nesa
Romans2:11 nũndũ Ngai ti mwendeesya wa andũ.
Romans2:12 Nũndũ onthe ala meekie nai ĩla mĩao ĩte vo makaaa vate ĩla mĩao; na asu onthe ala meekie nai me na ĩla mĩao makasilĩlwa na ĩla mĩao;
Romans2:13 nũndũ ti ewi ma ĩla mĩao alũngalu mbee wa Ngai
Romans2:14 (nũndũ yĩla Andũ‐ma‐mbaĩ‐ingĩ mate na ĩla mĩao mekaa maũndũ ala me nthĩnĩ wa mĩao kwa mũtuo woo
Romans2:15 nũndũ maũndũnĩ asu meonan’ya wĩa wa ĩla mĩao ũandĩkĩtwe ngoonĩ syoo
Romans2:16 mũthenya ũla Ngai ũkasilĩla syĩmbithĩ sya andũ
Romans2:17 Ĩndĩ ethĩwa we nĩwĩtawa Mũyuti na kwĩlingya ĩla mĩao
Romans2:18 na kũmanya kwenda kwake
Romans2:19 Na kũmanya nesa vyũ kana we mwene wĩ mũtongoi wa ililinda
Romans2:20 mũtai wa ala atumanu
Romans2:21 kwondũ wa ũu we ũla ũmanyĩasya ũngĩ
Romans2:22 We ũla waasya mũndũ ndakalaalae
Romans2:23 We ũla wĩkathĩĩaa nthĩnĩ wa ĩla mĩao

Romans2:25 Nũndũ nĩ w’o nzaĩko yĩ vata

Romans2:27 Na ethĩwa ũla wa mũtuo wa kũlea kwaĩkwa
Romans2:28 Nũndũ we ti Mũyuti ũla wĩ Mũyuti kwa ũvano wa ũtheinĩ: o na nzaĩko ti ĩla yĩ ũtheinĩ mwĩĩnĩ:
Romans2:29 ĩndĩ we nĩ Mũyuti
Romans3:1 Mũyuti ĩndĩ akĩlanĩtye kyau? Kana kũuna kwa nzaĩko nĩ kwaũ?
Romans3:2 Yĩ vata mũno na nzĩa syonthe: mbee nĩ kũĩkĩĩĩka na ndeto ila syaneeniwe nĩ Ngai.
Romans3:3 Nata ĩndĩ o na ethĩwa amwe matyaĩ na mũĩkĩĩo? Kũlea kwĩtĩkĩla kwoo kũkatw’ĩkĩthya kĩthito kya Ngai ta kĩte na ũtonyi?
Romans3:4 Aiee
Romans3:5 Ĩndĩ ethĩwa ũte ũlũngalu witũ nĩwonanasya ũlũngalu wa Ngai
Romans3:6 Aiee
Romans3:7 Ĩndĩ ethĩwa ũla w’o wa Ngai nĩwingĩvaa kũvikĩa kũtaĩwa kwake kwondũ wa ũvũngũ wakwa
Romans3:8 Na nĩkĩ tũikwasya
Romans3:9 Nĩkĩ ĩndĩ? Twĩ aseo kũvĩta ala angĩ? Aiee
Romans3:10 o tondũ kũandĩkĩtwe
Romans3:11 Kũi ũla wĩ na ũmanyi
Romans3:12 Onthe nĩmathũkĩte ũtee
Romans3:13 Mĩmeo yoo nĩ mbũa mbingũe; Nĩmaneenie ũkengani na nĩmĩ syoo: Ũoi wa syĩko wĩ ilomonĩ syoo:
Romans3:14 Makanyw’a moo nĩmausũĩte kĩumo na ũũ:
Romans3:15 Maũũ moo me mĩtũkĩ kwĩtĩkya nthakame;
Romans3:16 Wanangĩko na ũnyamao me moendelonĩ moo;
Romans3:17 Na nzĩa ya mũuo matyaamĩmanya:
Romans3:18 Kũmũkĩa Ngai kũi methonĩ moo.
Romans3:19 Na nĩtwĩsĩ maũndũ o na meva ala maneenawa nĩ ĩla mĩao
Romans3:20 nũndũ kwondũ wa meko ma ĩla mĩao vai mũndũ ũkatalĩlwa ũlũngalu mbee wake; nũndũ ũmanyi wa naĩ wũkaa kwondũ wa ĩla mĩao.
Romans3:21 Ĩndĩ yu ũlũngalu wa Ngai nĩwumĩlĩtw’e vate mĩao
Romans3:22 naw’o nĩ ũlũngalu wa Ngai ũla wosawa ũndũ wa kũĩkĩĩa Yesũ Klĩsto kwa onthe ala metĩkĩlaa; nũndũ kũi kĩvathũkan’yo;
Romans3:23 nũndũ onthe nĩmeekie naĩ
Romans3:24 nĩ kũtalĩlwa ũlũngalu mana nĩ mumo wake kwondũ wa wovosyo ũla wĩ nthĩnĩ wa Klĩsto Yesũ:
Romans3:25 ũla Ngai wambie ũmwia ethĩwe nthembo ya wĩw’anĩthyo
Romans3:26 kwa kwonan’ya ũlũngalu wake ĩvinda yĩĩ: nĩ kana ethĩwe mũlũngalu we mwene
Romans3:27 Kwĩkathĩĩa kũĩva ĩndĩ? Nĩ kũvingĩe nza. Kwondũ wa mwĩao wa mũthemba mwaũ? Wa meko? Aiee: ĩndĩ nũndũ wa mwĩao wa mũĩkĩĩo.
Romans3:28 Nĩtũkwona ĩndĩ kana mũndũ atalĩlwa ũlũngalu kwondũ wa kũĩkĩĩa vate meko ma ĩla mĩao.
Romans3:29 Kana Ngai nĩ Ngai wa Ayuti oka? Ti Ngai wa Andũ‐ma‐mbaĩ‐ingĩ nao? Ĩĩ
Romans3:30 ethĩwa nĩ w’o Ngai nĩ ũmwe
Romans3:31 Na ĩndĩ nĩtũkũtw’ĩkĩthya ĩla mĩao ta ĩte na ũtonyĩ kwondũ wa mũĩkĩĩo? Aiee

Romans5:1 Ĩndĩ twatalĩlwa ũlũngalu nũndũ wa mũĩkĩĩo

Romans5:3 Na ti ũu w’oka
Romans5:4 na wũmĩĩsyo ũetae ũlũmu; na ũlũmu ũetae wĩkwatyo;
Romans5:5 na wĩkwatyo ndũsonokasya; nũndũ wendo wa Ngai nĩwonoetwe ngoonĩ sitũ nĩ Veva Mũtheu ũla tũnengetwe.
Romans5:6 Nũndũ yĩla twaĩ onzu

Romans5:15 Ĩndĩ ũla mũthĩnzĩo ndũilyĩ ta yĩla ĩvĩtyo. Nũndũ ethĩwa aingĩ makwie nĩ ĩvĩtyo ya ũmwe
Romans5:16 Na ũla mũthĩnzĩo ndũilyĩ ta ũndũ ũla waumie ĩvĩtyonĩ ya mũndũ ũmwe ũla wavĩtisye: nũndũ ũsilĩlo waumie kwa ũmwe waete ũsilĩlo ũtw’ĩtwe
Romans5:17 Nũndũ ethĩwa kwondu wa ĩvĩtyo ya ũla ũmwe
Romans5:18 Ĩndĩ o tondũ ũsilĩlo ũtw’ĩtwe wookie ĩũlũ wa andũ onthe kwondũ wa ĩvĩtyo yĩmwe; o ta ũu kwondũ wa wĩko ũmwe wa ũlũngalu ũla mũthĩnzĩo wookie kwa andũ onthe
